Genesis1:1 Pachiyambi Mulungu adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi.
Genesis1:2 Dziko lapansi ndipo linali lopanda kanthu; ndipo mdima unali pamwamba pa nyanja; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unalinkufungatira pamwamba pa madzi.
Genesis1:3 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:4 Ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kuyerako kunali kwabwino; ndipo Mulungu analekanitsa kuyera ndi mdima.
Genesis1:5 Ndipo Mulungu anacha kuyerako Usana
Genesis1:6 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:7 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga thambo
Genesis1:8 Ndipo Mulungu analitcha thambolo Kumwamba. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:9 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:10 Ndipo Mulungu adautcha mtundawo Dziko lapansi; kusonkhana kwa madziko ndipo adatcha Nyanja: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino.
Genesis1:11 Mulungu ndipo anati
Genesis1:12 Ndipo dziko lapansi linamera udzu
Genesis1:13 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:14 Ndipo Mulungu anati
Genesis1:15 Zikhale zounikira m'thambo la kumwamba
Genesis1:16 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zounikira zazikulu ziwiri; chounikira chachikulu chakulamulira usana
Genesis1:17 Mulungu ndipo adaika zimenezo m'thambo la kumwamba
Genesis1:18 Nizilamulire usana ndi usiku
Genesis1:19 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:20 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:21 Mulungu ndipo adalenga zinsomba zazikulu ndi zoyendayenda zamoyo zakuchuluka m'madzi mwa mitundu yao
Genesis1:22 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa zimenezo
Genesis1:23 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa
Genesis1:24 Ndipo adati Mulungu
Genesis1:25 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndi ng'ombe monga mwa mtundu wake
Genesis1:26 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:27 Mulungu ndipo adalenga munthu m'chifanizo chake
Genesis1:28 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa iwo
Genesis1:29 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis1:30 ndiponso ndapatsa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi
Genesis1:31 Ndipo anaziona Mulungu zonse zimene adazipanga
Genesis2:1 Ndipo zinatha kupangidwa zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Genesis2:2 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri Mulungu anamaliza ntchito yonse anaipanga; ndipo anapuma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ku ntchito yake yonse.
Genesis2:3 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Genesis2:4 Imeneyo ndiyo mibadwo yao ya zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Genesis2:5 Ndi zomera zonse za m'munda zisanakhale m'dziko lapansi
Genesis2:6 koma inakwera nkhungu yotuluka pa dziko lapansi
Genesis2:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba munthu ndi dothi lapansi
Genesis2:8 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anabzala m'munda ku Edeni chakum'mawa; momwemo ndipo adaika munthu adamuumbayo.
Genesis2:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anameretsa m'nthaka mitengo yonse yokoma m'maso ndi yabwino kudya; ndiponso mtengo wa moyo pakati pa mundapo
Genesis2:10 Ndipo unatuluka m'Edeni mtsinje wakuthirira m'mundamo
Genesis2:11 Dzina la wakuyamba Pisoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Havila
Genesis2:12 golide wa dziko ali wabwino; ndimonso muli bedola ndi mwala wasohamu.
Genesis2:13 Dzina la mtsinje wachiwiri ndi Gihoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Kusi.
Genesis2:14 Dzina la mtsinje wachitatu ndi Tigrisi: umenewo ndiwo wakuyenda cha kum'mawa kwake kwa Asiriya. Mtsinje wachinai ndi Yufurate.
Genesis2:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anatenga munthuyo
Genesis2:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anamuuza munthuyo
Genesis2:17 koma mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa usadye umenewo; chifukwa tsiku lomwe udzadya umenewo udzafa ndithu.
Genesis2:18 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anati
Genesis2:19 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba ndi nthaka zamoyo zonse za m'thengo
Genesis2:20 Adamu ndipo anazitcha maina zinyama zonse
Genesis2:21 Koma Yehova Mulungu anamgonetsa Adamu tulo tatikulu
Genesis2:22 Ndipo nthitiyo anaichotsa Yehova Mulungu mwa Adamu anaipanga mkazi
Genesis2:23 Ndipo anati Adamu
Genesis2:24 Chifukwa chotero mwamuna adzasiya atate wake ndi amake nadzadziphatika kwa mkazi wake: ndipo adzakhala thupi limodzi.
Genesis2:25 Onse awiri ndipo anali amaliseche
Genesis3:1 Ndipo njoka inali yakuchenjera yoposa zamoyo zonse za m'thengo zimene anazipanga Yehova Mulungu. Ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:2 Mkaziyo ndipo anati kwa njoka
Genesis3:3 Koma zipatso za mtengo umene uli m'kati mwa munda
Genesis3:4 Njokayo ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:5 chifukwa adziwa Mulungu kuti tsiku limene mukadya umenewo
Genesis3:6 Ndipo pamene anaona mkaziyo kuti mtengo unali wabwino kudya
Genesis3:7 Ndipo anatseguka maso ao a onse awiri
Genesis3:8 Ndipo anamva mau a Yehova Mulungu alinkuyendayenda m'munda nthawi yamadzulo: ndipo anabisala Adamu ndi mkazi wake pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu pakati pa mitengo ya m'munda.
Genesis3:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaitana mwamunayo nati kwa iye
Genesis3:10 Ndipo anati
Genesis3:11 Ndipo anati
Genesis3:12 Ndipo anati mwamunayo
Genesis3:13 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:14 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu kwa njokayo
Genesis3:15 ndipo ndidzaika udani pakati pa iwe ndi mkaziyo
Genesis3:16 Kwa mkaziyo ndipo anati
Genesis3:17 Kwa Adamu ndipo anati
Genesis3:18 minga ndi mitula idzakubalira iwe; ndipo udzadya therere la m'thengo:
Genesis3:19 m'thukuta la nkhope yako udzadya chakudya
Genesis3:20 Ndipo mwamuna anamutcha dzina la mkazi wake
Genesis3:21 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anapangira Adamu ndi mkazi wake malaya azikopa
Genesis3:22 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu
Genesis3:23 Yehova Mulungu anamtulutsa iye m'munda wa Edeni
Genesis3:24 Ndipo anamuingitsa munthuyo; nakhazika akerubi cha kum'mawa kwake kwa munda wa Edeni
Genesis4:1 Ndipo mwamunayo anadziwa mkazi wake Heva: ndipo anatenga pakati
Genesis4:2 Ndipo anabalanso mphwake Abele. Abele anakhala mbusa wa nkhosa
Genesis4:3 Ndipo panali atapita masiku
Genesis4:4 Ndiponso Abele anatenga iyenso mwana woyamba wa nkhosa zake ndi mafuta omwe. Yehova ndipo anayang'anira Abele ndi nsembe yake:
Genesis4:5 koma sanayang'anire Kaini ndi nsembe yake. Kaini ndipo anakwiya kwambiri
Genesis4:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Kaini
Genesis4:7 Ukachita zabwino
Genesis4:8 Kaini ndipo ananena ndi Abele mphwake. Ndipo panali pamene anali kumunda
Genesis4:9 Yehova ndipo anati kwa Kaini
Genesis4:10 Ndipo anati
Genesis4:11 Tsopano ndiwe wotembereredwa kunthaka
Genesis4:12 pamene udzalima panthaka siidzaperekanso kwa iwe mphamvu yake: udzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis4:13 Ndipo Kaini anati kwa Yehova
Genesis4:14 Taonani
Genesis4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye
Genesis4:16 Ndipo Kaini anatuluka pamaso pa Yehova
Genesis4:17 Ndipo Kaini anamdziwa mkazi wake; ndipo anatenga pakati
Genesis4:18 Kwa Enoki ndipo kunabadwa Iradi; Iradi ndipo anabala Mehuyaele; Mehuyaele ndipo anabala Metusaele; Metusaele ndipo anabala Lameki.
Genesis4:19 Ndipo Lameki anadzitengera yekha akazi awiri: dzina lake la wina ndi Ada
Genesis4:20 Ndipo Ada anabala Yabala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo okhala m'mahema
Genesis4:21 Ndi dzina la mphwake ndilo Yubale; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo oimba zeze ndi chitoliro.
Genesis4:22 Ndipo Zila
Genesis4:23 Lameki ndipo anati kwa akazi ake
Genesis4:24 Ngati Kaini adzabwezeredwa kasanu ndi kawiri
Genesis4:25 Ndipo Adamu anadziwanso mkazi wake; ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna
Genesis4:26 Ndiponso kwa Seti
Genesis5:1 Ili ndi buku la mibadwo ya Adamu. Tsiku lomwe Mulungu analenga munthu anamlenga m'chifanizo cha Mulungu;
Genesis5:2 anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi
Genesis5:3 Ndipo Adamu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu
Genesis5:4 Masiku ake Adamu atabala Seti
Genesis5:5 Masiku ake onse anakhala ndi moyo Adamu anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai
Genesis5:6 Ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza zisanu
Genesis5:7 ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:8 masiku ake onse a Seti anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi ndi ziwiri; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:9 Ndipo Enosi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi anai
Genesis5:10 ndipo anakhala ndi moyo Enosi
Genesis5:11 Masiku ake onse a Enosi anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:12 Ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri
Genesis5:13 ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:14 masiku ake onse a Kenani anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:15 Ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu
Genesis5:16 ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:17 masiku ake onse a Mahalalele anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:18 Ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:19 ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:20 masiku ake onse a Yaredi anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri: ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:21 Ndipo Enoki anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu
Genesis5:22 ndipo Enoki anayendabe ndi Mulungu
Genesis5:23 masiku ake onse a Enoki anali mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi zisanu;
Genesis5:24 ndipo Enoki anayendabe ndi Mulungu; ndipo panalibe iye; pakuti Mulungu anamtenga.
Genesis5:25 Ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:26 ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo
Genesis5:27 masiku ake onse a Metusela anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu ndi zinai; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:28 Ndipo Lameki anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi ziwiri
Genesis5:29 namutcha dzina lake Nowa
Genesis5:30 ndipo Lameki anakhala ndi moyo atabala Nowa
Genesis5:31 masiku ake onse a Lameki anali zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis5:32 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu; ndipo Nowa anabala Semu ndi Hamu ndi Yafeti.
Genesis6:1 Ndipo panali pamene anthu anayamba kuchuluka padziko
Genesis6:2 kuti ana amuna a Mulungu anayang'ana ana akazi a anthu
Genesis6:3 Ndipo anati Yehova
Genesis6:4 Pa dziko lapansi panali anthu akulukulu masiku omwewo ndiponso pambuyo pake
Genesis6:5 Ndipo anaona Yehova kuti kuipa kwa anthu kunali kwakukulu pa dziko lapansi
Genesis6:6 Ndipo Yehova anamva chisoni chifukwa anapanga munthu pa dziko lapansi
Genesis6:7 Ndipo anati Yehova
Genesis6:8 Koma Nowa anapeza ufulu pamaso pa Yehova.
Genesis6:9 Mibadwo ya Nowa ndi iyi: Nowa anali munthu wolungama ndi wangwiro m'mibadwo yake; Nowa anayendabe ndi Mulungu.
Genesis6:10 Ndipo Nowa anabala ana amuna atatu
Genesis6:11 Ndipo dziko lapansi linavunda pamaso pa Mulungu
Genesis6:12 Ndipo Mulungu anaona dziko lapansi
Genesis6:13 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis6:14 Udzipangire wekha chingalawa cha mtengo wanjale; upangemo zipinda m'chingalawamo
Genesis6:15 Kupanga kwake ndi kotere: m'litali mwake mwa chingalawa mikono mazana atatu
Genesis6:16 Uike zenera m'chingalawacho
Genesis6:17 Ndine
Genesis6:18 Koma ndidzakhazikitsa ndi iwe pangano langa; ndipo udzalowa m'chingalawamo iwe ndi ana ako ndi mkazi wako
Genesis6:19 Ndipo zonse zokhala ndi moyo
Genesis6:20 Za mbalame monga mwa mitundu yao
Genesis6:21 Ndipo iwe udzitengereko wekha zakudya zonse zodyedwa
Genesis6:22 Chotero anachita Nowa
Genesis7:1 Ndipo anati Yehova kwa Nowa
Genesis7:2 Nyama zonse zodyedwa udzitengereko wekha zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis7:3 Ndiponso mbalame za kumlengalenga zisanu ndi ziwiri
Genesis7:4 Pakuti akapita masiku asanu ndi awiri Ine ndidzavumbitsa mvula pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; ndi zinthu zamoyo zonse zomwe ndazipanga ndidzaziononga pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis7:5 Ndipo anachita Nowa monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Yehova.
Genesis7:6 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu ndi limodzi
Genesis7:7 Ndipo analowa Nowa ndi ana ake ndi mkazi wake ndi akazi a ana ake m'chingalawamo
Genesis7:8 Nyama zodyedwa ndi nyama zosadyedwa
Genesis7:9 zinalowa ziwiriziwiri kwa Nowa m'chingalawamo
Genesis7:10 Ndipo panali pamene anapita masiku asanu ndi awiri
Genesis7:11 Chaka cha mazana asanu ndi limodzi cha moyo wa Nowa
Genesis7:12 Ndipo mvula inali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku.
Genesis7:13 Tsiku lomwelo analowa m'chingalawamo Nowa
Genesis7:14 iwo
Genesis7:15 Ndipo zinalowa kwa Nowa m'chingalawamo ziwiriziwiri zamoyo zonse
Genesis7:16 Zimene zinalowazo
Genesis7:17 Ndipo chigumula chinali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai: ndipo madzi anachuluka natukula chingalawa
Genesis7:18 Ndipo madzi anapambana
Genesis7:19 Ndipo madzi anapambana ndithu pa dziko lapansi; anamizidwa mapiri aatali onse amene anali pansi pa thambo lonse.
Genesis7:20 Madzi anapambana ndithu nakwera mikono khumi ndi isanu: namizidwa mapiri.
Genesis7:21 Ndipo zinafa zamoyo zonse zoyenda pa dziko lapansi
Genesis7:22 zonse zimene m'mphuno zao munali mpweya wa mzimu wa moyo
Genesis7:23 Ndipo zinaonongedwa zamoyo zonse zimene zinali pa dziko lapansi
Genesis7:24 Ndipo anapambana madzi pa dziko lapansi masiku zana kudza makumi asanu.
Genesis8:1 Ndipo Mulungu anakumbukira Nowa ndi zamoyo zonse
Genesis8:2 ndipo anatsekedwa akasupe a madzi aakulu ndi mazenera a kumwamba
Genesis8:3 ndipo madzi anaphweraphwerabe pa dziko lapansi: pamene anatha masiku zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu madzi anachepa.
Genesis8:4 Ndipo chingalawa chinaima pa mapiri a Ararati
Genesis8:5 Ndipo madzi analinkuchepa kufikira mwezi wakhumi; mwezi wakhumi tsiku loyamba mwezi ndipo padaoneka mitu ya mapiri.
Genesis8:6 Ndipo panali atapita masiku makumi anai
Genesis8:7 ndipo anatulutsa khungubwi
Genesis8:8 Ndipo anatulutsa njiwa imchokere
Genesis8:9 koma njiwayo siinapeza popondapo phazi lake
Genesis8:10 Ndipo analinda masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; natulutsanso njiwayo m'chingalawamo;
Genesis8:11 ndipo njiwa inadza kwa iye madzulo; ndipo
Genesis8:12 Ndipo analindanso masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; natulutsa njiwayo: ndipo siinabweranso konse kwa iye.
Genesis8:13 Ndipo panali chaka cha mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza chimodzi
Genesis8:14 Mwezi wachiwiri tsiku la makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri la mwezi
Genesis8:15 Mulungu ndipo ananena kwa Nowa
Genesis8:16 Tulukamoni m'chingalawamo
Genesis8:17 Tulutsa pamodzi ndi iwe zamoyo zonse zili ndi iwe za nyama zonse
Genesis8:18 Ndipo anatuluka Nowa ndi ana ake
Genesis8:19 zinyama zonse
Genesis8:20 Ndipo Nowa anamanga guwa la nsembe la Yehova; natengapo nyama zodyedwa zonse ndi mbalame zodyedwa zonse napereka nsembe zopsereza paguwapo.
Genesis8:21 Ndipo Yehova anamva chonunkhira chakukondweretsa; nati Yehova m'mtima mwake
Genesis8:22 Pakukhalabe masiku a dziko lapansi
Genesis9:1 Ndipo Mulungu anadalitsa Nowa ndi ana ake
Genesis9:2 Kuopsa kwanu
Genesis9:3 Zoyenda zonse zamoyo zidzakhala zakudya zanu; monga therere laliwisi ndakupatsani inu zonsezo.
Genesis9:4 Koma nyama
Genesis9:5 Zoonatu mwazi wanu wa miyoyo yanu ndidzafuna; pa dzanja la zinyama zonse ndidzaufuna: ndi pa dzanja la munthu
Genesis9:6 Amene akhetsa mwazi wa munthu
Genesis9:7 Ndi inu
Genesis9:8 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Nowa ndi kwa ana ake pamodzi naye
Genesis9:9 Ndipo Ine
Genesis9:10 ndi zamoyo zonse zili pamodzi ndi inu
Genesis9:11 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu; zamoyo zonse sizidzamalizidwanso konse ndi madzi a chigumula; ndipo sikudzakhalanso konse chigumula cha kuononga dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:12 Ndipo anati Mulungu
Genesis9:13 ndiika utawaleza wanga m'mtambomo
Genesis9:14 Ndipo padzakhala pophimba ndi mtambo Ine dziko lapansi
Genesis9:15 ndipo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa limene lili ndi Ine ndi inu
Genesis9:16 Ndipo utawo udzakhala m'mtambo; ndipo ndidzauyang'anira kuti ndikumbukire pangano lachikhalire lili ndi Mulungu ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:17 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis9:18 Ndi ana amuna a Nowa amene anatuluka m'chingalawa ndiwo Semu
Genesis9:19 Amenewa ndiwo ana amuna atatu a Nowa: ndiwo anafalikira dziko lonse lapansi.
Genesis9:20 Ndipo anayamba Nowa kukhala munthu wakulima nthaka
Genesis9:21 namwa vinyo wake
Genesis9:22 Ndipo Hamu atate wake wa Kanani
Genesis9:23 Semu ndi Yafeti ndipo anatenga chofunda
Genesis9:24 Nowa ndipo anauka kwa kuledzera kwake
Genesis9:25 Ndipo anati
Genesis9:26 Ndipo anati
Genesis9:27 Mulungu akuze Yafeti
Genesis9:28 Ndipo Nowa anakhala ndi moyo chigumula chitapita
Genesis9:29 Ndipo masiku onse a Nowa anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu: ndipo anamwalira.
Genesis10:1 Mibadwo ya ana a Nowa
Genesis10:2 Ana amuna a Yafeti: Gomeri
Genesis10:3 Ndi ana amuna a Gomeri: Asikenazi
Genesis10:4 Ndi ana amuna a Yavani: Elisa
Genesis10:5 Amenewo ndipo anagawa zisi za amitundu m'maiko mwao
Genesis10:6 Ndi ana amuna a Hamu: Kusi
Genesis10:7 Ndi ana amuna a Kusi: Seba
Genesis10:8 Ndipo Kusi anabala Nimirodi; ndipo iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis10:9 Iye ndiye mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova: chifukwa chake kunanenedwa
Genesis10:10 Ndipo kuyamba kwake kwa ufumu wake kunali Babiloni
Genesis10:11 M'dziko momwemo iye anatuluka kunka ku Asiriya
Genesis10:12 ndi Reseni pakati pa Ninive ndi Kala: umenewo ndi mudzi waukulu.
Genesis10:13 Ejipito ndipo anabala Ludimu
Genesis10:14 ndi Patirusimu
Genesis10:15 Ndipo Kanani anabala Sidoni woyamba wake
Genesis10:16 ndi Ayebusi
Genesis10:17 ndi Ahivi
Genesis10:18 ndi Aaravadi
Genesis10:19 Ndipo malire a Akanani anayamba pa Sidoni
Genesis10:20 Amenewa ndi ana amuna a Hamu monga mwa mabanja ao
Genesis10:21 Ndiponso kwa Semu atate wa ana onse a Eberi
Genesis10:22 Ana amuna a Semu; Elamu
Genesis10:23 Ndi ana a Aramu: Uzi ndi Huli ndi Getere
Genesis10:24 Aripakisadi ndipo anabala Sela; ndipo Sela anabala Eberi.
Genesis10:25 Kwa Eberi ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna awiri; dzina la wina ndi Pelegi; chifukwa kuti m'masiku ake dziko lapansi linagawanikana; dzina la mphwake ndi Yokotani.
Genesis10:26 Ndipo Yokotani anabala Alimodadi
Genesis10:27 ndi Hadoramu ndi Uzali
Genesis10:28 ndi Obala
Genesis10:29 ndi Ofiri ndi Havila
Genesis10:30 Kwao kunayamba pa Mesa pakunka ku Sefari phiri la kum'mawa.
Genesis10:31 Amenewa ndi ana a Semu
Genesis10:32 Amenewo ndi mabanja a ana a Nowa monga mwa mibadwo yao
Genesis11:1 Ndipo dziko lapansi linali la chinenedwe chimodzi ndi chilankhulidwe chimodzi.
Genesis11:2 Ndipo panali pamene anayendayenda ulendo kum'mawa
Genesis11:3 Ndipo ananenana wina ndi wina
Genesis11:4 Ndipo anati
Genesis11:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira kudzaona mudzi ndi nsanja imene analinkumanga ana a anthu.
Genesis11:6 Ndipo Yehova anati
Genesis11:7 Tiyeni
Genesis11:8 Ndipo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi
Genesis11:9 Chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake Babele; pakuti kumeneko Yehova anasokoneza chinenedwe cha dziko lonse lapansi; kuyambira pamenepo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi.

Genesis31:21 Ndipo anathawa iye ndi zonse anali nazo: ndipo anauka naoloka panyanja naloza nkhope yake iyang'anire kuphiri la Giliyadi.

Genesis31:23 Ndipo iye anatenga abale ake pamodzi naye
Genesis31:24 Ndipo Mulungu anadza kwa Labani Mwaramu usiku
Genesis31:25 Ndipo Labani anakomana naye Yakobo. Ndipo Yakobo anamanga hema wake m'phirimo: ndipo Labani ndi abale ake anamanga m'phiri la Giliyadi.
Genesis31:26 Ndipo Labani anati kwa Yakobo
Genesis31:27 Wathawanji iwe mobisika
Genesis31:28 Ndipo sunandiloleza ine ndimpsompsone ana anga aamuna ndi aakazi? Wapusa iwe pakuchita chotero.
Genesis31:29 M'dzanja langa muli mphamvu yakuchitira iwe zoipa koma Mulungu wa atate wako anati kwa ine usiku walero
Genesis31:30 Tsono ungakhale ukadamuka chifukwa mtima wako ulinkukhumba nyumba ya atate wako

Genesis31:36 Ndipo anakwiya Yakobo namkalipira Labani: ndipo Yakobo anayankha nati kwa Labani

Genesis31:38 Zaka makumi awiriwo ndakhala nawe
Genesis31:39 Chimene chinazomoledwa ndi chilombo sindinachitengere kwa iwe; ndekha ndinalipira; pa dzanja langa unachifuna
Genesis31:40 Chotero ndinakhala; usana ludzu linakomola ine
Genesis31:41 Ndinakhala chotere zaka makumi awiri m'nyumba mwako; zaka khumi ndi zinai ndinakutumikira iwe chifukwa cha ana ako akazi awiri

Genesis31:46 Ndipo Yakobo anati kwa abale ake

Genesis36:1 Mibadwo ya Esau (ndiye Edomu) ndi iyi:

Genesis36:8 Ndipo Esau anakhala m'phiri la Seiri; Esau ndiye Edomu.

Genesis40:2 Ndipo Farao anakwiyira akulu ake awiriwo wamkulu wa opereka chikho
Genesis40:3 Ndipo anaika iwo asungidwe m'nyumba ya kazembe wa alonda
Genesis40:4 Ndipo kazembe wa alonda anapereka iwo kwa Yosefe
Genesis40:5 Ndipo analota maloto onse awiri
Genesis40:6 Ndipo Yosefe analowa kwa iwo m'mawa
Genesis40:7 Ndipo anafunsa akulu a Farao osungidwa naye m'nyumba ya mbuyake
Genesis40:8 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye
Genesis40:9 Ndipo wopereka chikho wamkulu anafotokozera Yosefe loto lake
Genesis40:10 ndipo m'mpesamo munali nthambi zitatu: ndipo unali wonga unaphuka
Genesis40:11 ndipo chikho cha Farao chinali m'dzanja langa: ndipo ndinatenga mphesa
Genesis40:12 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iye
Genesis40:13 akali masiku atatu Farao adzatukula mutu wako
Genesis40:14 Koma undikumbukire ine m'mene kudzakhala bwino ndi iwe
Genesis40:15 chifukwa kuti ndinabedwa ndithu m'dziko la Ahebri; ndiponso pano sindinachite kanthu kakundiikira ine m'dzenjemu.
Genesis40:16 Pamene wophika mkate anaona kuti kumasulira kwake kunali kwabwino
Genesis40:17 m'lichero lapamwamba munali mikate ya Farao ya mitundumitundu; ndipo mbalame zinadya ya m'lichero la pamutu panga.

Genesis49:20 Ndi Asere

Genesis49:24 Koma uta wake unakhala wamphamvu

Genesis49:26 Madalitso a atate wako apambana mphamvu ndi madalitso a makolo anga

Genesis50:1 Ndipo Yosefe anagwa pa nkhope ya atate wake

Genesis50:3 Ndipo anatha masiku ake makumi anai a iye; chifukwa chomwecho amatsiriza masiku akukonza thupi; ndipo Aejipito anamlira iye masiku makumi asanu ndi awiri.

Genesis50:5 Atate wanga anandilumbiritsa ine

Genesis50:11 Ndipo pamene anthu okhala m'dzikomo

Exodus12:8 Ndipo azidya nyamayo usiku womwewo

Exodus12:11 Ndipo muziidya chotero: okwinda m'chuuno
Exodus12:12 Pakuti ndidzapita pakati pa dziko la Ejipito usiku womwewo
Exodus12:13 Ndipo mwaziwo udzakhala chizindikiro kwa inu pa nyumba zimene mukhalamo; pamene ndiona mwaziwo ndidzapitirira inu
Exodus12:14 Ndipo tsiku lino lidzakhala kwa inu chikumbutso
Exodus12:15 Masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa; lingakhale tsiku loyamba muzichotsa chotupitsa m'nyumba zanu; pakuti aliyense wakudya mkate wa chotupitsa kuyambira tsiku loyamba kufikira tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Exodus12:16 Ndipo tsiku loyamba kukhale kusonkhana kopatulika
Exodus12:17 Ndipo muzisunga chikondwerero a Mkate wopanda chotupitsa; pakuti tsiku lomwe lino ndinatulutsa makamu anu m'dziko la Ejipito; chifukwa chake muzisunga tsiku lino m'mibadwo yanu

Exodus12:20 Musadye kanthu ka chotupitsa; mokhala inu monse muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa.

Exodus38:16 Nsalu zochingira zonse za pabwalo pozungulira zinali za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa.
Exodus38:17 Ndipo makamwa a nsichi anali amkuwa; zokowera za nsichi ndi mitanda yake zasiliva; ndi zokutira mitu yake zasiliva; ndi nsichi zonse za pabwalo zinagwirana pamodzi ndi siliva.

Exodus38:19 Ndi nsichi zake zinali zinai
Exodus38:20 Ndi zichiri zonse za chihema

Exodus39:2 Ndipo anaomba efodi wa golide
Exodus39:3 Ndipo anasula golide waphanthiphanthi

Exodus39:5 Ndi mpango wa efodi wokhala pamenepo
Exodus39:6 Ndipo anakonza miyala yasohamu

Exodus39:23 ndi pakati pake polowa mutu

Exodus39:26 Mliu ndi khangaza
Exodus39:27 Ndipo anaomba malaya a bafuta

Exodus39:30 Ndipo anapanga phanthiphanthi wa korona wopatulika wa golide woona
Exodus39:31 Namangako mkuzi wamadzi
Exodus39:32 Potero anatsiriza ntchito yonse ya Kachisi wa chihema chokomanako; ndipo ana a Israele adachita monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza Mose
Exodus39:33 Ndipo anabwera naye Kachisi kwa Mose
Exodus39:34 ndi chophimba cha zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira

Exodus39:36 gomelo

Exodus40:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Exodus40:2 Tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba ukautse Kachisi wa chihema chokomanako.

Exodus40:4 Ulongenso gomelo

Exodus40:7 Ukaikenso mkhate pakati pa chihema chokomanako
Exodus40:8 Ndipo ukamange mpandawo pozungulira
Exodus40:9 Pamenepo ukatenge mafuta odzoza
Exodus40:10 Ndipo udzoze guwa la nsembe yopsereza
Exodus40:11 Udzozenso mkhate ndi tsinde lake
Exodus40:12 Ndipo ubwere nao Aroni ndi ana ake amuna ku khomo la chihema chokomanako
Exodus40:13 Nuveke Aroni chovala zopatulikazo; ndi kumdzoza

Exodus40:24 Ndipo anaika choikapo nyali m'chihema chokomanako
Exodus40:25 Nayatsa nyalizo pamaso pa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Exodus40:26 Ndipo anaika guwa la nsembe lagolide m'chihema chokomanako chakuno cha nsalu yotchinga;
Exodus40:27 nafukizapo chofukiza cha fungo lokoma; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Exodus40:28 Ndipo anapachika ku Kachisi nsalu yotsekera pakhomo.

Exodus40:30 Ndipo anaika mkhate pakati pa chihema chokomanako

Exodus40:38 Pakuti mtambo wa Yehova unakhala pa Kachisi msana

Leviticus7:24 Ndipo mafuta a iyo idafa yokha

Leviticus7:26 Ndipo musamadya mwazi uliwonse
Leviticus7:27 Aliyense akadya mwazi uliwonse

Leviticus7:29 Lankhula ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus7:30 adze nazo m'manja mwake nsembe zamoto za Yehova; adze nao mafuta pamodzi ndi nganga
Leviticus7:31 Ndipo wansembeyo atenthe mafutawo pa guwa la nsembe; koma ngangayo ikhale ya Aroni ndi ana ake.
Leviticus7:32 Ndipo mwendo wathako wa ku dzanja lamanja muupereke kwa wansembe ukhale nsembe yokweza yochokera ku nsembe zoyamika zanu.
Leviticus7:33 Mwendo wathako wa ku dzanja lamanja ukhale gawo lake la iyeyu mwa ana a Aroni wakubwera nao mwazi wa zopereka zoyamika

Leviticus8:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus8:2 Tenga Aroni ndi ana ake pamodzi naye ndi zovalazo
Leviticus8:3 nusonkhanitse khamu lonse ku khomo la chihema chokomanako.
Leviticus8:4 Ndipo Mose anachita monga Yehova anamuuza; ndi khamulo linasonkhana pa khomo la chihema chokomanako.
Leviticus8:5 Ndipo Mose anati kwa msonkhanowo
Leviticus8:6 Ndipo Mose anabwera nao Aroni ndi ana ake
Leviticus8:7 Ndipo anamveka ndi malaya a m'kati
Leviticus8:8 Ndipo anamuika chapachifuwa; naika m'chapachifuwa Urimu ndi Tumimu.
Leviticus8:9 Naika nduwirayo pamutu pake; ndi panduwira
Leviticus8:10 Ndipo Mose anatenga mafuta odzoza
Leviticus8:11 Ndipo anawazako pa guwa la nsembe kasanu ndi kawiri
Leviticus8:12 Ndipo anatsanulirako mafuta odzoza pamutu pa Aroni
Leviticus8:13 Ndipo Mose anatenga ana a Aroni
Leviticus8:14 Ndipo anabwera nayo ng'ombe ya nsembe yauchimo; ndipo Aroni ndi ana ake amuna anaika manja ao pa mutu wa ng'ombe ya nsembe yauchimo.
Leviticus8:15 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anatenga mwaziwo
Leviticus8:16 Ndipo anatenga mafuta onse a pamatumbo
Leviticus8:17 Koma ng'ombeyo
Leviticus8:18 Ndipo anabwera nayo nkhosa yamphongo ya nsembe yopsereza; ndipo Aroni ndi ana ake amuna anaika manja ao pamutu pa mphongoyo.
Leviticus8:19 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anawaza mwazi wake pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira.
Leviticus8:20 Ndipo anapadzula mphongoyo ziwalo zake; ndi Mose anatentha mutuwo ndi ziwalo
Leviticus8:21 Koma anatsuka matumbo ndi miyendo ndi madzi; ndi Mose anatentha mphongo yonse pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza yochita fungo lokoma; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose.
Leviticus8:22 Ndipo anabwera nayo nkhosa yamphongo yinayo
Leviticus8:23 Ndipo anaipha; ndi Mose anatengako mwazi wake naupaka pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la Aroni
Leviticus8:24 Pamenepo anabwera nao ana amuna a Aroni
Leviticus8:25 Ndipo anatenga mafutawo ndi mchira wamafuta
Leviticus8:26 ndipo mu dengu la mkate wopanda chotupitsa wokhala pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus8:27 anaika zonsezi m'manja mwa Aroni
Leviticus8:28 Pamenepo Mose anazichotsa ku manja ao
Leviticus8:29 Ndipo Mose anatenga ngangayo naiweyula
Leviticus8:30 Ndipo Mose anatengako mafuta odzoza
Leviticus8:31 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ake amuna
Leviticus8:32 Koma chotsalira cha nyama ndi mkate muchitenthe ndi moto.
Leviticus8:33 Ndipo musatuluka pa khomo la chihema chokomanako masiku asanu ndi awiri
Leviticus8:34 Monga anachita lero lino
Leviticus8:35 Ndipo mukhale pakhomo pa chihema chokomanako masiku asanu ndi awiri
Leviticus8:36 Ndipo Aroni ndi ana ake amuna anachita zonse zimene Yehova anauza pa dzanja la Mose.
Leviticus9:1 Ndipo kunali
Leviticus9:2 ndipo anati kwa Aroni
Leviticus9:3 Nunene kwa ana a Israele
Leviticus9:4 ndi ng'ombe
Leviticus9:5 Pamenepo anatenga zimene Mose anawauza
Leviticus9:6 Ndipo Mose anati
Leviticus9:7 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni
Leviticus9:8 Pamenepo Aroni anasendera kufupi kwa guwa la nsembe
Leviticus9:9 Ndipo ana a Aroni anasendera nao mwazi kwa iye; ndipo anaviika chala chake m'mwazimo naupaka pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe
Leviticus9:10 koma mafutawo
Leviticus9:11 Ndipo anatentha ndi moto nyamayi ndi chikopa kunja kwa chigono.
Leviticus9:12 Ndipo anapha nsembe yopsereza; ndi ana a Aroni anapereka mwaziwo kwa iye
Leviticus9:13 Ndipo anapereka nsembe yopsereza kwa iye
Leviticus9:14 Ndipo anatsuka matumbo ndi miyendo
Leviticus9:15 Ndipo anabwera nacho chopereka cha anthu
Leviticus9:16 Ndipo anabwera nayo nsembe yopsereza naipereka monga mwa lemba lake.
Leviticus9:17 Ndipo anabwera nayo nsembe yaufa
Leviticus9:18 Anaphanso ng'ombe
Leviticus9:19 ndi mafuta a ng'ombe; ndi a nkhosa yamphongoyo
Leviticus9:20 ndipo anaika mafuta pa ngangazo
Leviticus9:21 Ndipo Aroni anaweyula ngangazo ndi mwendo wathako wa ku dzanja lamanja zikhale nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; monga Iye anauza Mose.

Leviticus9:23 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni analowa ku chihema chokomanako

Leviticus11:2 Nenani ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus11:3 Nyama iliyonse yogawanika chiboda

Leviticus11:5 Ndi mbira
Leviticus11:6 Ndi kalulu
Leviticus11:7 Ndi nkhumba
Leviticus11:8 Nyama yake musamaidya
Leviticus11:9 Mwa zonse zili m'madzi muyenera kumadya izi: zilizonse zili nazo zipsepse ndi mamba m'madzi
Leviticus11:10 Koma zilizonse zilibe zipsepse ndi mamba m'nyanja
Leviticus11:11 inde muziyese zonyansa; musamadya nyama zao; mitembo yao zikunyansireni.
Leviticus11:12 Zilizonse zopanda zipsepse kapena mamba m'madzimo muziyese zonyansa.
Leviticus11:13 Ndipo mwa mbalame muziziyesa zonyansa izi; siziyenera kuzidya
Leviticus11:14 ndi muimba
Leviticus11:15 khungubwi mwa mtundu wake;
Leviticus11:16 ndi nthiwatiwa
Leviticus11:17 ndi nkhutukutu ndi nswankhono ndi manchichi;

Leviticus11:24 Ndipo izi zikudetsani: aliyense akhudza mtembo wake adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo;

Leviticus11:34 Chakudya chilichonse chokhala m'mwemo

Leviticus14:2 Chilamulo cha wakhate tsiku la kumyeretsa kwake ndi ichi: azidza naye kwa wansembe;

Leviticus14:4 pamenepo wansembe auze kuti amtengere iye wakuti akonzedwe
Leviticus14:5 ndipo wansembe auze kuti aphe mbalame imodzi m'mbale yadothi pamwamba pa madzi oyenda;
Leviticus14:6 natenge mbalame yamoyo
Leviticus14:7 nawaze kasanu ndi kawiri iye amene akuti amyeretse khate lake
Leviticus14:8 Ndipo iye wakuti ayeretsedwe atsuke zovala zake
Leviticus14:9 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri kudzakhala kuti amete tsitsi lake lonse la pamutu pake

Leviticus14:15 ndipo wansembe atengeko muyeso uja wa mafuta
Leviticus14:16 ndipo wansembe aviike chala chake cha dzanja lake lamanja cha iye mwini m'mafuta ali m'dzanja lake lamanzere
Leviticus14:17 ndipo wansembe apakeko mafuta okhala m'dzanja lake pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la iye wakuti ayeretsedwe
Leviticus14:18 natsitsitize mafuta otsala m'dzanja lake la wansembe

Leviticus14:20 ndipo wansembe atenthe nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus14:21 Ndipo akakhala waumphawi chosafikana chuma chake azitenga mwanawankhosa mmodzi wamwamuna akhale nsembe yopalamula
Leviticus14:22 ndi njiwa ziwiri
Leviticus14:23 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu abwere nao kwa wansembe

Leviticus14:25 naphe mwanawankhosa wa nsembe yopalamula

Leviticus14:28 ndipo wansembe apakeko mafuta aja ali m'dzanja lake pa ndewerere ya khutu la ku dzanja lamanja la iye wakuti ayeretsedwe

Leviticus15:2 Nenani nao ana a Israele
Leviticus15:3 Ndipo kudetsedwa kwa kukha kwake ndiko: ngakhale chakukhacho chituluka m'thupi mwake

Leviticus15:5 Ndipo munthu aliyense wakukhudza kama wake azitsuka zovala zake
Leviticus15:6 Ndipo iye wakukhalira chinthu chilichonse adachikhalira wakukhayo atsuke zovala zake
Leviticus15:7 Ndipo iye wakukhudza thupi la uyo wakukhayo atsuke zovala zake
Leviticus15:8 Ndipo wakukhayo akalavulira wina woyera; pamenepo atsuke zovala zake
Leviticus15:9 Ndipo mbereko iliyonse akwerapo wakukhayo ili yodetsedwa.
Leviticus15:10 Ndipo munthu aliyense akakhudza kanthu kalikonse kadali pansi pake adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo; ndipo iye wakunyamula zimenezo atsuke zovala zake

Leviticus15:14 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu atenge njiwa ziwiri

Leviticus15:16 Ndipo munthu aliyense akagona uipa
Leviticus15:17 Ndipo chovala chilichonse
Leviticus15:18 Mkazi yemwe
Leviticus15:19 Ndipo ngati mkazi ali ndi nthenda yakukha
Leviticus15:20 Ndipo chinthu chilichonse agonapo pokhala ali padera nchodetsedwa; ndi chinthu chilichonse akhalapo nchodetsa.

Leviticus15:22 Ndipo aliyense akhudza chinthu chilichonse akhalapo iye
Leviticus15:23 Ndipo chikakhala pakama

Leviticus16:18 Ndipo atulukire guwa la nsembe lokhala pamaso pa Yehova ndi kulichitira chotetezera; natengeko mwazi wa ng'ombeyo
Leviticus16:19 Ndipo awazepo mwazi wina ndi chala chake kasanu ndi katatu; ndi kuliyeretsa ndi kulipatula kulichotsera zodetsa za ana a Israele.

Leviticus16:22 ndi mbuziyo isenze yokha mphulupulu zonsezo kunka nazo ku dziko la pa lokha; ndipo azitaya mbuziyo m'chipululu.
Leviticus16:23 Pamenepo Aroni alowe m'chihema chokomanako
Leviticus16:24 Ndipo asambe thupi lake ndi madzi kumalo kopatulika
Leviticus16:25 Ndipo atenthe mafuta a nsembe yauchimo pa guwa la nsembe.

Leviticus16:28 Ndi iye amene anazitentha atsuke zovala zake

Leviticus16:34 Ndipo ichi chikhale kwa inu lemba losatha

Leviticus18:10 Usamavula mwana wamkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wako
Leviticus18:11 Usamavula mwana wamkazi wa mkazi wa atate wako
Leviticus18:12 Usamavula mlongo wa atate wako; ndiye wa chibale cha atate wako.
Leviticus18:13 Usamavula mbale wa mai wako; popeza ndiye mbale wa mai wako.
Leviticus18:14 Usamavula mbale wa atate wako; usamasendera kwa mkazi wake; ndiye mai wako.
Leviticus18:15 Usamavula mpongozi wako; ndiye mkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wako; usamamvula.
Leviticus18:16 Usamavula mkazi wa mbale wako; ndiye thupi la mbale wako.
Leviticus18:17 Usamavula mkazi ndi mwana wamkazi wake; usamatenga mwana wamkazi wa mwana wamwamuna wake
Leviticus18:18 Usamtenga mkazi kumuonjezera kwa mbale wake
Leviticus18:19 Usamasendera kwa mkazi kumvula pokhala ali padera chifukwa cha kudetsedwa kwake.
Leviticus18:20 Usagona naye mkazi wa mnansi wako
Leviticus18:21 Ndipo usamapereka a mbumba yako kuwapitiriza kumoto chifukwa cha Moleki; usamaipsa dzina la Mulungu wako; Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus18:22 Usamagonana ndi mwamuna
Leviticus18:23 Ndipo usamagonana ndi nyama iliyonse
Leviticus18:24 Musamadzidetsa nacho chimodzi cha izi; pakuti amitundu amene ndiwapirikitsa pamaso panu amadetsedwa nazo zonsezi;
Leviticus18:25 dziko lomwe lidetsedwa; chifukwa chake ndililanga
Leviticus18:26 Koma inu
Leviticus18:27 (Pakuti eni dziko okhalako
Leviticus18:28 lingakusanzeni inunso dzikoli
Leviticus18:29 Pakuti aliyense akachita chilichonse cha zonyansa izi
Leviticus18:30 Potero muzisunga chilangizo changa

Leviticus19:2 Nena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele
Leviticus19:3 Aliyense aope mai wake

Leviticus19:6 Tsiku lomwelo mwaipha

Leviticus19:12 Musamalumbira monama ndi kutchula dzina langa
Leviticus19:13 Usamasautsa mnansi wako
Leviticus19:14 Usamatemberera wogontha; usamaika chokhumudwitsa pamaso pa wosaona; koma uziopa Mulungu wako; Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:15 Musamachita chisalungamo pakuweruza mlandu; usamavomereza munthu wosauka
Leviticus19:16 Usamayendayenda nusinjirira mwa anthu a mtundu wako; usamatsata mwazi wa mnansi wako; Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:17 Usamamuda mbale wako mumtima mwako; umdzudzule munthu mnzako ndithu
Leviticus19:18 Usamabwezera chilango
Leviticus19:19 Muzisunga malemba anga. Usamalola zoweta zako za mitundu yosiyana zikwerane; usamabzala m'munda mwako mbeu za mitundu iwiri; usamavala chovala cha nsalu za mitundu iwiri zosokonezana.

Leviticus19:21 Ndipo adze nayo nsembe yake yopalamula kwa Yehova

Leviticus19:23 Ndipo mukadzalowa m'dzikomo

Leviticus19:25 Chaka chachisanu muzidya zipatso zake
Leviticus19:26 Musamadya kanthu ndi mwazi wake; musamachita nyanga
Leviticus19:27 Musamameta mduliro
Leviticus19:28 Musamadzicheka matupi anu chifukwa cha akufa
Leviticus19:29 Usamaipsa mwana wako wamkazi ndi kumchititsa chigololo; lingadzale ndi chigololo dzikoli

Leviticus23:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus23:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele

Leviticus23:4 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova
Leviticus23:5 Mwezi woyamba
Leviticus23:6 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi womwewo ndilo chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa a Yehova; masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa.
Leviticus23:7 Tsiku lake loyamba mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena.
Leviticus23:8 Koma mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto masiku asanu ndi awiri; pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri pakhale msonkhano wopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena.
Leviticus23:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus23:10 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus23:11 ndipo iye aweyule mtolowo pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus23:12 Ndipo tsiku loweyula mtolowo

Leviticus23:14 Musamadya mkate
Leviticus23:15 Ndipo mudziwerengere kuyambira tsiku lotsata Sabata
Leviticus23:16 muwerenge masiku makumi asanu kufikira tsiku lotsata sabata lachisanu ndi chiwiri; pamenepo mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe ya ufa watsopano.
Leviticus23:17 Mutuluke nayo m'zinyumba zanu mikate iwiri ya nsembe yoweyula
Leviticus23:18 Ndipo mubwere nao pamodzi ndi mikate
Leviticus23:19 Mukonzenso mwanawambuzi mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo
Leviticus23:20 Ndi wansembe awaweyule
Leviticus23:21 Ndipo mulalikire tsiku lomwelo; kuti mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena; ndilo lemba losatha m'nyumba zanu zonse
Leviticus23:22 Ndipo pakukolola dzinthu za m'dziko mwanu
Leviticus23:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus23:24 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus23:25 Musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena; mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova.
Leviticus23:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus23:27 Komatu
Leviticus23:28 Musamagwira ntchito iliyonse tsiku limenelo; pakuti ndilo tsiku la chitetezero
Leviticus23:29 Pakuti munthu aliyense wosadzichepetsa tsiku limenelo
Leviticus23:30 Ndi munthu aliyense wakugwira ntchito iliyonse tsiku limenelo
Leviticus23:31 Musamagwira ntchito iliyonse; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu
Leviticus23:32 Likhale ndi inu Sabata lakupumula; ndipo mudzichepetse; tsiku lachisanu ndi chinai madzulo
Leviticus23:33 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus23:34 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus23:35 Tsiku loyamba likhale msonkhano wopatulika
Leviticus23:36 Masiku asanu ndi awiri mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; ndipo mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; ndilo lotsirizira; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena.
Leviticus23:37 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova
Leviticus23:38 pamodzi ndi masabata a Yehova
Leviticus23:39 Koma tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
Leviticus23:40 Ndipo tsiku loyambali mudzitengere nthambi za mitengo yokoma
Leviticus23:41 Ndipo musunge chikondwerero cha Yehova masiku asanu ndi awiri m'chaka; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; musunge mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
Leviticus23:42 Mukhale m'misasa masiku asanu ndi awiri; onse obadwa m'dziko mwa Israele akhale m'misasa;
Leviticus23:43 kuti mibadwo yanu ikadziwe kuti ndinakhalitsa ana a Israele m'misasa
Leviticus23:44 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera ana a Israele nyengo zoikika za Yehova.

Leviticus25:42 Pakuti iwo ndiwo atumiki anga

Leviticus25:44 Kunena za kapolo wako wamwamuna
Leviticus25:45 Muwagulenso ana a alendo akukhala mwa inu
Leviticus25:46 Ndipo muwayese cholowa cha ana anu akudza m'mbuyo
Leviticus25:47 Ndipo mlendo wakugonera kwanu akalemera chuma
Leviticus25:48 atatha kudzigulitsa
Leviticus25:49 kapena mbale wa atate wake
Leviticus25:50 Ndipo awerengere amene anamgulayo kuyambira chaka adadzigulitsa kwa iye kufikira chaka choliza lipenga; ndipo mtengo wake ukhale monga mwa kuwerenga kwa zaka; amuyesere monga masiku a munthu wolipidwa.
Leviticus25:51 Zikamtsalira zaka zambiri
Leviticus25:52 Ndipo zikamtsalira zaka pang'ono kufikira chaka choliza lipenga amwerengere; monga mwa zaka zake abwezere mtengo wake wakumuombola.
Leviticus25:53 Akhale naye monga wolipidwa chaka ndi chaka; asamamlamulira momzunza pamaso pako.
Leviticus25:54 Ndipo akapanda kumuombola motero
Leviticus25:55 Pakuti ana a Israele ndi atumiki anga; iwo ndiwo atumiki anga amene ndinawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.

Leviticus26:9 Ndipo ndidzatembenukira kwa inu
Leviticus26:10 Ndipo mudzadya za sundwe wakale ndi kutulutsa zakale chifukwa cha zatsopano.

Leviticus26:12 Ndipo ndidzayendayenda pakati pa inu
Leviticus26:13 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Leviticus26:14 Koma mukapanda kundimvera Ine
Leviticus26:15 ndipo mukakaniza malemba anga
Leviticus26:16 ndidzachitira inu ichinso; ndidzakuikirani zoopsa
Leviticus26:17 Ndipo nkhope yanga idzatsutsana nanu; kuti adani anu adzakukanthani
Leviticus26:18 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera
Leviticus26:19 Popeza ndidzathyola mphamvu yanu yodzikuza; ndi kusandutsa thambo lanu likhale ngati chitsulo ndi dziko lanu ngati mkuwa;
Leviticus26:20 ndipo mudzachita nayo mphamvu yanu chabe; ndi nthaka yanu siidzapereka zipatso zake
Leviticus26:21 Ndipo mukayenda motsutsana nane
Leviticus26:22 Popeza ndidzatumiza chilombo cha kuthengo pakati pa inu
Leviticus26:23 Ndipo mukapanda kulangika nazo ndi kubwera kwa Ine
Leviticus26:24 Inenso ndidzayenda motsutsana ndi inu; ndipo ndidzakukanthani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri chifukwa cha zoipa zanu.
Leviticus26:25 Ndipo ndidzadzetsa kwa inu lupanga lakuchita chilango cha chipangano; kotero kuti mudzasonkhanidwa m'midzi mwanu; ndipo ndidzatumiza mliri pakati pa inu; ndipo mudzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mdani.
Leviticus26:26 Pamene ndithyola mchirikizo wanu wa mkate
Leviticus26:27 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera Ine
Leviticus26:28 Ine ndidzayenda nanu motsutsana mwa kukuzazirani
Leviticus26:29 Ndipo mudzadya nyama ya ana anu amuna; inde nyama ya ana anu akazi mudzaidya.
Leviticus26:30 Ndipo ndidzaononga malo amsanje anu
Leviticus26:31 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa midzi yanu bwinja
Leviticus26:32 Inde
Leviticus26:33 Ndipo ndidzabalalitsa inu mwa amitundu
Leviticus26:34 Pamenepo dzikoli lidzakondwera nao masabata ake
Leviticus26:35 Masiku onse a kupasuka kwake lipumula; ndiko mpumulo udalisowa m'masabata anu
Leviticus26:36 Kunena za iwo akutsalira
Leviticus26:37 Ndipo adzakhumudwitsana monga pothawa lupanga
Leviticus26:38 Ndipo mudzatayika mwa amitundu
Leviticus26:39 Ndipo otsala mwa inu adzazunzika m'moyo ndi mphulupulu zao m'maiko a adani anu; ndiponso ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao adzazunzika m'moyo.
Leviticus26:40 Pamenepo adzavomereza mphulupulu zao
Leviticus26:41 Inenso ndinayenda motsutsana nao
Leviticus26:42 pamenepo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa ndi Yakobo; ndiponso pangano langa ndi Isaki
Leviticus26:43 Dziko lomwe lidzasiyidwa nao
Leviticus26:44 Ndiponso pali ichinso: pokhala iwo m'dziko la adani ao sindidzawakaniza
Leviticus26:45 Koma chifukwa cha iwo ndidzawakumbukira pangano la makolo ao
Leviticus26:46 Awa ndi malemba ndi maweruzo ndi malamulo amene Yehova anaika pakati pa Iye ndi ana a Israele m'phiri la Sinai
Leviticus27:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Leviticus27:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Leviticus27:3 Ukayesa wamwamuna wa zaka makumi awiri kufikira wina wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi
Leviticus27:4 Koma akakhala wamkazi
Leviticus27:5 Akakhala munthu wa zaka zisanu kufikira wina wa zaka makumi awiri uwayesere
Leviticus27:6 Akakhala mwana wa mwezi umodzi kufikira zaka zisanu
Leviticus27:7 Akakhala munthu wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi mphambu
Leviticus27:8 Koma chuma chake chikapanda kufikira kuyesa kwako
Leviticus27:9 Ndipo chikakhala cha nyama imene anthu amabwera nayo ikhale chopereka cha Yehova
Leviticus27:10 Asaisinthe
Leviticus27:11 Ndipo chikakhala cha nyama yodetsa
Leviticus27:12 ndipo wansembeyo aiyese mtengo wake
Leviticus27:13 Ndipo akaiombola ndithu
Leviticus27:14 Munthu akapatula nyumba yake ikhale yopatulika kwa Yehova
Leviticus27:15 Ndipo iye wakuipatula akaombola nyumba yake
Leviticus27:16 Munthu akapatulirako Yehova munda wakewake
Leviticus27:17 Akapatula munda wake kuyambira chaka choliza lipenga
Leviticus27:18 Akaupatula munda wake chitapita chaka choliza lipenga
Leviticus27:19 Ndipo wakupatula mundayo akauomboladi
Leviticus27:20 Koma akapanda kuombola mundawo
Leviticus27:21 koma potuluka m'chaka choliza lipenga
Leviticus27:22 Ndipo akapatulira Yehova munda woti adaugula
Leviticus27:23 pamenepo wansembeyo amwerengere mtengo wake wa kuyesa kwako kufikira chaka choliza lipenga; ndipo apereke kuyesa kwako tsiku lomwelo
Leviticus27:24 Chaka choliza lipenga mundawo ubwerere kwa iye amene adaugulitsa
Leviticus27:25 Ndipo kuyesa kwako konse kukhale monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika sekeli ndi magera makumi awiri.
Leviticus27:26 Komatu woyamba kubadwa mwa nyama akhale wobadwa woyamba wa Yehova
Leviticus27:27 Koma akakhala wa nyama zodetsa
Leviticus27:28 Koma asachigulitse kapena kuchiombola chinthu choperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu
Leviticus27:29 Asamuombole munthu woperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu; amuphe ndithu.
Leviticus27:30 Limodzi mwa magawo khumi la zonse m'dziko
Leviticus27:31 Koma munthu akaombolatu kanthu ka limodzi la magawo khumiwo aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu.
Leviticus27:32 Ndipo limodzi la magawo khumi lonse la ng'ombe
Leviticus27:33 Asafunse ngati yabwino kapena yoipa
Leviticus27:34 Awa ndi malamulo
Numbers1:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'chipululu cha Sinai
Numbers1:2 Werenga khamu lonse la ana a Israele
Numbers1:3 Iwe ndi Aroni muwawerenge monga mwa magulu ao
Numbers1:4 Ndipo pamodzi ndi inu pakhale munthu mmodzi wa mafuko onse; yense mkulu wa nyumba ya kholo lake.
Numbers1:5 Ndipo maina a amuna amene aime nanu ndi awa: wa Rubeni
Numbers1:6 Wa Simeoni
Numbers1:7 Wa Yuda
Numbers1:8 Wa Isakara
Numbers1:9 Wa Zebuloni
Numbers1:10 Wa ana a Yosefe: wa Efuremu
Numbers1:11 Wa Benjamini
Numbers1:12 Wa Dani
Numbers1:13 Wa Asere
Numbers1:14 Wa Gadi
Numbers1:15 Wa Nafutali
Numbers1:16 Iwo ndiwo oitanidwa a khamu
Numbers1:17 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anatenga anthu awa
Numbers1:18 nasonkhanitsa khamu lonse tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachiwiri
Numbers1:19 Monga Yehova anauza Mose
Numbers1:20 Ndipo ana a Rubeni
Numbers1:21 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Rubeni
Numbers1:22 A ana a Simeoni
Numbers1:23 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Simeoni
Numbers1:24 A ana a Gadi
Numbers1:25 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Gadi
Numbers1:26 A ana a Yuda
Numbers1:27 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Yuda
Numbers1:28 A ana a Isakara
Numbers1:29 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Isakara
Numbers1:30 A ana a Zebuloni
Numbers1:31 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Zebuloni
Numbers1:32 A ana a Yosefe
Numbers1:33 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Efuremu
Numbers1:34 A ana a Manase
Numbers1:35 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Manase
Numbers1:36 A ana a Benjamini
Numbers1:37 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Benjamini
Numbers1:38 A ana a Dani
Numbers1:39 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Dani
Numbers1:40 A ana a Asere
Numbers1:41 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Asere
Numbers1:42 A ana a Nafutali
Numbers1:43 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Nafutali
Numbers1:44 Iwo ndiwo amene anawerengedwa
Numbers1:45 Potero owerengedwa onse a ana a Israele monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao
Numbers1:46 inde owerengedwa onse ndiwo zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi makumi asanu.
Numbers1:47 Koma Alevi monga mwa fuko la makolo ao sanawerengedwe mwa iwo.
Numbers1:48 Popeza Yehova adalankhula ndi Mose
Numbers1:49 Fuko la Levi lokha usaliwerenge
Numbers1:50 koma iwe
Numbers1:51 Ndipo akati amuke naye Kachisiyo
Numbers1:52 Ndipo ana a Israele amange mahema ao
Numbers1:53 Koma Alevi amange mahema ao pozungulira pa Kachisi wa mboni
Numbers1:54 Momwemo ana a Israele anachita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose; anachita momwemo.
Numbers2:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Numbers2:2 Ana a Israele azimanga mahema ao yense ku mbendera yake
Numbers2:3 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao ku m'mawa kotuluka dzuwa ndiwo a mbendera ya chigono cha Yuda
Numbers2:4 Ndipo khamu lake
Numbers2:5 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Isakara; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Isakara ndiye Netanele mwana wa Zuwara.
Numbers2:6 Ndipo khamu lake
Numbers2:7 Ndi fuko la Zebuloni: kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni.
Numbers2:8 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:9 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Yuda ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana anai
Numbers2:10 Mbendera ya chigono cha Rubeni ikhale kumwera monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Rubeni ndiye Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri.
Numbers2:11 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:12 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Simeoni; ndi kalonga wa ana a Simeoni ndiye Selumiele mwana wa Zurishadai.
Numbers2:13 Ndi khamu lake ndi owerengedwa ake
Numbers2:14 Ndi fuko la Gadi; kalonga wa ana a Gadi ndiye Eliyasafu mwana wa Reuwele.
Numbers2:15 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:16 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Rubeni ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu
Numbers2:17 Pamenepo khamu la Alevi azimuka nacho chihema chokomanako
Numbers2:18 Mbendera ya chigono cha Efuremu izikhala kumadzulo monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Efuremu ndiye Elisama mwana wa Amihudi.
Numbers2:19 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:20 Ndipo oyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Manase; ndi kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri.
Numbers2:21 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:22 Ndi fuko la Benjamini: kalonga wa ana a Benjamini ndiye Abidani mwana wa Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:24 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Efuremu ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza zana limodzi
Numbers2:25 Mbendera ya chigono cha Dani izikhala kumpoto monga mwa makamu ao; ndi kalonga wa ana a Dani ndiye Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai.
Numbers2:26 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:27 Ndipo iwo a kumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Asere; ndi kalonga wa ana a Asere ndiye Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani.
Numbers2:28 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:29 Ndi fuko la Nafutali: ndi kalonga wa ana a Nafutali ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani.
Numbers2:30 Ndi khamu lake
Numbers2:31 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Dani ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda m'mbuyo paulendo
Numbers2:32 Amenewo ndiwo anawerengedwa a ana a Israele monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao; owerengedwa onse a m'zigono
Numbers2:33 Koma sanawerenge Alevi mwa ana a Israele; monga Yehova adauza Mose.
Numbers2:34 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose
Numbers3:1 Mibadwo ya Aroni ndi Mose
Numbers3:2 Ndipo maina ao a ana amuna a Aroni ndi awa: Woyamba Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Awa ndi maina a ana amuna a Aroni
Numbers3:4 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu anafa pamaso pa Yehova muja anabwera nao moto wachilendo pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers3:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers3:6 Sendera nalo kuno fuko la Levi
Numbers3:7 Ndipo azisunga udikiro wake
Numbers3:8 Ndipo asunge zipangizo zonse za chihema chokomanako
Numbers3:9 Ndipo uzipereka Alevi kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ake amuna; apatsidwa kwa iye ndithu
Numbers3:10 Koma uike Aroni ndi ana ake amuna
Numbers3:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers3:12 Ndipo taonani
Numbers3:13 Pakuti ana oyamba onse ndi anga; tsiku lija ndinakantha ana oyamba onse m'dziko la Ejipito ndinadzipatulira ana oyamba onse m'Israele
Numbers3:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'chipululu cha Sinai
Numbers3:15 Werenga ana a Levi monga mwa nyumba ya makolo ao
Numbers3:16 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova
Numbers3:17 Ndipo ana a Levi maina ao ndi awa: Geresoni
Numbers3:18 Ndi ana a Geresoni maina ao ndi awa
Numbers3:19 Ndi ana a Kohati monga mwa mabanja ao: Amuramu ndi Izihara
Numbers3:20 Ndi ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao: Mali ndi Musi. Awa ndi mabanja a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao.
Numbers3:21 Banja la Libini
Numbers3:22 Owerengedwa ao
Numbers3:23 Mabanja a Ageresoni azimanga mahema ao pambuyo pa Kachisi kumadzulo.
Numbers3:24 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo a Ageresoni ndiye Eliyasafu mwana wa Laele.
Numbers3:25 Ndipo udikiro wa ana a Geresoni m'chihema
Numbers3:26 ndi nsalu zotchinga za kubwalo
Numbers3:27 Banja la Aamuramu
Numbers3:28 Powawerenga amuna onse
Numbers3:29 Mabanja a ana a Kohati azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumwera.
Numbers3:30 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ao ya mabanja a Akohati ndiye Elizafani mwana wa Uziyele.
Numbers3:31 Ndipo udikiro wao ndiwo likasa
Numbers3:32 Ndipo kalonga wa akalonga a Alevi ndiye Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembeyo; ndiye aziyang'anira osunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika.
Numbers3:33 Banja la Amali
Numbers3:34 Ndipo owerengedwa ao
Numbers3:35 Ndi kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ya mabanja la Merari ndiye Zuriyele mwana wa Abihaili; azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumpoto.
Numbers3:36 Ndipo choyang'anira iwo
Numbers3:37 ndi nsichi za pabwalo pozungulira
Numbers3:38 Ndipo amene adamanga mahema ao pa khomo la Kachisi
Numbers3:39 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi
Numbers3:40 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Numbers3:41 Ndipo unditengere Ine Alevi (Ine ndine Yehova) m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele; ndi ng'ombe za Alevi m'malo mwa zoyamba kubadwa zonse mwa ng'ombe za ana a Israele.
Numbers3:42 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga
Numbers3:43 Ndipo amuna onse oyamba kubadwa
Numbers3:44 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers3:45 Landira Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele
Numbers3:46 Kunena za mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza atatuwo oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israele
Numbers3:47 ulandire masekeli asanu pa munthu mmodzi; uwalandire pa muyeso wa sekeli wa malo opatulika (sekeli ndiwo magera makumi awiri);
Numbers3:48 nupereke ndalama zimene akuposawo anaomboledwa nazo kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ake amuna.
Numbers3:49 Pamenepo Mose analandira ndalama zoombola nazo kwa iwo akuposa aja adawaombola Alevi;
Numbers3:50 analandira ndalamazo kwa oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israele; masekeli chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu
Numbers3:51 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Aroni ndi ana ake ndalama zoombola nazo monga mwa mau a Yehova
Numbers4:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Numbers4:2 Werengani ana a Kohati pakati pa ana a Levi
Numbers4:3 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu
Numbers4:4 Ntchito ya ana a Kohati m'chihema chokomanako ndi iyi
Numbers4:5 akati amuke a m'chigono
Numbers4:6 ndi kuikapo chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu; ndi kuyalapo nsalu yamadzi yeniyeni
Numbers4:7 Ndi pa gome la mkate woonekera ayale nsalu yamadzi
Numbers4:8 Ndipo ayale pa izi nsalu yofiira
Numbers4:9 Ndipo atenge nsalu yamadzi
Numbers4:10 Ndipo achimange ndi chipangizo zake zonse m'chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu
Numbers4:11 Ndipo pa guwa la nsembe lagolide aziyala nsalu ya madzi
Numbers4:12 Natenge zipangizo zake zonse za utumiki
Numbers4:13 Ndipo azichotsa mapulusa pa guwa la nsembe
Numbers4:14 Naikepo zipangizo zake zonse
Numbers4:15 Atatha Aroni ndi ana ake amuna kuphimba malo opatulika
Numbers4:16 Ndipo zoyang'anira Eleazara
Numbers4:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni
Numbers4:18 Musamasadza fuko la mabanja a Kohati kuwachotsa pakati pa Alevi;
Numbers4:19 koma muzitero nao kuti akhale ndi moyo
Numbers4:20 Koma asalowe kukaona zopatulikazo pozikulunga
Numbers4:21 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers4:22 Werenganso ana a Geresoni
Numbers4:23 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu
Numbers4:24 Ntchito ya mabanja a Ageresoni
Numbers4:25 azinyamula nsalu zophimba za Kachisi
Numbers4:26 ndi nsalu zochingira za pabwalo
Numbers4:27 Ntchito yonse ya ana a Ageresoni
Numbers4:28 Iyi ndi ntchito ya mabanja a ana a Geresoni m'chihema chokomanako; ndipo Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe ayang'anire udikiro wao.
Numbers4:29 Kunena za ana a Merari
Numbers4:30 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu
Numbers4:31 Ndipo udikiro wa akatundu ao
Numbers4:32 ndi nsichi za kubwalo kozungulira
Numbers4:33 Iyi ndi ntchito ya mabanja a ana a Merari
Numbers4:34 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi akalonga a khamu anawerenga ana a Akohati monga mwa mabanja ao
Numbers4:35 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu
Numbers4:36 ndipo owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu.
Numbers4:37 Awa ndi owerengedwa a mabanja a Akohati
Numbers4:38 Ndipo ana owerengedwa a Geresoni
Numbers4:39 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu
Numbers4:40 owerengedwa ao
Numbers4:41 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Geresoni
Numbers4:42 Ndipo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari
Numbers4:43 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu
Numbers4:44 owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao
Numbers4:45 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari
Numbers4:46 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi
Numbers4:47 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu
Numbers4:48 owerengedwawo ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu kudza mazana asanu mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu.
Numbers4:49 Anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose
Numbers5:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers5:2 Uza ana a Israele kuti azitulutsa m'chigono akhate onse
Numbers5:3 muwatulutse amuna ndi akazi muwatulutsire kunja kwa chigono
Numbers5:4 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita chotero
Numbers5:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers5:6 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Numbers5:7 azivomereza tchimo lake adalichita; nabwezere chopalamulacho monsemo
Numbers5:8 Koma munthuyo akapanda kukhala nayo nkhoswe imene akaibwezere chopalamulacho
Numbers5:9 Ndipo nsembe zokweza zonse za zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israele
Numbers5:10 Zopatulika za munthu aliyense ndi zake: zilizonse munthu aliyense akapatsa wansembe
Numbers5:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers5:12 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Numbers5:13 ndi munthu akagona naye
Numbers5:14 ndipo ukamgwira mwamuna mtima wansanje
Numbers5:15 pamenepo mwamunayo azidza naye mkazi wake kwa wansembe
Numbers5:16 Ndipo wansembe abwere naye
Numbers5:17 natenge madzi opatulika m'mbale yadothi wansembeyo
Numbers5:18 Pamenepo wansembeyo aike mkaziyo pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers5:19 Ndipo wansembe amlumbiritse
Numbers5:20 Koma iwe
Numbers5:21 pamenepo wansembe alumbiritse mkazi lumbiro lakutemberera
Numbers5:22 ndipo madzi awa akudzetsa temberero adzalowa m'matumbo mwako
Numbers5:23 Ndipo wansembe alembere matemberero awa m'buku
Numbers5:24 Ndipo amwetse mkaziyo madzi owawa akudzetsa temberero; ndi madzi odzetsa temberero adzalowa mwa iye nadzamwawira.
Numbers5:25 Ndipo wansembe atenge nsembe yaufa yansanje m'manja mwa mkazi
Numbers5:26 Wansembe atengekonso nsembe yaufa wodzala manja
Numbers5:27 Ndipo atammwetsa madziwo
Numbers5:28 Koma ngati mkazi sanadetsedwe
Numbers5:29 Ichi ndi chilamulo cha nsanje
Numbers5:30 kapena pamene mtima wansanje umgwira mwamuna
Numbers5:31 Mwamunayo ndiye wosachita mphulupulu
Numbers6:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers6:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Numbers6:3 azisala vinyo ndi kachasu; asamwe vinyo wosasa
Numbers6:4 Masiku onse a kusala kwake asadye kanthu kopangika ndi mphesa
Numbers6:5 Masiku onse a chowinda chake chakusala
Numbers6:6 Masiku onse akudzipatulira kwa Yehova asayandikize mtembo.
Numbers6:7 Asadzidetse ndi atate wake
Numbers6:8 Masiku onse a kusala kwake akhala wopatulikira kwa Yehova.
Numbers6:9 Munthu akafa chikomo pali iye
Numbers6:10 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu adze nazo njiwa ziwiri
Numbers6:11 ndipo wansembe akonze imodzi nsembe yauchimo
Numbers6:12 Ndipo awapatulire Yehova masiku a kusala kwake
Numbers6:13 Ndipo chilamulo cha Mnaziri
Numbers6:14 pamenepo abwere nacho chopereka chake kwa Yehova
Numbers6:15 ndi dengu la mkate wopanda chotupitsa
Numbers6:16 Ndipo wansembe azibwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers6:17 naphe nkhosa yamphongo yoyamika ya Yehova
Numbers6:18 Pamenepo Mnaziriyo amete mutu wake wa kusala kwake pa khomo la chihema chokomanako

Numbers35:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'zidikha za Mowabu
Numbers35:2 Uza ana a Israele
Numbers35:3 Ndipo midzi ndiyo yokhalamo iwowa; ndi mabusa akhale a ng'ombe zao
Numbers35:4 Ndipo mabusa a midziyo
Numbers35:5 Ndipo muyese kunja kwa mudzi
Numbers35:6 Ndipo midziyo muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi ija isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako; imene muipereke kuti wakupha mnzake athawireko; ndipo pamodzi ndi iyi muperekenso midzi makumi anai ndi iwiri.
Numbers35:7 Midzi yonse muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi makumi anai ndi isanu ndi itatu
Numbers35:8 Ndipo kunena za midziyo muiperekeyo yaoyao ya ana a Israele
Numbers35:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose
Numbers35:10 Nena ndi ana a Israele
Numbers35:11 muikire midzi ikukhalireni midzi yopulumukirako; kuti wakupha mnzake wosati dala athawireko.
Numbers35:12 Ndipo midziyo ikukhalireni yakupulumuka wolipsa; kuti wakupha mnzake asafe
Numbers35:13 Ndipo midziyo muipereke ikukhalireni midzi isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako.
Numbers35:14 Mupereke midzi itatu tsidya lino la Yordani
Numbers35:15 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi imene ndiyo yopulumukirako ana a Israele
Numbers35:16 Koma akamkantha ndi chipangizo chachitsulo
Numbers35:17 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli mwala
Numbers35:18 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli chipangizo chamtengo
Numbers35:19 Wolipsa mwazi mwini wake aphe wakupha munthuyo; pakumpeza amuphe.
Numbers35:20 Ndipo akampyoza momkwiyira
Numbers35:21 kapena kumpanda ndi dzanja lake momuda
Numbers35:22 Koma akampyoza modzidzimuka
Numbers35:23 kapena kumponyera mwala wakufetsa munthu
Numbers35:24 pamenepo msonkhano uziweruza pakati pa wokantha mnzakeyo ndi wolipsa mwaziyo monga mwa maweruzo awa;
Numbers35:25 ndipo msonkhano umlanditse wakupha munthu m'dzanja la wolipsa mwazi
Numbers35:26 Koma wakupha munthu akatuluka nthawi iliyonse kulumpha malire a mudzi wake wopulumukirako kumene anathawirako;
Numbers35:27 nakampeza wolipsa mwazi kunja kwa malire a mudzi wake wothawirako
Numbers35:28 popeza wakupha munthu akadakhala m'mudzi wake wopulumukirako kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe; koma atafa mkulu wa ansembe wakupha munthuyo abwere ku dziko lakelake.
Numbers35:29 Ndipo izi zikhale kwa inu lemba la chiweruzo mwa mibadwo yanu
Numbers35:30 Aliyense wakantha munthu
Numbers35:31 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola moyo wa iye adapha munthu
Numbers35:32 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola iye amene adathawira kumudzi wake wopulumukirako
Numbers35:33 Ndipo musamaipsa dziko muli m'mwemo; popeza mwazi uipsa dziko; pakuti kulibe kutetezera dziko chifukwa cha mwazi anaukhetsa m'mwemo
Numbers35:34 Usamadetsa dziko ukhala m'mwemo

Deuteronomy7:15 Ndipo Yehova adzakuchotserani nthenda zonse; sadzakuikirani nthenda zoipa zilizonse za Aejipito muzidziwa zija; koma adzaziika pa onse akudana ndi inu.
Deuteronomy7:16 Ndipo mudzatha mitundu yonse ya anthu amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzapereka kwa inu; diso lanu lisawachitire chifundo; musamatumikira milungu yao; pakuti uku kudzakuchitirani msampha.

Deuteronomy29:4 koma Yehova sanakupatseni mtima wakudziwa
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndipo ndinakutsogolerani zaka makumi anai m'chipululu; zovala zanu sizinatha pathupi panu
Deuteronomy29:6 Simunadya mkate
Deuteronomy29:7 Ndipo pamene munafika pamalo pano
Deuteronomy29:8 ndipo tinalanda dziko lao
Deuteronomy29:9 Chifukwa chake sungani mau a chipangano ichi ndi kuwachita
Deuteronomy29:10 Muimirira inu nonse lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu; mafumu anu
Deuteronomy29:11 makanda anu
Deuteronomy29:12 kuti mulowe chipangano cha Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy29:13 kuti adzikhazikire inu
Deuteronomy29:14 Koma sindichita chipangano ichi ndi lumbiro ili ndi inu nokha;
Deuteronomy29:15 komanso ndi iye wakuimirira pano nafe lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu
Deuteronomy29:16 Pakuti mudziwa chikhalidwe chathu m'dziko la Ejipito
Deuteronomy29:17 ndipo munapenya zonyansa zao
Deuteronomy29:18 kuti angakhale pakati pa inu mwamuna
Deuteronomy29:19 Ndipo kungakhale
Deuteronomy29:20 Yehova sadzamkhululukira
Deuteronomy29:21 Ndipo Yehova adzamsiyanitsa ndi mafuko onse a Israele ndi kumchitira choipa

Joshua8:25 Ndipo onse amene adagwa tsiku lija
Joshua8:26 Popeza Yoswa sanabweze dzanja lake limene anatambasula nalo nthungo
Joshua8:27 Koma ng'ombe ndi zofunkha za mudzi uwu Israele anadzifunkhira monga mwa mau a Yehova amene analamulira Yoswa.
Joshua8:28 Ndipo Yoswa anatentha Ai
Joshua8:29 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Ai
Joshua8:30 Pomwepo Yoswa anamangira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele guwa la nsembe m'phiri la Ebala
Joshua8:31 monga Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu adalamulira ana a Israele
Joshua8:32 Ndipo analembapo pa miyalayi chitsanzo cha chilamulo cha Mose
Joshua8:33 Ndipo Aisraele onse
Joshua8:34 Atatero
Joshua8:35 Panalibe mau amodzi a zonse adazilamulira Mose osawerenga Yoswa pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa Israele
Joshua9:1 Ndipo kunali
Joshua9:2 anasonkhana kuponyana ndi Yoswa ndi Israele
Joshua9:3 Koma pamene nzika za Gibiyoni zinamva zimene Yoswa adachitira Yeriko ndi Ai
Joshua9:4 zinachita momchenjerera
Joshua9:5 ndi nsapato zakale za zigamba pa mapazi ao
Joshua9:6 Ndipo zinamuka kwa Yoswa kumisasa ku Giligala
Joshua9:7 Ndipo amuna a Israele anati kwa Ahivi
Joshua9:8 Koma anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua9:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Joshua9:10 ndi zonse anachitira mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordani
Joshua9:11 Ndipo akulu athu ndi nzika zonse za m'dziko mwathu zidanena nafe ndi kuti
Joshua9:12 Mkate wathu uwu tinadzitengera kamba m'nyumba zathu
Joshua9:13 ndi matumba a vinyo awa tinawadzaza akali atsopano; ndipo taonani
Joshua9:14 Pamenepo amunawo analandirako kamba wao
Joshua9:15 Ndipo Yoswa anachitirana nao mtendere napangana nao
Joshua9:16 Ndipo kunali
Joshua9:17 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo
Joshua9:18 Ndipo ana a Israele sanawakanthe
Joshua9:19 Koma akalonga onse ananena kwa msonkhano wonse
Joshua9:20 Tidzawachitira ichi
Joshua9:21 Ndipo akalonga ananena nao
Joshua9:22 Ndipo Yoswa anawaitana
Joshua9:23 Ndipo tsopano mukhale otembereredwa
Joshua9:24 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa nati
Joshua9:25 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua9:26 Pamenepo anawachitira chotero

Joshua10:1 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:2 anaopa kwambiri
Joshua10:3 Chifukwa chake Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya Yerusalemu anatuma kwa Hohamu
Joshua10:4 Kwerani kwanga kuno
Joshua10:5 Pamenepo mafumu asanu a Aamori
Joshua10:6 Ndipo amuna a ku Gibiyoni anatumira Yoswa mau kuchigono ku Giligala
Joshua10:7 Pamenepo Yoswa anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala
Joshua10:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa
Joshua10:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawadzidzimukitsa; popeza anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala usiku wonse.
Joshua10:10 Ndipo Yehova anawamwaza pamaso pa Israele
Joshua10:11 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:12 Pomwepo Yoswa ananena kwa Yehova tsiku limene Yehova anapereka Aamori pamaso pa ana a Israele; ndipo anati pamaso pa Israele
Joshua10:13 Ndipo dzuwa linalinda
Joshua10:14 Ndipo panalibe tsiku lotere kale lonse kapena m'tsogolomo
Joshua10:15 Pamenepo Yoswa anabwezera
Joshua10:16 Ndipo mafumu awa asanu anathawa
Joshua10:17 Ndipo anauza Yoswa ndi kuti
Joshua10:18 Ndipo Yoswa anati
Joshua10:19 koma inu musaime
Joshua10:20 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:21 anthu onse anabwerera kuchigono kwa Yoswa pa Makeda ndi mtendere. Palibe munthu anachitira chipongwe mmodzi yense wa ana a Israele.
Joshua10:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anati
Joshua10:23 Ndipo anatero
Joshua10:24 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:25 Pamenepo Yoswa ananena nao
Joshua10:26 Ndipo atatero
Joshua10:27 Ndipo kunali
Joshua10:28 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira Makeda tsiku lomwe lija ndi kuukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa
Joshua10:29 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye anapitirira kuchokera ku Makeda kunka ku Libina
Joshua10:30 ndipo Yehova anapereka uwunso
Joshua10:31 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua10:32 napereka Yehova Lakisi m'dzanja la Israele
Joshua10:33 Pamenepo Horamu mfumu ya Gezere anakwera kudzathandiza Lakisi; ndipo Yoswa anamkantha iye ndi anthu ake mpaka sanamsiyire ndi mmodzi yense.
Joshua10:34 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua10:35 Naulanda tsiku lomwelo
Joshua10:36 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye anakwera kuchokera ku Egiloni mpaka ku Hebroni
Joshua10:37 naulanda
Joshua10:38 Pamenepo Yoswa
Joshua10:39 naulanda
Joshua10:40 Motero Yoswa anakantha dziko lonse
Joshua10:41 Ndipo Yoswa anawakantha kuyambira Kadesi-Baranea mpaka ku Gaza
Joshua10:42 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira mafumu awa onse ndi dziko lao nthawi yomweyi; chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anathirira Israele nkhondo.
Joshua10:43 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye
Joshua11:1 Ndipo kunali
Joshua11:2 ndi kwa mafumu akukhala kumpoto kumapiri
Joshua11:3 kwa Akanani kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo
Joshua11:4 Ndipo anatuluka
Joshua11:5 Ndipo mafumu awa onse anasonkhana
Joshua11:6 Koma Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua11:7 Ndipo Yoswa
Joshua11:8 Ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Israele
Joshua11:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawachitira monga Yehova adamuuza: nadula akavalo ao mitsindo
Joshua11:10 Ndipo Yoswa anabwerera m'mbuyo nthawi imeneyi nalanda Hazori nakantha mfumu yake ndi lupanga; pakuti kale Hazori unali waukulu wa maufumu aja onse.
Joshua11:11 Ndipo anakantha amoyo onse anali m'mwemo
Joshua11:12 Ndipo Yoswa analanda midzi yonse ya mafumu awa
Joshua11:13 Koma midzi yonse yomangidwa pa zitunda zao Israele sanaitenthe
Joshua11:14 Ndi zofunkha zonse za midzi iyi ndi ng'ombe ana a Israele anadzifunkhira; koma anakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa anthu onse mpaka adawaononga osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wopuma mpweya.
Joshua11:15 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose mtumiki wake
Joshua11:16 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonselo
Joshua11:17 kuyambira phiri la Halaki lokwera kunka ku Seiri
Joshua11:18 Yoswa anathira nkhondo mafumu awa onse nthawi yaikulu.
Joshua11:19 Palibe mudzi wakupangana mtendere ndi ana a Israele
Joshua11:20 Pakuti chidadzera kwa Yehova kulimbitsa mitima yao kuti athirane nao Aisraele nkhondo kuti Iye awaononge konse
Joshua11:21 Ndipo Yoswa anadza nthawi yomweyo
Joshua11:22 Panalibe Aanaki otsala m'dziko la ana a Israele; koma m'Gaza ndi m'Gati ndi m'Asidodi anatsalamo ena.
Joshua11:23 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonse monga mwa zonse Yehova adazinena kwa Mose; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa Israele
Joshua12:1 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene ana a Israele anawakantha

Joshua12:3 ndi pachidikha mpaka nyanja ya Kineroti kum'mawa
Joshua12:4 Nalandanso malire a Ogi mfumu ya Basani wotsala wa Arefaimu
Joshua12:5 nachita ufumu m'phiri la Heremoni
Joshua12:6 Mose mtumiki wa Yehova ndi ana a Israele anawakantha; ndi Mose mtumiki wa Yehova analipereka kwa Arubeni
Joshua12:7 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene Yoswa ndi ana a Israele anawakantha tsidya lija la Yordani kumadzulo
Joshua12:8 kumapiri ndi kuchigwa

Joshua13:1 Ndipo Yoswa anakalamba
Joshua13:2 Dziko lotsala ndilo: malire onse a Afilisti
Joshua13:3 kuyambira Sihori wokhala chakuno cha Ejipito mpaka malire a Ekeroni kumpoto
Joshua13:4 kumwera dziko lonse la Akanani
Joshua13:5 ndi dziko la Agebala
Joshua13:6 nzika zonse za kumapiri kuyambira Lebanoni
Joshua13:7 Ndipo tsopano uwagawire mafuko asanu ndi anai
Joshua13:8 Pamodzi ndi iye Arubeni ndi Agadi analandira cholowa chao
Joshua13:9 kuyambira pa Aroere
Joshua13:10 ndi midzi yonse ya Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Joshua13:11 ndi Giliyadi
Joshua13:12 ufumu wonse wa Ogi m'Basani
Joshua13:13 Koma ana a Israele sanainge Agesuri kapena Amaakati; koma Gesuri
Joshua13:14 Koma fuko la Levi sanalipatse cholowa; nsembe za Yehova Mulungu wa Israele
Joshua13:15 Ndipo Mose anapatsira fuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua13:16 Malire ao anayambira ku Aroere wokhala m'mphepete mwa chigwa cha Arinoni
Joshua13:17 Hesiboni ndi midzi yake yonse yokhala pachidikha; Diboni
Joshua13:18 ndi Yahazi ndi Kedemoti

Joshua13:20 ndi Betepeori
Joshua13:21 ndi midzi yonse ya kuchidikha
Joshua13:22 Ana a Israele anaphanso ndi lupanga Balamu mwana wa Beori
Joshua13:23 Ndipo malire a ana a Rubeni ndiwo Yordani ndi malire ake. Ndicho cholandira cha ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua13:24 Ndipo Mose anapatsira fuko la Gadi
Joshua13:25 Ndipo malire ao ndiwo Yazere
Joshua13:26 ndi kuyambira Hesiboni mpaka Ramati-Mizipe
Joshua13:27 ndipo m'chigwa Beteharamu

Joshua13:30 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Mahanaimu
Joshua13:31 ndi Giliyadi logawika pakati
Joshua13:32 Izi ndi zolowazi Mose anazigawira m'zidikha za Mowabu
Joshua13:33 Koma fuko la Levi
Joshua14:1 Ndipo awa ndi maiko ana a Israele anawalanda m'dziko la Kanani
Joshua14:2 Kulandira kwao kunachitika ndi kulota maere
Joshua14:3 Pakuti Mose adapatsa mafuko awiri
Joshua14:4 Pakuti ana a Yosefe ndiwo mafuko awiri
Joshua14:5 Monga Yehova analamulira Mose
Joshua14:6 Pamenepo ana a Yuda anadza kwa Yoswa ku Giligala; ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi ananena naye
Joshua14:7 Ndinali ine wa zaka makumi anai muja Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anandituma kuchokera ku Kadesi-Baranea
Joshua14:8 Koma abale anga amene anakwera nane anasungunutsa mitima ya anthu; koma ine ndinamtsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wanga wonse.
Joshua14:9 Ndipo Mose analumbira tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti
Joshua14:10 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua14:11 Koma lero lino ndili wamphamvu monga tsiku lija anandituma Mose; monga mphamvu yanga pamene paja
Joshua14:12 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua14:13 Pamenepo Yoswa anamdalitsa

Joshua14:15 Koma kale dzina la Hebroni linali mudzi wa Araba
Joshua15:1 Ndipo gawo la fuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao linafikira malire a Edomu
Joshua15:2 Ndi malire ao a kumwera
Joshua15:3 natuluka kumwera kwa chikweza cha Akarabimu
Joshua15:4 napitirira ku Azimoni
Joshua15:5 Ndi malire a kum'mawa ndiwo Nyanja ya Mchere
Joshua15:6 nakwera malire kunka ku Betehogila
Joshua15:7 nakwera malire kunka ku Debiri
Joshua15:8 nakwera malire kunka ku chigwa cha mwana wa Hinomu
Joshua15:9 Ndipo analemba malire kuyambira pamwamba pa phiri mpaka chitsime cha madzi cha Nefitowa
Joshua15:10 Ndipo malire anazungulira kuyambira ku Baala kunka kumadzulo
Joshua15:11 natuluka malire kunka ku mbali ya Ekeroni kumpoto; ndipo analemba malire kunka ku Sikeroni
Joshua15:12 Ndi malire a kumadzulo anali ku Nyanja Yaikulu ndiwo malire ake. Awa ndi malire a ana a Yuda pozungulira monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua15:13 Koma Yoswa anampatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune gawo mwa ana a Yuda
Joshua15:14 Ndipo Kalebe anaingitsako ana amuna atatu a Anaki
Joshua15:15 Nakwera komweko kunka kwa nzika za Debiri; koma kale dzina la Debiri ndilo Kiriyati-Sefere.

Joshua15:17 Ndipo Otiniyele mwana wa Kenazi

Joshua15:19 Nati iye
