Joshua16:1 Ndipo gawo la ana a Yosefe linatuluka kuchokera ku Yordani ku Yeriko
Joshua16:2 natuluka ku Betele kunka ku Luzi
Joshua16:3 natsikira kumadzulo kunka ku malire a Ayafileti
Joshua16:4 Motero ana a Yosefe
Joshua16:5 Ndipo malire a ana a Efuremu
Joshua16:6 natuluka malire kumadzulo ku Mikametati kumpoto; nazungulira malire kum'mawa kunka ku Taanatisilo
Joshua16:7 natsika kuchokera ku Yanowa
Joshua16:8 Kuyambira ku Tapuwa malire anamuka kumadzulo ku mtsinje wa Kana; ndi matulukiro ake anali kunyanja. Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Efuremu monga mwa mabanja ao;
Joshua16:9 pamodzi ndi midzi adaipatulira ana a Efuremu pakati pa cholowa cha ana a Manase
Joshua16:10 Ndipo sanaingitse Akanani akukhala m'Gezere; koma Akanani anakhala pakati pa Efuremu
Joshua17:1 Gawo la fuko la Manase ndi ili: pakuti anali woyamba wa Yosefe. Makiri mwana woyamba wa Manase
Joshua17:2 Ndipo maere anagwera ana ena otsala a Manase monga mwa mabanja ao; ana a Abiyezere ndi ana a Heleki
Joshua17:3 Koma Zelofehadi
Joshua17:4 Ndipo anayandikira pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe
Joshua17:5 Ndipo anamgwera Manase magawo khumi
Joshua17:6 popeza ana akazi a Manase adalandira cholowa pakati pa ana ake amuna; ndi dziko la Giliyadi linakhala la ana a Manase otsala.
Joshua17:7 Ndipo malire a Manase anayambira ku Asere
Joshua17:8 Dziko la Tapuwa linali la Manase; koma Tapuwa mpaka malire a Manase linakhala la ana a Efuremu.
Joshua17:9 Natsikira malire ku mtsinje wa Kana
Joshua17:10 kumwera nkwa Efuremu ndi kumpoto nkwa Manase
Joshua17:11 Ndipo m'Isakara ndi m'Asere Manase anali nao Beteseani ndi midzi yake
Joshua17:12 Koma ana a Manase sanathe kuingitsa a m'midzi aja
Joshua17:13 Ndipo kunali pamene ana a Israele atakula mphamvu anasonkhetsa Akanani osawaingitsa onse.
Joshua17:14 Pamenepo ana a Yosefe ananena ndi Yoswa
Joshua17:15 Ndipo Yoswa ananena nao
Joshua17:16 Ndipo ana a Yosefe anati
Joshua17:17 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe
Joshua17:18 koma kuphiriko kudzakhala kwanu pakuti pangakhale mpa mitengo
Joshua18:1 Ndipo msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israele unasonkhana ku Silo
Joshua18:2 Ndipo anatsala mwa ana a Israele mafuko asanu ndi awiri osawagawira cholowa chao.
Joshua18:3 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israele
Joshua18:4 Mudzifunire amuna
Joshua18:5 Ndipo adzaligawa magawo asanu ndi awiri; Yuda adzakhala m'malire ake kumwera
Joshua18:6 Ndipo muzilemba dziko likhale magawo asanu ndi awiri
Joshua18:7 Pakuti Alevi alibe gawo pakati pa inu; pakuti unsembe wa Yehova ndiwo cholowa chao. Koma Gadi
Joshua18:8 Ndipo amunawo ananyamuka
Joshua18:9 Namuka amunawo
Joshua18:10 Ndipo Yoswa anawalotera maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova; ndi apo Yoswa anawagawira ana a Israele dziko
Joshua18:11 Ndipo maere a fuko la ana a Benjamini anakwera monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a gawo lao anatuluka pakati pa ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yosefe.
Joshua18:12 Ndipo malire ao a kumpoto anachokera ku Yordani; ndi malire anakwera ku mbali ya Yeriko kumpoto
Joshua18:13 Ndipo malire anapitirirapo kunka ku Luzi
Joshua18:14 Ndipo malire analembedwa nazungulira ku mbali ya kumadzulo kunka kumwera
Joshua18:15 Ndipo mbali ya kumwera inayambira polekezera Kiriyati-Yearimu; natuluka malire kunka kumadzulo
Joshua18:16 natsikira malire kunka polekezera phiri lokhala patsogolo pa chigwa cha mwana wa Hinomu
Joshua18:17 nalembedwa kunka kumpoto
Joshua18:18 napitirira ku mbali ya pandunji pa Betaraba kumpoto
Joshua18:19 napitirira malire kunka ku mbali ya Betehogila kumpoto; ndi matulukiro ake a malire anali ku nyondo ya kumpoto ya Nyanja ya Mchere; pa kulekezera kwa kumwera kwa Yordani; ndiwo malire a kumwera.
Joshua18:20 Ndipo malire ake mbali ya kum'mawa ndiwo Yordani
Joshua18:21 Koma midzi ya fuko la ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo Yeriko
Joshua18:22 ndi Betaraba
Joshua18:23 ndi Avimu ndi Para
Joshua18:24 ndi Kefaramoni
Joshua18:25 Gibiyoni ndi Rama
Joshua18:26 ndi Mizipa
Joshua18:27 ndi Rekemu
Joshua18:28 ndi Zela
Joshua19:1 Ndipo maere achiwiri anamtulukira Simeoni
Joshua19:2 Ndipo anali nacho cholowa chao Beereseba
Joshua19:3 ndi Hazara-Suwala
Joshua19:4 ndi Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 ndi Zikilagi
Joshua19:6 ndi Betelebaoti
Joshua19:7 Aini
Joshua19:8 ndi milaga yonse yozungulira midzi iyi mpaka Baalati-Bere ndiwo Rama kumwera. Ndicho cholowa cha fuko la ana a Simeoni
Joshua19:9 M'gawo la ana a Yuda muli cholowa cha ana a Simeoni; popeza gawo la ana a Yuda linawachulukira; chifukwa chake ana a Simeoni anali nacho cholowa pakati pa cholowa chao.
Joshua19:10 Ndipo maere achitatu anakwerera ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a cholowa chao anafikira ku Saridi;
Joshua19:11 nakwera malire ao kunka kumadzulo ndi ku Mareyala nafikira ku Dabeseti
Joshua19:12 ndi kuchokera ku Saridi anazungulira kunka kum'mawa kumatulukira dzuwa
Joshua19:13 ndi pochoka pamenepo anapitirira kunka kum'mawa ku Gatihefere
Joshua19:14 nauzungulira malire kumpoto
Joshua19:15 ndi Katati
Joshua19:16 Ichi ndi cholowa cha ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua19:17 Maere achinai anamtulukira Isakara
Joshua19:18 Ndi malire ao anali ku Yezireele
Joshua19:19 ndi Hafaraimu
Joshua19:20 ndi Rabiti ndi Kisiyoni
Joshua19:21 ndi Remeti ndi Enganimu ndi Enihada
Joshua19:22 ndi malire anafikira ku Tabori
Joshua19:23 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Isakara
Joshua19:24 Ndipo maere achisanu analitulukira fuko la ana a Asere monga mwa mabanja ao.
Joshua19:25 Ndi malire ao ndiwo Helekati
Joshua19:26 ndi Alamumeleki
Joshua19:27 nazungulira kotulukira dzuwa ku Betedagoni
Joshua19:28 ndi Ebroni
Joshua19:29 nazungulira malire kunka ku Rama
Joshua19:30 Uma womwe ndi Afeki
Joshua19:31 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Asere monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua19:32 Maere achisanu ndi chimodzi anatulukira ana a Nafutali
Joshua19:33 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Helefe ku thundu wa ku Zaananimu
Joshua19:34 nazungulira malire kunka kumadzulo ku Azinoti-Tabori
Joshua19:35 Ndipo midzi yamalinga ndiyo Zidimu
Joshua19:36 ndi Adama
Joshua19:37 ndi Kedesi
Joshua19:38 ndi Yironi
Joshua19:39 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Nafutali
Joshua19:40 Maere achisanu ndi chiwiri anatulukira fuko la ana a Dani
Joshua19:41 Ndipo malire a cholowa chao anali Zora
Joshua19:42 Saalabini
Joshua19:43 ndi Eloni ndi Timna ndi Ekeroni;
Joshua19:44 ndi Eliteke
Joshua19:45 ndi Yehudi
Joshua19:46 ndi Meyarikoni
Joshua19:47 Koma malire a ana a Dani anatuluka kupitirira iwowa; pakuti ana a Dani anakwera nathira nkhondo ku Lesemu
Joshua19:48 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Dani
Joshua19:49 Ndipo atatha kuligawa dziko likhale cholowa chao monga mwa malire ake
Joshua19:50 monga mwa lamulo la Yehova anampatsa mudzi umene anawapempha
Joshua19:51 Izi ndizo zolowa anazigawa Eleazara wansembe
Joshua20:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua20:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele ndi kuti
Joshua20:3 Kuti athawireko wakupha munthu osamupha dala
Joshua20:4 Munthu akathawira umodzi wa midzi iyi
Joshua20:5 Ndipo akamlondola wolipsa mwazi
Joshua20:6 Ndipo azikhala m'mudzimo mpaka adzaima pamaso pa msonkhano anene mlandu wake
Joshua20:7 Ndipo anapatula Kedesi m'Galileya ku mapiri a Nafutali
Joshua20:8 Ndipo tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa kwa Yeriko
Joshua20:9 Iyi ndi midzi yoikidwira ana onse a Israele
Joshua21:1 Pamenepo akulu a nyumba za atate a Alevi anayandikira kwa Eleazara wansembe
Joshua21:2 nanena nao ku Silo m'dziko la Kanani
Joshua21:3 Ndipo ana a Israele anapatsa Alevi
Joshua21:4 Ndipo maere anatulukira mabanja a Akohati; ndipo molota maere ana a Aroni wansembe
Joshua21:5 Ndipo ana otsala a Kohati analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a fuko la Efuremu
Joshua21:6 Ndipo ana a Geresoni analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a fuko la Isakara
Joshua21:7 Ana a Merari
Joshua21:8 Motero ana a Israele anapatsa Alevi midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao
Joshua21:9 Ndipo anapatsa motapa pa fuko la ana a Yuda
Joshua21:10 kuti ikhale ya ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akohati
Joshua21:11 Ndipo anawapatsa mudzi wa Araba
Joshua21:12 Koma minda ya mudzi ndi milaga yake anapatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune
Joshua21:13 Ndipo kwa ana a Aroni wansembe anapatsa Hebroni ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:14 ndi Yatiri ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:15 ndi Holoni ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:16 ndi Aini ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:17 Ndipo motapira fuko la Benjamini
Joshua21:18 Anatoti ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:19 Midzi yonse ya ana a Aroni
Joshua21:20 Ndipo mabanja a ana a Kohati
Joshua21:21 Ndipo anawapatsa Sekemu ndi mabusa ake ku mapiri a Efuremu
Joshua21:22 ndi Kibizaimu ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:23 Ndipo motapira fuko la Dani
Joshua21:24 Ayaloni ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:25 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati
Joshua21:26 Midzi yonse ya mabanja a ana otsala a Kohati ndiyo khumi ndi mabusa ao.
Joshua21:27 Ndipo anapatsa ana a Geresoni
Joshua21:28 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Isakara
Joshua21:29 Yaramuti ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:30 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Asere
Joshua21:31 Helekati ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:32 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Nafutali
Joshua21:33 Midzi yonse ya Ageresoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi mabusa ao.
Joshua21:34 Ndipo anapatsa kwa mabanja a ana a Merari
Joshua21:35 Dimina ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:36 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Rubeni
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:38 Ndipo motapira m'fuko la Gadi
Joshua21:39 Hesiboni ndi mabusa ake
Joshua21:40 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi ya ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao
Joshua21:41 Midzi yonse ya Alevi
Joshua21:42 Midzi iyi yonse inali nao mabusa ao pozungulira pao: inatero midzi iyi yonse.
Joshua21:43 Motero Yehova anawapatsa Israele dziko lonse adalumbiralo kuwapatsa makolo ao: ndipo analilandira laolao
Joshua21:44 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa mpumulo pozungulira ponse
Joshua21:45 Sikadasowa kanthu konse ka zinthu zokoma zonse Yehova adazinenera nyumba ya Israele; zidachitika zonse.
Joshua22:1 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana Arubeni ndi Agadi
Joshua22:2 nanena nao
Joshua22:3 simunasiya abale anu masiku awa ambiri mpaka lero lino
Joshua22:4 Ndipo tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanu wapumitsa abale anu
Joshua22:5 Koma samalirani bwino kuti muchite chilangizo ndi chilamulo zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani
Joshua22:6 Momwemo Yoswa anawadalitsa
Joshua22:7 Ndipo gawo limodzi la fuko la Manase
Joshua22:8 nanena nao ndi kuti
Joshua22:9 Ndipo ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:10 Ndipo pamene anafikira mbali ya ku Yordani
Joshua22:11 Ndipo ana a Israele anamva anthu akuti
Joshua22:12 Pamene ana a Israele anamva ichi msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israele anasonkhana ku Silo
Joshua22:13 Ndipo ana a Israele anatumiza kwa ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:14 ndi akalonga khumi naye; nyumba imodzi ya atate kalonga mmodzi
Joshua22:15 M'mene anafika kwa ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:16 Utero msonkhano wonse wa Yehova
Joshua22:17 Kodi mphulupulu ya ku Peori itichipera
Joshua22:18 kuti mubwerera lero lino kusatsata Yehova? Ndipo kudzakhala kuti popeza lero mupikisana ndi Yehova
Joshua22:19 Koma mukayesa dziko la cholowa chanu nchodetsa
Joshua22:20 Kodi Akani mwana wa Zera sanalakwe m'choperekedwacho
Joshua22:21 Pamenepo ana a Rubeni
Joshua22:22 Yehova Chauta Mulungu
Joshua22:23 tadzimangira guwa la nsembe
Joshua22:24 ndipo ngati ife sitinachita ichi chifukwa cha kuopa mlandu
Joshua22:25 Pakuti Yehova anaika Yordani ukhale malire pakati pa ife ndi inu
Joshua22:26 Chifukwa chake tinati
Joshua22:27 koma lidzakhala mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu
Joshua22:28 Chifukwa chake tinati
Joshua22:29 Sikungatheke kuti tipikisane ndi Yehova ndi kubwerera lero kusatsata Yehova
Joshua22:30 Pamene Finehasi wansembe
Joshua22:31 Ndipo Finehasi
Joshua22:32 Ndipo Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara wansembe
Joshua22:33 Ndipo mauwo anakomera ana a Israele pamaso pao; ndi ana a Israele analemekeza Mulungu
Joshua22:34 Ndipo ana a Rubeni ndi ana a Gadi analitcha guwa la nsembelo: Ndilo mboni pakati pa ife kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu.
Joshua23:1 Ndipo atapita masiku ambiri
Joshua23:2 Yoswa anaitana Aisraele onse
Joshua23:3 ndipo munapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu anachitira mitundu iyi yonse ya anthu chifukwa cha inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye anakuthirirani nkhondo.
Joshua23:4 Taonani
Joshua23:5 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu Iyeyu adzawapirikitsa pamaso panu
Joshua23:6 Koma mulimbike mtima kwambiri kusunga ndi kuchita zonse zolembedwa m'buku la chilamulo cha Mose
Joshua23:7 osalowa pakati pa amitundu awa otsala mwa inu; kapena kutchula dzina la milungu yao; osalumbiritsa nalo
Joshua23:8 koma muumirire Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua23:9 Pakuti Yehova anaingitsa pamaso panu mitundu yaikulu ndi yamphamvu; koma inu
Joshua23:10 Munthu mmodzi wa inu adzapirikitsa anthu chikwi chimodzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amathirira inu nkhondo monga ananena ndi inu.
Joshua23:11 Potero mudzisamalire ndithu kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Joshua23:12 Koma
Joshua23:13 dziwani ndithu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu sadzalandanso dziko la amitundu awa kuwachotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala kwa inu deka ndi msampha ndi mkwapulo m'nthiti mwanu
Joshua23:14 Ndipo taonani
Joshua23:15 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga zakugwerani zokoma zonse anakunenerani Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua23:16 Mukalakwira chipangano cha Yehova Mulungu wanu chimene analamulira inu ndi kumuka ndi kutumikira milungu ina ndi kuigwadira
Joshua24:1 Ndipo Yoswa anasonkhanitsa mafuko onse a Israele ku Sekemu

Joshua24:4 Ndi kwa Isaki ndinapatsa Yakobo ndi Esau
Joshua24:5 Pamenepo ndinatuma Mose ndi Aroni
Joshua24:6 Ndipo ndinatulutsa atate anu m'Ejipito; ndipo munadza kunyanja; koma Aejipito analondola atate anu ndi magaleta ndi apakavalo mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira.
Joshua24:7 Ndipo pamene anafuula kwa Yehova
Joshua24:8 Pamenepo ndinakulowetsani inu m'dziko la Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordani; nagwirana nanu iwowa; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu
Joshua24:9 Pamenepo Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Joshua24:10 koma sindinafuna kumvera Balamu
Joshua24:11 Pamenepo munaoloka Yordani
Joshua24:12 Ndipo ndinatuma mavu atsogolere inu
Joshua24:13 Ndipo ndinakupatsani dziko limene simunagwiramo ntchito
Joshua24:14 Ndipo tsopano
Joshua24:15 Ndipo ngati kutumikira Yehova kukuipirani mudzisankhire lero amene mudzamtumikira
Joshua24:16 Ndipo anthu anayankha
Joshua24:17 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi Iye amene anatikweza kutitulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito kunyumba ya akapolo
Joshua24:18 ndipo Yehova anaingitsa pamaso pathu anthu awa onse

Judges1:1 Ndipo atafa Yoswa
Judges1:2 Ndipo Yehova anati
Judges1:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi Simeoni mkulu wake
Judges1:4 Ndipo Yuda atakwera
Judges1:5 Ndipo anapeza Adoni-Bezeki m'Bezeki
Judges1:6 Koma Adoni-Bezeki anathawa; ndipo anampirikitsa
Judges1:7 Pamenepo anati Adoni-Bezeki
Judges1:8 Ndipo ana a Yuda anachita nkhondo pa Yerusalemu
Judges1:9 Ndipo atatero ana a Yuda anatsika kuthirana nao nkhondo Akanani akukhala kumapiri
Judges1:10 Ndipo Yuda anamuka kwa Akanani akukhala m'Hebroni; koma kale dzina la Hebroni ndilo mudzi wa Ariba; ndipo anakantha Sesai
Judges1:11 Pochoka pamenepo anamuka kwa nzika za ku Debiri
Judges1:12 Ndipo Kalebe anati
Judges1:13 Ndipo Otiniyele
Judges1:14 Ndipo kunali
Judges1:15 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges1:16 Ndipo ana a Mkeni mlamu wake wa Mose
Judges1:17 Ndipo Yuda anamuka ndi Simeoni mkulu wake
Judges1:18 Yuda analandanso Gaza ndi malire ake
Judges1:19 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yuda
Judges1:20 Ndipo anapatsa Kalebe Hebroni monga Mose adanena; iye nawaingitsa komweko ana amuna atatu a Anaki.
Judges1:21 Koma ana a Benjamini sanaingitse Ayebusi okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma Ayebusi anakhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi ana a Benjamini
Judges1:22 Ndipo anakwera iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe
Judges1:23 Ndipo iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe anatumiza ozonda ku Betele. Koma kale dzina la mudziwo ndilo Luzi.
Judges1:24 Ndipo alonda anaona munthu alikutuluka m'mudzi
Judges1:25 Nawaonetsa polowera m'mudzi iye
Judges1:26 Ndipo munthuyo anamuka ku dziko la Ahiti
Judges1:27 Koma Manase sanaingitse a ku Beteseani ndi midzi yake kapena a Taanaki ndi midzi yake
Judges1:28 Ndipo kunali
Judges1:29 Ndipo Efuremu sanaingitse Akanani okhala m'Gezere; koma Akanani anakhala m'Gezere pakati pao.
Judges1:30 Zebuloni sanaingitse nzika za ku Kitironi
Judges1:31 Asere sanaingitse nzika za ku Ako
Judges1:32 koma Asere anakhala pakati pa Akanani nzika za kudziko; pakuti sanawaingitse.
Judges1:33 Nafutali sanaingitse nzika za ku Betesemesi
Judges1:34 Ndipo Aamori anakankha ana a Dani akhale kumapiri pakuti sanawalole atsikire kuchigwa;
Judges1:35 Aamori anakhumbanso kukhala kuphiri la Heresi
Judges1:36 Ndipo malire a Aamori anayambira pokwerera pa Akarabimu
Judges2:1 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala kunka ku Bokimu. Ndipo anati
Judges2:2 ndipo inu
Judges2:3 Chifukwa chakenso ndinati
Judges2:4 Ndipo kunali
Judges2:5 Potero analitcha dzina la malowo Bokimu: namphera Yehova nsembe pomwepo.
Judges2:6 Pamene Yoswa atawalola anthu amuke
Judges2:7 Ndipo anthuwo anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa
Judges2:8 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a cholowa chake m'Timnati-Heresi
Judges2:10 Ndiponso mbadwo uwu wonse unasonkhanidwa kuikidwa kwa makolo ao; nuuka mbadwo wina pambuyo pao; wosadziwa Yehova kapena ntchitoyi adaichitira Israele.
Judges2:11 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges2:12 nasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao
Judges2:13 Ndipo anasiya Yehova
Judges2:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele
Judges2:15 Kuli konse anatuluka
Judges2:16 Ndipo Yehova anautsa oweruza
Judges2:17 Koma sanamvere angakhale oweruza ao
Judges2:18 Ndipo pamene Yehova anawaukitsira oweruza
Judges2:19 Koma kunali atafa woweruzayo anabwerera m'mbuyo
Judges2:20 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele; nati Iye
Judges2:21 Inenso sindionjeza kuingitsa pamaso pao a mitundu ina imene Yoswa adaisiya pakufa iyeyu;
Judges2:22 kuti ndiyese nayo Israele ngati adzasunga njira ya Yehova kuyendamo monga anaisunga makolo ao
Judges2:23 Motero Yehova analeka mitundu iyi osaiingitsa msanga
Judges3:1 Ndipo iyo ndiyo mitundu ya anthu anaisiyapo Yehova kuyesa nayo Israele
Judges3:2 chifukwa chake ndicho chokha chakuti adziwitse mibadwo ya ana a Israele ndi kuwaphunzitsa nkhondo
Judges3:3 anasiya mafumu asanu a Afilisti ndi Akanani onse
Judges3:4 Amenewo anakhala choyesera Israele kuti Yehova adziwe ngati adzamvere malamulo ake
Judges3:5 Ndipo ana a Israele anakhala pakati pa Akanani
Judges3:6 nakwatira ana akazi a iwowa
Judges3:7 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges3:8 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele ndipo anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Kusani-Risataimu
Judges3:9 Ndipo pamene ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova
Judges3:10 Ndipo unamdzera mzimu wa Yehova
Judges3:11 Pamenepo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai; ndi Otiniyele mwana wa Kenazi anafa.
Judges3:12 Koma ana a Israele anaonjezanso kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; pamenepo Yehova analimbitsa Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu pa Israele
Judges3:13 Ndipo anadzisonkhanitsira ana a Amoni ndi a Amaleke
Judges3:14 Ndipo ana a Israele anatumikira Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu.
Judges3:15 Koma pamene ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova
Judges3:16 Ndipo Ehudi anadzisulira lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse utali wake mkono; nalimangirira pansi pa zovala zake pa ntchafu ya kulamanja.
Judges3:17 Ndipo anapereka mtulo kwa Egiloni
Judges3:18 Ndipo atatha kupereka mtulowo
Judges3:19 Koma iye mwini anabwerera pa mafano osema ali ku Giligala
Judges3:20 Ndipo Ehudi anamdzera alikukhala pa yekha m'chipinda chosanja chopitidwa mphepo. Nati Ehudi
Judges3:21 Ndipo Ehudi anatulutsa dzanja lake lamanzere nagwira lupanga ku ntchafu ya kulamanja nampyoza m'mimba mwake;
Judges3:22 ndi chigumbu chake chinalowa kutsata mpeni wake; ndi mafuta anaphimba mpeniwo
Judges3:23 Pamenepo Ehudi anatuluka kukhonde namtsekera pamakomo pa chipinda chosanja nafungulira.
Judges3:24 Ndipo atatuluka iye
Judges3:25 Ndipo analindirira mpaka anachita manyazi; koma taonani
Judges3:26 Ndipo Ehudi anapulumuka pakuchedwa iwo
Judges3:27 Ndipo kunali
Judges3:28 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges3:29 Ndipo anakantha Amowabu nyengo ija anthu zikwi khumi
Judges3:30 Motero anagonjetsa Mowabu tsiku lija pansi pa dzanja la Israele. Ndipo dziko linapumula zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu.
Judges3:31 Atapita iye kunali Samigara
Judges4:1 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges4:2 Ndipo Yehova anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Yabini mfumu ya Kanani
Judges4:3 Ndipo ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova; pakuti anali nao magaleta achitsulo mazana asanu ndi anai; napsinja ana a Israele kolimba zaka makumi awiri.
Judges4:4 Ndipo Debora
Judges4:5 Ndipo anakhala patsinde pa mgwalangwa wa Debora pakati pa Rama ndi Betele ku mapiri a Efuremu; ndi ana a Israele anakwera kwa iye awaweruze.
Judges4:6 Ndipo anatuma
Judges4:7 Ndipo ndidzamkoka Sisera
Judges4:8 Ndipo Baraki anati kwa iye
Judges4:9 Nati iye
Judges4:10 Ndipo Baraki anaitana Zebuloni ndi Nafutali asonkhane ku Kedesi; iye nakwera ndi anthu zikwi khumi akumtsata; Deboranso anakwera kunka naye.
Judges4:11 Ndipo Hebere Mkeni anadzisiyanitsa ndi Akeni
Judges4:12 Ndipo anauza Sisera kuti Baraki mwana wa Abinowamu wakwera kuphiri la Tabori.
Judges4:13 Pamenepo Sisera anasonkhanitsa magaleta ake onse ndiwo magaleta mazana asanu ndi anai achitsulo
Judges4:14 Ndipo Debora anati kwa Baraki
Judges4:15 Ndipo Ambuye anaononga Sisera ndi magaleta onse ndi gulu lankhondo lonse
Judges4:16 Koma Baraki anatsata magaleta ndi gululo mpaka Haroseti wa amitundu; ndi gulu lonse lankhondo la Sisera linagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa
Judges4:17 Koma Sisera anathawira choyenda pansi ku hema wa Yaele mkazi wa Hebere Mkeni; pakuti panali mtendere pakati pa Yabini mfumu ya Hazori
Judges4:18 Ndipo Yaele anatuluka kukomana ndi Sisera
Judges4:19 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges4:20 Ndipo Sisera ananena naye
Judges4:21 Pamenepo Yaele mkazi wa Hebere anatenga chichiri cha hema
Judges4:22 Ndipo taonani
Judges4:23 Momwemo Mulungu anagonjetsa tsiku lija Yabini mfumu ya Kanani pamaso pa ana a Israele.
Judges4:24 Ndipo dzanja la ana a Israele linamkabe ndi kulimbika pa Yabini mfumu ya Kanani mpaka adamuononga Yabini mfumu ya Kanani.
Judges5:1 Ndipo Debora ndi Baraki mwana wa Abinowamu anaimba tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti
Judges5:2 Lemekezani Yehova pakuti atsogoleri m'Israele anatsogolera
Judges5:3 Imvani mafumu inu; tcherani makutu
Judges5:4 Yehova
Judges5:5 Mapiri anagwedezeka pamaso pa Yehova
Judges5:6 Masiku a Samigara
Judges5:7 Milaga idalekeka m'Israele
Judges5:8 Anasankha milungu yatsopano
Judges5:9 Mtima wanga uvomerezana nao olamulira a m'Israele
Judges5:10 Inu akuyenda okwera pa abulu oyera
Judges5:11 Posamveka phokoso la amauta potunga madzi
Judges5:12 Galamuka
Judges5:13 Pamenepo omveka otsala anatsika ndi anthu; Yehova ananditsikira pakati pa achamuna.
Judges5:14 Anafika Aefuremu amene adika mizu m'Amaleke; Benjamini anakutsata iwe pakati pa anthu ako. Ku Makiri kudachokera olamulira
Judges5:15 Akalonga a Isakara anali ndi Debora; monga Isakara momwemo Baraki
Judges5:16 Wakhaliranji pakati pa makola
Judges5:17 Giliyadi anakhala tsidya lija la Yordani; ndi Dani
Judges5:18 Zebuloni ndiwo anthu anataya moyo wao mpaka imfa
Judges5:19 Anadza mafumu nathira nkhondo; pamenepo anathira nkhondo mafumu a Kanani. M'Taanaki
Judges5:20 Nyenyezi zinathira nkhondo yochokera kumwamba
Judges5:21 Mtsinje wa Kisoni unawakokolola
Judges5:22 Pamenepo ziboda za akavalo zinaguguda. Ndi kutumphatumpha
Judges5:23 Mutemberere Merozi
Judges5:24 Wodalitsika
Judges5:25 Mwamunayo anapempha madzi
Judges5:26 Dzanja lake analitambasulira kuchichiri
Judges5:27 Pa mapazi ake anabzong'onyoka
Judges5:28 Anapenyerera ali pazenera
Judges5:29 Akazi anzake omveka anzeru anamyankha; koma anadziyankhira yekha mau.
Judges5:30 Kodi sanapeze
Judges5:31 Adani anu onse
Judges6:1 Koma ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Midiyani zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri.
Judges6:2 Pamene dzanja la Midiyani linalaka Israele
Judges6:3 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:4 nawamangira misasa
Judges6:5 Pakuti anakwera nazo zoweta zao ndi mahema ao
Judges6:6 Ndipo Israele anafooka kwambiri chifukwa cha Midiyani; ndipo ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova.
Judges6:7 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:8 Yehova anatuma munthu mneneri kwa ana a Israele
Judges6:9 ndipo ndinakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aejipito
Judges6:10 ndipo ndinati kwa inu
Judges6:11 Pamenepo anadza mthenga wa Yehova
Judges6:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera
Judges6:13 Ndipo Gideoni ananena naye
Judges6:14 Pamenepo Yehova anamtembenukira
Judges6:15 Ndipo anati kwa Iye
Judges6:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye
Judges6:17 Ndipo anati kwa Iye
Judges6:18 Musachoke pano
Judges6:19 Ndipo Gideoni analowa
Judges6:20 Koma mthenga wa Mulungu ananena naye
Judges6:21 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anatambasula nsonga ya ndodo inali m'dzanja lake
Judges6:22 Pamenepo Gideoni anaona kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova
Judges6:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye
Judges6:24 Pamenepo Gideoni anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe pomwepo; nalitcha Yehova-ndiye-mtendere; likali m'Ofura wa Aabiyezere ndi pano pomwe.
Judges6:25 Ndipo kunali
Judges6:26 numangire Yehova Mulungu wako guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa lingali
Judges6:27 Pamenepo Gideoni anatenga amuna khumi mwa anyamata ake
Judges6:28 Ndipo pakuuka mamawa amuna akumudziwo
Judges6:29 Nanenana wina ndi mnzake
Judges6:30 Pamenepo amuna akumudziwo anati kwa Yowasi
Judges6:31 Koma Yowasi anati kwa onse akumuimirira
Judges6:32 Chifukwa chake anamutcha tsiku lija Yerubaala
Judges6:33 Pamenepo Amidiyani onse ndi Aamaleke ndi ana a kum'mawa anasonkhana pamodzi naoloka
Judges6:34 Koma mzimu wa Yehova unavala Gideoni; naomba lipenga iye
Judges6:35 Ndipo anatuma mithenga kwa Manase konse; ndi iwonso analalikidwa kumtsata iye; natuma mithenga kwa Asere
Judges6:36 Ndipo Gideoni anati kwa Mulungu
Judges6:37 taonani
Judges6:38 Ndipo kunatero; pakuti anauka mamawa
Judges6:39 Ndipo Gideoni ananena ndi Mulungu
Judges6:40 Ndipo Mulungu anatero usiku uja; pakuti panauma pachikopa pokha
Judges7:1 Pamenepo Yerubaala
Judges7:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni. Anthu ali ndi iwe andichulukira kuti ndipereke Midiyani m'dzanja lao; angadzitame Israele pa Ine
Judges7:3 Ndipo tsopano
Judges7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Gideoni
Judges7:5 Ndipo anatsikira nao anthu kumadzi; ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:6 Ndi kuwerenga kwa iwo akukhatira
Judges7:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:8 Pamenepo anthu anatenga kamba m'dzanja lao
Judges7:9 Ndipo kunali usiku womwewo
Judges7:10 Koma ngati uopa kutsika
Judges7:11 nudzamva zonena iwo; utatero manja ako adzalimbikitsidwa kutsikira kumisasa. Pamenepo anatsikira ndi Pura mnyamata wake ku chilekezero cha anthu azida a m'misasa.
Judges7:12 Ndipo Amidiyani ndi Aamaleke ndi ana onse a kum'mawa ali gonere m'chigwa
Judges7:13 Ndipo pakufikako Gideoni
Judges7:14 Ndipo mnzake anayankha nati
Judges7:15 Ndipo kunali
Judges7:16 Ndipo anagawa amuna mazana atatu akhale magulu atatu
Judges7:17 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges7:18 Pamene ndiomba lipenga
Judges7:19 Motero Gideoni ndi amuna zana anali naye anafikira ku chilekezero cha misasa poyambira ulonda wa pakati
Judges7:20 Ndi magulu atatuwo anaomba malipenga
Judges7:21 Ndipo anaima yense m'mbuto mwake pozungulira misasa; pamenepo anathamanga a m'misasa onse
Judges7:22 Ndipo mazana atatuwa anaomba malipenga
Judges7:23 Pamenepo anthu a Israele analalikidwa kuchokera ku Nafutali
Judges7:24 Gideoni anatumanso mithenga ku mapiri onse a Efuremu ndi kuti
Judges7:25 Ndipo anagwira akalonga awiri a Midiyani
Judges8:1 Ndipo amuna a Efuremu anati kwa iye
Judges8:2 Koma ananena nao
Judges8:3 Mulungu anapereka m'dzanja lanu akalonga a Midiyani
Judges8:4 Ndipo Gideoni anafika ku Yordani
Judges8:5 Ndipo ananena kwa amuna a ku Sukoti
Judges8:6 Koma akalonga a ku Sukoti anati
Judges8:7 Ndipo Gideoni anati
Judges8:8 Ndipo anachokapo kukwera ku Penuwele
Judges8:9 Ndipo ananenanso kwa amuna a ku Penuwele ndi kuti
Judges8:10 Zeba ndi Zalimuna ndipo anali m'Karikori
Judges8:11 Ndipo Gideoni anakwerera njira ya iwo okhala m'mahema kum'mawa kwa Noba
Judges8:12 Ndipo Zeba ndi Zalimuna anathawa; koma anawatsata
Judges8:13 Pamenepo Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi anabwerera kunkhondo pokwerera pa Heresi.
Judges8:14 Ndipo anagwira mnyamata wa anthu a ku Sukoti
Judges8:15 Ndipo anafika kwa amuna a ku Sukoti
Judges8:16 Ndipo anagwira akulu a m'mudzi ndi minga ya kuchipululu ndi mitungwi
Judges8:17 Ndipo anagamula nsanja ya Penuwele
Judges8:18 Pamenepo anati kwa Zeba ndi Zalimuna
Judges8:19 Ndipo anati
Judges8:20 Nati kwa Yetere mwana wake woyamba
Judges8:21 Pamenepo Zeba ndi Zalimuna anati
Judges8:22 Pamenepo anthu a Israele anati kwa Gideoni
Judges8:23 Koma Gideoni ananena nao. Sindidzalamulira inu
Judges8:24 Gideoni anatinso kwa iwo
Judges8:25 Ndipo anayankha
Judges8:26 Ndipo kulemera kwake kwa maperere agolide adawapempha ndiko masekeli chikwi chimodzi ndi mazana asanu ndi awiri; osawerenga mphande
Judges8:27 Ndipo Gideoni anawapanga fano
Judges8:28 Motero anagonjetsa Amidiyani pamaso pa ana a Israele
Judges8:29 Ndipo Yerubaala
Judges8:30 Nakhala nao ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri Gideoni
Judges8:31 Ndipo mkazi wake wamng'ono wokhala m'Sekemu
Judges8:32 Ndipo Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi anafa atakalamba bwino
Judges8:33 Ndipo kunali
Judges8:34 Ndi ana a Israele sanakumbukire Yehova Mulungu wao
Judges8:35 osachitira chifundo nyumba ya Yerubaala
Judges9:1 Koma Abimeleki mwana wa Yerubaala anamuka ku Sekemu kwa abale a amai wake
Judges9:2 Nenanitu m'makutu mwa eni ake onse a ku Sekemu
Judges9:3 Pamenepo abale a amake anamnenera mau awa onse m'makutu a eni ake onse a Sekemu; ndi mitima yao inalunjika kutsata Abimeleki; pakuti anati
Judges9:4 Ndipo anampatsa ndalama makumi asanu ndi awiri za m'nyumba ya Baala-Beriti; ndipo Abimeleki analembera nazo anthu opanda pake ndi opepuka amene anamtsata.
Judges9:5 Ndipo anamuka kunyumba ya atate wake ku Ofura
Judges9:6 Pamenepo anasonkhana eni ake onse a ku Sekemu
Judges9:7 Ndipo atamuuza Yotamu
Judges9:8 Kumuka inamuka mitengo kudzidzozera mfumu; niti kwa mtengo wa azitona
Judges9:9 Koma mtengo wa azitona unati kwa iwo
Judges9:10 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mkuyu. Tiye iwe
Judges9:11 Koma mkuyu unanena nao
Judges9:12 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mpesa
Judges9:13 Koma mpesa unanena nao
Judges9:14 Pamenepo mitengo yonse inati kwa nkandankhuku
Judges9:15 Ndipo nkandankhuku unati kwa mitengo
Judges9:16 Ndipo tsopano
Judges9:17 pakuti atate wanga anakugwirirani nkhondo
Judges9:18 koma mwaukira nyumba ya atate wanga lero lino
Judges9:19 ngati tsono mwachitira Yerubaala ndi nyumba yake zoona ndi zangwiro lero lino
Judges9:20 koma ngati simunatero
Judges9:21 Pamenepo Yotamu anafulumira
Judges9:22 Abimeleki atakhala kalonga wa Israele zaka zitatu
Judges9:23 Mulungu anatumiza mzimu woipa pakati pa Abimeleki ndi eni ake a ku Sekemu; ndi eni ake a ku Sekemu anamchitira Abimeleki mosakhulupirika;
Judges9:24 kuti chiwawa adachitira ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri a Yerubaala chimdzere
Judges9:25 Ndipo eni ake a ku Sekemu anaika omlalira pamwamba pa mapiri; amene anawawanya onse akudzera njirayi; ndipo anamuuza Abimeleki.
Judges9:26 Ndipo Gaala
Judges9:27 Ndipo anatuluka kunka kuminda
Judges9:28 Pamenepo Gaala
Judges9:29 Mwenzi anthu awa akadakhala m'dzanja langa; ndikadamchotsadi Abimeleki. Ndipo anati kwa Abimeleki
Judges9:30 Pamene Zebuli woyang'anira mudzi anamva mau a Gaala mwana wa Ebedi
Judges9:31 Natuma mithenga kwa Abimeleki ku Aruma monyenga nati
Judges9:32 Ndipo tsopano
Judges9:33 ndipo kukhale kuti m'mawa
Judges9:34 Pamenepo Abimeleki anauka ndi anthu onse anali naye
Judges9:35 Ndipo Gaala mwana wa Ebedi anatuluka
Judges9:36 Ndipo pamene Gaala anapenya anthuwo anati kwa Zebuli
Judges9:37 Koma Gaala ananenanso
Judges9:38 Pamenepo Zebuli anati kwa iye
Judges9:39 Ndipo Gaala anatuluka pamaso pao pa eni ake a ku Sekemu
Judges9:40 Koma Abimeleki anampirikitsa
Judges9:41 Ndipo Abimeleki anakhala ku Aruma; ndi Zebuli anaingitsa Gaala ndi abale ake kuti asakhale m'Sekemu.
Judges9:42 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake
Judges9:43 Pamenepo anatenga anthu
Judges9:44 Ndi Abimeleki ndi magulu okhala naye anathamanga naima polowera pa chipata cha mudzi; ndi magulu awiriwo anagwera onse okhala m'munda
Judges9:45 Ndipo Abimeleki analimbana ndi mudzi tsiku lija lonse; nalanda mudzi nawapha anthu anali m'mwemo; napasula mudzi; nawazapo mchere.
Judges9:46 Ndipo pamene eni ake onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu anachimva
Judges9:47 Ndipo anauza Abimeleki kuti amuna onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu asonkhane.
Judges9:48 Pamenepo Abimeleki anakwera kunka kuphiri la Zalimoni
Judges9:49 Ndi anthu onse anadulanso yense nthambi yake
Judges9:50 Pamenepo Abimeleki anamuka ku Tebezi
Judges9:51 Koma m'mudzimo munali nsanja yolimba nathawira kumeneko amuna ndi akazi onse
Judges9:52 Ndipo Abimeleki anafika kunsanja
Judges9:53 Ndipo mkazi wina anaponya mwana wa mphero pamutu pa Abimeleki
Judges9:54 Pamenepo anaitana msanga mnyamata wake wosenza zida zake
Judges9:55 Pamene amuna a Israele anaona kuti adafa Abimeleki anamuka yense kumalo kwake.
Judges9:56 Momwemo Mulungu anambwezera Abimeleki choipacho anachitira atate wake ndi kuwapha abale ake makumi asanu ndi awiri.
Judges9:57 Ndipo Mulungu anawabwezera choipa chonse cha amuna a ku Sekemu pamitu pao

Judges10:2 Ndipo anaweruza Israele zaka makumi awiri ndi zitatu
Judges10:3 Atafa iye
Judges10:4 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu okwera pa ana a abulu makumi atatu
Judges10:5 Nafa Yairi
Judges10:6 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova
Judges10:7 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele

Judges10:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ana a Israele

Judges10:18 Ndipo anthu
Judges11:1 Yefita Mgiliyadi ndipo anali ngwazi yamphamvu
Judges11:2 Ndipo mkazi wa Giliyadi anambalira ana amuna; koma atakula ana amuna a mkaziyo anampirikitsa Yefita
Judges11:3 Pamenepo Yefita anathawa abale ake
Judges11:4 Ndipo kunali
Judges11:5 ndipo kunatero
Judges11:6 nati kwa Yefita
Judges11:7 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akulu a Giliyadi
Judges11:8 Ndipo akulu a Giliyadi ananena ndi Yefita
Judges11:9 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akulu a Giliyadi
Judges11:10 Ndipo akulu a Giliyadi anati kwa Yefita
Judges11:11 Pamenepo Yefita anamuka ndi akulu a Giliyadi
Judges11:12 Ndipo Yefita anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni
Judges11:13 Ndipo mfumu ya ana a Amoni inati kwa mithenga ya Yefita
Judges11:14 Ndipo Yefita anatumanso mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni;
Judges11:15 nanena naye
Judges11:16 pakuti pakukwera iwo kuchokera ku Ejipito Israele anayenda m'chipululu mpaka Nyanja Yofiira
Judges11:17 pamenepo Israele anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya Edomu
Judges11:18 Pamenepo anayenda m'chipululu
Judges11:19 Ndipo Israele anatuma mithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Judges11:20 Koma Sihoni sanakhulupirire Israele kuti apitire pakati pa malire ake; koma Sihoni anamemeza anthu ake onse
Judges11:21 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anapereka Sihoni ndi anthu ake onse m'dzanja la Israele
Judges11:22 Ndipo analandira akhale cholowa chao
Judges11:23 Motero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anaingitsa Aamori
Judges11:24 Chimene akulandiritsani Kemosi mulungu wanu
Judges11:25 Ndipo tsopano kodi inu ndinu wabwino woposa Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Judges11:26 Pokhala Israele m'Hesiboni ndi midzi yake
Judges11:27 Potero sindinakuchimwirani ine
Judges11:28 Koma mfumu ya ana a Amoni sanamvere mau a Yefita anamtumizirawo.
Judges11:29 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unamdzera Yefita
Judges11:30 Ndipo Yefita anawindira Yehova chowinda
Judges11:31 ndipo kudzali kuti chilichonse chakutuluka pakhomo pa nyumba yanga kudzakomana nane pakubweranso ine ndi mtendere kuchokera kwa ana a Amoni
Judges11:32 Potero Yefita anapita kwa ana a Amoni kuwathira nkhondo; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja lake;
Judges11:33 nawakantha kuyambira ku Aroere mpaka ufika ku Miniti
Judges11:34 Pofika Yefita ku Mizipa kunyumba yake
Judges11:35 Ndipo kunali
Judges11:36 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges11:37 Ndipo anati kwa atate wake
Judges11:38 Nati iye
Judges11:39 Ndipo kunali pakutha miyezi iwiri
Judges11:40 kuti ana akazi a Israele akamuka chaka ndi chaka kumliririra mwana wa Yefita wa ku Giliyadi
Judges12:1 Pamenepo amuna a Efuremu analalikidwa
Judges12:2 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa iwo
Judges12:3 Ndipo pakuona ine kuti simundipulumutsa
Judges12:4 Pamenepo Yefita anamemeza amuna onse a m'Giliyadi nalimbana naye Efuremu; ndipo amuna a Giliyadi anakantha Efuremu
Judges12:5 Ndipo Agiliyadi anatsekereza madooko a Yordani a Efuremu; ndipo kunatero kuti
Judges12:6 pamenepo anati kwa iye
Judges12:7 Ndipo Yefita anaweruza Israele zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi; nafa Yefita Mgiliyadi
Judges12:8 Ndi pambuyo pake Ibizani wa ku Betelehemu anaweruza Israele.
Judges12:9 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu; ndi ana akazi makumi atatu anawakwatitsa kwina
Judges12:10 Nafa Ibizani naikidwa ku Betelehemu.
Judges12:11 Ndi pambuyo pake Eloni Mzebuloni anaweruza Israele; naweruza Israele zaka khumi.
Judges12:12 Nafa Eloni Mzebuloni naikidwa m'Ayaloni m'dziko la Zebuloni.
Judges12:13 Ndi pambuyo pake Abidoni mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni anaweruza Israele.
Judges12:14 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi anai ndi zidzukulu zazimuna makumi atatu
Judges12:15 Nafa Abidoni mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni
Judges13:1 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; nawapereka Yehova m'dzanja la Afilisti zaka makumi anai.
Judges13:2 Ndipo panali munthu wina wa Zora wa banja la Adani
Judges13:3 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera mkaziyo nanena naye
Judges13:4 Chifukwa chake udzisamalire
Judges13:5 pakuti taona
Judges13:6 Pamenepo anadza mkaziyo
Judges13:7 koma anati kwa ine
Judges13:8 Pamenepo Manowa anapembedza Yehova
Judges13:9 Ndipo Mulungu anamvera mau a Manowa; ndi mthenga wa Mulungu anamdzeranso mkaziyo
Judges13:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anafulumira nathamanga
Judges13:11 Nanyamuka Manowa natsata mkazi wake
Judges13:12 Nati Manowa
Judges13:13 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa
Judges13:14 Chilichonse chichokera kumpesa asadyeko
Judges13:15 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova
Judges13:16 Koma mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa
Judges13:17 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova
Judges13:18 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye
Judges13:19 Pamenepo Manowa anatenga mwanawambuzi pamodzi ndi nsembe yaufa
Judges13:20 Pakuti kunali
Judges13:21 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova sanaonekerenso kwa Manowa kapena kwa mkazi wake. Pamenepo anadziwa Manowa kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova.
Judges13:22 Nati Manowa kwa mkazi wake
Judges13:23 Koma mkazi wake ananena naye
Judges13:24 Ndipo mkaziyo anabala mwana wamwamuna namutcha dzina lake Samisoni; nakula mwanayo
Judges13:25 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unayamba kumfulumiza mtima ku misasa ya Dani pakati pa Zora ndi Esitaoli.
Judges14:1 Ndipo Samisoni anatsikira ku Timna
Judges14:2 Nakwera iye
Judges14:3 Koma atate wake ndi amai wake ananena naye
Judges14:4 Koma atate wake ndi amai wake sanadziwe kuti chidachokera kwa Yehova ichi; popeza analikufuna kutola chifukwa ndi Afilisti. Ndipo nthawi ija Afilisti analamulira Israele.
Judges14:5 Pamenepo anatsikira Samisoni
Judges14:6 Ndipo unamgwera iye kolimba mzimu wa Yehova
Judges14:7 Ndipo anatsika nakamba ndi mkazi
Judges14:8 Atapita masiku ndipo anabweranso kudzamtenga
Judges14:9 Ndipo anaufula ndi dzanja lake
Judges14:10 Ndipo atate wake anatsikira kwa mkazi; ndi Samisoni anakonzerapo madyerero; pakuti amatero anyamata.
Judges14:11 Ndipo kunali
Judges14:12 Nanena nao Samisoni
Judges14:13 koma ngati simukhoza kunditanthauzira uwu mudzandipatsa ndinu malaya a nsalu yabafuta makumi atatu ndi zovala zosinthanitsa makumi atatu. Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges14:14 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges14:15 Koma kunali
Judges14:16 Ndipo mkazi wa Samisoni analira pamaso pake
Judges14:17 Ndipo analira pamaso pake masiku asanu ndi awiriwo pochitika madyerero ao; koma kunali kuti tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri anamuuza
Judges14:18 Ndipo amuna a pamudzi anati kwa Samisoni tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Judges14:19 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unamgwera Samisoni
Judges14:20 Ndipo mkazi wake wa Samisoni anakhala wa mnzake

Judges15:2 Nati atate wake
Judges15:3 Koma Samisoni
Judges15:4 Namuka Samisoni
Judges15:5 Nayatsa miuni
Judges15:6 Pamenepo Afilisti anati
Judges15:7 Ndipo Samisoni ananena nao
Judges15:8 Ndipo anawakantha nyung'unyu ndi ntchafu
Judges15:9 Pamenepo Afilisti anakwera
Judges15:10 Ndipo anthu a Yuda anati
Judges15:11 Pamenepo anatsikira ku phanga la Etamu amuna zikwi zitatu a ku Yuda
Judges15:12 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges15:13 Ndipo anati kwa iye
Judges15:14 Pamene anafika ku Lehi Afilisti anafuula pokomana naye; koma mzimu wa Yehova unamgwera kolimba
Judges15:15 Ndipo anapeza chibwano chatsopano cha bulu
Judges15:16 Nati Samisoni
Judges15:17 Ndipo kunali
Judges15:18 Ndipo anamva ludzu lambiri
Judges15:19 Pamenepo Mulungu anang'amba pokumbika paja pa Lehi
Judges15:20 Ndipo Samisoni anaweruza Israele m'masiku a Afilisti zaka makumi awiri.
Judges16:1 Ndipo Samisoni anamuka ku Gaza
Judges16:2 Koma wina anauza a ku Gaza
Judges16:3 Koma Samisoni anagona mpaka pakati pa usiku
Judges16:4 Ndipo pambuyo pake kunali kuti anakonda mkazi m'chigwa cha Soreki
Judges16:5 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti anamkwerera mkaziyo
Judges16:6 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni
Judges16:7 Nanena naye Samisoni
Judges16:8 Pamenepo akalonga a Afilisti anakwera nazo kwa mkaziyo nsinga zatsopano zisanu ndi ziwiri zosauma; ndipo iye anammanga nazo.
Judges16:9 Koma anali nao omlalira m'chipinda cha m'kati. Nanena naye
Judges16:10 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni
Judges16:11 Nanena naye
Judges16:12 Ndipo Delila anatenga nsinga zatsopano
Judges16:13 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni
Judges16:14 Ndipo anachimanga ndi phanga
Judges16:15 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges16:16 Ndipo kunali
Judges16:17 Pomwepo anamfotokozera mtima wake wonse
Judges16:18 Ndipo pamene Delila anaona kuti adamfotokozera mtima wake wonse
Judges16:19 Pamenepo anamgonetsa pa mabondo ake
Judges16:20 Ndipo anati
Judges16:21 Pamenepo Afilisti anamgwira
Judges16:22 Koma atammetsa tsitsi la pamutu pake linayamba kumeranso.
Judges16:23 Ndipo anasonkhana akalonga a Afilisti kuperekera Dagoni mulungu wao nsembe yaikulu
Judges16:24 Ndipo pakumuona anthu analemekeza mulungu wao
Judges16:25 Ndipo kunali
Judges16:26 Ndipo Samisoni anati kwa mnyamata womgwira dzanja
Judges16:27 Koma nyumbayi inadzala ndi amuna ndi akazi; ndi akalonga onse a Afilisti anali momwemo ndi patsindwi panali amuna ndi akazi ngati zikwi zitatu akuyang'ana pakusewera Samisoni.
Judges16:28 Pamenepo Samisoni anaitana kwa Yehova
Judges16:29 Ndipo Samisoni anagwira mizati iwiri ya pakati imene nyumba inakhazikikapo
Judges16:30 Nati Samisoni
Judges16:31 Pamenepo anatsika abale ake ndi banja lonse la atate wake
Judges17:1 Ndipo ku mapiri a Efuremu kunali munthu dzina lake ndiye Mika.
Judges17:2 Ndipo iye anati kwa amai wake
Judges17:3 Nabwezera amake ndalama zija mazana khumi ndi limodzi; nati amai wake
Judges17:4 Ndipo pamene anambwezera mai wake ndalamazo
Judges17:5 Koma munthuyu Mika anali nayo nyumba ya milungu
Judges17:6 Masikuwa panalibe mfumu m'Israele
Judges17:7 Ndipo panali mnyamata wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda wa banja la Yuda
Judges17:8 Adachokera munthuyo m'mudzi m'Betelehemu-Yuda
Judges17:9 Ndipo Mika ananena naye
Judges17:10 Nanena naye Mika
Judges17:11 Ndi Mleviyo anavomera kukhalitsa ndi munthuyo; ndi mnyamatayo anamkhalira ngati mmodzi wa ana ake.
Judges17:12 Ndipo Mika anamninkha zansembe Mleviyo
Judges17:13 Nati Mika
Judges18:1 Masiku ajawo panalibe mfumu m'Israele; masiku ajanso fuko la Adani anadzifunira cholowa chakukhalako; pakuti kufikira tsiku lija sichinawagwera cholowa chao pakati pa mafuko a Israele.
Judges18:2 Ndipo ana a Dani anatuma a banja lao amuna asanu a mwa iwo onse
Judges18:3 Pokhala iwo m'nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:4 Ndipo ananena nao
Judges18:5 Pamenepo ananena naye
Judges18:6 Nanena nao wansembeyo
Judges18:7 Pamenepo amuna asanuwa anachoka
Judges18:8 Ndipo asanuwo anafikanso kwa abale ao ku Zora ndi Esitaoli; ndi abale ao ananena nao
Judges18:9 Nati iwo
Judges18:10 Pomuka inu mudzafikira anthu okhazikika mtima ndi dziko lachitando; pakuti Mulungu walipereka m'dzanja lanu; pamenepo mposasowa kanthu kalikonse kali pa dziko lapansi.
Judges18:11 Pamenepo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi
Judges18:12 Nakwera namanga misasa m'Kiriyati-Yearimu
Judges18:13 Ndipo anapitirira komweko kunka ku mapiri a Efuremu
Judges18:14 Pamenepo anayankha amuna asanu anamukawo kukazonda dziko la Laisi
Judges18:15 Napatuka iwo kumkako
Judges18:16 Ndipo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi omangira zida zao za nkhondo m'chuuno
Judges18:17 koma amuna asanu omukawo kukazonda dziko anakwera analowako
Judges18:18 Atalowa iwo m'nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:19 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges18:20 Nukondwera mtima wa wansembeyo
Judges18:21 Atatero anabwerera
Judges18:22 Atafika kutali ndi nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:23 Ndipo anafuula kwa ana a Dani. Nacheuka iwo nati kwa Mika
Judges18:24 Nati iye
Judges18:25 Koma ana a Dani anati kwa iye
Judges18:26 Nayenda ulendo wao ana a Dani; ndipo Mika pakuona kuti anamposa mphamvu
Judges18:27 M'mwemo anatenga zimene Mika adachipanga
Judges18:28 Ndipo panalibe wolanditsa
Judges18:29 Ndipo analitcha dzina la mudziwo Dani
Judges18:30 Ndipo ana a Dani anadziimitsira fano losemalo; ndi Yonatani mwana wa Geresomo mwana wa Manase
Judges18:31 Motero anadziikira fano losema la Mika
Judges19:1 Ndipo kunali
Judges19:2 Koma mkazi wake wamng'ono anachita chigololo akali naye
Judges19:3 Koma anauka mwamuna wake namtsata kukamba naye zamtima
Judges19:4 Ndipo mpongozi wake
Judges19:5 Ndipo kunali
Judges19:6 Nakhala pansi nadya namwa onse awiri pamodzi; nati kwa munthuyo atate wa mkaziyo
Judges19:7 Ndipo munthuyo ananyamuka kuti amuke; koma mpongozi wakeyo anamkakamiza
Judges19:8 Nalawirira mamawa tsiku lachisanu kuti amuke
Judges19:9 Pamenepo munthuyo ananyamuka kuchoka
Judges19:10 Koma munthuyo anakana kugonako usiku
Judges19:11 Pofika iwo pa Yebusi linalimkulowa dzuwa
Judges19:12 Koma mbuye wake ananena naye
Judges19:13 Nati kwa mnyamata wake
Judges19:14 Napitirira iwo
Judges19:15 Napatukirako
Judges19:16 Ndipo taonani
Judges19:17 Pamene anakweza maso ake anaona munthu wa pa ulendoyo m'khwalala la mudzi; ndi nkhalambayo inati
Judges19:18 Ndipo ananena nayo
Judges19:19 Ngakhale udzu ndi chakudya cha abulu athu ziliko; ndi mkate ndi vinyo zilikonso kwa ine ndi kwa mdzakazi wako ndi kwa mnyamata wokhala ndi akapolo ako; kosasowa kanthu.
Judges19:20 Ndipo nkhalambayo inati
Judges19:21 Pamenepo anamlonga m'nyumba yake
Judges19:22 Pokondweretsa iwo mitima yao
Judges19:23 Ndipo munthu mwini nyumba anawatulukira nanena nao
Judges19:24 Taonani
Judges19:25 Koma amunawo sanafune kumvera; motero munthuyu anagwira mkazi wake wamng'ono
Judges19:26 Nadza mkaziyo
Judges19:27 Pamene mbuye wake anauka mamawa
Judges19:28 Ndipo ananena naye
Judges19:29 Ndipo pofika iye kunyumba kwake
Judges19:30 Ndipo kunali kuti onse amene anachiona anati
Judges20:1 Pamenepo anatuluka ana onse a Israele
Judges20:2 Ndipo akulu a anthu onse a mafuko onse a Israele anadziimika mu msonkhano wa anthu a Mulungu
Judges20:3 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anamva kuti ana a Israele adakwera kunka ku Mizipa. Nati ana a Israele
Judges20:4 Ndipo Mlevi
Judges20:5 Nandiukira eni ake a Gibea
Judges20:6 Pamenepo ndinagwira mkazi wanga wamng'ono ndi kumgawa ndi kumtumiza m'dziko lonse la cholowa cha Israele
Judges20:7 Taonani
Judges20:8 Ndipo anthu onse anauka ngati munthu mmodzi
Judges20:9 koma tsopano ichi ndicho tidzachitira Gibea: tidzaukwerera ndi kulota maere.
Judges20:10 Ndipo tidzatapa amuna khumi limodzi pa zana limodzi
Judges20:11 Potero amuna onse a Israele anasonkhanira mudziwo
Judges20:12 Ndipo mafuko a Israele anatuma anthu mwa fuko lonse la Benjamini
Judges20:13 Ndipo tsopano perekani amunawo otama zopanda pake
Judges20:14 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anasonkhana kuchokera kumidzi kunka ku Gibea
Judges20:15 Ndipo anawerenga ana a Benjamini a m'midzi tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi akusolola lupanga; osawerenga okhala m'Gibea
Judges20:16 Mwa anthu awa onse munali amuna osankhika mazana asanu ndi awiri amanzere
Judges20:17 Ndipo anawerenga amuna a Israele
Judges20:18 Nauka ana a Israele
Judges20:19 Nauka ana a Israele m'mawa
Judges20:20 Ndipo amuna a Israele anatuluka kulimbana ndi Benjamini; ndi amuna a Israele anawandandalikira nkhondo ku Gibea.
Judges20:21 Pamenepo ana a Benjamini anatuluka m'Gibea
Judges20:22 Koma anthu
Judges20:23 Ndipo ana a Israele anakwera nalira misozi pamaso pa Yehova mpaka madzulo; nafunsira kwa Yehova ndi kuti
Judges20:24 Potero ana a Israele anayandikira ana a Benjamini m'mawa mwake.
Judges20:25 Ndipo Benjamini anawatulukira ku Gibea m'mawa mwake
Judges20:26 Pamenepo ana onse a Israele ndi anthu onse anakwera nafika ku Betele
Judges20:27 Ndipo ana a Israele anafunsira kwa Yehova; pakuti likasa la chipangano la Mulungu linakhala komweko masiku aja
Judges20:28 namaima ku likasalo Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara mwana wa Aroni
Judges20:29 Ndipo Israele anaika olalira Gibea pozungulira pake.
Judges20:30 Ndipo ana a Israele anakwerera ana a Benjamini tsiku lachitatu
Judges20:31 Natuluka ana a Benjamini kukomana ndi anthuwo
Judges20:32 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anati
Judges20:33 Nauka amuna onse a Israele m'malo ao nanika ku Baala-Tamara; natuluka Aisraele olalira aja m'malo mwao
Judges20:34 Ndipo anadza pandunji pa Gibea amuna osankhika m'Israele monse zikwi khumi
Judges20:35 Ndipo Yehova anakantha Benjamini pamaso pa Israele; ndi ana a Israele anawaononga a Benjamini tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri ndi zisanu
Judges20:36 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaona kuti takanthidwa; popeza amuna a Israele anawapatsa Abenjamini malo
Judges20:37 Nafulumira olalirawo nathamangira Gibea
Judges20:38 Koma kunali chizindikiro choikika pakati pa amuna a Israele ndi olalirawo
Judges20:39 Ndi nkhondo ya Israele inathawa
Judges20:40 Koma pamene mtambo unayamba kukwera m'mudzi ngati utsi uli tolo
Judges20:41 Natembenuka amuna a Israele; nadabwa amuna a Benjamini; popeza anaona kuti chidawagwera choipa.
Judges20:42 Nabwerera iwo pamaso pa amuna a Israele kunka njira ya chipululu; koma nkhondo inawalondetsa; ndi aja otuluka m'mudzi anawaononga pakati pao.
Judges20:43 Anawazinga Abenjamini
Judges20:44 Ndipo adagwa a Benjamini amuna zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu; iwo onse ndiwo ngwazi.
Judges20:45 Natembenuka iwo
Judges20:46 Potero onse amene adagwa a Benjamini tsiku lija
Judges20:47 Koma amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi anabwerera nathawira kuchipululu
Judges20:48 Ndipo amuna a Israele anabwereranso kwa ana a Benjamini
Judges21:1 Koma amuna a Israele adalumbira ku Mizipa
Judges21:2 Ndipo anthu anadza ku Betele
Judges21:3 Nati iwo
Judges21:4 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake
Judges21:5 Nati ana a Israele
Judges21:6 Ndipo ana a Israele anamva chifundo chifukwa cha Benjamini mbale wao
Judges21:7 Tidzatani kuwafunira otsalawo akazi
Judges21:8 Nati iwo
Judges21:9 Pakuti pamene anawerenga anthu
Judges21:10 Ndipo msonkhano unatumizako amuna zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri
Judges21:11 Ndipo chimene mukachite ndi ichi: mukaononge konse mwamuna aliyense
Judges21:12 Ndipo anapeza mwa anthu a Yabesi-Giliyadi anamwali mazana anai osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye; nabwera nao kumisasa ku Silo
Judges21:13 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unatumiza mau kwa ana a Benjamini okhala m'thanthwe la Rimoni
Judges21:14 Nakwera Abenjamini nthawi ija
Judges21:15 Ndipo anthu anamva chifundo pa Benjamini
Judges21:16 Pamenepo akulu a msonkhano anati
Judges21:17 Nati iwo
Judges21:18 Koma sitikhoza ife kuwapatsa ana athu akazi akhale akazi ao; pakuti ana a Israele adalumbira ndi kuti
Judges21:19 Nati iwo
Judges21:20 Ndipo analamulira ana a Benjamini ndi kuti
Judges21:21 nimuyang'ane
Judges21:22 Ndipo kudzali
Judges21:23 Nachita chotere ana a Benjamini
Judges21:24 Ndipo ana a Israele anachokako nthawi ija yense kunka ku fuko lake
Judges21:25 Panalibe mfumu m'Israele masiku aja; yense anachita chomkomera pamaso pake.
Ruth1:1 Ndipo masiku akuweruza oweruzawo munali njala m'dziko. Ndipo munthu wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda anamuka nakagonera m'dziko la Mowabu
Ruth1:2 Dzina la munthuyo ndiye Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Ndipo Elimeleki mwamuna wake wa Naomi anamwalira; natsala iye ndi ana ake awiri.
Ruth1:4 Nadzitengera iwo akazi a ku Mowabu; wina dzina lake ndiye Oripa
Ruth1:5 Koma Maloni ndi Kilioni anamwalira onse awiri; motero ana ake amuna awiri ndi mwamuna wake anamsiya mkaziyo.
Ruth1:6 Pamenepo ananyamuka iyeyu ndi apongozi ake kuti abwerere kuchoka m'dziko la Mowabu; pakuti adamva m'dziko la Mowabu kuti Yehova adasamalira anthu ake ndi kuwapatsa chakudya.
Ruth1:7 Natuluka iye kumene anakhalako ndi apongozi ake awiri pamodzi naye; namka ulendo wao kubwerera ku dziko la Yuda.
Ruth1:8 Ndipo Naomi anati kwa apongozi ake awiri
Ruth1:9 Yehova akuloleni mupeze mpumulo yense m'nyumba ya mwamuna wake. Nawapsompsona
Ruth1:10 Ndipo ananena naye
Ruth1:11 Nati Naomi
Ruth1:12 Bwererani
Ruth1:13 kodi mudzawalindirira akakula? Mudzadziletsa osakwatibwa? Iai
Ruth1:14 Nakweza iwo mau ao
Ruth1:15 Pamenepo anati
Ruth1:16 Nati Rute
Ruth1:17 kumene mudzafera inu ine ndidzafera komweko
Ruth1:18 Ndipo pakuona kuti analimbika kumuka naye
Ruth1:19 Namuka iwo awiriwo mpaka anafika ku Betelehemu. Ndipo kunali pakufika iwo ku Betelehemu
Ruth1:20 Koma ananena nao
Ruth1:21 Ndinachoka pano wolemera
Ruth1:22 Momwemo anabwera Naomi ndi Rute Mmowabu mpongozi wake pamodzi naye
Ruth2:1 Ndipo Naomi anali naye mbale wa mwamuna wake
Ruth2:2 Nati Rute Mmowabu kwa Naomi
Ruth2:3 Namuka iye
Ruth2:4 Ndipo taona
Ruth2:5 Nati Bowazi kwa mnyamata woyang'anira ochekawo
Ruth2:6 Ndipo mnyamata woyang'anira ochekawo anayankha nati
Ruth2:7 ndipo anati
Ruth2:8 Pamenepo Bowazi ananena ndi Rute
Ruth2:9 Maso ako akhale pa munda achekawo
Ruth2:10 Potero anagwa nkhope yake pansi
Ruth2:11 Ndipo Bowazi anayankha nanena naye
Ruth2:12 Yehova akubwezere ntchito yako
Ruth2:13 Nati iye
Ruth2:14 Ndipo pa nthawi ya kudya Bowazi ananena naye
Ruth2:15 Ndipo ataumirira kukatola khunkha
Ruth2:16 Ndiponso mumtayire za m'manja
Ruth2:17 Natola khunkha iye m'munda mpaka madzulo; naomba khunkhalo; napeza ngati efa wa barele
Ruth2:18 nalisenza nalowa kumudzi; ndipo mpongozi wake anaona khunkhalo; Rute natulutsanso nampatsa mkute uja anausiya atakhuta.
Ruth2:19 Ndipo mpongozi wake ananena naye
Ruth2:20 Nati Naomi kwa mpongozi wake
Ruth2:21 Ndipo Rute Mmowabu anati
Ruth2:22 Nati Naomi kwa Rute mpongozi wake
Ruth2:23 Momwemo anaumirira adzakazi a Bowazi kuti atole khunkha kufikira atatha kucheka barele ndi tirigu; ndipo anakhala iye kwao kwa mpongozi wake.

Ruth4:1 Ndipo Bowazi anakwera kunka kuchipata
Ruth4:2 Ndipo anatenga amuna khumi a akulu a mudzi

Ruth4:21 ndi Salimoni anabala Bowazi
