1Samuel1:1 Ndipo panali munthu wina wa ku Ramatayimu Zofimu
1Samuel1:2 Iyeyu anali nao akazi awiri; winayo dzina lake ndi Hana
1Samuel1:3 Ndipo munthuyo akakwera chaka ndi chaka kutuluka m'mudzi mwake kukalambira ndi kupereka nsembe kwa Mulungu wa makamu m'Silo. Ndipo pomwepo panali ana amuna awiri a Eli
1Samuel1:4 Ndipo pofika tsiku lakuti Elikana akapereka nsembe
1Samuel1:5 koma anapatsa Hana magawo awiri
1Samuel1:6 Ndipo womnyodolayo anamputa kwakukulu
1Samuel1:7 Ndipo popeza munthuyo adatero chaka ndi chaka
1Samuel1:8 Ndipo mwamuna wake Elikana anati kwa iye
1Samuel1:9 Chomwecho Hana anauka atadya m'Silo
1Samuel1:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anali ndi mtima wowawa
1Samuel1:11 nalonjeza chowinda
1Samuel1:12 Ndipo panali
1Samuel1:13 Koma Hana ananena mu mtima; milomo yake inatukula
1Samuel1:14 Ndipo Eli anati kwa iye
1Samuel1:15 Ndipo Hana anayankha
1Samuel1:16 Musamandiyesa mdzakazi wanu mkazi woipa; chifukwa kufikira lero ndinalankhula mwa kuchuluka kwa kudandaula kwanga ndi kuvutika kwanga.
1Samuel1:17 Pamenepo Eli anayankha nati
1Samuel1:18 Ndipo iye anati
1Samuel1:19 Ndipo iwo anauka mamawa
1Samuel1:20 Ndipo panali pamene nthawi yake inafika
1Samuel1:21 Ndipo munthuyo Elikana
1Samuel1:22 Koma Hana sadakwera
1Samuel1:23 Ndipo Elikana mwamuna wake anati
1Samuel1:24 Ndipo atamletsa kuyamwa anakwera naye
1Samuel1:25 Ndipo iwo anapha ng'ombe
1Samuel1:26 Ndipo mkaziyo ananena
1Samuel1:27 Ndinampempha mwanayu; ndipo Yehova anandipatsa chopempha changa ndinachipempha kwa Iye;
1Samuel1:28 chifukwa chake inenso ndinampereka kwa Yehova; masiku onse a moyo wake aperekedwa kwa Yehova. Ndipo analambira Yehova pomwepo.
1Samuel2:1 Ndipo Hana anapemphera
1Samuel2:2 Palibe wina woyera ngati Yehova; palibe wina koma Inu nokha; palibenso thanthwe longa Mulungu wathu.
1Samuel2:3 Musalankhulenso modzikuza kwambiri motero; m'kamwa mwanu musatuluke zolulutsa; chifukwa Yehova ndi Mulungu wanzeru
1Samuel2:4 Mauta a amphamvu anathyoka
1Samuel2:5 Amene anakhuta anakasuma chakudya; koma anjalawo anachira; inde chumba chabala asanu ndi awiri; ndipo iye amene ali ndi ana ambiri achita liwondewonde.
1Samuel2:6 Yehova amapha
1Samuel2:7 Yehova asaukitsa
1Samuel2:8 Amuutsa waumphawi m'fumbi
1Samuel2:9 Adzasunga mapazi a okondedwa ake
1Samuel2:10 Otsutsana ndi Yehova adzaphwanyika; kumwamba Iye adzagunda pa iwo; Yehova adzaweruza malekezero a dziko. Ndipo adzapatsa mphamvu mfumu yake
1Samuel2:11 Ndipo Elikana ananka kwao ku Rama
1Samuel2:12 Koma ana a Eli anali oipa; sanadziwe Yehova.
1Samuel2:13 Ndipo machitidwe a ansembe akuchitira anthu ndiwo
1Samuel2:14 nachipisa m'chimphuli
1Samuel2:15 Ngakhale asanayambe kupsereza mafuta
1Samuel2:16 Ndipo ngati munthu akanena naye
1Samuel2:17 Ndipo zoipa za anyamatawo zinali zazikulu ndithu pamaso pa Yehova; pakuti anthu anaipidwa ndi nsembe ya Yehova.
1Samuel2:18 Koma Samuele anatumikira pamaso pa Yehova akali mwana
1Samuel2:19 Ndiponso amake akamsokera mwinjiro waung'ono
1Samuel2:20 Ndipo Eli anadalitsa Elikana ndi mkazi wake
1Samuel2:21 Ndipo Yehova anakumbukira Hana
1Samuel2:22 Ndipo Eli anali wokalamba ndithu; namva zonse ana ake anachitira Aisraele onse
1Samuel2:23 Ndipo iye ananena nao
1Samuel2:24 Iai
1Samuel2:25 Munthu akachimwira munthu mnzake oweruza adzaweruza mlandu wake; koma ngati munthu achimwira Yehova
1Samuel2:26 Ndipo mwanayo Samuele anakulakula
1Samuel2:27 Ndipo anafika kwa Eli munthu wa Mulungu
1Samuel2:28 Kodi sindinasankhula iye pakati pa mafuko onse a Israele
1Samuel2:29 Nanga umaponderezeranji nsembe yanga ndi chopereka changa
1Samuel2:30 Chifukwa chake Yehova Mulungu wa Israele akuti
1Samuel2:31 Ona
1Samuel2:32 Ndipo udzaona masautso a mokhalamo Mulungu
1Samuel2:33 Ndipo munthu wako
1Samuel2:34 Ndipo ichi chimene chidzafikira ana ako awiri Hofeni ndi Finehasi
1Samuel2:35 Ndipo ndidzadziukitsira wansembe wokhulupirika
1Samuel2:36 Ndipo kudzali kuti yense wakusiyidwa wa m'banja lako adzabwera kwa iye nadzawerama ndi kupempha ndalama ndi chakudya
1Samuel3:1 Ndipo mwanayo Samuele anatumikira Yehova pamaso pa Eli. Ndipo masiku aja mau a Yehova anamveka kamodzikamodzi; masomphenya sanaonekeoneke.
1Samuel3:2 Ndipo kunali nthawi yomweyo Eli atagona m'malo mwake (maso ake anayamba chizirezire osatha kupenya bwino);
1Samuel3:3 ndi nyali ya Mulungu isanazime
1Samuel3:4 Pamenepo Yehova anaitana Samuele; ndipo iye anayankha kuti
1Samuel3:5 Ndipo anathamangira kwa Eli nati
1Samuel3:6 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kumuitana
1Samuel3:7 Koma Samuele sanadziwe Yehova
1Samuel3:8 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kumuitana Samuele nthawi yachitatu. Ndipo iye anauka napita kwa Eli
1Samuel3:9 Chifukwa chake Eli anati kwa Samuele
1Samuel3:10 Ndipo Yehova anabwera
1Samuel3:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel3:12 Tsiku lija ndidzamchitira Eli zonse ndinaneneratu za pa banja lake
1Samuel3:13 Popeza ndinamuuza kuti ndidzaweruza nyumba yake kosatha chifukwa cha zoipa anazidziwa
1Samuel3:14 Chifukwa chake ndinalumbira kwa banja la Eli
1Samuel3:15 Ndipo Samuele anagona kufikira m'mawa
1Samuel3:16 Pamenepo Eli anaitana Samuele
1Samuel3:17 Ndipo anati
1Samuel3:18 Ndipo Samuele anamuuza zonse
1Samuel3:19 Ndipo Samuele anakula
1Samuel3:20 Ndipo Aisraele onse
1Samuel3:21 Ndipo Yehova anaonekanso m'Silo
1Samuel4:1 Ndipo mau a Samuele anafikira kwa Aisraele onse. Ndipo Aisraele anatuluka kukaponyana nkhondo ndi Afilisti
1Samuel4:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anandandalitsa nkhondo yao pa Aisraele; ndipo pokomana nkhondo Aisraele anakanthidwa ndi Afilisti. Ndipo anapha kuthengoko anthu zikwi zinai a khamu lao.
1Samuel4:3 Ndipo pamene anthu anafika ku zithandozo
1Samuel4:4 Chifukwa chake anatumiza ku Silo kuti akatenge kumeneko likasalo la chipangano la Yehova wa makamu
1Samuel4:5 Pakufika likasalo la chipangano la Yehova kuzithando
1Samuel4:6 Ndipo Afilistiwo pakumva kubuma pa kufuula kwao
1Samuel4:7 Ndipo Afilisti anaopa
1Samuel4:8 Tsoka kwa ife! Adzatilanditsa ndani m'manja a milungu yamphamvu imeneyi? Milungu ija inakantha Aejipito ndi masautso onse m'chipululu ndi yomweyi.
1Samuel4:9 Limbikani
1Samuel4:10 Ndipo Afilisti anaponyana nao
1Samuel4:11 Ndipo likasa la Mulungu linalandidwa
1Samuel4:12 Ndipo munthu wa fuko la Benjamini anathamanga kuchokera ku khamu la ankhondo
1Samuel4:13 Pakufika iye
1Samuel4:14 Ndipo Eli
1Samuel4:15 Koma Eli anali ndi zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zitatu; ndipo maso ake anangokhala tong'o osapenya.
1Samuel4:16 Ndipo munthuyo anati kwa Eli
1Samuel4:17 Ndipo wakubwera ndi mauyo anayankha
1Samuel4:18 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel4:19 Ndipo mpongozi wake
1Samuel4:20 Ndipo pamene adati amwalire
1Samuel4:21 Ndipo iye anamutcha dzina la mwanayo Ikabodi
1Samuel4:22 Ndipo iye anati
1Samuel5:1 Ndipo Afilisti anatenga likasa la Mulungu
1Samuel5:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anatenga likasa la Mulungu
1Samuel5:3 Ndipo pakuuka a ku Asidodi mamawa taonani Dagoni adagwa pansi
1Samuel5:4 Ndipo m'mawa mwake polawirira
1Samuel5:5 Chifukwa chake angakhale ansembe
1Samuel5:6 Koma Yehova anavuta iwo a ku Asidodi ndi dzanja lake
1Samuel5:7 Ndipo pamene anthu a ku Asidodi anaona kuti nchomwecho
1Samuel5:8 Chifukwa chake anatumiza mithenga
1Samuel5:9 Ndipo kunali atafika nalo
1Samuel5:10 Chifukwa chake anatumiza likasa la Mulungu ku Ekeroni. Ndipo kunali pofika likasalo ku Ekeroni
1Samuel5:11 Chifukwa chake anatumiza
1Samuel5:12 Ndipo amene anapanda kufa anagwidwa ndi mafundowo; ndi kulira kwa mudziwo kunakwera kumwamba.
1Samuel6:1 Ndipo likasa la Yehova linakhala ku dziko la Afilisti miyezi isanu ndi iwiri.
1Samuel6:2 Ndipo Afilistiwo anaitana ansembe ndi oombeza
1Samuel6:3 Ndipo iwo anati
1Samuel6:4 Ndipo iwo aja anati
1Samuel6:5 Chifukwa chake muzipanga zifanizo za mafundo anu
1Samuel6:6 Mulikuumitsiranji mitima yanu
1Samuel6:7 Chifukwa chake tsono
1Samuel6:8 ndipo mutenge likasa la Yehova
1Samuel6:9 Ndipo muyang'anire
1Samuel6:10 Ndipo anthuwo anatero; natenga ng'ombe ziwiri zamkaka
1Samuel6:11 naika likasa la Yehova pagaletapo
1Samuel6:12 Ndipo ng'ombezo zinatsata njira yolunjika ku Betesemesi
1Samuel6:13 Ndipo a ku Betesemesi analikumweta tirigu wao m'chigwamo; natukula maso ao
1Samuel6:14 Ndipo galetalo linafika m'munda wa Yoswa wa ku Betesemesi
1Samuel6:15 Ndipo Alevi anatsitsa likasa la Yehova
1Samuel6:16 Ndipo pamene mafumu asanu a Afilisti anaonerako
1Samuel6:17 Ndipo amenewa ndiwo mafundo agolide amene Afilisti anabwezera kwa Yehova akhale nsembe yopalamula
1Samuel6:18 ndiponso mbewa zagolide
1Samuel6:19 Ndipo Mulungu anakantha anthu a ku Betesemesi
1Samuel6:20 Ndipo a ku Betesemesi anati
1Samuel6:21 Ndipo anatumiza mithenga kwa anthu a ku Kiriyati-Yearimu
1Samuel7:1 Ndipo anthu a ku Kiriyati-Yearimu anabwera
1Samuel7:2 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel7:3 Ndipo Samuele analankhula ndi banja lonse la Israele nati
1Samuel7:4 Pomwepo ana a Israele anachotsa Abaala ndi Asitaroti
1Samuel7:5 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel7:6 Ndipo anaunjikana ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:7 Ndipo pamene Afilisti anamva kuti Aisraele anasonkhana pamodzi ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:8 Ndipo ana a Israele anati kwa Samuele
1Samuel7:9 Ndipo Samuele anatenga mwanawankhosa woyamwa
1Samuel7:10 Ndipo pamene Samuele analikupereka nsembe yopserezayo
1Samuel7:11 Ndipo Aisraele anatuluka ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:12 Pamenepo Samuele anatenga mwala nauimika pakati pa Mizipa ndi Sene
1Samuel7:13 Chomwecho anagonjetsa Afilisti
1Samuel7:14 Ndipo midzi ya Israele imene Afilisti adailanda kale inabwezedwa kwa Aisraele
1Samuel7:15 ndipo Samuele anaweruza Israele masiku onse a moyo wake.
1Samuel7:16 Ndipo anayenda chozungulira chaka ndi chaka ku Betele
1Samuel7:17 Ndipo anabwera ku Rama
1Samuel8:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel8:2 Dzina la mwana wake woyamba ndiye Yowele
1Samuel8:3 Ndipo ana ake sanatsanze makhalidwe ake
1Samuel8:4 Pamenepo akulu onse a Israele anasonkhana
1Samuel8:5 nanena naye
1Samuel8:6 Koma chimenechi sichinakondweretsa Samuele
1Samuel8:7 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel8:8 Monga ntchito zao zonse anazichita kuyambira tsiku lija ndinawatulutsa ku Ejipito
1Samuel8:9 Chifukwa chake tsono umvere mau ao; koma uwachenjeze kolimba
1Samuel8:10 Ndipo Samuele anauza anthu akumpempha iye mfumu mau onse a Yehova.
1Samuel8:11 Nati
1Samuel8:12 idzawaika akhale otsogolera chikwi
1Samuel8:13 Ndipo idzatenga ana anu akazi apange zonunkhira
1Samuel8:14 Ndipo idzalanda minda yanu
1Samuel8:15 Ndipo idzatenga limodzi la magawo khumi la mbeu zanu
1Samuel8:16 Ndipo idzatenga akapolo anu
1Samuel8:17 Idzatenga limodzi la magawo khumi la zoweta zanu; ndipo inu mudzakhala akapolo ake.
1Samuel8:18 Ndipo tsiku lija mudzafuula chifukwa cha mfumu yanu munadzisankhira nokha; koma Yehova sadzayankha inu tsiku lijalo.
1Samuel8:19 Koma anthu anakana kumvera mau a Samuele; nati
1Samuel8:20 kuti ifenso tikafanane nao anthu a mitundu yonse; kuti mfumu yathuyo ikatiweruzire
1Samuel8:21 Ndipo Samuele anamva mau onse a anthuwo
1Samuel8:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Samuele
1Samuel9:1 Ndipo panali munthu Mbenjamini
1Samuel9:2 Iye anali ndi mwana wamwamuna dzina lake Saulo
1Samuel9:3 Ndipo abulu a Kisi
1Samuel9:4 Ndipo anapyola dziko lamapiri la Efuremu
1Samuel9:5 Pamene anafika ku dziko la Zufu
1Samuel9:6 Koma ananena naye
1Samuel9:7 Ndipo Saulo ananena ndi mnyamata wake
1Samuel9:8 Ndipo mnyamatayo anayankhanso kwa Saulo nati
1Samuel9:9 Kale m'Israele
1Samuel9:10 Pamenepo Saulo anati kwa mnyamata wake
1Samuel9:11 Pakukwera kumudziko anapeza anthu akazi alikutuluka kuti akatunge madzi
1Samuel9:12 Ndipo anawayankha nati
1Samuel9:13 mutafika m'mudzi
1Samuel9:14 Ndipo iwowa anakwera kumudzi; ndipo m'mene analowa m'mudzimo
1Samuel9:15 Ndipo Yehova anaululiratu m'khutu la Samuele dzulo lake la tsiku limene Saulo anabwera
1Samuel9:16 Mawa
1Samuel9:17 Ndipo pamene Samuele anaona Saulo
1Samuel9:18 Pomwepo Saulo anayandikira kwa Samuele pakati pa chipata
1Samuel9:19 Ndipo Samuele anayankha Saulo nati
1Samuel9:20 Za abulu ako atatayika adapita masiku atatu
1Samuel9:21 Ndipo Saulo anayankha nati
1Samuel9:22 Ndipo Samuele anatenga Saulo ndi mnyamata wake
1Samuel9:23 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi wophika
1Samuel9:24 Ndipo wophikayo ananyamula mwendo ndi mnofu wake
1Samuel9:25 Ndipo pamene anatsika kumsanje kulowanso kumudzi
1Samuel9:26 Ndipo anauka mamawa; ndipo kutacha
1Samuel9:27 Ndipo pamene analikutsika polekeza mudzi
1Samuel10:1 Pamenepo Samuele anatenga nsupa ya mafuta
1Samuel10:2 M'mene talekana lero
1Samuel10:3 Mukapitirira pamenepo tsono ndi kufika ku mtengo wathundu wa ku Tabori
1Samuel10:4 Iwowa adzakupatsani moni
1Samuel10:5 Ndipo m'tsogolo mwake mudzafika kuphiri la Mulungu
1Samuel10:6 ndipo Mzimu wa Yehova udzagwera inu kolimba
1Samuel10:7 Ndipo zitakufikirani zizindikiro izi mudzachita monga mudzaona pochita
1Samuel10:8 Ndipo mudzatsika patsogolo pa ine kunka ku Giligala; ndipo
1Samuel10:9 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel10:10 Ndipo pamene anafika ku Gibea
1Samuel10:11 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel10:12 Ndipo munthu wina wa komweko anayankha nati
1Samuel10:13 Ndipo pamene adatha kunenera anafika kumsanjeko.
1Samuel10:14 Ndipo mbale wa atate wake wa Saulo ananena kwa iye ndi mnyamata wake
1Samuel10:15 Ndipo mbale wa atate wa Saulo anati
1Samuel10:16 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa mbale wa atate wake
1Samuel10:17 Ndipo Samuele anaitana anthu onse asonkhane kwa Yehova ku Mizipa;
1Samuel10:18 nanena ndi ana a Israele
1Samuel10:19 koma lero inu mwakana Mulungu wanu amene anakupulumutsani yekha m'matsoka anu onse
1Samuel10:20 Chomwecho Samuele anayandikizitsa mafuko onse a Israele
1Samuel10:21 Nayandikizitsa fuko la Benjamini
1Samuel10:22 Chifukwa chake anaonjeza kufunsa Yehova
1Samuel10:23 Ndipo anathamanga
1Samuel10:24 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi anthu onse
1Samuel10:25 Pamenepo Samuele anafotokozera anthu machitidwe a ufumu
1Samuel10:26 Ndi Saulo yemwe anamuka kunyumba yake ku Gibea; ndipo am'khamu anatsagana naye iwo amene Mulungu adakhudza mitima yao.
1Samuel10:27 Koma oipa ena anati
1Samuel11:1 Pamenepo Nahasi Mwamoni anakwera
1Samuel11:2 Ndipo Nahasi Mwamoni ananena nao
1Samuel11:3 Ndipo akulu a ku Yabesi ananena naye
1Samuel11:4 Tsono mithengayo inafika ku Gibea kwa Saulo
1Samuel11:5 Ndipo
1Samuel11:6 Ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unamgwera Saulo mwamphamvu
1Samuel11:7 Natenga ng'ombe ziwiri nazidula nthulinthuli
1Samuel11:8 Ndipo anawawerenga ku Bezeki; ndipo ana a Israele anali zikwi mazana atatu
1Samuel11:9 Ndipo anati kwa mithenga inadzayi
1Samuel11:10 Chifukwa chake anthu a ku Yabesi anati
1Samuel11:11 Ndipo m'mawa mwake Saulo anagawa anthu magulu atatu; ndipo iwowa anafika pakati pa zithandozo m'ulonda wa mamawa
1Samuel11:12 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Samuele
1Samuel11:13 Koma Saulo anati
1Samuel11:14 Ndipo Samuele ananena kwa anthuwo
1Samuel11:15 Ndipo anthu onse anapita ku Giligala; ndi kumeneko analonga Saulo mfumu pamaso pa Yehova m'Giligala; ndi pamenepo anaphera nsembe zoyamika pamaso pa Yehova; ndi pomwepo Saulo ndi anthu onse a Israele anakondwera kwakukulu.
1Samuel12:1 Ndipo Samuele anauza Aisraele onse
1Samuel12:2 Ndipo tsopano
1Samuel12:3 Ndikalipo ine; chitani umboni wonditsutsa pamaso pa Yehova
1Samuel12:4 Ndipo iwo anati
1Samuel12:5 Ndipo iye ananena nao
1Samuel12:6 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi anthuwo
1Samuel12:7 Chifukwa chake tsono
1Samuel12:8 Pamene Yakobo anafika ku Ejipito
1Samuel12:9 Koma iwowa anaiwala Yehova Mulungu wao
1Samuel12:10 Ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova
1Samuel12:11 Ndipo Yehova anatumiza Yerubaala
1Samuel12:12 Ndipo pamene munaona kuti Nahasi mfumu ya ana a Amoni inadza kuponyana nanu
1Samuel12:13 Chifukwa chake siyi mfumu imene munaisankha
1Samuel12:14 Mukaopa Yehova ndi kumtumikira ndi kumvera mau ake
1Samuel12:15 Koma mukapanda kumvera mau a Yehova
1Samuel12:16 Chifukwa chake tsono
1Samuel12:17 Si nyengo yakumweta tirigu lero kodi? Ndidzaitana kwa Yehova
1Samuel12:18 Momwemo Samuele anaitana kwa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anatumiza bingu ndi mvula tsiku lomwelo; ndipo anthu onse anaopa kwambiri Yehova ndi Samuele.
1Samuel12:19 Ndipo anthu onse ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel12:20 Ndipo Samuele ananena kwa anthuwo
1Samuel12:21 musapatukire inu kutsata zinthu zachabe
1Samuel12:22 Pakuti Yehova sadzasiya anthu ake chifukwa cha dzina lake lalikulu; pakuti kudamkomera Yehova kukuyesani inu anthu a Iye yekha.
1Samuel12:23 Ndipo inenso
1Samuel12:24 Koma mumuope Yehova
1Samuel12:25 Koma mukaumirirabe kuchita choipa
1Samuel13:1 Saulo anali ndi zaka makumi atatu pamene anayamba ufumu wake; nakhala mfumu ya Israele zaka ziwiri.
1Samuel13:2 Pamenepo Saulo anadzisankhira anthu zikwi zitatu a Israele; zikwi za iwowa zinali ndi Saulo ku Mikimasi
1Samuel13:3 Ndipo Yonatani anathyola kaboma ka Afilisti lokhala ku Geba
1Samuel13:4 Ndipo Aisraele onse anamva kunena kuti Saulo anathyola kaboma ka Afilisti
1Samuel13:5 Ndipo Afilisti anasonkhana kuti akamenyane ndi Aisraele
1Samuel13:6 Pamene anthu a Israele anazindikira kuti ali m'kupsinjika
1Samuel13:7 Ndipo Ahebri ena anaoloka Yordani nafika ku dziko la Gadi ndi Giliyadi; koma Saulo akali ku Giligala
1Samuel13:8 Ndipo iye anatsotsa masiku asanu ndi awiri
1Samuel13:9 Pamenepo Saulo anati
1Samuel13:10 Ndipo kunali kuti pakutsiriza iye kupereka nsembe yopserezayo
1Samuel13:11 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel13:12 chifukwa chake ndinati
1Samuel13:13 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi Saulo
1Samuel13:14 Koma tsopano ufumu wanu sudzakhala chikhalire; Yehova wadzifunira munthu wa pamtima pake; ndipo Yehova wamuika iye akhale mtsogoleri wa anthu ake
1Samuel13:15 Ndipo Samuele anauka nachoka ku Giligala kunka ku Gibea wa ku Benjamini. Ndipo Saulo anawerenga anthu amene anali naye
1Samuel13:16 Ndipo Saulo
1Samuel13:17 Ndipo owawanya anatuluka ku zithando za Afilisti magulu atatu; gulu limodzi linalowa njira yonka ku Ofura
1Samuel13:18 gulu lina linalowa njira yonka ku Betehoroni; ndi gulu linanso linalowa ku njira ya kumalire
1Samuel13:19 Ndipo m'dziko lonse la Israele simunapezeka wosula; popeza Afilisti adati
1Samuel13:20 koma Aisraele onse ankatsikira kwa Afilisti
1Samuel13:21 ndipo mtengo wakukonza makasu
1Samuel13:22 Chomwecho kunali kuti tsiku lankhondolo sunapezeka mkondo kapena lupanga m'manja a anthu onse anali ndi Saulo ndi Yonatani; koma Saulo yekha ndi Yonatani mwana wake anali nazo.
1Samuel13:23 Ndipo a ku kaboma ka Afilisti anatuluka kunja ku mpata wa ku Mikimasi.
1Samuel14:1 Ndipo kunali tsiku lina kuti Yonatani mwana wa Saulo ananena ndi mnyamata wonyamula zida zake
1Samuel14:2 Ndipo Saulo analikukhala m'matsekerezo a Gibea patsinde pa mtengo wankhangaza uli ku Migironi; ndipo panali naye anthu monga mazana asanu ndi limodzi;
1Samuel14:3 ndi Ahiya mwana wa Ahitubi mbale wake wa Ikabodi
1Samuel14:4 Ndipo pakati pa mipata imene Yonatani anafuna kupitapo kunka ku kaboma ka Afilisti
1Samuel14:5 Phiri lija linaimirira kuyang'ana kumpoto pandunji pa Mikimasi
1Samuel14:6 Ndipo Yonatani ananena ndi mnyamata wonyamula zida zake
1Samuel14:7 Ndipo wonyamula zida zake anena naye
1Samuel14:8 Ndipo Yonatani anati
1Samuel14:9 Akatero ndi ife kuti
1Samuel14:10 Koma akatero kuti
1Samuel14:11 Ndipo onse awiri anadziwulula kwa a ku kaboma ka Afilistiwo; ndipo Afilistiwo anati
1Samuel14:12 Ndipo a ku kabomawo anayankha Yonatani ndi wonyamula zida zake
1Samuel14:13 Ndipo Yonatani anakwera chokwawa
1Samuel14:14 Kuwapha koyambako
1Samuel14:15 Ndipo kunali kunthunthumira kuzithando
1Samuel14:16 Ndipo ozonda a Saulo ku Gibea wa ku Benjamini anayang'ana; ndipo
1Samuel14:17 Pamenepo Saulo ananena ndi anthu amene anali naye
1Samuel14:18 Ndipo Saulo ananena ndi Ahiya
1Samuel14:19 Ndipo kunali m'mene Saulo anali chilankhulire ndi wansembeyo
1Samuel14:20 Ndipo Saulo ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anaunjikana pamodzi
1Samuel14:21 Ndiponso Ahebri akukhala nao Afilisti kale
1Samuel14:22 Anateronso Aisraele onse akubisala m'phiri la Efuremu
1Samuel14:23 Chomwecho Yehova anapulumutsa Israele tsiku lija; ndipo nkhondo inapitirira pa Betaveni.
1Samuel14:24 Ndipo Aisraele anasauka tsiku lija; pakuti Saulo anawalumbirira
1Samuel14:25 Ndipo anthu onsewo analowa munkhalango
1Samuel14:26 Ndipo pakufika anthuwo m'nkhalangomo
1Samuel14:27 Koma Yonatani sanamve m'mene atate wake analumbirira anthu; chifukwa chake iye anatambalitsa ndodo ya m'dzanja lake
1Samuel14:28 Ndipo wina wa anthuwo anayankha
1Samuel14:29 Ndipo Yonatani anati
1Samuel14:30 Koposa kotani nanga
1Samuel14:31 Ndipo anakantha Afilisti tsiku lija kuyambira ku Mikimasi kufikira ku Ayaloni
1Samuel14:32 Ndipo anthuwo anathamangira zowawanyazo
1Samuel14:33 Pamenepo anauza Saulo
1Samuel14:34 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel14:35 Ndipo Saulo anamangira Yehova guwa la nsembe; limenelo ndilo guwa loyamba iye anamangira Yehova.
1Samuel14:36 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel14:37 Ndipo Saulo anafunsira uphungu kwa Mulungu
1Samuel14:38 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel14:39 Pakuti
1Samuel14:40 Ndipo iye ananena ndi Aisraele onse
1Samuel14:41 Chifukwa chake Saulo ananena ndi Yehova
1Samuel14:42 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel14:43 Pamenepo Saulo ananena ndi Yonatani
1Samuel14:44 Pamenepo Saulo anati
1Samuel14:45 Ndipo anthuwo ananena ndi Saulo
1Samuel14:46 Ndipo Saulo analeka kuwapirikitsa Afilistiwo; ndi Afilistiwo anamuka ku malo a iwo okha.
1Samuel14:47 Ndipo pamene Saulo atakhazikitsa ufumu wa pa Israele
1Samuel14:48 Ndipo iye anakula mphamvu
1Samuel14:49 Ndipo ana a Saulo ndiwo Yonatani
1Samuel14:50 ndi dzina la mkazi wa Saulo ndi Ahinowamu mwana wa Ahimaazi; ndi dzina la kazembe wa khamu lankhondo lake ndiye Abinere mwana wa Nere
1Samuel14:51 Ndipo atate wa Saulo ndiye Kisi; ndipo Nere atate wa Abinere ndiye mwana wa Abiyele.
1Samuel14:52 Ndipo panali nkhondo yowawa ndi Afilisti masiku onse a Saulo; ndipo Saulo pakuona munthu wamphamvu
1Samuel15:1 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi Saulo
1Samuel15:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu
1Samuel15:3 Muka tsopano
1Samuel15:4 Ndipo Saulo anamemeza anthu
1Samuel15:5 Ndipo Saulo anafika kumudzi wa Amaleke
1Samuel15:6 Ndipo Saulo anauza Akeni kuti
1Samuel15:7 Ndipo Saulo anakantha Aamaleke
1Samuel15:8 Namtenga wamoyo Agagi
1Samuel15:9 Koma Saulo ndi anthu anamsunga wamoyo Agagi
1Samuel15:10 Pamenepo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Samuele
1Samuel15:11 Kundichititsa chisoni kuti ndinaika Saulo akhale mfumu; pakuti wabwerera wosanditsata Ine
1Samuel15:12 Ndipo Samuele analawirira m'mawa kuti akakomane ndi Saulo; ndipo munthu anamuuza Samuele kuti
1Samuel15:13 Ndipo Samuele anadza kwa Saulo; ndipo Saulo anati kwa iye
1Samuel15:14 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel15:15 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel15:16 Pomwepo Samuele ananena ndi Saulo
1Samuel15:17 Nati Samuele
1Samuel15:18 Ndipo Yehova anakutumani ulendo
1Samuel15:19 Chifukwa ninji tsono simunamvera mau a Yehova
1Samuel15:20 Ndipo Saulo ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel15:21 Koma anthuwo anatengako zowawanya
1Samuel15:22 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel15:23 Pakuti kupanduka kuli ngati choipa cha kuchita nyanga
1Samuel15:24 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa Samuele
1Samuel15:25 Chifukwa chake tsono
1Samuel15:26 Ndipo Samuele ananena ndi Saulo
1Samuel15:27 Ndipo pakupotoloka Samuele kuti achoke
1Samuel15:28 Ndipo Samuele ananena naye
1Samuel15:29 Ndiponso Wamphamvu wa Israele sanama kapena kulapa; popeza Iye sali munthu kuti akalapa.
1Samuel15:30 Pomwepo iye anati
1Samuel15:31 Chomwecho Samuele anabwerera natsata Saulo; ndi Saulo analambira Yehova.
1Samuel15:32 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel15:33 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel15:34 Pamenepo Samuele ananka ku Rama; ndi Saulo anakwera kunka kunyumba yake ku Gibea wa Saulo.
1Samuel15:35 Ndipo Samuele sanadzenso kudzaona Saulo kufikira tsiku la imfa yake; koma Samuele analira chifukwa cha Saulo; ndipo Yehova anali ndi chisoni kuti anamlonga Saulo mfumu ya Israele.
1Samuel16:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel16:2 Ndipo Samuele anati
1Samuel16:3 Ndipo uitane Yese abwere kunsembeko
1Samuel16:4 Ndipo Samuele anachita chimene Yehova ananena
1Samuel16:5 Nati iye
1Samuel16:6 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel16:7 Koma Yehova ananena ndi Samuele
1Samuel16:8 Pamenepo Yese anaitana Abinadabu nampititsa pa Samuele. Ndipo iye adati
1Samuel16:9 Pamenepo Yese anapititsapo Sama. Ndipo anati
1Samuel16:10 Ndipo Yese anapititsapo ana ake amuna asanu ndi awiri. Koma Samuele anati kwa Yese
1Samuel16:11 Ndipo Samuele anati kwa Yese
1Samuel16:12 Ndipo anatumiza munthu
1Samuel16:13 Pamenepo Samuele anatenga nyanga ya mafuta
1Samuel16:14 Koma mzimu wa Yehova unamchokera Saulo
1Samuel16:15 Ndipo anyamata a Saulo ananena naye
1Samuel16:16 Tsono inu mbuye wathu muuze anyamata anu
1Samuel16:17 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa anyamata ake
1Samuel16:18 Ndipo mnyamata wake wina anayankha
1Samuel16:19 Chifukwa chake Saulo anatumiza mithenga kwa Yese
1Samuel16:20 Ndipo Yese anatenga bulu namsenza mkate
1Samuel16:21 Ndipo Davide anafika kwa Saulo
1Samuel16:22 Ndipo Saulo anatumiza kwa Yese
1Samuel16:23 Ndipo kunali kuti pamene mzimu woipawo wochokera kwa Mulungu unali pa Saulo
1Samuel17:1 Pamenepo Afilisti anasonkhanitsa makamu ao a nkhondo
1Samuel17:2 Ndipo Saulo ndi anthu a Israele anasonkhana
1Samuel17:3 Ndipo Afilisti anaima paphiri tsidya lija
1Samuel17:4 Ndipo ku zithando za Afilisti kunatuluka chiwinda
1Samuel17:5 Ndipo anali ndi chisoti chamkuwa pamutu pake
1Samuel17:6 nakuta msongolo wake ndi chovala chamkuwa
1Samuel17:7 Ndipo mtengo wa mkondo wake unali ngati mtanda woombera nsalu; ndi khali la mkondowo linalemera ngati masekeli mazana asanu ndi limodzi a chitsulo; ndipo womnyamulira chikopa anamtsogolera.
1Samuel17:8 Naima iye naitana makamu a nkhondo a Israele
1Samuel17:9 Akakhoza iyeyo kuponyana ndi ine ndi kundipha
1Samuel17:10 Nati Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:11 Ndipo pamene Saulo ndi Aisraele onse anamva mau ao a Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:12 Tsono Davide anali mwana wa Mwefurati uja wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda
1Samuel17:13 Ndipo ana atatu akulu a Yese anatsata Saulo kunkhondoko; ndi maina ao a ana ake atatuwo adapita ku nkhondowo ndiwo Eliyabu woyambayo
1Samuel17:14 Ndipo Davide anali wotsiriza; ndi akulu atatuwo anamtsata Saulo.
1Samuel17:15 Koma Davide akamuka kwa Saulo
1Samuel17:16 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anayandikira m'mawa ndi madzulo
1Samuel17:17 Ndipo Yese anati kwa Davide mwana wake
1Samuel17:18 nunyamule nchinchi izi khumi zamase ukapatse mtsogoleri wa chikwi chao
1Samuel17:19 Tsono Saulo
1Samuel17:20 Ndipo Davide anauka m'mamawa
1Samuel17:21 Ndipo Israele ndi Afilisti anandandalitsa nkhondo zao
1Samuel17:22 Ndipo Davide anasiya akatundu ake m'dzanja la wosungira akatundu
1Samuel17:23 Ndipo m'mene iye anali chilankhulire nao
1Samuel17:24 Ndipo Aisraele onse
1Samuel17:25 Nati Aisraele
1Samuel17:26 Ndipo Davide analankhula ndi anthu akuima pafupi ndi iye
1Samuel17:27 Ndipo anthuwo anamyankha motero
1Samuel17:28 Ndipo Eliabu mkulu wake anamumva iye alikulankhula ndi anthu; ndipo Eliyabu anapsa mtima ndi Davide
1Samuel17:29 Ndipo Davide anati
1Samuel17:30 Napotolokera iye kwa munthu wina
1Samuel17:31 Ndipo pamene mau adanena Davide anamveka
1Samuel17:32 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Saulo
1Samuel17:33 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:34 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Saulo
1Samuel17:35 ndinachithamangira
1Samuel17:36 Ine kapolo wanu ndinapha mkango ndi chimbalangondo zonse ziwiri; ndipo Mfilisti uyu wosadulidwa adzakhala ngati mmodzi wa izo
1Samuel17:37 Nati Davide
1Samuel17:38 Ndipo Saulo anaveka Davide zovala zake za iye yekha
1Samuel17:39 Ndipo Davide anamanga lupanga lake pamwamba pa zovala zake
1Samuel17:40 Natenga ndodo yake m'dzanja lake nadzisankhira miyala isanu yosalala ya mumtsinje
1Samuel17:41 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anadza
1Samuel17:42 Ndipo Mfilisti pakumwazamwaza maso
1Samuel17:43 Ndipo Mfilisti anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:44 Ndipo Mfilistiyo anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:45 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:46 Lero lino Yehova adzakupereka iwe m'dzanja langa
1Samuel17:47 Ndi msonkhano wonse uno udzazindikira kuti Yehova sapulumutsa ndi lupanga
1Samuel17:48 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel17:49 Ndipo Davide anapisa dzanja lake m'thumba mwake
1Samuel17:50 Chomwecho Davide anapambana Mfilistiyo ndi mwala wa choponyera chake
1Samuel17:51 Potero Davide anathamanga naima pa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:52 Ndipo anthu a Israele ndi Ayuda ananyamuka
1Samuel17:53 Ndipo ana a Israele atathamangira Afilisti
1Samuel17:54 Ndipo Davide anatenga mutu wa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:55 Ndipo pamene Saulo anaona Davide alikutulukira kwa Mfilistiyo
1Samuel17:56 Ndipo mfumu inati
1Samuel17:57 Ndipo pamene Davide anabwera
1Samuel17:58 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa iye
1Samuel18:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel18:2 Ndipo Saulo anamtenga tsiku lomwelo
1Samuel18:3 Pamenepo Yonatani ndi Davide anapangana pangano
1Samuel18:4 Ndipo Yonatani anavula malaya ake anali nao
1Samuel18:5 Ndipo Davide anatuluka kunka kulikonse Saulo anamtumako
1Samuel18:6 Ndipo kunali pakudza iwo
1Samuel18:7 Ndipo akazi anathirirana mang'ombe m'kuimba kwao
1Samuel18:8 Koma Saulo anakwiya ndithu
1Samuel18:9 Ndipo kuyambira tsiku lomwelo ndi m'tsogolo mwake
1Samuel18:10 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake
1Samuel18:11 Ndipo Saulo anaponya mkondowo; pakuti anati
1Samuel18:12 Ndipo Saulo anaopa Davide chifukwa Yehova anali naye
1Samuel18:13 Chifukwa chake Saulo anamchotsa kuti asakhale naye
1Samuel18:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala wochenjera m'mayendedwe ake onse; ndipo Yehova anali naye.
1Samuel18:15 Ndipo pamene Saulo anaona kuti analikukhala wochenjera ndithu anamuopa.
1Samuel18:16 Koma Aisraele onse ndi Ayuda onse anamkonda Davide pakuti anawatsogolera kutuluka ndi kulowa nao.
1Samuel18:17 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa Davide
1Samuel18:18 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Saulo
1Samuel18:19 Koma kunali nthawi imene akadapatsa Merabi mwana wamkazi wa Saulo kwa Davide
1Samuel18:20 Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Saulo anakonda Davide; ndipo pakumva Saulo
1Samuel18:21 Nati Saulo
1Samuel18:22 Ndipo Saulo analamulira anyamata ake
1Samuel18:23 Ndipo anyamata a Saulo analankhula mau awa m'makutu a Davide. Nati Davide
1Samuel18:24 Ndipo anyamata a Saulo anamuuza
1Samuel18:25 Nati Saulo
1Samuel18:26 Ndipo pamene anyamata ake anauza Davide mau awa
1Samuel18:27 Ndipo asanathe masikuwo
1Samuel18:28 Ndipo Saulo anaona
1Samuel18:29 Saulo nayamba kumuopa Davide kopambana; ndi Saulo anali mdani wa Davide masiku onse.
1Samuel18:30 Pomwepo mafumu a Afilisti anatuluka; ndipo nthawi zonse anatuluka iwo
1Samuel19:1 Ndipo Saulo analankhula kwa Yonatani mwana wake
1Samuel19:2 Koma Yonatani mwana wa Saulo anakondwera kwambiri ndi Davide. Ndipo Yonatani anauza Davide
1Samuel19:3 ndipo ine ndidzakutuluka ndi kuima pa mbali ya atate wanga kumunda kumene kuli iwe
1Samuel19:4 Ndipo Yonatani analankhula ndi Saulo atate wake movomereza Davide
1Samuel19:5 popeza iye anataya moyo wake nakantha Mfilistiyo
1Samuel19:6 Ndipo Saulo anamvera mau a Yonatani; nalumbira
1Samuel19:7 Pamenepo Yonatani anaitana Davide
1Samuel19:8 Ndipo kunalinso nkhondo; ndipo Davide anatuluka
1Samuel19:9 Ndipo mzimu woipa wochokera kwa Yehova unali pa Saulo
1Samuel19:10 Ndipo Saulo anayesa kupyoza Davide kumphatikiza kukhoma ndi mkondowo; koma iye anadzilanditsa kuchoka pamaso pa Saulo; ndipo analasa khoma; ndipo Davide anathawa napulumuka usiku uja.
1Samuel19:11 Ndipo Saulo anatumiza mithenga kunyumba ya Davide imdikire
1Samuel19:12 Chomwecho Mikala anamtsitsira Davide pazenera
1Samuel19:13 Ndipo Mikala anatenga chifanizo nachiika pakama
1Samuel19:14 Ndipo pamene Saulo anatumiza mithenga kuti ikamgwire Davide
1Samuel19:15 Ndipo Saulo anatumiza mithengayo kuti ikaone Davide
1Samuel19:16 Ndipo pakulowa mithengayo
1Samuel19:17 Nati Saulo kwa Mikala
1Samuel19:18 Chomwecho anathawa Davide
1Samuel19:19 Ndipo wina anauza Saulo
1Samuel19:20 Ndipo Saulo anatumiza mithenga kuti igwire Davide
1Samuel19:21 Ndipo pamene anauza Saulo
1Samuel19:22 Pamenepo iyenso anamuka ku Rama
1Samuel19:23 Ndipo anapita komweko ku Nayoti m'Rama; ndi mzimu wa Mulungu unamgwera iyenso; ndipo anapitirira
1Samuel19:24 Ndiponso anavula zovala zake
1Samuel20:1 Ndipo Davide anathawa ku Nayoti m'Rama
1Samuel20:2 Namyankha
1Samuel20:3 Ndipo Davide analumbiranso nati
1Samuel20:4 Ndipo Yonatani anati kwa Davide
1Samuel20:5 Nati Davide kwa Yonatani
1Samuel20:6 Atate wako akandifuna pang'ono ponse
1Samuel20:7 Tsono akati
1Samuel20:8 Chifukwa chake uchitire kapolo wako zokoma mtima; popeza wamchititsa kapolo wako kupangana nawe pangano la kwa Yehova; koma ngati mwa ine muli choipa chilichonse
1Samuel20:9 Ndipo Yonatani anati
1Samuel20:10 Tsono Davide anati kwa Yonatani
1Samuel20:11 Nati Yonatani kwa Davide
1Samuel20:12 Ndipo Yonatani anati kwa Davide
1Samuel20:13 Mulungu alange Yonatani
1Samuel20:14 Ndipo undionetsere chifundo cha Yehova
1Samuel20:15 komanso usaleke kuchitira chifundo a m'nyumba yanga nthawi zonse: mungakhale m'tsogolomo Yehova atathera adani onse a Davide pa dziko lapansi.
1Samuel20:16 Chomwecho Yonatani anapangana pangano ndi nyumba ya Davide
1Samuel20:17 Ndipo Yonatani anamlumbiritsa Davide kachiwiri
1Samuel20:18 Tsono Yonatani ananena kwa Davide
1Samuel20:19 Ndipo atapita masiku atatu
1Samuel20:20 Ndipo ine ndidzaponya mivi itatu pambali pake
1Samuel20:21 Ndipo taona
1Samuel20:22 Koma ndikati kwa mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:23 Ndipo za chija tinakambirana iwe ndi ine
1Samuel20:24 Chomwecho Davide anabisala kuthengo; ndipo pakukhala mwezi
1Samuel20:25 Mfumu nikhala pa mpando wake
1Samuel20:26 Koma Saulo sananene kanthu tsiku lomwelo; chifukwa anaganizira
1Samuel20:27 Ndipo kunali tsiku lachiwiri mwezi utakhala
1Samuel20:28 Ndipo Yonatani anayankha Saulo
1Samuel20:29 nati
1Samuel20:30 Pamenepo Saulo anapsa mtima ndi Yonatani
1Samuel20:31 Popeza nthawi yonse mwana wa Yeseyo akhala ndi moyo padziko
1Samuel20:32 Ndipo Yonatani anayankha Saulo atate wake
1Samuel20:33 Ndipo Saulo anamponyera mkondo kuti amgwaze; momwemo Yonatani anazindikira kuti atate wake anatsimikiza mtima kupha Davide.
1Samuel20:34 Pamenepo Yonatani anauka pagome wolunda ndithu
1Samuel20:35 Ndipo m'mawa
1Samuel20:36 Ndipo anauza mnyamata wakeyo
1Samuel20:37 Ndipo mnyamatayo atafika pa malo a muvi umene Yonatani anauponya
1Samuel20:38 Ndipo Yonatani anafuulira mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:39 Koma mnyamatayo sanadziwe kanthu; Davide ndi Yonatani okha anadziwa za mlanduwo.
1Samuel20:40 Ndipo Yonatani anapatsa mnyamata wake zida zake
1Samuel20:41 Pomwepo pochoka mnyamatayo
1Samuel20:42 Ndipo Yonatani ananena kwa Davide
1Samuel21:1 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Nobu kwa Ahimeleki wansembeyo; ndipo Ahimeleki anadza kukomana ndi Davide alikunjenjemera
1Samuel21:2 Nati Davide kwa Ahimeleki wansembeyo
1Samuel21:3 Chifukwa chake tsono muli ndi chiyani? Mundipatse m'dzanja langa mikate isanu
1Samuel21:4 Ndipo wansembeyo anayankha Davide nati
1Samuel21:5 Ndipo Davide anayankha wansembeyo
1Samuel21:6 Chomwecho wansembeyo anampatsa mkate wopatulika
1Samuel21:7 Tsono munthu wina wa anyamata a Saulo anali komweko
1Samuel21:8 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Ahimeleki
1Samuel21:9 Nati wansembeyo
1Samuel21:10 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka
1Samuel21:11 Ndipo anyamata a Akisi ananena naye
1Samuel21:12 Ndipo Davide anasunga mau awa mumtima mwake
1Samuel21:13 Nasanduliza makhalidwe ake pamaso pao
1Samuel21:14 Tsono Akisi ananena ndi anyamata ake
1Samuel21:15 Kodi ndisowa anthu amisala kuti mwabwera ndi uyu kuti akhale wamisala pamaso panga? Kodi uyu adzalowa m'nyumba mwanga?
1Samuel22:1 Motero Davide anachoka kumeneko
1Samuel22:2 Ndipo yense wosautsidwa
1Samuel22:3 Ndipo Davide anachoka kumeneko kunka Mizipa wa ku Mowabu; nati kwa mfumu ya Mowabu
1Samuel22:4 Ndipo anawatenga kunka nao pamaso pa mfumu ya Mowabu; ndipo iwo anakhala naye nthawi yonse Davide anali ku lingalo.
1Samuel22:5 Ndipo mneneri Gadi anati kwa Davide
1Samuel22:6 Pakumva Saulo kuti anadziwika Davide
1Samuel22:7 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa anyamata ake akuima chomzinga
1Samuel22:8 kuti inu nonse munapangana chiwembu pa ine
1Samuel22:9 Pamenepo Doegi wa ku Edomu
1Samuel22:10 Ndipo iye anamfunsira kwa Yehova
1Samuel22:11 Pamenepo mfumu anatuma mthenga kukaitana Ahimeleki wansembeyo
1Samuel22:12 Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel22:13 Ndipo Saulo anati kwa iye
1Samuel22:14 Ndipo Ahimeleki anayankha mfumu
1Samuel22:15 Kodi ndayamba lero kumfunsira kwa Mulungu? Musatero iai; mfumu asanenera mnyamata wake kanthu
1Samuel22:16 Ndipo mfumu inati
1Samuel22:17 Mfumu niuza asilikali akuima chomzinga iye
1Samuel22:18 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Doegi
1Samuel22:19 Ndipo anakantha Nobu ndiwo mudzi wa ansembe ndi lupanga lakuthwa
1Samuel22:20 Ndipo mmodzi wa ana a Ahimeleki
1Samuel22:21 Ndipo Abiyatara anadziwitsa Davide kuti Saulo anapha ansembe a Yehova.
1Samuel22:22 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abiyatara
1Samuel22:23 Ukhale ndi ine
1Samuel23:1 Tsono anauza Davide
1Samuel23:2 Chifukwa chake Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova
1Samuel23:3 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye
1Samuel23:4 Tsono Davide anafunsiranso kwa Yehova. Ndipo Yehova anamyankha iye
1Samuel23:5 Chomwecho Davide ndi anthu ake anamuka ku Keila
1Samuel23:6 Ndipo kunali kuti Abiyatara mwana wa Ahimeleki pakuthawira kwa Davide ku Keila
1Samuel23:7 Ndipo anthu anauza Saulo kuti Davide wafika ku Keila. Ndipo Saulo anati
1Samuel23:8 Ndipo Saulo anamemeza anthu onse kunkhondo
1Samuel23:9 Ndipo Davide anadziwa kuti Saulo analikulingalira zomchitira zoipa; nati kwa Abiyatara wansembe
1Samuel23:10 Nati Davide
1Samuel23:11 Kodi amuna a ku Keila adzandipereka m'dzanja lake? Kodi Saulo adzatsikira ndithu
1Samuel23:12 Tsono Davide anati
1Samuel23:13 Potero Davide ndi anyamata ake
1Samuel23:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'chipululu m'ngaka
1Samuel23:15 Ndipo Davide anaona kuti Saulo adatuluka kudzafuna moyo wake; Davide nakhala m'chipululu cha Zifi m'nkhalango ku Horesi.
1Samuel23:16 Ndipo Yonatani mwana wa Saulo ananyamuka
1Samuel23:17 Ndipo iye ananena naye
1Samuel23:18 Ndipo awiriwo anapangana pangano pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Davide anakhala kunkhalango
1Samuel23:19 Ndipo a ku Zifi anakwera kwa Saulo ku Gibea
1Samuel23:20 Chifukwa chake mfumu
1Samuel23:21 Saulo nati
1Samuel23:22 Mukanitu kuti mukadziwitse ndithu
1Samuel23:23 Chifukwa chake yang'anirani
1Samuel23:24 Ndipo iwo ananyamuka
1Samuel23:25 Ndipo Saulo ndi anthu ake anamuka kukamfuna. Koma wina anauza Davide; chifukwa chake anatsikira kuthanthweko
1Samuel23:26 Ndipo Saulo anamuka mbali ina ya phiri
1Samuel23:27 Koma mthenga unafika kwa Saulo ndi kuti
1Samuel23:28 Chomwecho Saulo anabwerera polondola Davide
1Samuel23:29 Ndipo Davide anakwera kuchokera kumeneko
1Samuel24:1 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel24:2 Tsono Saulo anatenga anthu zikwi zitatu osankhika pakati pa Aisraele onse
1Samuel24:3 Ndipo panjira anafika ku makola a nkhosa
1Samuel24:4 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye
1Samuel24:5 Ndipo kunali m'tsogolo mwake kuti mtima wa Davide unamtsutsa chifukwa adadula mkawo wa mwinjiro wa Saulo.
1Samuel24:6 Nati kwa anyamata ake
1Samuel24:7 Chomwecho Davide analetsa anyamata ake ndi mau awa
1Samuel24:8 Bwino lake Davide yemwe ananyamuka
1Samuel24:9 Davide nanena ndi Saulo
1Samuel24:10 Onani
1Samuel24:11 Ndiponso atate wanga
1Samuel24:12 Yehova aweruze pakati pa ine ndi inu; ndipo Yehova adzandibwezera chilango kwa inu.
1Samuel24:13 Monga umanena mwambi wa makolo
1Samuel24:14 Nanga mfumu ya Israele inatulukira yani; inu mulikupirikitsa yani? Galu wakufa
1Samuel24:15 Chifukwa chake Yehova akhale woweruza
1Samuel24:16 Ndipo kunali
1Samuel24:17 Nati kwa Davide
1Samuel24:18 Ndipo unatsimikiza lero lino kuti wandichitira zabwino; chifukwa sunandipha pamene Yehova anandipereka m'dzanja lako.
1Samuel24:19 Pakuti munthu akapeza mdani wake
1Samuel24:20 Ndipo tsono taona ndidziwa kuti udzakhala mfumu ndithu
1Samuel24:21 Chifukwa chake tsono undilumbirire ndi Yehova
1Samuel24:22 Ndipo Davide analumbirira Saulo. Saulo namuka kwao; koma Davide ndi anthu ake anakwera kunka kungaka.
1Samuel25:1 Ndipo Samuele anamwalira; ndi Aisraele onse anaunjikana pamodzi nalira maliro ake
1Samuel25:2 Ndipo panali munthu ku Maoni
1Samuel25:3 Tsono dzina la munthuyo ndiye Nabala
1Samuel25:4 Ndipo Davide anamva kuchipululu kuti Nabala alinkusenga nkhosa zake.
1Samuel25:5 Davide natuma anyamata khumi
1Samuel25:6 ndipo muzitero kwa wodalayo
1Samuel25:7 Ndipo tsono ndamva kuti muli nao osenga nkhosa; abusa anu amene anali ndi ife
1Samuel25:8 Mufunse anyamata anu
1Samuel25:9 Ndipo pakufika anyamata a Davide
1Samuel25:10 Koma Nabala anayankha anyamata a Davide nati
1Samuel25:11 Kodi ndidzatenga mkate wanga
1Samuel25:12 Chomwecho anyamata a Davide anatembenukira ku njira yao
1Samuel25:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa anthu ake
1Samuel25:14 Koma mnyamata wina anauza Abigaile
1Samuel25:15 Koma anthu aja anatichitira zabwino ndithu
1Samuel25:16 iwo anatikhalira ngati linga usana ndi usiku
1Samuel25:17 Chifukwa chake tsono mudziwe ndi kulingalira chimene mudzachita; popeza anatsimikiza mtima kuchitira choipa mbuye wathu
1Samuel25:18 Pomwepo Abigaile anafulumira
1Samuel25:19 Nati kwa anyamata ake
1Samuel25:20 Ndipo kudatero pakuberekeka iye pa bulu wake
1Samuel25:21 Koma Davide adanena
1Samuel25:22 Mulungu alange adani a Davide
1Samuel25:23 Ndipo Abigaile pakuona Davide
1Samuel25:24 Ndipo atagwadira pa mapazi ake anati
1Samuel25:25 Mbuye wanga
1Samuel25:26 Chifukwa chake tsono
1Samuel25:27 Ndipo mphatso iyi mdzakazi wanu ndatengera mbuye wanga
1Samuel25:28 Mukhululukire kulakwa kwa mdzakazi wanu; pakuti Yehova adzapatsadi mbuye wanga banja lokhazikika
1Samuel25:29 Ngakhale anauka anthu kukulondolani
1Samuel25:30 Ndipo kudzali
1Samuel25:31 mudzakhala opanda chakudodoma nacho

1Samuel25:33 ndipo

1Samuel25:36 Ndipo Abigaile anafika kwa Nabala; ndipo

1Samuel25:38 Ndipo kunali

1Samuel26:1 Ndipo Azifi anafika kwa Saulo ku Gibea
1Samuel26:2 Ndipo Saulo ananyamuka
1Samuel26:3 Saulo namanga zithando m'phiri la Hakila kupenya kuchipululu kunjira. Koma Davide anakhala kuchipululu
1Samuel26:4 Chifukwa chake Davide anatumiza ozonda
1Samuel26:5 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka nafika pamalo paja Saulo anamangapo; ndipo Davide adaona pogona Saulo
1Samuel26:6 Pamenepo Davide anayankha nati kwa Ahimeleki Muhiti
1Samuel26:7 Chomwecho Davide ndi Abisai anafika kwa anthuwo usiku; ndipo onani
1Samuel26:8 Ndipo Abisai anati kwa Davide
1Samuel26:9 Koma Davide ananena ndi Abisai
1Samuel26:10 Nati Davide
1Samuel26:11 Yehova andiletse ine kusamula dzanja langa pa wodzozedwa wa Yehova; koma utenge mkondowo uli kumutu kwake
1Samuel26:12 Chomwecho Davide anatenga mkondowo
1Samuel26:13 Ndipo Davide anaolokera pa phiri; pakati pao panali danga lalikulu;
1Samuel26:14 ndipo Davide anaitana anthuwo
1Samuel26:15 Davide nati kwa Abinere
1Samuel26:16 Ichi unachichita sichili chabwino. Pali Yehova
1Samuel26:17 Ndipo Saulo anazindikira mau ake a Davide
1Samuel26:18 Nati iye

1Samuel27:2 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka

1Samuel27:5 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Akisi

1Samuel28:17 Ndipo Yehova yekha wachita monga ananena pakamwa panga; ndipo Yehova wang'amba ufumuwo
1Samuel28:18 Chifukwa sunamvera mau a Yehova
1Samuel28:19 Ndiponso Yehova adzapereka Israele pamodzi ndi iwe m'dzanja la Afilisti; ndipo mawa iwe ndi ana ako mudzakhala kuli ine; Yehova adzaperekanso khamu la Aisraele m'dzanja la Afilisti.

1Samuel29:1 Tsono Afilisti anasonkhanitsa makamu ao onse ku Afeki; ndipo Aisraele anamanga ku chitsime cha m'Yezireele.
1Samuel29:2 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti ananyamuka ndi mazana ao ndi zikwi zao; ndipo Davide ndi anthu ake ananyamuka ndi a pambuyo pamodzi ndi Akisi.
1Samuel29:3 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti anati
1Samuel29:4 Koma akalonga a Afilisti anapsa naye mtima; nanena naye akalonga a Afilisti

1Samuel30:2 nagwira akazi ndi onse anali m'mwemo

1Samuel30:4 Ndipo Davide ndi anthu amene anali naye anakweza mau ao

1Samuel30:16 Ndipo pamene anatsika naye
1Samuel30:17 Ndipo Davide anawakantha kuyambira madzulo kufikira usiku wa mawa wake; ndipo panalibe munthu mmodzi wa iwowa anapulumuka
1Samuel30:18 Ndipo Davide analanditsa zonse anazitenga Aamaleke
1Samuel30:19 Ndipo sikanasoweka kanthu

1Samuel30:23 Davide nati

1Samuel30:28 ndi kwa iwo a ku Aroere
1Samuel30:29 ndi kwa iwo a ku Rakala
1Samuel30:30 ndi kwa iwo a ku Horoma
1Samuel30:31 ndi kwa iwo a ku Hebroni

1Samuel31:3 Ndipo nkhondoyo inamkulira Saulo kwambiri
1Samuel31:4 Tsono Saulo ananena ndi wonyamula zida zake

1Samuel31:6 Chomwecho adamwalira pamodzi Saulo ndi ana ake atatu
1Samuel31:7 Ndipo pamene Aisraele akukhala tsidya lina la chigwa
1Samuel31:8 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake
1Samuel31:9 Ndipo anadula mutu wake
1Samuel31:10 Ndipo anaika zida zake m'nyumba ya Asitaroti; napachika mtembo wake ku linga la ku Beteseani.
1Samuel31:11 Koma pamene a ku Yabesi-Giliyadi anamva zimene Afilisti anamchitira Saulo
1Samuel31:12 ngwazi zonse zinanyamuka ndi kuchezera usiku kuyenda
1Samuel31:13 Natenga mafupa ao nawaika patsinde pa mtengo wa bwemba uli m'Yabesi

2Samuel1:8 Nanena
2Samuel1:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine

2Samuel1:16 Koma asanafe

2Samuel1:24 Ana akazi inu a Israele

2Samuel2:1 Ndipo zitatha izi Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati
2Samuel2:2 Chomwecho Davide anakwera kunka kumeneko pamodzi ndi akazi ake awiri
2Samuel2:3 Ndipo Davide anakwera nao anyamata ake okhala naye
2Samuel2:4 Ndipo anthu Ayuda anabwera namdzoza Davide pomwepo akhale mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda. Ndipo wina anauza Davide kuti
2Samuel2:5 Pamenepo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa anthu a ku Yabesi-Giliyadi
2Samuel2:6 Ndipo tsopano Yehova achitire inu chokoma ndi choonadi; inenso ndidzakubwezerani chokoma ichi
2Samuel2:7 Chifukwa chake tsono manja anu alimbike
2Samuel2:8 Koma Abinere
2Samuel2:9 namlonga ufumu wa pa Giliyadi ndi Aasiriya ndi Yezireele ndi Efuremu ndi Benjamini ndi Aisraele onse.
2Samuel2:10 Ndipo Isiboseti mwana wa Saulo anali ndi zaka makumi anai pakuyamba iye kukhala mfumu ya Israele
2Samuel2:11 Ndipo Davide anali mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda ku Hebroni zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi.
2Samuel2:12 Ndipo Abinere mwana wa Nere ndi anyamata a Isiboseti mwana wa Saulo anatuluka ku Mahanaimu kunka ku Gibiyoni.
2Samuel2:13 Ndi Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya
2Samuel2:14 Ndipo Abinere ananena ndi Yowabu
2Samuel2:15 Pomwepo iwo anaimirira naoloka owerengedwa
2Samuel2:16 Ndipo anagwirana munthu yense kugwira mutu wa mnzake
2Samuel2:17 Ndipo tsikulo nkhondo inakula ndithu. Ndi Abinere ndi anthu a Israele anathawa pamaso pa anyamata a Davide.
2Samuel2:18 Ndipo analipo ana atatu a Zeruya
2Samuel2:19 Ndipo Asahele anapirikitsa Abinere.
2Samuel2:20 Pomwepo Abinere anacheuka nati
2Samuel2:21 Ndipo Abinere ananena naye
2Samuel2:22 Ndipo Abinere anabwereza kunena kwa Asahele
2Samuel2:23 Koma iye anakana kupatuka; chifukwa chake Abinere anamkantha ndi khali la mkondo m'mimba mwake
2Samuel2:24 Koma Yowabu ndi Abisai anampirikitsa Abinere; ndipo dzuwa linawalowera pofika ku chitunda cha Ama
2Samuel2:25 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaunjikana pamodzi kutsata Abinere
2Samuel2:26 Pomwepo Abinere anaitana Yowabu nati
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu nati
2Samuel2:28 Chomwecho Yowabu anaomba lipenga
2Samuel2:29 Ndipo Abinere ndi anthu ake anachezera usiku wonse kupyola chidikha
2Samuel2:30 Ndipo Yowabu anabwerera pakutsata Abinere. Ndipo pamene anasonkhanitsa pamodzi anthu onse anasowa anthu a Davide khumi ndi asanu ndi anai ndi Asahele.
2Samuel2:31 Koma anyamata a Davide anakantha anthu a Benjamini ndi a Abinere
2Samuel2:32 Ndipo ananyamula Asahele namuika m'manda a atate wake ali ku Betelehemu. Ndipo Yowabu ndi anthu ake anachezera kuyenda usiku wonse
2Samuel3:1 Ndipo panali nkhondo nthawi yaitali pakati pa nyumba ya Saulo ndi nyumba ya Davide. Koma Davide analimba chilimbire
2Samuel3:2 Ndipo ana a Davide anabadwira ku Hebroni. Mwana woyamba ndiye Aminoni
2Samuel3:3 wachiwiri Kiliyabu
2Samuel3:4 ndi wachinai Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti; ndi wachisanu Sefatiya mwana wa Abitala;
2Samuel3:5 ndi wachisanu ndi chimodzi Itireamu wa Egila mkazi wa Davide. Awa anambadwira Davide ku Hebroni.
2Samuel3:6 Ndipo panali
2Samuel3:7 Ndipo Saulo adali ndi mkazi wamng'ono
2Samuel3:8 Pomwepo Abinere anapsa mtima kwambiri pa mau a Isiboseti
2Samuel3:9 Mulungu alange Abinere
2Samuel3:10 kuchotsa ufumu kunyumba ya Saulo ndi kukhazika mpando wachifumu wa Davide pa Israele ndi pa Yuda
2Samuel3:11 Ndipo iye sanakhoze kuyankha Abinere mau amodzi chifukwa cha kumuopa iye.
2Samuel3:12 Ndipo Abinere anatuma mithenga imnenere kwa Davide
2Samuel3:13 Nati iye
2Samuel3:14 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa Isiboseti mwana wa Saulo
2Samuel3:15 Pomwepo Isiboseti anatumiza namchotsera kwa mwamuna wake
2Samuel3:16 Ndipo mwamuna wakeyo anapita naye
2Samuel3:17 Ndipo Abinere analankhula nao akulu a Israele nanena nao
2Samuel3:18 chitani tsono
2Samuel3:19 Ndipo Abinere analankhulanso m'kumva kwa Abenjamini; Abinere anamukanso ku Hebroni kulankhula m'makutu a Davide zonse zakukomera Aisraele ndi a nyumba yonse ya Benjamini.
2Samuel3:20 Abinere nafika kwa Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:21 Pomwepo Abinere anati kwa Davide
2Samuel3:22 Ndipo taonani
2Samuel3:23 Tsono pofika Yowabu ndi khamu lonse anali nalo
2Samuel3:24 Pomwepo Yowabu anadza kwa mfumu
2Samuel3:25 Mumdziwa Abinere mwana wa Nere kuti anadza kuti akunyengeni
2Samuel3:26 Ndipo Yowabu anatuluka kwa Davide
2Samuel3:27 Pofikanso Abinere ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:28 Ndipo pambuyo pake
2Samuel3:29 chilango chigwere pa mutu wa Yowabu ndi pa nyumba yonse ya atate wake; ndipo kusasoweke kunyumba ya Yowabu munthu wakukhala nayo nthenda yakukha
2Samuel3:30 Motero Yowabu ndi Abisai mbale wake adapha Abinere
2Samuel3:31 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yowabu ndi kwa anthu onse okhala naye
2Samuel3:32 Ndipo anaika Abinere ku Hebroni; ndi mfumu inakweza mau ake nilira ku manda a Abinere
2Samuel3:33 Ndipo mfumu inanenera Abinere nyimbo iyi ya maliro
2Samuel3:34 Manja anu sanamangidwe
2Samuel3:35 Ndipo anthu onse anadza kudzadyetsa Davide chakudya kukali msana; koma Davide analumbira nati
2Samuel3:36 Ndipo anthu onse anachisamalira
2Samuel3:37 Momwemo anthu onse ndi Aisraele onse anazindikira tsiku lija kuti sikunafumira kwa mfumu kupha Abinere mwana wa Nere.
2Samuel3:38 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa anyamata ake
2Samuel3:39 Ndipo ndikali wofooka ine lero
2Samuel4:1 Ndipo pamene Isiboseti mwana wa Saulo
2Samuel4:2 Ndipo Isiboseti
2Samuel4:3 ndi Abeeroti anathawira ku Gitaimu; kumeneko amakhalira kufikira lero lino.
2Samuel4:4 Ndipo Yonatani mwana wa Saulo
2Samuel4:5 Ndipo Rekabu ndi Baana ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti
2Samuel4:6 Ndipo iwo analowanso kufikira m'kati mwa nyumba
2Samuel4:7 Koma polowa iwo m'nyumbamo iye ali chigonere pakama pake m'chipindamo
2Samuel4:8 Ndipo anabwera nao mutu wa Isiboseti kwa Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel4:9 Ndipo Davide anayankha Rekabu ndi Baana mbale wake
2Samuel4:10 muja munthu wina anandiuza kuti
2Samuel4:11 Koposa kotani nanga
2Samuel4:12 Ndipo Davide analamulira anyamata ake
2Samuel5:1 Pomwepo mafuko onse a Israele anabwera kwa Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel5:2 Masiku anapitawo
2Samuel5:3 Chomwecho akulu onse a Israele anadza kwa mfumu ku Hebroni; ndipo mfumu Davide anapangana nao pangano ku Hebroni pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo anamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israele.
2Samuel5:4 Davide anali ndi zaka makumi atatu polowa iye ufumu wake
2Samuel5:5 Ku Hebroni anachita ufumu pa Yuda zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi; ndi ku Yerusalemu anachita ufumu pa Aisraele onse ndi Ayuda omwe zaka makumi atatu mphambu zitatu.
2Samuel5:6 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu ake anamuka ku Yerusalemu kuyambana nao Ayebusi
2Samuel5:7 Chinkana anatero Davide anathyola linga la Ziyoni
2Samuel5:8 Ndipo tsiku lija Davide anati
2Samuel5:9 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'linga muja
2Samuel5:10 Ndipo Davide anakula chikulire chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa makamu anali naye.
2Samuel5:11 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya Tiro anatumiza mithenga kwa Davide ndi mitengo yamkungudza
2Samuel5:12 Ndipo Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova anamkhazikitsa mfumu ya Israele
2Samuel5:13 Ndipo Davide anadzitengera akazi aang'ono ena ndi akazi a ulemu ena a ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel5:14 Maina a iwo anambadwira m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samuwa
2Samuel5:15 ndi Ibara ndi Elisuwa
2Samuel5:16 ndi Elisama ndi Eliyada ndi Elifeleti.
2Samuel5:17 Koma pamene Afilisti anamva kuti adamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israele
2Samuel5:18 Tsono Afilisti anafika natanda m'chigwa cha Refaimu.
2Samuel5:19 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati
2Samuel5:20 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Baala-Perazimu
2Samuel5:21 Ndipo iwo anasiya kumeneko mafano ao; Davide ndi anyamata ake nawachotsa.
2Samuel5:22 Ndipo Afilisti anakweranso kachiwiri
2Samuel5:23 Ndipo pamene Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova
2Samuel5:24 Ndipo kudzali
2Samuel5:25 Ndipo Davide anatero
2Samuel6:1 Pambuyo pake Davide anamemezanso osankhika onse a m'Israele
2Samuel6:2 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka
2Samuel6:3 Ndipo iwo ananyamulira likasa la Mulungu pa galeta watsopano
2Samuel6:4 Potuluka nalo tsono pamodzi ndi likasa la Mulungu m'nyumba ya Abinadabu ili pachitunda
2Samuel6:5 Ndipo Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israele anasewera pamaso pa Yehova
2Samuel6:6 Ndipo pofika iwo ku dwale la Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Pomwepo mkwiyo wa Yehova udayaka pa Uza
2Samuel6:8 Ndipo kudaipira Davide
2Samuel6:9 Ndipo Davide anaopa Yehova tsiku lomwelo; nati
2Samuel6:10 Momwemo Davide sanafune kudzitengera likasa la Yehova lidze kumudzi wa Davide; koma Davide analipambutsira kunyumba ya Obededomu Mgiti.
2Samuel6:11 Ndipo likasa la Yehova linakhala m'nyumba ya Obededomu Mgiti miyezi itatu; ndipo Yehova anadalitsa Obededomu ndi banja lake lonse.
2Samuel6:12 Pamenepo anthu anauza mfumu Davide
2Samuel6:13 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel6:14 Ndipo Davide anavina ndi mphamvu yake yonse pamaso pa Yehova; Davide nadzimangirira efodi wabafuta.
2Samuel6:15 Chomwecho Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israele anakwera nalo likasa la Yehova
2Samuel6:16 Ndipo kunali pamene likasa la Yehova linafika m'mudzi wa Davide
2Samuel6:17 Ndipo pamene adalowa nalo likasa la Mulungu analiika pamalo pake pakati pa hema amene Davide adaliutsira; ndipo Davide anapereka nsembe zopsereza
2Samuel6:18 Pamene Davide adatsiriza kupereka nsembe yopsereza ndi zoyamika
2Samuel6:19 Ndipo anagawira anthu onse
2Samuel6:20 Pamenepo Davide anabwerera kudalitsa nyumba yake. Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Saulo anatulukira kwa Davide
2Samuel6:21 Koma Davide ananena ndi Mikala
2Samuel6:22 Ndipo ndidzaonjezanso kukhala ngati munthu woluluka
2Samuel6:23 Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Saulo sanaone mwana kufikira tsiku la imfa yake.
2Samuel7:1 Ndipo kunali pakukhala mfumuyo m'nyumba mwake
2Samuel7:2 mfumuyo inanena ndi Natani mneneriyo
2Samuel7:3 Ndipo Natani anati kwa mfumuyo
2Samuel7:4 Ndipo kunali usiku womwewo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Natani
2Samuel7:5 Kauze mtumiki wanga Davide
2Samuel7:6 Pakuti sindinakhala m'nyumba kuyambira tsiku lija ndinatulutsa ana a Israele ku Ejipito kufikira lero lomwe
2Samuel7:7 M'malo monse ndinayendamo limodzi ndi ana onse a Israele kodi ndinanena ndi fuko limodzi la Aisraele
2Samuel7:8 Chifukwa chake tsono udzatero kwa mtumiki wanga Davide
2Samuel7:9 Ndipo ndinali nawe kulikonse unamukako
2Samuel7:10 Ndipo ndidzaikira anthu anga Israele malo
2Samuel7:11 monga kuyambira tsiku lija ndinalamulira oweruza kuyang'anira anthu anga Israele; ndipo ndidzakupumulitsa kwa adani ako onse. Yehova akuuzanso kuti Yehova adzakumangira banja.
2Samuel7:12 Pamene masiku ako akadzakwaniridwa
2Samuel7:13 Iye adzamangira dzina langa nyumba
2Samuel7:14 Ndidzakhala atate wake
2Samuel7:15 koma chifundo changa sichidzamchokera iye
2Samuel7:16 Ndipo nyumba yako ndi ufumu wako zidzakhazikikadi ku nthawi zonse pamaso pako; mpando wachifumu wako udzakhazikika ku nthawi zonse.
2Samuel7:17 Monga mwa mau onse awa ndi monga mwa masomphenya onse awa
2Samuel7:18 Pomwepo Davide mfumu analowa
2Samuel7:19 Ndipo ichinso chinali pamaso panu chinthu chaching'ono
2Samuel7:20 Ndipo Davide adzaonjezanso kunenanso ndi Inu? Pakuti mudziwa mnyamata wanu
2Samuel7:21 Chifukwa cha mau anu
2Samuel7:22 Chifukwa chake wamkulu ndi Inu Yehova Mulungu
2Samuel7:23 Ndiponso mtundu uti wa pa dziko lapansi ufanana ndi anthu anu
2Samuel7:24 Ndipo mwadzikhazikira anthu anu Aisraele
2Samuel7:25 Ndipo tsopano
2Samuel7:26 Ndipo dzina lanu likulitsidwe ku nthawi zonse
2Samuel7:27 Pakuti inu
2Samuel7:28 Ndipo tsopano
2Samuel7:29 chifukwa chake tsono chikukomereni kudalitsa nyumba ya mnyamata wanu kuti ikhale pamaso panu chikhalire; pakuti Inu
2Samuel8:1 Ndipo m'tsogolo mwake Davide anakantha Afilisti
2Samuel8:2 Ndipo anakantha Amowabu nawayesa ndi chingwe
2Samuel8:3 Davide anakanthanso Hadadezere
2Samuel8:4 Ndipo Davide anatenga apakavalo ake chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel8:5 Ndipo pakufika Aaramu a ku Damasiko kudzathandiza Hadadezere mfumu ya ku Zoba
2Samuel8:6 Pamenepo Davide anaika maboma m'Aramu wa Damasiko. Ndipo Aaramu anasanduka anthu a Davide
2Samuel8:7 Ndipo Davide anatenga zikopa zagolide zinali ndi anyamata a Hadadezere
2Samuel8:8 Ndipo ku Beta ndi ku Berotai midzi ya Hadadezere
2Samuel8:9 Ndipo pamene Toi mfumu ya ku Hamati anamva kuti Davide adakantha khamu lonse la Hadadezere
2Samuel8:10 Toi anatumiza mwana wake Yoramu kwa mfumu Davide
2Samuel8:11 Izi zomwe mfumu Davide anazipatula zikhale za Yehova
2Samuel8:12 za Aaramu
2Samuel8:13 Ndipo Davide anamveketsa dzina lake pamene anabwera uko adakantha Aaramu m'Chigwa cha Mchere
2Samuel8:14 Ndipo anaika maboma m'Edomu; m'dziko lonse la Edomu anaika maboma
2Samuel8:15 Ndipo Davide anakhala mfumu ya Aisraele onse
2Samuel8:16 Ndipo Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anayang'anira ankhondo
2Samuel8:17 ndi Zadoki mwana wa Ahitubi
2Samuel8:18 Ndipo Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anayang'anira Akereti ndi Apeleti. Ndipo ana a Davide anali ansembe ake.
2Samuel9:1 Ndipo Davide anati
2Samuel9:2 Ndipo panali mnyamata wa m'nyumba ya Saulo dzina lake Ziba; ndipo anamuitana iye afike kwa Davide; ndi mfumuyo inanena naye
2Samuel9:3 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel9:4 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel9:5 Pamenepo mfumu Davide anatumiza anthu nakatenga iye kunyumba ya Makiri mwana wa Amiyele ku Lodebara.
2Samuel9:6 Ndipo Mefiboseti mwana wa Yonatani
2Samuel9:7 Ndipo Davide ananena naye
2Samuel9:8 Ndipo iye anamlambira
2Samuel9:9 Pomwepo mfumu inaitana Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Ndipo uzimlimira munda wake
2Samuel9:11 Pomwepo Ziba anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel9:12 Ndipo Mefiboseti anali ndi mwana wamwamuna wamng'ono
2Samuel9:13 Chomwecho Mefiboseti anakhala ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel10:1 Ndipo kunali zitapita izi
2Samuel10:2 Ndipo Davide anati
2Samuel10:3 Koma akalonga a ana a Amoni anati kwa Hanuni mbuye wao
2Samuel10:4 Chomwecho Hanuni anatenga anyamata a Davide nawameta ndevu zao mbali imodzi
2Samuel10:5 Pamene anachiuza Davide iye anatumiza anthu kukakomana nao; pakuti amunawo anachita manyazi akulu. Niti mfumu
2Samuel10:6 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anazindikira kuti anadzinunkhitsa kwa Davide
2Samuel10:7 Ndipo pamene Davide anachimva
2Samuel10:8 Ndipo ana a Amoni anatuluka
2Samuel10:9 Ndipo pamene Yowabu anaona kuti nkhondo inamdzera kumaso ndi kumbuyo
2Samuel10:10 Koma anthu otsalawo anawapereka kwa Abisai mbale wake
2Samuel10:11 Ndipo iye anati
2Samuel10:12 Ulimbike mtima
2Samuel10:13 Chomwecho Yowabu ndi anthu amene anali naye anayandikira kuponyana nkhondo ndi Aaramu. Ndipo iwowa anathawa pamaso pake.
2Samuel10:14 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anaona kuti Aaramu anathawa
2Samuel10:15 Ndipo pamene Aaramu anaona kuti Aisraele anawathyola
2Samuel10:16 Ndipo Hadadezere anatumiza mthenga nakatenga Aaramu a ku tsidya la chimtsinje; iwo nafika ku Helamu
2Samuel10:17 Ndipo wina anauza Davide; iye nasonkhanitsa Aisraele onse
2Samuel10:18 Ndipo Aaramu anathawa pamaso pa Israele; Davide naphapo Aaramu apamagaleta mazana asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel10:19 Ndipo pamene mafumu onse
2Samuel11:1 Ndipo kunali pofikanso chaka
2Samuel11:2 Ndipo kunali pa madzulo Davide anauka pa kama wake nayenda pa tsindwi la nyumba ya mfumu. Ndipo iye ali patsindwipo anaona mkazi alinkusamba; ndi mkaziyo anali wochititsa kaso pomuyang'ana.
2Samuel11:3 Ndipo Davide anatumiza munthu nafunsa za mkaziyo. Ndipo wina anati
2Samuel11:4 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mithenga
2Samuel11:5 Ndipo mkaziyo anaima
2Samuel11:6 Davide natumiza kwa Yowabu
2Samuel11:7 Ndipo pakufika kwa iye Uriya uja
2Samuel11:8 Ndipo Davide anauza Uriya
2Samuel11:9 Koma Uriya anagona pa khomo la nyumba ya mfumu pamodzi ndi anyamata onse a mbuye wake
2Samuel11:10 Ndipo pamene anauza Davide kuti
2Samuel11:11 Uriya nanena ndi Davide
2Samuel11:12 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Uriya
2Samuel11:13 Ndipo pakumuitana Davide
2Samuel11:14 Ndipo m'mawa Davide analembera Yowabu kalata
2Samuel11:15 Ndi m'kalatamo analemba kuti
2Samuel11:16 Ndipo Yowabu atayang'anira mudziwo
2Samuel11:17 Ndipo akumudziwo anatuluka
2Samuel11:18 Pamenepo Yowabu anatumiza munthu nauza Davide zonse za nkhondoyi;
2Samuel11:19 nauza mthengawo kuti
2Samuel11:20 kudzali kuti ukapsa mtima wa mfumu nikati kwa iwe
2Samuel11:21 Ndani anakantha Abimeleki mwana wa Yerubeseti? Sadamponyera kodi mphero mkazi wa palinga nafa iye ku Tebezi? Munasendera bwanji pafupi potere pa lingalo? Tsono udzanena
2Samuel11:22 Chomwecho mthengawo unamuka
2Samuel11:23 Ndipo mthengawo unati kwa Davide
2Samuel11:24 Ndipo akuponyawo amene anali palinga anaponya anyamata anu; ndipo anyamata ena a mfumu anafa
2Samuel11:25 Pomwepo Davide ananena ndi mthengawo
2Samuel11:26 Ndipo pamene mkazi wa Uriya anamva kuti Uriya mwamuna wake adamwalira
2Samuel11:27 Ndipo pakutuluka malirowo
2Samuel12:1 Ndipo Yehova anatumiza Natani kwa Davide. Ndipo anafika kwa iye nanena naye
2Samuel12:2 Wolemerayo anali nazo zoweta zazing'ono ndi zazikulu zambiri ndithu;
2Samuel12:3 koma wosaukayo analibe kanthu kena koma kamwana kakakazi ka nkhosa
2Samuel12:4 Ndipo kwa wolemerayo kunafika mlendo
2Samuel12:5 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Davide unayaka ndithu pa munthuyo
2Samuel12:6 ndipo adzabwezera mwa mwanawankhosayo ena anai
2Samuel12:7 Ndipo Natani ananena kwa Davide
2Samuel12:8 ndinakupatsa nyumba ya mbuye wako
2Samuel12:9 Chifukwa ninji unapeputsa mau a Yehova ndi kuchita chimene chili choipa pamaso pake? Unakantha Uriya Muhiti ndi lupanga ndi kutenga mkazi wake akhale mkazi wako; ndipo unamupha iye ndi lupanga la ana a Amoni.
2Samuel12:10 Chifukwa chake tsono lupanga silidzachoka pa nyumba yako nthawi zonse
2Samuel12:11 Atero Yehova
2Samuel12:12 Pakuti iwe unachichita m'tseri; koma Ine ndidzachita chinthu ichi pamaso pa Aisraele onse
2Samuel12:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Natani
2Samuel12:14 Koma popeza pakuchita ichi munapatsa chifukwa chachikulu kwa adani a Yehova cha kuchitira mwano
2Samuel12:15 Ndipo Natani anamuka kwao. Ndipo Yehova anadwaza mwana amene mkazi wa Uriya anambalira Davide
2Samuel12:16 Chifukwa chake Davide anapempherera mwanayo kwa Mulungu; Davide nasala kudya
2Samuel12:17 Ndipo akulu a m'nyumba yake ananyamuka
2Samuel12:18 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri mwanayo anamwalira. Ndipo anyamata a Davide anaopa kumuuza kuti mwanayo wafa
2Samuel12:19 Koma pamene Davide anaona anyamata ake likunong'onezana
2Samuel12:20 Pamenepo Davide ananyamuka pansi
2Samuel12:21 Pamenepo anyamata ake ananena naye
2Samuel12:22 Nati iye
2Samuel12:23 Koma tsopano wafa
2Samuel12:24 Ndipo Davide anasangalatsa Bateseba mkazi wake
2Samuel12:25 natumiza ndi dzanja la Natani mneneriyo
2Samuel12:26 Ndipo Yowabu anathira nkhondo pa Raba wa ana a Amoni
2Samuel12:27 Yowabu natumiza mithenga kwa Davide nati
2Samuel12:28 Chifukwa chake tsono musonkhanitse anthu otsalawo
2Samuel12:29 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsa anthu onse
2Samuel12:30 Nachotsa korona pa mutu wa mfumu yao; kulemera kwake kunali talente wa golide; ndipo m'menemo munali miyala ya mtengo wapatali; ndipo anamuika pa mutu wa Davide. Iye natulutsa zofunkha za mudziwo zambirimbiri.
2Samuel12:31 Natulutsa anthu a m'mudzimo
2Samuel13:1 Ndipo kunali chitapita ichi
2Samuel13:2 Ndipo Aminoni anapsinjikadi nayamba kudwala chifukwa cha mlongo wake Tamara
2Samuel13:3 Koma Aminoni anali ndi bwenzi lake
2Samuel13:4 Nanena naye
2Samuel13:5 Ndipo Yonadabu ananena naye
2Samuel13:6 Chomwecho Aminoni anagona
2Samuel13:7 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mau kwao kwa Tamara
2Samuel13:8 Chomwecho Tamara anapita kunyumba ya mlongo wake Aminoni; ndipo iye anali chigonere. Ndipo anatenga ufa naukanda naumba timitanda pamaso pake
2Samuel13:9 Ndipo anatenga chiwaya natitulutsa pamaso pake; koma anakana kudya. Ndipo Aminoni anati
2Samuel13:10 Ndipo Aminoni anati kwa Tamara
2Samuel13:11 Ndipo pamene anabwera nato pafupi kuti adye
2Samuel13:12 Koma iye anamyankha nati
2Samuel13:13 Ndipo ine
2Samuel13:14 Koma iye sadafuna kumvera mau ake
2Samuel13:15 Atatero Aminoni anadana naye ndi chidani chachikulu kopambana; pakuti chidani chimene anamuda nacho
2Samuel13:16 Koma iye ananena naye
2Samuel13:17 Pomwepo anaitana mnyamata wake amene anamtumikira
2Samuel13:18 Ndipo iye anavala chovala cha mawangamawanga
2Samuel13:19 Ndipo Tamara anathira phulusa pamutu pake
2Samuel13:20 Ndipo Abisalomu mlongo wake ananena naye
2Samuel13:21 Koma pamene mfumu Davide anamva zonsezi
2Samuel13:22 Ndipo Abisalomu sanalankhule ndi Aminoni chabwino kapena choipa
2Samuel13:23 Ndipo zitapita zaka ziwiri zathunthu
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu nafika kwa mfumu nati
2Samuel13:25 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel13:26 Pomwepo Abisalomu anati
2Samuel13:27 Koma Abisalomu anaiumirira iyo
2Samuel13:28 Ndipo Abisalomu anakamulira anyamata ake
2Samuel13:29 Ndipo anyamata a Abisalomu anamchitira Aminoni monga umo Abisalomu anawalamulira. Pomwepo ana amuna onse a mfumu ananyamuka
2Samuel13:30 Ndipo kunali akali panjira
2Samuel13:31 Pamenepo mfumu inanyamuka ning'amba zovala zake nigona pansi
2Samuel13:32 Ndipo Yonadabu mwana wa Simea mbale wa Davide anayankha nati
2Samuel13:33 Chifukwa chake tsono mfumu mbuye wanga asasauke mtima ndi chinthuchi
2Samuel13:34 Koma Abisalomu anathawa. Ndipo mnyamata wakudikira anatukula maso ake nayang'ana
2Samuel13:35 Ndipo Yonadabu ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel13:36 Ndipo kunali pakutsiriza iye kulankhula
2Samuel13:37 Koma Abisalomu anathawa
2Samuel13:38 Chomwecho anathawa Abisalomu
2Samuel13:39 Ndipo mfumu Davide analira kunka kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel14:1 Ndipo Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anazindikira kuti mtima wa mfumu unalunjika kwa Abisalomu.
2Samuel14:2 Ndipo Yowabu anatumiza ku Tekowa
2Samuel14:3 Nulowe kwa mfumu
2Samuel14:4 Ndipo pamene mkazi wa ku Tekowayo anati alankhule ndi mfumuyo
2Samuel14:5 Ndipo mfumuyo inanena naye
2Samuel14:6 Ndipo mdzakazi wanu ndinali nao ana amuna awiri
2Samuel14:7 Ndipo onani
2Samuel14:8 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi mkaziyo
2Samuel14:9 Ndipo mkazi wa ku Tekowayo ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel14:10 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel14:11 Nati iye
2Samuel14:12 Pamenepo mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:13 Ndipo mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:14 Pakuti kufa tidzafa
2Samuel14:15 Chifukwa chake tsono chakuti ndadzanena mau awa ndi mbuye wanga mfumu
2Samuel14:16 Pakuti mfumu idzamvera ndi kupulumutsa mdzakazi wake m'dzanja la munthu wakufuna kundiononga ine pamodzi ndi mwana wanga
2Samuel14:17 Ndipo mdzakazi wanu ndinati
2Samuel14:18 Pamenepo mfumu inayankha
2Samuel14:19 Ndipo mfumuyo inati
2Samuel14:20 Mnyamata wanu Yowabu anachita chinthu ichi kuti asandulize mamvekedwe a mlanduwo. Ndipo mbuye wanga ali wanzeru
2Samuel14:21 Ndipo mfumuyo inanena ndi Yowabu
2Samuel14:22 Ndipo Yowabu anagwa nkhope yake pansi
2Samuel14:23 Chomwecho Yowabu ananyamuka namka ku Gesuri
2Samuel14:24 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel14:25 Ndipo m'Israele monse munalibe wina anthu anamtama kwambiri chifukwa cha kukongola kwake monga Abisalomu; kuyambira ku mapazi kufikira pakati pa mutu wake mwa iye munalibe chilema.
2Samuel14:26 Ndipo pometa tsitsi lake amameta potsiriza chaka
2Samuel14:27 Ndipo kwa Abisalomu kunabadwa ana amuna atatu ndi mwana wamkazi mmodzi
2Samuel14:28 Ndipo Abisalomu anakhala ku Yerusalemu zaka ziwiri zathunthu
2Samuel14:29 Pamenepo Abisalomu anaitana Yowabu kuti akamtumize iye kwa mfumu; koma anakana kubwera kwa iye; ndipo anamuitananso nthawi yachiwiri
2Samuel14:30 Chifukwa chake iye anati kwa anyamata ake
2Samuel14:31 Pamenepo Yowabu ananyamuka nafika kwa Abisalomu kunyumba yake
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu nayankha Yowabu
2Samuel14:33 Chomwecho Yowabu anadza kwa mfumu namuuza; ndipo pamene iye adaitana Abisalomu
2Samuel15:1 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel15:2 Ndipo Abisalomu analawirira
2Samuel15:3 Abisalomu nanena naye
2Samuel15:4 Abisalomu anatinso
2Samuel15:5 Ndipo kunatero kuti pakusendera munthu aliyense kudzamlambira
2Samuel15:6 Abisalomu anachitira zotero Aisraele onse akudza kwa mfumu kuti aweruze mlandu wao; chomwecho Abisalomu anakopa mitima ya anthu a Israele.
2Samuel15:7 Ndipo kunali pakutha zaka zinai Abisalomu ananena kwa mfumu
2Samuel15:8 Pakuti mnyamata wanu ndinawinda pakukhala ine ku Gesuri m'Aramu
2Samuel15:9 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel15:10 Koma Abisalomu anatumiza ozonda ku mafuko onse a Israele
2Samuel15:11 Ndipo pamodzi ndi Abisalomu panapita anthu mazana awiri a ku Yerusalemu ndiwo oitanidwa
2Samuel15:12 Ndipo Abisalomu anaitana Ahitofele Mgiloni
2Samuel15:13 Ndipo mthenga unafika kwa Davide nuti
2Samuel15:14 Ndipo Davide ananena nao anyamata ake onse akukhala naye ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel15:15 Ndipo anyamata a mfumu ananena kwa mfumu
2Samuel15:16 Mfumu nituluka
2Samuel15:17 Ndipo mfumu inatuluka
2Samuel15:18 Ndipo anyamata ake onse anapita naye limodzi; ndi Akereti ndi Apeleti
2Samuel15:19 Pomwepo mfumu inanena kwa Itai Mgiti
2Samuel15:20 Popeza unangofika dzulo lokha
2Samuel15:21 Itai nayankha mfumu nuti
2Samuel15:22 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Itai
2Samuel15:23 Ndipo dziko lonse linalira ndi mau okweza; ndipo anthu onse anaoloka
2Samuel15:24 Ndipo onani
2Samuel15:25 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Zadoki
2Samuel15:26 Koma Iye akatero kuti
2Samuel15:27 Ndipo mfumu inanenanso ndi Zadoki wansembeyo
2Samuel15:28 Ona ndidzaima pa madooko a m'chipululu kufikira afika mau ako akunditsimikizira ine.
2Samuel15:29 Chifukwa chake Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ananyamulanso likasa la Mulungu nafika nalo ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo iwo anakhala kumeneko.
2Samuel15:30 Ndipo Davide anakwera pa chikweza cha ku Azitona nakwera nalira misozi; ndipo anafunda mutu wake nayenda ndi mapazi osavala; ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anafunda munthu yense mutu wake ndipo anakwera
2Samuel15:31 Ndipo wina anauza Davide nati
2Samuel15:32 Ndipo kunali pakufika Davide ku mutu wa phiri
2Samuel15:33 Ndipo Davide ananena naye
2Samuel15:34 koma ukabwerera kumudzi
2Samuel15:35 Ndipo suli nao kumeneko Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ansembewo kodi? Motero chilichonse udzachimva cha m'nyumba ya mfumu uziuza Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ansembewo.
2Samuel15:36 Onani
2Samuel15:37 Chomwecho Husai bwenzi la Davide anadza m'mudzimo; ndipo Abisalomu anafika ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel16:1 Ndipo pamene Davide anapitirira pang'ono pamutu pa phiri
2Samuel16:2 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Ziba
2Samuel16:3 Ndipo mfumu inati
2Samuel16:4 Pomwepo mfumu inanena ndi Ziba
2Samuel16:5 Ndipo pakufika mfumu Davide ku Bahurimu
2Samuel16:6 Ndipo iye anaponya miyala Davide ndi anyamata onse a mfumu Davide
2Samuel16:7 Ndipo anatero Simei pakutukwana
2Samuel16:8 Yehova wabwezera pa iwe mwazi wonse wa nyumba ya Saulo
2Samuel16:9 Pomwepo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel16:10 Mfumu niti
2Samuel16:11 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Abisai ndi anyamata ake onse
2Samuel16:12 Kapena Yehova adzayang'anira chosayenerachi alikundichitira ine
2Samuel16:13 Chomwecho Davide ndi anthu ake anapita m'njira
2Samuel16:14 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu onse amene anali naye anafika olema; ndipo iye anadzitsitsimutsa kumeneko.
2Samuel16:15 Ndipo Abisalomu
2Samuel16:16 Ndipo kunali pakudza kwa Abisalomu Husai Mwariki
2Samuel16:17 Ndipo Abisalomu ananena ndi Husai
2Samuel16:18 Husai nanena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel16:19 Ndiponso ndidzatumikira yani? Si pamaso pa mwana wake nanga? Monga ndinatumikira pamaso pa atate wanu
2Samuel16:20 Pomwepo Abisalomu ananena ndi Ahitofele
2Samuel16:21 Ndipo Ahitofele ananena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel16:22 Chomwecho iwo anayalira Abisalomu hema pamwamba pa nyumba; ndipo Abisalomu analowa kwa akazi aang'ono a atate wake pamaso pa Aisraele onse.
2Samuel16:23 Ndipo uphungu wa Ahitofele anaupangira masiku aja
2Samuel17:1 Ndipo Ahitofele ananena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel17:2 ndipo ndidzamgwera ali wolema ndi wofooka
2Samuel17:3 ndipo anthu onsewo ndidzabwera nao kwa inu; munthu mumfunayo ali ngati onse obwerera; momwemo anthu onse adzakhala mumtendere.
2Samuel17:4 Ndipo mauwa anamuyenerera Abisalomu
2Samuel17:5 Pomwepo Abisalomu anati
2Samuel17:6 Ndipo pakufika Husai kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel17:7 Ndipo Husai ananena ndi Abisalomu
2Samuel17:8 Husai anatinso
2Samuel17:9 Onani
2Samuel17:10 Ndipo ngakhale ngwazi imene mtima wake ukunga mtima wa mkango idzasungunuka konse
2Samuel17:11 Koma uphungu wanga ndiwo kuti musonkhanitse Aisraele onse kwa inu kuyambira ku Dani kufikira ku Beereseba
2Samuel17:12 Chomwecho tidamvumbulukira pa malo akuti adzapezeka
2Samuel17:13 Ndiponso ngati walowa kumudzi wina
2Samuel17:14 Ndipo Abisalomu ndi anthu onse a Israele anati
2Samuel17:15 Pomwepo Husai ananena ndi Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ansembewo
2Samuel17:16 Chifukwa chake tsono mutumize msanga nimuuze Davide kuti Musagona usiku uno pa madooko a kuchipululu
2Samuel17:17 Ndipo Yonatani ndi Ahimaazi anakhala ku Enirogele; mdzakazi ankapita kuwauza; ndipo iwo anapita nauza mfumu Davide
2Samuel17:18 Koma mnyamata wina anawaona nauza Abisalomu; ndipo ajawo anachoka msanga onse awiri
2Samuel17:19 Ndipo mkazi anatenga chivundikiro nachiika pakamwa pa chitsime
2Samuel17:20 Ndipo anyamata a Abisalomu anafika kunyumba kwa mkaziyo; nati
2Samuel17:21 Ndipo kunali
2Samuel17:22 Pomwepo Davide ananyamuka ndi anthu onse amene anali naye
2Samuel17:23 Ndipo Ahitofele
2Samuel17:24 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Mahanaimu. Abisalomu naoloka Yordani
2Samuel17:25 Ndipo Abisalomu anaika Amasa
2Samuel17:26 Ndipo Israele ndi Abisalomu anamanga zithando m'dziko la Giliyadi.
2Samuel17:27 Ndipo kunali pakufika Davide ku Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:28 iwo anabwera nao makama
2Samuel17:29 ndi uchi ndi mafuta
2Samuel18:1 Ndipo Davide anawerenga anthu amene anali naye
2Samuel18:2 Davide natumiza anthu atawagawa magulu atatu
2Samuel18:3 Koma anthuwo anati
2Samuel18:4 Ndipo mfumu inanena nao
2Samuel18:5 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira Yowabu ndi Abisai ndi Itai
2Samuel18:6 Chomwecho anthuwo anatulukira kuthengo kukamenyana ndi Israele; nalimbana ku nkhalango ya ku Efuremu.
2Samuel18:7 Ndipo anthu a Israele anakanthidwa pamenepo pamaso pa anyamata a Davide
2Samuel18:8 Pakuti nkhondo inatanda pa dziko lonse
2Samuel18:9 Ndipo Abisalomu anakomana ndi anyamata a Davide. Abisalomu naberekeka pa nyuru yake
2Samuel18:10 Ndipo munthu wina anamuona
2Samuel18:11 Ndipo Yowabu ananena ndi womuuzayo
2Samuel18:12 Munthuyo nanena ndi Yowabu
2Samuel18:13 Ndikadachita chonyenga pa moyo wake
2Samuel18:14 Pomwepo Yowabu anati
2Samuel18:15 Ndipo anyamata khumi onyamula zida zake za Yowabu anamzungulira Abisalomu namkantha namupha.
2Samuel18:16 Ndipo Yowabu analiza lipenga
2Samuel18:17 Ndipo anatenga Abisalomu namponya m'chidzenje chachikulu kunkhalangoko; naunjika pamwamba pake mulu waukulu ndithu wamiyala; ndipo Aisraele onse anathawa yense ku hema wake.
2Samuel18:18 Koma Abisalomu akali moyo adatenga nadziutsira choimiritsacho chili m'chigwa cha mfumu; pakuti anati
2Samuel18:19 Pomwepo Ahimaazi mwana wa Zadoki anati
2Samuel18:20 Ndipo Yowabu ananena naye
2Samuel18:21 Pamenepo Yowabu ananena ndi Mkusi
2Samuel18:22 Ndipo Ahimaazi mwana wa Zadoki ananena kachiwiri kwa Yowabu
2Samuel18:23 Koma ngakhale kotero
2Samuel18:24 Koma Davide anakhala pakati pa zipata ziwiri; ndipo mlonda anakwera pa tsindwi la chipata cha kulinga
2Samuel18:25 Pamenepo mlondayo anafuula
2Samuel18:26 Ndipo mlondayo anaona munthu wina wothamanga; mlonda naitana wakuchipata nanena
2Samuel18:27 Mlondayo nati
2Samuel18:28 Ndipo Ahimaazi anafuula
