2Samuel19:1 Ndipo anauza Yowabu
2Samuel19:2 Ndipo chipulumutso cha tsiku lija chinasandulika maliro kwa anthu onse; pakuti anthu anamva kuti
2Samuel19:3 Ndipo tsiku lija anthu analowa m'mudzi kachetechete
2Samuel19:4 Ndipo mfumu inafunda nkhope yake
2Samuel19:5 Ndipo Yowabu anafika kunyumba ya mfumu
2Samuel19:6 m'mene mukonda awo akudana nanu
2Samuel19:7 Chifukwa chake tsono nyamukani
2Samuel19:8 Pamenepo mfumu inanyamuka
2Samuel19:9 Ndipo anthu onse a m'mafuko onse a Israele analikutsutsana
2Samuel19:10 Ndipo Abisalomu amene tinamdzoza mfumu yathu anafa kunkhondo. Chifukwa chake tsono mulekeranji kunena mau akuti abwere nayo mfumuyo?
2Samuel19:11 Ndipo mfumu Davide anatumiza kwa Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ansembewo
2Samuel19:12 Inu ndinu abale anga
2Samuel19:13 Ndipo munene ndi Amasa
2Samuel19:14 Ndipo iye anakopa mitima ya anthu onse a Yuda
2Samuel19:15 Chomwecho mfumu inabwera nifika ku Yordani. Ndipo Ayuda anadza ku Giligala
2Samuel19:16 Ndipo Simei
2Samuel19:17 Ndipo anali nao anthu chikwi chimodzi Abenjamini
2Samuel19:18 Ndipo ngalawa yakuolotsera inaoloka kuti akatenge banja la mfumu ndi kuchita chomkomera. Ndipo Simei mwana wa Gera anagwa pansi pamaso pa mfumu pakuoloka iye pa Yordani.
2Samuel19:19 Nati kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:20 Pakuti mnyamata wanu ndidziwa kuti ndinachimwa; chifukwa chake
2Samuel19:21 Koma Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anayankha nati
2Samuel19:22 Koma Davide anati
2Samuel19:23 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Simei
2Samuel19:24 Ndipo Mefiboseti mwana wa Saulo anatsika kukakomana ndi mfumu; ndipo sadasamba mapazi ake
2Samuel19:25 Ndipo kunali pakufika iye ku Yerusalemu kukakomana ndi mfumu
2Samuel19:26 Ndipo anayankha
2Samuel19:27 Ndipo iye anandinamizira mnyamata wanu kwa mbuye wanga mfumu; koma mbuye wanga mfumu ali ngati mthenga wa Yehova; chifukwa chake chitani chimene chikukomerani.
2Samuel19:28 Pakuti nyumba yonse ya atate wanga inali anthu oyenera imfa pamaso pa mbuye wanga mfumu; koma inu munaika mnyamata wanu pakati pa iwo akudya pa gome lanu. Kuyenera kwanga nkutaninso kuti ndikaonjezere kudandaulira kwa mfumu?
2Samuel19:29 Ndipo mfumu inanena naye
2Samuel19:30 Ndipo Mefiboseti anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:31 Ndipo Barizilai
2Samuel19:32 Ndipo Barizilai anali nkhalamba
2Samuel19:33 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Barizilai
2Samuel19:34 Koma Barizilai ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel19:35 Lero ndili nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu; kodi ndikhoza kuzindikiranso kusiyanitsa zabwino ndi zoipa? Mnyamata wanu ndikhoza kodi kuzindikira chimene ndidya kapena kumwa? Kodi ndikhozanso kumva mau a amuna ndi akazi oimba? Chifukwa ninji tsono mnyamata wanu ndidzakhalanso wolemetsa mbuye wanga mfumu.
2Samuel19:36 Mnyamata wanu angofuna kuoloka Yordani pamodzi ndi mfumu; ndipo afuniranji mfumu kundibwezerapo mphotho yotere?
2Samuel19:37 Mulole mnyamata wanu ndibwererenso
2Samuel19:38 Ndipo mfumu inayankha
2Samuel19:39 Ndipo anthu onse anaoloka Yordani
2Samuel19:40 Chomwecho mfumu inaoloka nifika ku Giligala
2Samuel19:41 Ndipo onani
2Samuel19:42 Ndipo anthu onse a Yuda anayankha anthu a Israele. Chifukwa mfumu ili ya chibale chathu; tsono mulikukwiyiranji pa mlandu umenewu? Tinadya konse za mfumu kodi? Kapena kodi anatipatsa mtulo uliwonse?
2Samuel19:43 Ndipo anthu a Israele anayankha anthu a Yuda
2Samuel20:1 Ndipo kudangotero kuti pamenepo panali munthu woipa
2Samuel20:2 Chomwecho anthu onse a Israele analeka kutsata Davide
2Samuel20:3 Ndipo Davide anafika kunyumba kwake ku Yerusalemu. Mfumuyo nitenga akazi khumi ang'onowo amene adawasiya asunge nyumbayo
2Samuel20:4 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Chomwecho Amasa anamuka kukaitana anthu a Yuda asonkhane; koma anachedwa
2Samuel20:6 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abisai
2Samuel20:7 Ndipo anatuluka namtsata anthu a Yowabu
2Samuel20:8 Pamene anafika iwo pa mwala waukulu uli ku Gibiyoni
2Samuel20:9 Ndipo Yowabu ananena ndi Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Koma Amasa sanasamalire lupanga lili m'dzanja la Yowabu; chomwecho iye anamgwaza nalo m'mimba; nakhuthula matumbo ake pansi
2Samuel20:11 Ndipo mnyamata wina wa Yowabu anaima pali iye
2Samuel20:12 Ndipo Amasa analikukunkhulira m'mwazi wake pakati pa mseu. Ndipo pamene munthuyo anaona kuti anthu onse anaima
2Samuel20:13 Atamchotsa iye mumseu
2Samuel20:14 Ndipo anapyola mafuko onse a Israele kufikira ku Abele ndi ku Betimaaka
2Samuel20:15 Ndipo anadza nammangira misasa m'Abele wa Betimaaka
2Samuel20:16 Pamenepo mkazi wanzeru wa m'mudzimo anafuula
2Samuel20:17 Ndipo anayandikira kwa mkaziyo; ndi mkaziyo anati
2Samuel20:18 Ndipo iye analankhula
2Samuel20:19 Ine ndine wa awo amene ali amtendere ndi okhulupirika m'Israele; inu mulikufuna kuononga mudzi ndi mai wa m'Israele; mudzamezeranji cholowa cha Yehova?
2Samuel20:20 Ndipo Yowabu anayankha nati
2Samuel20:21 Mlanduwo suli wotere ai
2Samuel20:22 Pomwepo mkaziyo anapita kwa anthu onse mwa nzeru yake. Ndipo iwo anadula mutu wa Sheba mwana wa Bikiri
2Samuel20:23 Ndipo Yowabu anali woyang'anira khamu lonse la Israele; ndi Benaya
2Samuel20:24 ndi Adoramu anayang'anira msonkho; ndi Yehosafati mwana wa Ahiludi anali wolemba mbiri;
2Samuel20:25 ndi Seva anali mlembi; ndi Zadoki ndi Abiyatara anali ansembe;
2Samuel20:26 ndiponso Ira Myairi anali ansembe a Davide.
2Samuel21:1 Ndipo m'masiku a Davide munali njala
2Samuel21:2 Ndipo mfumu inaitana Agibiyoni
2Samuel21:3 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Agibiyoni
2Samuel21:4 Ndipo Agibiyoni ananena naye
2Samuel21:5 Ndipo anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel21:6 Mutipatse ana ake amuna asanu ndi awiri
2Samuel21:7 Koma mfumu inaleka Mefiboseti mwana wa Yonatani
2Samuel21:8 Koma mfumu inatenga ana amuna awiri a Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya
2Samuel21:9 niwapereka m'manja a Agibiyoni
2Samuel21:10 Ndipo Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya anatenga chiguduli
2Samuel21:11 Ndipo anauza Davide chimene Rizipa mwana wamkazi wa Aya
2Samuel21:12 Ndipo Davide ananka natenga mafupa a Saulo ndi mafupa a Yonatani mwana wake kwa anthu a ku Yabesi-Giliyadi amene anawaba m'khwalala la Beteseani
2Samuel21:13 nachotsa kumeneko mafupa a Saulo ndi mafupa a Yonatani mwana wake; nasonkhanitsa iwo mafupa a iwo aja adapachikidwa.
2Samuel21:14 Naika mafupa a Saulo ndi Yonatani mwana wake ku dziko la Benjamini m'Zela
2Samuel21:15 Ndipo Afilisti anaponyananso nkhondo ndi Aisraele; ndipo Davide anatsika ndi anyamata ake pamodzi naye naponyana ndi Afilisti; nafuna kukomoka Davide.
2Samuel21:16 Ndipo Isibi-Benobi
2Samuel21:17 Koma Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anamthandiza namkantha Mfilistiyo
2Samuel21:18 Ndipo kunali chitapita ichi
2Samuel21:19 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ndi Afilisti ku Gobu; ndipo Elihanani mwana wa Yaare-Oregimu wa ku Betelehemu anapha Goliyati Mgiti
2Samuel21:20 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ku Gati
2Samuel21:21 Ndipo pakutonza Israele iyeyu
2Samuel21:22 Awa anai anawabala ndi Rafa ku Gati; ndipo anagwa ndi dzanja la Davide ndi la anyamata ake.
2Samuel22:1 Ndipo Davide analankhula kwa Yehova mau a nyimbo iyi tsikuli Yehova anampulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ake onse
2Samuel22:2 Ndipo anati
2Samuel22:3 Mulungu wa thanthwe langa
2Samuel22:4 Ndidzaitana kwa Yehova amene ayenera timtamande; chomwecho ndidzapulumutsidwa kwa adani anga.
2Samuel22:5 Pakuti mafunde a imfa anandizinga
2Samuel22:6 Zingwe za kumanda zinandizingira; misampha ya imfa inandifikira ine.
2Samuel22:7 M'kusauka kwanga ndinaitana kwa Yehova
2Samuel22:8 Pomwepo dziko linagwedezeka ndi kunthunthumira. Maziko a dziko la kumwamba anasunthika. Nagwedezeka
2Samuel22:9 M'mphuno mwake munatuluka utsi
2Samuel22:10 Anaweramitsa miyambanso
2Samuel22:11 Ndipo Iye anaberekeka pa kerubi nauluka; inde anaoneka pa mapiko a mphepo.
2Samuel22:12 Ndipo anayesa mdimawo ngati mahema omzungulira Iye
2Samuel22:13 Cheza cha pamaso pake makala a moto anayaka.
2Samuel22:14 Yehova anagunda kumwamba; ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba ananena mau ake.
2Samuel22:15 Ndipo Iye anatumiza mivi
2Samuel22:16 Pamenepo m'munsi mwa nyanja munaoneka
2Samuel22:17 Iye anatumiza kuchokera kumwamba nanditenga; Iye ananditulutsa m'madzi aakulu.
2Samuel22:18 Iye anandipulumutsa kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu
2Samuel22:19 Anandifikira ine tsiku la tsoka langa; koma Yehova anali mchirikizo wanga.
2Samuel22:20 Iye ananditulutsanso ku malo akulu; Iye anandipulumutsa
2Samuel22:21 Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa cholungama changa; monga mwa kuyera kwa manja anga anandipatsa mphotho.
2Samuel22:22 Pakuti ndinasunga njira za Yehova
2Samuel22:23 Pakuti maweruzo ake onse anali pamaso panga; ndipo za malemba ake
2Samuel22:24 Ndinakhalanso wangwiro kwa Iye
2Samuel22:25 Chifukwa chake Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa cholungama changa; monga mwa kuyera kwanga pamaso pake.
2Samuel22:26 Ndi chifundo Inu mudzadzionetsa wachifundo
2Samuel22:27 Ndi oyera mtima mudzadzionetsa woyera mtima; ndi otsutsatsutsa mudzadzionetsa wopotoza.
2Samuel22:28 Ndipo mudzapulumutsa anthu osautsidwa; koma maso anu ali pa odzikuza kuti muwachepetse.
2Samuel22:29 Pakuti Inu ndinu nyali yanga
2Samuel22:30 Pakuti ndi Inu ndithamangira gulu; ndi Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga.
2Samuel22:31 Kunena za Mulungu
2Samuel22:32 Pakuti Mulungu ndani
2Samuel22:33 Mulungu ndiye linga langa lamphamvu; ndipo Iye ayendetsa angwiro mu njira yake.
2Samuel22:34 Iye asandutsa mapazi ake akunga mapazi a mbawala; nandiika pa misanje yanga.
2Samuel22:35 Iye aphunzitsa manja anga nkhondo; kotero kuti manja anga alifula uta wamkuwa.
2Samuel22:36 Ndiponso munandipatsa chikopa cha chipulumutso chanu; ndi kufatsa kwanu kunandikulitsa.
2Samuel22:37 Munakulitsa kulunza kwanga pansi panga
2Samuel22:38 Ndinapirikitsa adani anga
2Samuel22:39 Ndinawatha ndi kuwapyoza
2Samuel22:40 Pakuti Inu munandimanga m'chuuno ndi mphamvu ya kunkhondo; munandigonjetsera akundiukira.
2Samuel22:41 Munatembenuzitsanso adani anga andipatse mbuyo
2Samuel22:42 Anayang'ana iwo
2Samuel22:43 Pomwepo ndinawasansantha asalale ngati fumbi la padziko
2Samuel22:44 Inunso munandipulumutsa ine pa kulimbana kwa anthu anga; munandisunga ndikhale mutu wa amitundu; Anthu amene sindinawadziwa adzanditumikira ine.
2Samuel22:45 Alendo adzandigonjera ine
2Samuel22:46 Alendo adzafota
2Samuel22:47 Yehova ali ndi moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; ndipo akulitsidwe Mulungu wa thanthwe la chipulumutso changa;
2Samuel22:48 inde Mulungu wakundibwezera chilango ine
2Samuel22:49 Amene anditulutsa kwa adani anga; inde mundikweza ine pamwamba pa iwo akundiukira; mundipulumutsa kwa munthu wachiwawa.
2Samuel22:50 Chifukwa chake ndidzakuongani Yehova
2Samuel22:51 Iye apatsa mfumu yake chipulumutso chachikulu; naonetsera chifundo wodzozedwa wake
2Samuel23:1 Ndipo mau otsiriza a Davide ndi awa
2Samuel23:2 Mzimu wa Yehova unalankhula mwa ine
2Samuel23:3 Mulungu wa Israele anati
2Samuel23:4 Iye adzakhala ngati kuunika kwa m'mawa
2Samuel23:5 Zoonadi nyumba yanga siikhala yotere ndi Mulungu; koma Iye anapangana ndi ine pangano losatha
2Samuel23:6 Koma oipa onse adzakhala ngati minga yoyenera kuitaya
2Samuel23:7 koma wakukhudza iyo adzikonzeratu chitsulo ndi luti la mkondo; ndipo idzatenthedwa konse ndi moto m'malo mwao.
2Samuel23:8 Maina a ngwazi Davide anali nazo ndiwo: Yosebu-Basebeti Mtakemoni
2Samuel23:9 Ndipo wotsatana naye Eleazara mwana wa Dodo mwana wa Mwahohi
2Samuel23:10 iye ananyamuka
2Samuel23:11 Ndipo wotsatana naye ndiye Sama mwana wa Age Muharari. Ndipo Afilisti anasonkhana ali gulu pa Lehi pamene panali munda wamphodza; anthu nathawa Afilistiwo.
2Samuel23:12 Koma iyeyo anaima pakati pa mundawo
2Samuel23:13 Ndipo atatu a mwa makamu atatu opambanawo
2Samuel23:14 Pamenepo Davide anali m'linga
2Samuel23:15 Ndipo Davide analakalaka nati
2Samuel23:16 Ndipo ngwazi zitatuzo zinapyola khamu la Afilisti
2Samuel23:17 Nati
2Samuel23:18 Ndipo Abisai
2Samuel23:19 Kodi iye sindiye waulemu mwa atatuwa? Chifukwa chake anali kazembe wao; ngakhale iyenso sadafikana ndi atatu oyamba.
2Samuel23:20 Ndipo Benaya
2Samuel23:21 ndipo anapha Mwejipito munthu wokongola
2Samuel23:22 Izi anachita Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada
2Samuel23:23 Iye ndiye waulemu koposa makumi atatuwo
2Samuel23:24 Asahele mbale wa Yowabu anali wa makumi atatuwo; Elihanani mwana wa Dodo wa ku Betelehemu;
2Samuel23:25 Sama Mharodi
2Samuel23:26 Helezi Mpaliti
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezere Mwanatoti
2Samuel23:28 Zalimoni Mwahohi
2Samuel23:29 Helebi mwana wa Baana Mnetofa
2Samuel23:30 Benaya Mpiratoni
2Samuel23:31 Abiyaliboni Mwarabati
2Samuel23:32 Eliyaba Msaaliboni wa ana a Yaseni
2Samuel23:33 Sama Muharari
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwana wa Ahasibai
2Samuel23:35 Heziro wa ku Karimele
2Samuel23:36 Igala mwana wa Natani wa ku Zoba
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki Mwamoni
2Samuel23:38 Ira Mwitiri
2Samuel23:39 Uriya Muhiti; onse pamodzi anali makumi atatu mphambu asanu ndi awiri.
2Samuel24:1 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakanso pa Israele
2Samuel24:2 Ndipo mfumu inanena ndi Yowabu kazembe wa khamu
2Samuel24:3 Ndipo Yowabu ananena ndi mfumu
2Samuel24:4 Koma mau a mfumu anapambana Yowabu ndi atsogoleri a khamulo. Ndipo Yowabu ndi atsogoleri a khamulo anatuluka pamaso pa mfumu kuti akawerenge anthu a Israele.
2Samuel24:5 Naoloka Yordani
2Samuel24:6 nafika ku Giliyadi ndi ku dera la Tatimuhodisi; nafika ku Dani-Yaana ndi kuzungulira
2Samuel24:7 nafika ku linga la Tiro ndi kumidzi yonse ya Ahivi ndi ya Akanani; natulukira kumwera kwa Yuda ku Beereseba.
2Samuel24:8 Chomwecho pamene atayenda dziko lonse anafika ku Yerusalemu pakutha miyezi isanu ndi inai
2Samuel24:9 Ndipo Yowabu anapereka kwa mfumu kuchuluka kwa anthu adawawerenga; ndipo m'Israele munali anthu zikwi mazana asanu ndi atatu
2Samuel24:10 Pamenepo mtima wa Davide unamtsutsa
2Samuel24:11 Ndipo pouka Davide m'mawa mau a Yehova anafika kwa mneneri Gadi
2Samuel24:12 Kalankhule ndi Davide
2Samuel24:13 Chomwecho Gadi anafika kwa Davide
2Samuel24:14 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Gadi
2Samuel24:15 Chomwecho Yehova anatumiza mliri pa Israele kuyambira m'mawa kufikira nthawi yoikira; ndipo anafapo anthu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri kuyambira ku Dani kufikira ku Beereseba.
2Samuel24:16 Ndipo pamene mthenga anatambasulira dzanja lake ku Yerusalemu kuuononga
2Samuel24:17 Ndipo Davide analankhula ndi Yehova pamene anaona mthenga wakudwalitsa anthu
2Samuel24:18 Ndipo Gadi anafika tsiku lomwelo kwa Davide nanena naye
2Samuel24:19 Ndipo Davide anakwerako monga mwa kunena kwa Gadi
2Samuel24:20 Ndipo Arauna anayang'ana naona mfumuyo ndi anyamata ake alikubwera kwa iye; natuluka Arauna naweramira pamaso pa mfumu nkhope yake pansi.
2Samuel24:21 Arauna nati
2Samuel24:22 Arauna nati kwa Davide Mbuye wanga mfumu atenge napereke nsembe chomkomera; siizi ng'ombe za nsembe yopsereza
2Samuel24:23 zonsezi
2Samuel24:24 Koma mfumu inati kwa Arauna
2Samuel24:25 Ndipo Davide anamangirapo Yehova guwa la nsembe
1Kings1:1 Ndipo mfumu Davide anakalamba nachuluka masiku ake; ndipo iwo anamfunda ndi zofunda
1Kings1:2 Pamenepo anyamata ake ananena naye
1Kings1:3 Tsono anafunafuna m'malire monse a Israele namwali wokongola
1Kings1:4 Ndipo namwaliyo anali wokongola ndithu
1Kings1:5 Pamenepo Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti anadzikuza
1Kings1:6 Ndipo atate wake sadamvuta masiku ake onse
1Kings1:7 Ndipo anapangana ndi Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya
1Kings1:8 Koma Zadoki wansembe
1Kings1:9 Ndipo Adoniya anapha nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi nyama zonona pamwala pa Zoheleti

1Kings1:36 Ndipo Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anayankha mfumu

1Kings1:38 Pamenepo Zadoki wansembe

1Kings1:42 Iye akali chilankhulire

1Kings1:52 Ndipo Solomoni anati

1Kings2:1 Pakuyandikira masiku ake a Davide akuti amwalire
1Kings2:2 Ndimuka ine njira ya dziko lonse: limba mtima tsono

1Kings2:4 kuti Yehova akakhazikitse mau ake adanenawo za ine

1Kings2:7 Koma uchitire zokoma ana amuna aja a Barizilai wa ku Giliyadi

1Kings2:45 Koma mfumu Solomoni adzadalitsika
1Kings2:46 Pamenepo mfumu inalamulira Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada
1Kings3:1 Ndipo Solomoni anapalana ubwenzi ndi Farao mfumu ya Aejipito
1Kings3:2 Koma anthu anaphera nsembe pamisanje
1Kings3:3 Ndipo Solomoni anakondana ndi Yehova
1Kings3:4 Ndipo mfumu inapita ku Gibiyoni kukaphera nsembe kumeneko; popeza msanje waukulu unali kumeneko
1Kings3:5 Ku Gibiyoni Yehova anaonekera Solomoni m'kulota usiku
1Kings3:6 Ndipo Solomoni anati
1Kings3:7 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings3:8 Ndipo kapolo wanu ndili pakati pa anthu anu amene Inu munawasankha
1Kings3:9 Patsani tsono kapolo wanu mtima womvera wakuweruza anthu anu; kuti ndizindikire pakati pa zabwino ndi zoipa; pakuti akutha ndani kuweruza anthu anu ambiri amene?
1Kings3:10 Ndipo mau amenewa anakondweretsa Yehova kuti Solomoni anapempha chimenechi.
1Kings3:11 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye
1Kings3:12 taona

1Kings4:1 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anali mfumu ya Israele yense.
1Kings4:2 Ndipo akulu a mfumu ndi awa: Azariya mwana wa Zadoki anali wansembe
1Kings4:3 Elihorefe ndi Ahiya ana a Sisa alembi
1Kings4:4 ndi Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anali kazembe wa nkhondo
1Kings4:5 ndi Azariya mwana wa Natani anayang'anira akapitao
1Kings4:6 ndi Ahisara Adoniramu mwana wa Abida anali wamsonkho.
1Kings4:7 Ndipo Solomoni anali nao akapitao khumi ndi awiri akuyang'anira Aisraele onse
1Kings4:8 Ndipo maina ao ndiwo: Benihuri anatengetsa ku mapiri a Efuremu;
1Kings4:9 Benedekere ku Makazi ndi Saalibimu ndi Betesemesi ndi Elonibetehanani;
1Kings4:10 Benihesedi ku Aruboti ndi Soko ndi dziko lonse la Hefere;
1Kings4:11 Benabinadabu ku mtunda wa Dori
1Kings4:12 Baana mwana wa Ahiludi ku Taanaki ndi Megido ndi Beteseani konse
1Kings4:13 Benigebere ku Ramoti Giliyadi
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwana wa Ido ku Mahanaimu;
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi ku Nafutali
1Kings4:16 Baana mwana wa Husai ku Asere ndi ku Bealoti;
1Kings4:17 Yehosafati mwana wa Paruwa ku Isakara;
1Kings4:18 Simei mwana wa Ela ku Benjamini;
1Kings4:19 Gebere mwana wa Uri ku dziko la Giliyadi
1Kings4:20 Ayuda ndi Aisraele anachuluka ngati mchenga wa kunyanja
1Kings4:21 Ndipo Solomoni analamulira maiko onse
1Kings4:22 Ndipo zakudya za Solomoni zofikira tsiku limodzi zinali miyeso makumi atatu ya ufa wosalala
1Kings4:23 ng'ombe zonenepa khumi
1Kings4:24 Pakuti analamulira dziko lonse lili tsidya lino la Yufurate
1Kings4:25 Ndipo Ayuda ndi Aisraele anakhala mosatekeseka
1Kings4:26 Ndipo Solomoni anali nazo zipinda za akavalo a magaleta ake zikwi khumi mphambu ziwiri.
1Kings4:27 Ndipo akapitao aja anatengetsera chakudya Solomoni ndi anthu onse akudya ku gome la mfumu Solomoni
1Kings4:28 Barelenso ndi udzu wa akavalo ndi ngamira anabwera nazo kumalo kwao
1Kings4:29 Ndipo Mulungu anampatsa Solomoni nzeru ndi luntha lambiri
1Kings4:30 Ndipo nzeru ya Solomoni inaposa nzeru za anthu onse akum'mawa
1Kings4:31 Pakuti anali wanzeru woposa anthu onse
1Kings4:32 Ndipo ananena miyambo zikwi zitatu
1Kings4:33 Nakamba za mitengo
1Kings4:34 Ndipo anafikapo anthu a mitundu yonse kudzamva nzeru ya Solomoni
1Kings5:1 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya ku Tiro anatuma anyamata ake kwa Solomoni
1Kings5:2 Ndipo Solomoni anatumiza mau kwa Hiramu
1Kings5:3 Mudziwa inu kuti atate wanga Davide sanathe kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wake nyumba
1Kings5:4 Koma tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanga wandipumulitsa ku mbali zonse; palibe wotsutsana nane
1Kings5:5 Ndipo taonani
1Kings5:6 Ndipo tsono
1Kings5:7 Ndipo kunachitika
1Kings5:8 Ndipo Hiramu anatumiza kwa Solomoni
1Kings5:9 Akapolo anga adzatsika nayo ku Lebanoni kufika nayo ku nyanja
1Kings5:10 Tsono Hiramu anapatsa Solomoni mitengo yamkungudza ndi mitengo yamlombwa monga momwe anafuniramo.
1Kings5:11 Ndipo Solomoni anapatsa Hiramu miyeso ya tirigu zikwi makumi awiri ndiyo zakudya za banja lake
1Kings5:12 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa Solomoni nzeru monga momwe adamlonjezera; ndipo panali mtendere pakati pa Hiramu ndi Solomoni
1Kings5:13 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anasonkhetsa athangata mwa Aisraele onse
1Kings5:14 Ndipo anawatuma ku Lebanoni mwezi umodzi zikwi khumi kuwasintha
1Kings5:15 Ndipo Solomoni anawasenzetsa akatundu anthu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri
1Kings5:16 osawerenga akapitao a Solomoni akuyang'anira ntchito
1Kings5:17 Ndipo mfumu inalamula iwo
1Kings5:18 Ndipo omanga nyumba a Solomoni ndi omanga nyumba a Hiramu ndi anthu a ku Gebala anaisema
1Kings6:1 Ndipo kunachitika zitapita zaka mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu atatuluka ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito
1Kings6:2 Ndipo nyumbayo mfumu Solomoni anaimangira Yehova
1Kings6:3 Ndipo anamanga chipinda cholowera pakhomo pa nyumba ya Kachisiyo
1Kings6:4 Ndipo m'nyumbamo anamanga mazenera a sefa wokhazikika.
1Kings6:5 Ndipo anamanga zipinda zosanjikizana zogundana ndi khoma
1Kings6:6 Chipinda chapansicho kupingasa kwake kunali mikono isanu
1Kings6:7 Ndipo nyumbayo pomangidwa inamangidwa ndi miyala yokonzeratu asanaitute; ndipo m'nyumbamo simunamveka kulira nyundo
1Kings6:8 Khomo lolowera m'zipinda za pakati linali ku mbali ya ku dzanja lamanja ya nyumba; ndipo anthu amakwerera pa makwerero ozunguniza
1Kings6:9 Momwemo anamanga nyumbayo naitsiriza
1Kings6:10 Ndipo anamanga zipindazo zogundana ndi nyumba yonseyo
1Kings6:11 Ndipo mau a Yehova anafika kwa Solomoni
1Kings6:12 Kunena za nyumba yino ulikuimanga
1Kings6:13 Ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pa ana a Israele osawasiya anthu anga a Israele.
1Kings6:14 Tsono Solomoni anamanga nyumbayo naitsiriza.
1Kings6:15 Ndipo anatchinga makoma a nyumba m'katimo ndi matabwa amkungudza
1Kings6:16 Ndipo anadulitsa ndi matabwa amkungudza mikono makumi awiri m'kati mwa nyumba m'tsogolo mwake
1Kings6:17 Ndipo nyumbayo
1Kings6:18 Ndipo m'kati mwa nyumba munali mikungudza yosemasema
1Kings6:19 Ndipo anakonza m'kati mwa nyumba m'tsogolo mwake
1Kings6:20 Ndipo m'kati mwa chipindacho
1Kings6:21 Momwemo Solomoni anakuta m'kati mwa nyumba ndi golide woyengetsa
1Kings6:22 Ndipo nyumba yonse anaikuta ndi golide mpaka adatha nyumba yonse
1Kings6:23 Ndipo m'chipinda chamkatimo anasema mitengo ya azitona akerubi awiri
1Kings6:24 Ndipo phiko limodzi la kerubi linali la mikono isanu
1Kings6:25 Ndi kerubi winayo msinkhu wake unali mikono khumi; akerubi onse awiri anafanana muyeso wao ndi msinkhu wao.
1Kings6:26 Msinkhu wa kerubi mmodzi unali mikono khumi
1Kings6:27 Ndipo anaika akerubiwo m'chipinda cha m'katimo
1Kings6:28 Ndipo anawakuta akerubi ndi golide.
1Kings6:29 Nalemba m'makoma onse akuzinga chipinda mafano olemba ngati akerubi ndi migwalangwa ndi maluwa oti gada
1Kings6:30 Ndipo anakuta ndi golide pansi pake pa nyumba m'katimo ndi kunja.
1Kings6:31 Ndipo pa khomo la chipinda chamkati anapanga zitseko za mtengo wa azitona
1Kings6:32 Zitseko ziwiri zomwe zinali za mtengo wa azitona
1Kings6:33 Momwemo anapanganso mphuthu za azitona za pa khomo la Kachisi
1Kings6:34 ndi zitseko ziwiri za mitengo yamlombwa pa khomo lina; panali chitseko chopatukana
1Kings6:35 Ndipo analembapo ngati akerubi ndi migwalangwa ndi maluwa oti gada
1Kings6:36 Ndipo bwalo la m'kati analimanga mizere itatu ya miyala yosemasema
1Kings6:37 Maziko ake a nyumba ya Yehova anaikidwa m'chaka chachinai m'mwezi wa Zivi.
1Kings6:38 Ndipo m'chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi m'mwezi wa Buli ndiwo mwezi wachisanu ndi chitatu anatsiriza nyumba konsekonse monga mwa mamangidwe ake onse. Momwemo anaimanga zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri.
1Kings7:1 Koma nyumba ya iye yekha Solomoni anaimanga zaka khumi mphambu zitatu
1Kings7:2 Anamanganso nyumba yotchedwa Nkhalango ya Lebanoni
1Kings7:3 Ndipo inayalidwa ndi mkungudza pamwamba pa zipinda makumi anai mphambu zisanu zolongosoledwa pa mapanda
1Kings7:4 Ndipo panali mazenera m'mizere itatuyo
1Kings7:5 Ndipo makomo onse ndi mphuthu zonse zinali zaphwamphwa maonekedwe ake
1Kings7:6 Ndipo anamanga khonde la nsanamira
1Kings7:7 Ndipo anamanga khonde la mpando wachifumu loweruziramo iye
1Kings7:8 Ndipo nyumba yake yakukhalamo iye
1Kings7:9 Izi zonse zinali za miyala ya mtengo wapatali yosemasema
1Kings7:10 Ndipo maziko ake anali a miyala ya mtengo wapatali
1Kings7:11 Ndi pamwamba pake panali miyala ya mtengo wapatali
1Kings7:12 Ndipo bwalo lalikulu lozingapo linali ndi mizere itatu ya miyala yosemasema
1Kings7:13 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anatuma anthu kukatenga Hiramu ku Tiro.
1Kings7:14 Iyeyo anali mwana wake wa mkazi wamasiye wa fuko la Nafutali
1Kings7:15 Popeza iyeyu anaunda nsanamira ziwiri zamkuwa
1Kings7:16 Ndipo anapanga mitu iwiri ya mkuwa wosungunula
1Kings7:17 Ndipo panali maukonde olukaluka ndi zoyangayanga
1Kings7:18 M'mwemo anapanga nsanamira
1Kings7:19 Ndipo mituyi inali pamwamba pa nsanamira za pa chipinda cholowera chinali ngati akakombo malembedwe ake
1Kings7:20 Ndipo panalinso mitu pamwamba pa nsanamira ziwirizo
1Kings7:21 Ndipo anaimiritsa nsanamirazi pa chipinda cholowera cha Kachisi; naimiritsa nsanamira ya ku dzanja lamanja
1Kings7:22 Ndipo pamwamba pa nsanamirazo panali ngati akakombo malembedwe ake; motero anaitsiriza ntchito ya nsanamirazo.
1Kings7:23 Ndipo anayenganso thawale lamkuwa
1Kings7:24 Ndipo m'khosi mwake munali ngati zikho zozinganiza m'mkono umodzi zikho khumi zakuzinganiza thawalelo; zikhozo zinayengedwa m'mizere iwiri poyengedwa thawalelo.
1Kings7:25 Linasanjikika pa ng'ombe khumi mphambu ziwiri
1Kings7:26 Ndipo kuchindikira kwake kunali ngati chikhato cha munthu
1Kings7:27 Ndipo anapanga maphaka khumi amkuwa
1Kings7:28 Ndipo mapangidwe a maphakawo anali otere: anali nao matsekerezo ao
1Kings7:29 Ndipo pa matsekezerezo a pakati pa mbano panali ngati mikango ndi ng'ombe ndi akerubi
1Kings7:30 Ndipo phaka lililonse linali ndi njinga zamkuwa zinai ndi mitanda yamkuwa
1Kings7:31 Ndipo pakamwa pake m'katimo pamwamba pa chosanjikira
1Kings7:32 Ndipo njinga zinai zinali pansi pa matsekerezo
1Kings7:33 Ndipo mapangidwe a njinga analingana ndi mapangidwe a njinga za galeta
1Kings7:34 Ndipo panali ngati mapewa anai pansi pangodya zinali za phaka limodzi
1Kings7:35 Ndipo pamwamba pa phaka panali khoma lozunguniza
1Kings7:36 Ndipo m'mapanthi mwa mbano zake ndi pa matsekerezo ake analemba ngati akerubi ndi mikango ndi migwalangwa
1Kings7:37 Motero anapanga maphaka khumiwo
1Kings7:38 Ndipo anapanga mbiya zaphwamphwa khumi zamkuwa; m'mbiya imodziyo munalowamo madzi a mitsuko yaikulu makumi anai
1Kings7:39 Ndipo anaika maphaka asanu ku dzanja lamanja la nyumba
1Kings7:40 Ndipo Hiramu anayenga mbiyazo ndi zoolera ndi mbale zowazira. Motero Hiramu anatsiriza kupanga ntchito yonse anaichitira mfumu Solomoni ya m'nyumba ya Yehova.
1Kings7:41 Nsanamira ziwirizo
1Kings7:42 ndi makangaza mazana anai a maukonde awiriwo
1Kings7:43 ndi maphaka khumiwo ndi mbiya khumi zili pa maphakawo
1Kings7:44 ndi thawale limodzilo
1Kings7:45 ndi miphikayo
1Kings7:46 Mfumu inaziyenga pa chidikha cha ku Yordani
1Kings7:47 Ndipo Solomoni anazileka zipangizo zonse osaziyesa
1Kings7:48 Ndipo Solomoni anapanga zipangizo zonse za m'nyumba ya Yehova: guwa la nsembe lagolide
1Kings7:49 ndi zoikapo nyali za golide woyengetsa
1Kings7:50 ndi zikho
1Kings7:51 Motero ntchito zonse zinatsirizika
1Kings8:1 Pamenepo Solomoni anasonkhanitsa akulu a Israele
1Kings8:2 Ndipo anthu onse a Israele anasonkhana kwa mfumu Solomoni kukadyerera m'mwezi wa Etanimu
1Kings8:3 Ndipo akulu onse a Israele anadza
1Kings8:4 Ndipo anatenga likasa la Yehova
1Kings8:5 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni ndi msonkhano wonse wa Israele wosonkhana kwa iye anali naye kulikasa
1Kings8:6 Ndipo ansembe analonga likasa la chipangano cha Yehova kumalo kwake
1Kings8:7 Popeza akerubiwo anatambasula mapiko ao awiri pamwamba pa likasa
1Kings8:8 Ndipo mphikozo zinatalika kuti nsonga za mphiko zidaoneka ku malo opatulika chakuno cha chipinda chamkati; koma sizinaoneka kubwalo; ndipo zikhala pomwepo mpaka lero lino.
1Kings8:9 Munalibe kanthu m'likasamo koma magome awiri aja a mwala Mose anawalongamo pa Horebu
1Kings8:10 Ndipo kunachitika atatuluka ansembe m'malo opatulika
1Kings8:11 Ndipo ansembe sanakhoze kuimirira kutumikira chifukwa cha mtambowo
1Kings8:12 Pamenepo Solomoni anati
1Kings8:13 Ine ndakumangirani ndithu nyumba yokhalamo Inu
1Kings8:14 Ndipo mfumu inapotoloka nkhope yake
1Kings8:15 Nati iye
1Kings8:16 Kuyambira tsiku lakutulutsa Ine anthu anga Aisraele m'dziko la Ejipito
1Kings8:17 Ndipo Davide atate wanga anafuna m'mtima mwake kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele nyumba.
1Kings8:18 Koma Yehova ananena ndi Davide atate wanga
1Kings8:19 Koma usamange ndiwe nyumbayo
1Kings8:20 Ndipo Yehova wakhazikitsa mau ake analankhulawo
1Kings8:21 Ndipo ndakonzera malo likasalo
1Kings8:22 Ndipo Solomoni anaimirira ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa Israele
1Kings8:23 Yehova Mulungu wa Israele
1Kings8:24 wakusungira mtumiki wanu Davide atate wanga chimene mudamlonjezacho; munalankhulanso m'kamwa mwanu ndi kukwaniritsa ndi dzanja lanu monga lero lino.
1Kings8:25 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings8:26 Ndipo tsopano
1Kings8:27 Kodi Mulungu adzakhala ndithu pa dziko lapansi? Taonani
1Kings8:28 Koma mucheukire pemphero la kapolo wanu
1Kings8:29 kuti maso anu atsegukire nyumba yino usiku ndi usana
1Kings8:30 Ndipo mverani pembedzero la kapolo wanu ndi la anthu anu Aisraele
1Kings8:31 Ngati munthu akachimwira mnzake
1Kings8:32 mverani Inu pamenepo m'mwambamo
1Kings8:33 Ndipo anthu anu Aisraele akawakantha adani ao chifukwa cha kuchimwira Inu
1Kings8:34 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwambamo
1Kings8:35 Pamene kumwamba kwatsekera
1Kings8:36 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba
1Kings8:37 M'dziko mukakhala njala
1Kings8:38 tsono pempho ndi pembedzero lililonse akalipempha munthu aliyense
1Kings8:39 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inu
1Kings8:40 kuti aope Inu masiku onse akukhala iwowo m'dziko limene Inu munapatsa makolo ao.
1Kings8:41 Ndiponso kunena za mlendo
1Kings8:42 popeza adzamva za dzina lanu lalikulu ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu ndi mkono wanu wotambasuka; akabwera iyeyo nadzapemphera molunjika kunyumba yino;
1Kings8:43 mverani Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inu
1Kings8:44 Akatuluka anthu anu kukayambana nkhondo ndi adani ao
1Kings8:45 pamenepo mverani Inu m'Mwamba pempho ndi pembedzero lao
1Kings8:46 Akachimwira Inu
1Kings8:47 ndipo akakumbukira mitima yao
1Kings8:48 ndipo akabwerera kwa Inu ndi mtima wao wonse ndi moyo wao wonse
1Kings8:49 pamenepo mverani Inu pemphero ndi pembedzero lao m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo
1Kings8:50 ndi kukhululukira anthu anu adachimwira Inu ndi mphulupulu zao zonse adapalamula nazo kwa Inu; ndipo muwachititsire chifundo iwo amene anawagwira ndende
1Kings8:51 pakuti awa ndi anthu anu ndithu
1Kings8:52 kuti maso anu akatsegukire pembedzero la kapolo wanu ndi pembedzero la anthu anu Aisraele
1Kings8:53 Popeza Inu munawapatula pa anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi akhale cholowa chanu
1Kings8:54 Ndipo kunali kuti atatsiriza Solomoni kupemphera kwa Yehova pemphero ndi pembedzero lino lonse
1Kings8:55 Naimirira
1Kings8:56 Wolemekezeka ndi Yehova amene anapumulitsa anthu ake Aisraele
1Kings8:57 Yehova Mulungu wathu akhale nafe monga umo anakhalira nao makolo athu
1Kings8:58 kuti atitembenuzire kwa Iye yekha mitima yathu iyende m'njira zake zonse
1Kings8:59 Ndipo mau anga amenewa ndapembedzera nao pamaso pa Yehova akhale pafupi ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu usana ndi usiku
1Kings8:60 kuti anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi akadziwe kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu
1Kings8:61 Mitima yanu ikhale yangwiro ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu
1Kings8:62 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu onse a Israele pamodzi naye anaphera nsembe pamaso pa Yehova.
1Kings8:63 Ndipo Solomoni anaphera nsembe yamtendere
1Kings8:64 Tsiku lomwelo mfumu inapatulira Mulungu pakati pake pa bwalo la ku khomo la nyumba ya Yehova; pakuti pomwepo anapereka nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe yaufa
1Kings8:65 Ndipo nthawi yomweyo Solomoni anachita madyerero pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu
1Kings8:66 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu anawauza anthu apite; ndipo iwo anadalitsa mfumu

1Kings10:1 Ndipo atamva mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba mbiri ya Solomoni yakubukitsa dzina la Yehova
1Kings10:2 Nafika ku Yerusalemu ndi ulendo wake waukulu
1Kings10:3 Ndipo Solomoni anamyankha miyambi yake yonse
1Kings10:4 Ndipo pamene mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba adaona nzeru zonse za Solomoni
1Kings10:5 ndi zakudya za pa gome lake
1Kings10:6 Ndipo anati kwa mfumu
1Kings10:7 Koma sindinakhulupirira mau amenewo mpaka ndafika ine kuno
1Kings10:8 Odala anthu anu
1Kings10:9 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu wanu amene anakondwera nanu
1Kings10:10 Ndipo mkaziyo ananinkha mfumu matalente a golide zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri
1Kings10:11 Ndipo zombo za Hiramu zotengera golide ku Ofiri zinatenganso ku Ofiri mitengo yambiri yambawa
1Kings10:12 Ndipo mfumu inasema mitengo yambawayo
1Kings10:13 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni ananinkha mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba chifuniro chake chonse anachipempha iye
1Kings10:14 Tsono kulemera kwake kwa golide anafika kwa Solomoni chaka chimodzi kunali matalente mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi limodzi a golide.
1Kings10:15 Osawerenganso winayo wa anthu a malonda oyendayenda
1Kings10:16 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anapanga zikopa mazana awiri zagolide wonsansantha
1Kings10:17 Ndi malihawo mazana atatu a golide wonsansantha

1Kings10:19 Mpandowo wachifumu unali ndi makwerero asanu ndi limodzi

1Kings10:21 Ndipo zikho zomwera zonse za mfumu Solomoni zinali zagolide
1Kings10:22 Popeza mfumu inali nazo panyanja zombo za ku Tarisisi
1Kings10:23 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anawaposa mafumu onse a dziko lapansi pa chuma ndi nzeru.

1Kings10:25 Ndipo akafika munthu yense ndi mtulo wake

2Kings23:9 Koma ansembe a misanje sanakwere kudza ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova ku Yerusalemu; koma anadya mkate wopanda chotupitsa pakati pa abale ao.

2Kings23:13 Ndipo mfumu inawaipitsira misanje yokhala kum'mawa kwa Yerusalemu
2Kings23:14 Nathyolathyola zoimiritsa
2Kings23:15 Anagumulanso guwa la nsembe linali ku Betele

2Kings23:18 Nati iye
2Kings23:19 Ndi nyumba zonse zomwe za ku misanje yokhala m'midzi ya Samariya

2Kings23:21 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira anthu onse

2Kings23:23 koma Paska ili analichitira Yehova m'Yerusalemu

1Chronicles26:30 A Ahebroni: Hasabiya ndi abale ake odziwa mphamvu chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri anayang'anira Israele tsidya lino la Yordani kumadzulo
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya ndiye mkulu wa Ahebroni
1Chronicles26:32 Ndi abale ake ngwazi ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri
1Chronicles27:1 Ndipo ana a Israele monga mwa chiwerengo chao
1Chronicles27:2 Woyang'anira chigawo choyamba cha mwezi
1Chronicles27:3 Ndiye wa ana a Perezi
1Chronicles27:4 Woyang'anira chigawo cha mwezi wachiwiri ndiye Dodai Mwahohi ndi chigawo chake; ndi Mikiloti mtsogoleri
1Chronicles27:5 Kazembe wachitatu wa khamu wa mwezi wachitatu ndiye Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada wansembe wamkulu; ndi m'chigawo mwake munalinso zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya ameneyo ndiye wamphamvu uja wa makumi atatu aja
1Chronicles27:7 Wachinai wa mwezi wachinai ndiye Asahele mbale wa Yowabu
1Chronicles27:8 Kazembe wachisanu wa mwezi wachisanu ndiye Samuti Mwizara; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:9 Wachisanu ndi chimodzi wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi ndiye Ira mwana wa Ikesi Mtekowa; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:10 Wachisanu ndi chiwiri wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri ndiye Helezi Mpeloni wa ana a Efuremu; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:11 Wachisanu ndi chitatu wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chitatu ndiye Sibekai Muhusa wa Azera; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:12 Wachisanu ndi chinai wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai ndiye Abiyezere Mwanatoti wa Abenjamini; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:13 Wakhumi wa mwezi wakhumi ndiye Maharai Mnetofa wa Azera; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:14 Wakhumi ndi chimodzi wa mwezi wakhumi ndi chimodzi ndiye Benaya Mpiratoni wa ana a Efuremu; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:15 Wakhumi ndi chiwiri wa mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri ndiye Helidai Mnetofa wa Otiniyele; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai.
1Chronicles27:16 Koma oyang'anira mafuko a Israele ndi awa: wa Arubeni mtsogoleri wao ndiye Eliyezere mwana wa Zikiri; wa Asimeoni
1Chronicles27:17 wa Alevi

2Chronicles1:2 Ndipo Solomoni analankhula ndi Aisraele onse

2Chronicles1:4 Koma likasa la Mulungu Davide adakwera nalo kuchokera ku Kiriyati-Yearimu kunka kumene Davide adalikonzeratu malo; pakuti adaliutsiratu hema ku Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles1:5 Guwa la nsembe lomwe lamkuwa

2Chronicles1:14 Ndipo Solomoni anasonkhanitsa magaleta ndi apakavalo

2Chronicles3:10 Ndipo m'malo opatulika kwambiri anapanga akerubi awiri
2Chronicles3:11 Ndi mapiko a akerubi m'litali mwake ndimo mikono makumi awiri; phiko la kerubi mmodzi mikono isanu
2Chronicles3:12 Ndi phiko la kerubi wina mikono isanu lojima khoma la nyumba

Ezra8:25 ndi kuwayesera siliva
Ezra8:26 Ndipo ndinawayesera m'dzanja mwao matalente a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu
Ezra8:27 ndi zikho zagolide makumi awiri za madariki chikwi chimodzi
Ezra8:28 Ndipo ndinanena nao
Ezra8:29 Mukhale maso ndi kuzisunga mpaka muziyesera pamaso pa ansembe aakulu ndi Alevi
Ezra8:30 Potero ansembe ndi Alevi analandira kulemera kwake kwa siliva ndi golide ndi zipangizo
Ezra8:31 Pamenepo tinachoka ku mtsinje wa Ahava tsiku lakhumi ndi chiwiri la mwezi woyamba
Ezra8:32 Ndipo tinafika ku Yerusalemu ndi kukhalako masiku atatu.
Ezra8:33 Ndipo pa tsiku lachinai siliva ndi golide ndi zipangizo zinayesedwa m'nyumba ya Mulungu wathu
Ezra8:34 zonsezi anaziwerenga ndi kuziyesa; ndi kulemera kwake konse kunalembedwa nthawi yomweyo.
Ezra8:35 Otengedwa ndende
Ezra8:36 Ndipo napereka malamulo a mfumu kwa akazembe a mfumu
Ezra9:1 Zitatha izi tsono anandiyandikira akalonga
Ezra9:2 Pakuti anadzitengera okha ndi ana amuna ao ana akazi ao; nisokonezeka mbeu yopatulika ndi mitundu ya maikowa; inde dzanja la akalonga ndi olamulira linayamba kulakwa kumene.
Ezra9:3 Ndipo pakumva mau awa ndinang'amba chovala changa
Ezra9:4 Nandisonkhanira aliyense wakunjenjemera pa mau a Mulungu wa Israele
Ezra9:5 Ndi pa nsembe yamadzulo ndinanyamuka m'kuzunzika kwanga
Ezra9:6 ndipo ndinati
Ezra9:7 Chiyambire masiku a makolo athu tapalamula kwakukulu mpaka lero lino; ndi chifukwa cha mphulupulu zathu ife
Ezra9:8 Ndipo tsopano
Ezra9:9 Popeza ife ndife akapolo
Ezra9:10 Ndipo tsopano
Ezra9:11 amene munalamulira mwa atumiki anu aneneri ndi kuti
Ezra9:12 Chifukwa chake tsono
Ezra9:13 Ndipo zitatigwera zonsezi chifukwa cha ntchito zathu zoipa ndi kupalamula kwathu kwakukulu; popeza inu Mulungu wathu mwatilanga motichepsera mphulupulu zathu
Ezra9:14 kodi tidzabwereza kuphwanya malamulo anu
Ezra9:15 Yehova Mulungu wa Israele
Ezra10:1 Pakupemphera Ezara tsono
Ezra10:2 Pamenepo Sekaniya mwana wa Yehiyele
Ezra10:3 Ndipo tsono tipangane ndi Mulungu wathu kuchotsa akazi onse
Ezra10:4 Nyamukani
Ezra10:5 Nanyamuka Ezara
Ezra10:6 Pamenepo Ezara ananyamuka pakhomo pa nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezra10:7 Nabukitsa iwo mau mwa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu kwa ana onse otengedwa ndende
Ezra10:8 ndi kuti aliyense wosafikako atapita masiku atatu
Ezra10:9 Ndipo anasonkhana ku Yerusalemu amuna onse a Yuda ndi Benjamini asanapite masiku atatu
Ezra10:10 Pamenepo Ezara wansembe ananyamuka
Ezra10:11 Chifukwa chake tsono
Ezra10:12 Ndipo unayankha msonkhano wonse
Ezra10:13 Koma anthu ndiwo ambiri
Ezra10:14 Ayang'anire ichi tsono akalonga athu a msonkhano wonse
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mwana wa Asahele ndi Yazeya mwana wa Tikiva okha anatsutsana nacho
Ezra10:16 Pamenepo anthu otengedwa ndende anachita chotero. Ndi Ezara wansembe
Ezra10:17 Natsiriza nao amuna onse adadzitengera akazi achilendo tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba.
Ezra10:18 Ndipo anapeza mwa ana a ansembe odzitengera akazi achilendo
Ezra10:19 Ndipo anaimika dzanja lao kuti adzachotsa akazi ao; ndipo popeza adapalamuladi
Ezra10:20 Ndi a ana a Imeri: Hanani ndi Zebadiya.
Ezra10:21 Ndi a ana a Harimu: Maaseiya
Ezra10:22 Ndi a ana a Pasuri: Eliyoenai
Ezra10:23 Ndi a Alevi: Yozabadi
Ezra10:24 Ndi a oimbira: Eliyasibu; ndi a odikira: Salumu

Ezra10:26 Ndi a ana a Elamu: Mataniya

Nehemiah1:1 Mau a Nehemiya mwana wa Hakaliya. Kunali tsono mwezi wa Kisilevi
Nehemiah1:2 anafika Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Nanena nane iwo
Nehemiah1:4 Ndipo kunali
Nehemiah1:5 ndi kuti
Nehemiah1:6 mutchere khutu
Nehemiah1:7 Tachita mwamphulupulu pa Inu
Nehemiah1:8 Mukumbukire mau mudalamulira mtumiki wanu Mose
Nehemiah1:9 koma mukabwerera kudza kwa Ine
Nehemiah1:10 Ndipo awa ndi akapolo anu ndi anthu anu
Nehemiah1:11 Yehova
Nehemiah2:1 Koma kunachitika mwezi wa Nisani
Nehemiah2:2 Ninena nane mfumu
Nehemiah2:3 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:4 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa ine
Nehemiah2:5 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:6 Ninena nane mfumu
Nehemiah2:7 Ndinanenanso kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:8 ndi kalata kwa Asafu wosunga misitu ya mfumu
Nehemiah2:9 Ndinafika tsono kwa ziwanga za tsidya lino la mtsinje
Nehemiah2:10 Atamva Sanibalati Muhoroni
Nehemiah2:11 Motero ndinafika ku Yerusalemu
Nehemiah2:12 Ndipo ndinauka usiku
Nehemiah2:13 Ndipo ndinatuluka usiku pa Chipata cha ku Chigwa
Nehemiah2:14 Ndipo ndinapitirira kunka ku Chipata cha Chitsime
Nehemiah2:15 Ndipo ndinakwera usiku kumtsinje
Nehemiah2:16 Koma olamulira sanadziwe uko ndinamuka

Nehemiah2:19 Koma Sanibalati Muhoroni
Nehemiah2:20 Koma ndinawabwezera mau
Nehemiah3:1 Pamenepo Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe ananyamuka pamodzi ndi abale ake ansembe
Nehemiah3:2 Ndi pambali pake anamanga amuna a ku Yeriko. Ndi pambali pao anamanga Zakuri mwana wa Imuri.
Nehemiah3:3 Ndi chipata chansomba anachimanga ana a Hasena; anamanga mitanda yake
Nehemiah3:4 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Meremoti mwana wa Uriya
Nehemiah3:5 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Atekowa; koma omveka ao sanapereke makosi ao kuntchito ya Mbuye wao.
Nehemiah3:6 Ndi chipata chakale anachikonza Yoyada mwana wa Paseya; ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Besodeiya anamanga mitanda yake
Nehemiah3:7 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Melatiya Mgibeoni
Nehemiah3:8 Pambali pake anakonza Uziyele mwana wa Haraya
Nehemiah3:9 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Refaya mwana wa Huri
Nehemiah3:10 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Yedaya mwana wa Harumafa
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya mwana wa Harimu
Nehemiah3:12 Ndi pambali pake anakonza Salumu mwana wa Halohesi
Nehemiah3:13 Chipata cha ku Chigwa anachikonza Hanuni; ndi okhala m'Zanowa anachimanga
Nehemiah3:14 Ndi Chipata cha Kudzala anachikonza Malikiya mwana wa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Ndi chipata cha kukasupe anachikonza Salumu mwana wa Kolihoze mkulu wa dziko la Mizipa anachimanga
Nehemiah3:16 Potsatizana naye anakonza Nehemiya mwana wa Azibuki
Nehemiah3:17 Potsatizana naye anakonza Alevi
Nehemiah3:18 Potsatizana naye anakonza abale ao
Nehemiah3:19 Ndi pa mbali pake Ezere mwana wa Yesuwa
Nehemiah3:20 Potsatizana naye Baruki mwana wa Zabai anafulumira kukonza gawo lina kuyambira popindirira mpaka kukhomo la nyumba ya Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe.
Nehemiah3:21 Potsatizana naye Meremoti mwana wa Uriya mwana wa Hakozi anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:22 Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza ansembe okhala kuchidikha.
Nehemiah3:23 Potsatizana nao anakonza Benjamini ndi Hasubu pandunji pa nyumba pao. Potsatizana nao anakonza Azariya mwana wa Maaseiya mwana wa Ananiya pafupi pa nyumba yake.
Nehemiah3:24 Potsatizana naye Binuyi mwana wa Henadadi anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwana wa Uzai anakonza pandunji popindirira
Nehemiah3:26 Koma Anetini okhala m'Ofele anakonza kufikira kumalo a pandunji pa Chipata cha Madzi kum'mawa
Nehemiah3:27 Potsatizana nao Atekowa anakonza gawo lina
Nehemiah3:28 Kumtunda kwa chipata cha akavalo anakonza ansembe
Nehemiah3:29 Potsatizana nao anakonza Zadoki mwana wa Imeri pandunji pa nyumba yake. Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza Semaya mwana wa Sekaniya
Nehemiah3:30 Potsatizana naye Hananiya mwana wa Selemiya
Nehemiah3:31 Potsatizana naye anakonza Malikiya wina wa osula golide kufikira kunyumba ya Anetini
Nehemiah3:32 Ndi pakati pa chipinda chosanja cha kungodya ndi chipata chankhosa anakonza osula golide ndi ochita malonda.

Nehemiah4:11 Nati adani athu

Nehemiah6:19 Anatchulanso ntchito zake zokoma pamaso panga namfotokozera iye mau anga. Ndipo Tobiya anatumiza akalata kuti andiopse ine.

Nehemiah11:1 Ndipo akulu a anthu anakhala m'Yerusalemu; anthu otsala omwe anachita maere
Nehemiah11:2 Ndipo anthu anadalitsa amuna onse akudzinenera mwaufulu kuti adzakhala m'Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah11:3 Awa tsono ndi akulu a dziko okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma m'midzi ya Yuda yense anakhala pa cholowa chake m'midzi mwao
Nehemiah11:4 Ndipo m'Yerusalemu munakhala ena a ana a Yuda ndi ana a Benjamini. Mwa ana a Yuda: Ataya mwana wa Uziya
Nehemiah11:5 ndi Maaseiya mwana wa Baruki
Nehemiah11:6 Ana onse a Perezi okhala m'Yerusalemu ndiwo ngwazi mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi atatu.
Nehemiah11:7 Ndi ana a Benjamini ndi awa: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu

Job3:2 Nalankhula Yobu nati
Job3:3 Litayike tsiku lobadwa ine
Job3:4 Tsiku lija likhale mdima; Mulungu asalifunse kumwamba
Job3:5 Mdima ndi mthunzi wa imfa ziliyese laolao; mtambo ulikhalire; zonse zodetsa usana bii ziliopse.
Job3:6 Usiku uja
Job3:7 Ha! Usiku uja ukhale chumba; kuimbira kokondwera kusalowe m'mwemo.
Job3:8 Autemberere iwo akutemberera usana
Job3:9 Nyenyezi za chizirezire zide; uyembekezere kuunika
Job3:10 popeza sunatseka pa makomo ake mimba ya mai wanga. Kapena kundibisira mavuto pamaso panga.
Job3:11 Ndinalekeranji kufera m'mimba? Ndi kupereka mzimu wanga pobadwa ine.
Job3:12 Anandilandiriranji maondo? Kapena mawere kuti ndiyamwe?
Job3:13 Pakuti ndikadagona pansi pomwepo ndi kukhala chete; ndikanagona tulo; pamenepo ndikadaona popumula;
Job3:14 pamodzi ndi mafumu ndi maphungu a padziko
Job3:15 kapena pamodzi ndi akalonga eni ake a golide
Job3:16 Kapena ngati nsenye yobisika ndikadakhala kuli zii; ngati makanda osaona kuunika.
Job3:17 Apo oipa aleka kumavuta; ndi apo ofooka mphamvu akhala m'kupumula.
Job3:18 Apo a m'kaidi apumula pamodzi
Job3:19 Ang'ono ndi akulu ali komwe; ndi kapolo amasuka kwa mbuyake.

Job3:25 Pakuti chimene ndinachiopa chandigwera

Job16:2 Ndamva zambiri zotere; inu nonse ndinu otonthoza mtima mondilemetsa.
Job16:3 Kodi adzatha mau ouluzika? Kapena chikuwindula nchiyani kuti uyankha zotere?
Job16:4 Inenso ndikadanena monga inu
Job16:5 Koma ndikadakulimbikitsani ndi m'kamwa mwanga
Job16:6 Chinkana ndinena chisoni changa sichitsika; ndipo ndikaleka
Job16:7 Koma tsopano wandilemetsa Iye; mwapasula msonkhano wanga wonse.
Job16:8 Kundigwira kwanu
Job16:9 Iye ananding'amba m'kundida kwake
Job16:10 Iwo anandiyasamira pakamwa pao; anandiomba pama ndi kunditonza; asonkhana pamodzi kunditsutsa.
Job16:11 Mulungu andipereka kwa osulangama
Job16:12 Ndinali mkupuma
Job16:13 Eni mauta ake andizinga

Job31:8 Ndibzale ine nadye wina
Job31:9 Ngati mtima wanga wakopeka ndi mkazi
Job31:10 mkazi wanga aperere wina; wina namuike kumbuyo.
Job31:11 Pakuti icho ndi choipitsitsa
Job31:12 Pakuti ndicho moto wakunyeka mpaka chionongeko
Job31:13 Ngati ndapeputsa mlandu wa kapolo wanga
Job31:14 ndidzatani ponyamuka Mulungu? Ndipo pondizonda Iye ndidzamnyankha chiyani?
Job31:15 Kodi Iye amene anandilenga ine m'mimba sanamlenge iyenso? Sindiye mmodzi anatiumba m'mimba?
Job31:16 Ngati ndakaniza aumphawi chifuniro chao
Job31:17 kapena kudya nthongo yanga ndekha
Job31:18 (pakuti kuyambira ubwana wanga analeredwa ndi ine monga ndi atate; ndipo ndinakhala nkhoswe ya wamasiye chibadwire ine.)
Job31:19 Ngati ndinaona wina alinkutayika wopanda chovala
Job31:20 ngati ziuno zake sizinandiyamika
Job31:21 ngati ndinasamulira ana amasiye dzanja langa
Job31:22 libanthuke phewa langa paphalo
Job31:23 Pakuti tsoka lochokera kwa Mulungu linandiopsa
Job31:24 Ngati ndayesa golide chiyembekezo changa
Job31:25 ngati ndinakondwera popeza chuma changa nchachikulu
Job31:26 ngati ndalambira dzuwa lilikuwala
Job31:27 ndi mtima wanga wakopeka m'tseri
Job31:28 ichinso ndi mphulupulu yoyenera oweruza kunena mlandu wake; pakuti ndikadakana Mulungu ali m'mwamba.
Job31:29 Ngati ndakondwera nalo tsoka la wondida
Job31:30 ndithu sindinalola m'kamwa mwanga muchimwe
Job31:31 Ngati amuna a m'hema mwanga sanati
Job31:32 Mlendo sakagona pakhwalala
Job31:33 Ngati ndakwirira zolakwa zanga monga Adamu
Job31:34 popeza ndinaopa unyinji waukulu
Job31:35 Ha! Ndikadakhala naye wina wakundimvera
Job31:36 Ndithu ndikadawasenza paphewa panga
Job31:37 Ndikadamfotokozera chiwerengo cha mopondamo mwanga
Job31:38 Ngati minda yanga ifuula monditsutsa
Job31:39 ngati ndadya zipatso zake wopanda ndalama. Kapena kutayitsa eni ake moyo wao;
Job31:40 imere minga m'malo mwa tirigu
Job32:1 Pamenepo amuna atatuwa analeka kumyankha Yobu; pakuti anali wolungama pamaso pake pa iye mwini.

Job38:1 Pamenepo Yehova anayankha Yobu m'kamvulumvulu
Job38:2 Ndani uyu adetsa uphungu
Job38:3 Udzimangire m'chuuno tsono ngati mwamuna; ndikufunsa
Job38:4 Unali kuti muja ndinaika maziko a dziko lapansi? Fotokoza ngati udziwa kuzindikira.
Job38:5 Analemba malire ake ndani
Job38:6 Maziko ake anakumbidwa pa chiyani? Kapena anaika ndani mwala wake wa pangodya
Job38:7 muja nyenyezi za m'mawa zinaimba limodzi mokondwera

Job38:10 ndi kuilembera malire anga
Job38:11 ndi kuti

Job38:13 kuti agwire malekezero a dziko lapansi
Job38:14 Lisandulika ngati dothi lonyata pansi pa chosindikiza
Job38:15 ndi kuunika kwa oipa kuletsedwa kuti asakuone
Job38:16 Kodi unalowa magwero a nyanja? Kodi unayendayenda pozama penipeni?
Job38:17 Kodi zipata za imfa zinavumbulukira iwe? Kapena kodi unaona zipata za mthunzi wa imfa?
Job38:18 Kodi unazindikira chitando cha dziko lapansi? Fotokozera
Job38:19 Ili kuti njira yomukira pokhala kuunika? Ndi mdima
Job38:20 kuti upite nao kumalire ake
Job38:21 Udziwa

Job38:23 amene ndiwasungira tsiku la nsautso
Job38:24 Njira ili kuti yomukira pogawikana kuunika

Job38:27 kukhutitsa thengo la kunkhwangwala
Job38:28 Kodi mvula ili naye atate? Kapena wabala ndani madontho a mame?

Job38:30 Madzi aundana ngati mwala
Job38:31 Kodi ungamange gulu la Nsangwe? Kapena kumasula zomangira za Akamwiniatsatana?
Job38:32 Ungatulutse kodi nyenyezi m'nyengo zao monga mwa malongosoledwe ao? Kapena kutsogolera Mlalang'amba ndi ana ake?
Job38:33 Kodi udziwa malemba a kuthambo? Ukhoza kukhazikitsa ufumu wao pa dziko lapansi?

Job38:35 Kodi ukhoza kutumiza mphezi kuti zimuke

Job38:40 pamene ibwatama m'ngaka mwao
Job38:41 Amkonzeratu khungubwi chakudya chake ndani
Job39:1 Kodi udziwa nyengo yakuswana zinkhoma? Kodi wapenyerera pakuswa mbawala?

Job40:1 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kwa Yobu

Job41:1 Kodi ukhoza kukoka Leviyatani ndi mbedza? Kapena kukanikiza kalandira wake ndi chingwe?
Job41:2 Kodi ukhoza kumanga m'mphuno ndi mlulu? Kapena kuboola nsagwada wake ndi mbedza?
Job41:3 Kodi idzachulukitsa mau akukupembedza? Kapena idzanena nawe mau ofatsa?
Job41:4 Kodi idzapangana ndi iwe
Job41:5 Kodi udzasewera nayo ngati mbalame? Kapena udzaimangira anamwali ako kuti aiwete?
Job41:6 Kodi opangana malonda adzaitsatsa? Adzaigawana eni malonda?
Job41:7 Kodi udzadzaza khungu lake ndi ntchetho
Job41:8 Isanjike dzanja lako; ukakumbukira nkhondoyi
Job41:9 Taona
Job41:10 Palibe wolimba mtima kuti adzaiputa. Ndipo ndaniyo adzaima pamaso pa Ine?
Job41:11 Ndaniyo anayamba kundipatsa Ine kuti ndimthokoze? Zilizonse pansi pa thambo ponse ndi zanga.
Job41:12 Sindikhala chete osatchula ziwalo za ng'onayo
Job41:13 Ndani adzasenda chovala chake chakunja? Adzalowa ndani kumizere iwiri ya mano ake?
Job41:14 Adzatsegula ndani zitseko za pakamwa pake? Mano ake aopsa pozungulira pao.
Job41:15 Mamba ake olimba ndiwo kudzitama kwake; amangika pamodzi ngati okomeredwatu.
Job41:16 Alumikizana lina ndi linzake
Job41:17 Amamatirana lina ndi linzake

Job41:19 M'kamwa mwake mutuluka miuni
Job41:20 M'mphuno mwake mutuluka utsi

Job41:23 Nyama yake yopsapsala igwirana ikwima pathupi pake yosagwedezeka.

Job41:25 Ikanyamuka

Job41:28 Muvi suithawitsa

Job41:30 Kumimba kwake ikunga mapale akuthwa
Job41:31 Ichititsa nthubwinthubwi pozama ngati nkhali
Job41:32 Ichititsa mifunde yonyezimira pambuyo pake; munthu akadati pozama pali ndi imvi.
Job41:33 Pa dziko lapansi palibe china cholingana nayo
Job41:34 Ipenya chilichonse chodzikuza
Job42:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova
Job42:2 Ndidziwa kuti mukhoza kuchita zonse
Job42:3 Ndani uyu abisa uphungu wosadziwa kanthu? Chifukwa chake ndinafotokozera zimene sindinazizindikira
Job42:4 Tamveranitu
Job42:5 Kumva ndidamva mbiri yanu
Job42:6 chifukwa chake ndekha ndidzinyansa
Job42:7 Kunali tsono atanena Yehova mau awa kwa Yobu
Job42:8 Ndipo tsono
Job42:9 Namuka Elifazi wa ku Temani
Job42:10 Ndipo Yehova anachotsa ukapolo wa Yobu
Job42:11 Pamenepo anamdzera abale ake onse
Job42:12 Ndipo Yehova anadalitsa chitsiriziro cha Yobu koposa chiyambi chake
Job42:13 Anali naonso ana amuna asanu ndi awiri ndi ana akazi atatu.
Job42:14 Ndipo anamutcha dzina la woyamba Yemima
Job42:15 Ndipo m'dziko monse simunapezeka akazi okongola ngati ana akazi a Yobu
Job42:16 Ndipo zitatha izi
Job42:17 Namwalira Yobu
Psalms1:1 Wodala munthuyo wosayenda mu uphungu wa oipa
Psalms1:2 Komatu m'chilamulo cha Yehova muli chikondwerero chake; ndipo m'chilamulo chake amalingirira usana ndi usiku.
Psalms1:3 Ndiye akunga mtengo wooka pa mitsinje ya madzi; wakupatsa chipatso chake pa nyengo yake
Psalms1:4 Oipa satero ai; koma akunga mungu wouluka ndi mphepo.
Psalms1:5 Chifukwa chake oipa sadzaimirira pa mlanduwo
Psalms1:6 Pakuti Yehova adziwa mayendedwe a olungama; koma mayendedwe a oipa adzatayika.
Psalms2:1 Aphokoseranji amitundu
Psalms2:2 Adzikhazikitsa mafumu a dziko lapansi
Psalms2:3 Tidule zomangira zao
Psalms2:4 Wokhala m'mwambayo adzaseka; Ambuye adzawanyoza.
Psalms2:5 Pomwepo adzalankhula nao mu mkwiyo wake
Psalms2:6 Koma Ine ndadzoza mfumu yanga Pa Ziyoni
Psalms2:7 Ndidzauza za chitsimikizo: Yehova ananena ndi Ine
Psalms2:8 Undifunse
Psalms2:9 Udzawathyola ndi ndodo yachitsulo; udzawaphwanya monga mbiya ya woumba.
Psalms2:10 Tsono
Psalms2:11 Tumikirani Yehova ndi mantha
Psalms2:12 Mpsompsoneni Mwanayo

Psalms5:10 Muwayese otsutsika Mulungu; agwe nao uphungu wao. M'kuchuluka kwa zolakwa zao muwapirikitse; pakuti anapikisana ndi Inu.

Psalms9:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Muti-Labeni. Salimo la Davide. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndidzawerengera zodabwitsa zanu zonse.
Psalms9:2 Ndidzakondwerera ndi kusekera mwa Inu; ndidzaimbira dzina lanu
Psalms9:3 Pobwerera m'mbuyo adani anga
Psalms9:4 Pakuti mwandiweruzira mlandu wanga; mwakhala pa mpando wachifumu
Psalms9:5 Mwadzudzula amitundu
Psalms9:6 Adaniwo atha psiti
Psalms9:7 Koma Yehova akhala chikhalire
Psalms9:8 Ndipo Iyeyu adzaweruza dziko lapansi m'chilungamo
Psalms9:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala msanje kwa iye wokhalira mphanthi. Msanje m'nyengo za nsautso;
Psalms9:10 ndipo iwo akudziwa dzina lanu adzakhulupirira Inu; pakuti
Psalms9:11 Imbirani zoyamika Yehova
Psalms9:12 Pakuti Iye wofuna chamwazi awakumbukira; saiwala kulira kwa ozunzika.

Psalms10:2 Podzikuza woipa apsereza waumphawi; agwe m'chiwembu anapanganacho.

Psalms10:4 Woipa
Psalms10:5 Mayendedwe ake alimbika nthawi zonse; maweruzo anu ali pamwamba posaona iye; adani ake onse awanyodola.
Psalms10:6 Ati mumtima mwake
Psalms10:7 M'kamwa mwake mwadzala kutemberera ndi manyengo ndi kuchenjerera; pansi pa lilime lake pali chivutitso chopanda pake.
Psalms10:8 Akhala m'molalira midzi; mobisalamo akupha munthu wosachimwa. Ambisira waumphawi nkhope yake.

Psalms10:15 Thyolani mkono wa woipa; ndipo wochimwa
Psalms10:16 Yehova ndiye Mfumu kunthawi yamuyaya; aonongeka amitundu m'dziko lake.

Psalms10:18 kuti muweruze mlandu wa amasiye ndi wokhalira mphanthi

Psalms16:5 Yehova ndiye gawo la cholowa changa ndi chikho changa

Psalms18:2 Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa

Psalms18:5 Zingwe za manda zindizinga

Psalms18:8 Unakwera utsi wotuluka m'mphuno mwake

Psalms18:10 Ndipo anaberekeka pa kerubi
Psalms18:11 Anaika mdima pobisala pake
Psalms18:12 Mwa kuchezemira kunali pamaso pake makongwa anakanganuka
Psalms18:13 Ndipo anagunda m'mwamba Yehova
Psalms18:14 Ndipo anatuma mivi yake nawabalalitsa; inde mphezi zaunyinji
Psalms18:15 Ndipo zidaoneka zoyendamo madzi
Psalms18:16 Anatuma kuchokera m'mwamba
Psalms18:17 Anandipulumutsa ine kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu
Psalms18:18 Anandipeza ine tsiku la tsoka langa; koma Yehova anali mchirikizo wanga.
Psalms18:19 Ananditulutsanso andifikitse motakasuka; anandilanditsa
Psalms18:20 Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa chilungamo changa; anandisudzula monga mwa kusisira kwa manja anga.
Psalms18:21 Pakuti ndasunga njira za Yehova
Psalms18:22 Pakuti maweruzo ake onse anali pamaso panga
Psalms18:23 Ndipo ndinakhala wangwiro ndi Iye
Psalms18:24 Ndimo anandisudzulira Yehova monga mwa chilungamo changa
Psalms18:25 Pa wachifundo mukhala wachifundo; pa munthu wangwiro mukhala wangwiro.
Psalms18:26 Pa woyera mtima mukhala woyera mtima; pa wotsutsatsutsa mukhala wotsutsana naye.
Psalms18:27 Pakuti Inu muwapulumutsa anthu aumphawi; koma maso okweza muwatsitsa.
Psalms18:28 Pakuti Inu muyatsa nyali yanga; Yehova
Psalms18:29 Pakuti mwa Inu ndipyola khamu la anthu; ndipo mwa Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga.
Psalms18:30 Mulungu ndiye wangwiro m'njira zake; mau a Yehova ngoyengeka; ndiye chikopa cha onse okhulupirira Iye.
Psalms18:31 Pakuti Mulungu ndani wosati Yehova? Ndipo thanthwe ndani wosati Mulungu wathu?
Psalms18:32 Mulungu ndiye wondizingiza mphamvu m'chuuno
Psalms18:33 Alinganiza mapazi anga ngati a mbawala
Psalms18:34 Aphunzitsa manja anga agwire nkhondo; kuti walifuka uta wamkuwa ndi manja anga.
Psalms18:35 Ndipo mwandipatsa chikopa cha chipulumutso chanu; ndipo dzanja lamanja lanu landigwiriziza
Psalms18:36 Mwandipondetsa patalipatali
Psalms18:37 Ndidzalondola adani anga
Psalms18:38 Ndidzawapyoza kuti sangakhoze kuuka
Psalms18:39 Pakuti mwandizingiza mphamvu m'chuuno ku nkhondoyo; mwandigonjetsera amene andiukira.
Psalms18:40 Ndipo adani anga mwawalozetsa m'mbuyo kwa ine
Psalms18:41 Anafuula
Psalms18:42 Pamenepo ndinawapera ngati fumbi la kumphepo; ndinawakhuthula ngati matope a pabwalo.
Psalms18:43 Mwandipulumutsa pa zolimbana nane za anthu; mwandiika mutu wa amitundu; mtundu wa anthu sindinaudziwa udzanditumikira.
Psalms18:44 Pakumva m'khutu za ine adzandimvera
Psalms18:45 Alendo adzafota
Psalms18:46 Yehova ngwa moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; nakwezeke Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa.
Psalms18:47 Ndiye Mulungu amene andibwezerera chilango
Psalms18:48 Andipulumutsa kwa adani anga. Inde mundikweza pa iwo akundiukira ine
Psalms18:49 Chifukwa chake Yehova ndidzakuyamikani mwa amitundu
Psalms18:50 Alanditsa mfumu yake ndi chipulumutso chachikulu; nachitira chifundo wodzozedwa wake

Psalms19:3 Palibe chilankhulidwe

Psalms22:9 Pakuti Inu ndinu wondibadwitsa; wondikhulupiritsa pokhala ine pa bere la mai wanga.
Psalms22:10 Chibadwire ine anandisiyira Inu
Psalms22:11 Musandikhalire kutali; pakuti nsautso ili pafupi

Psalms22:19 Koma Inu
Psalms22:20 Landitsani moyo wanga kulupanga; wokondedwa wanga kumphamvu ya galu

Psalms22:23 Inu akuopa Yehova

Psalms22:26 Ozunzika adzadya nadzakhuta
Psalms22:27 Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzakumbukira nadzatembenukira kwa Yehova
Psalms22:28 Pakuti ufumuwo ngwa Yehova; Iye achita ufumu mwa amitundu.
Psalms22:29 Onenepa onse a pa dziko lapansi adzadya nadzagwadira; onse akutsikira kufumbi adzawerama pamaso pake
Psalms22:30 Mbumba ya anthu idzamtumikira; kudzanenedwa za Ambuye ku mibadwo yakudza.
Psalms22:31 Iwo adzadza nadzafotokozera chilungamo chake kwa anthu akadzabadwa

Psalms25:4 Mundidziwitse njira zanu
Psalms25:5 Munditsogolere m'choonadi chanu
Psalms25:6 Kumbukirani
Psalms25:7 Musakumbukire zolakwa za ubwana wanga kapena zopikisana nanu. Mundikumbukire monga mwa chifundo chanu
Psalms25:8 Yehova ndiye wabwino ndi wolunjika mtima
Psalms25:9 Adzawatsogolera ofatsa m'chiweruzo; ndipo adzaphunzitsa ofatsa njira yake.
Psalms25:10 Mayendedwe onse a Yehova ndiwo chifundo ndi choonadi
Psalms25:11 Chifukwa cha dzina lanu
Psalms25:12 Munthuyo wakuopa Yehova ndani? Adzamlangiza iye njira adzasankheyo.
Psalms25:13 Moyo wake udzakhala mokoma; ndi mbumba zake zidzalandira dziko lapansi.
Psalms25:14 Chinsinsi cha Yehova chili kwa iwo akumuopa Iye; ndipo adzawadziwitsa pangano lake.
Psalms25:15 Maso anga alinga kwa Yehova kosaleka; pakuti Iye adzaonjola mapazi anga m'ukonde.
Psalms25:16 Cheukirani ine ndipo ndichitireni chifundo; pakuti ndili wounguluma ndi wozunzika.
Psalms25:17 Masautso a mtima wanga akula
Psalms25:18 Penyani mazunzo anga ndi zovuta zanga; ndipo khululukirani zolakwa zanga zonse.
Psalms25:19 Penyani adani anga
Psalms25:20 Sungani moyo wanga
Psalms25:21 Ungwiro ndi kuongoka mtima zindisunge
Psalms25:22 Ombolani Israele
Psalms26:1 Salimo la Davide. Mundiweruze
Psalms26:2 Mundiyesere
Psalms26:3 Pakuti chifundo chanu chili pamaso panga; ndipo ndayenda m'choona chanu.
Psalms26:4 Sindinakhala pansi ndi anthu achabe; kapena kutsagana nao anthu othyasika.
Psalms26:5 Ndidana nao msonkhano wa ochimwa
Psalms26:6 Ndidzasamba manja anga mosalakwa; kuti ndizungulire guwa la nsembe lanu
Psalms26:7 kuti ndimveketse mau a chiyamiko
Psalms26:8 Yehova

Psalms26:10 amene m'manja mwao muli mphulupulu
Psalms26:11 Koma ine
Psalms26:12 Phazi langa liponda pachidikha
Psalms27:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ndiye kuunika kwanga ndi chipulumutso changa; ndidzaopa yani? Yehova ndiye mphamvu ya moyo wanga; ndidzachita mantha ndi yani?
Psalms27:2 Pondifika ine ochita zoipa kudzadya mnofu wanga
Psalms27:3 Lingakhale gulu la ankhondo limanga misasa kuti andithyole
Psalms27:4 Chinthu chimodzi ndinachipempha kwa Yehova
Psalms27:5 Chifukwa kuti pa tsiku la tsoka Iye adzandibisa mumsasa mwake
Psalms27:6 Ndipo tsopano mutu wanga udzakwezeka pamwamba pa adani anga akundizinga; ndipo ndidzapereka m'chihema mwake nsembe za kufuula mokondwera; ndidzaimba
Psalms27:7 Imvani
Psalms27:8 Pamene munati

Psalms27:11 Mundiphunzitse njira yanu

Psalms28:2 Mverani mau a kupemba kwanga

Psalms29:1 Salimo la Davide. Perekani kwa Yehova
Psalms29:2 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lake
Psalms29:3 Liu la Yehova lili pamadzi; Mulungu wa ulemerero agunda
Psalms29:4 Liu la Yehova ndi lamphamvu; liu la Yehova ndi lalikulukulu.
Psalms29:5 Liu la Yehova lithyola mitengo yamkungudza; inde Yehova athyola mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni.
Psalms29:6 Aitumphitsa monga mwanawang'ombe; Lebanoni ndi Sirioni monga msona wa njati.
Psalms29:7 Liu la Yehova ligawa malawi a moto.
Psalms29:8 Liu la Yehova ligwedeza chipululu; Yehova agwedeza chipululu cha Kadesi.
Psalms29:9 Liu la Yehova liswetsa nyama zazikazi
Psalms29:10 Yehova anakhala pa chigumula
Psalms29:11 Yehova adzapatsa anthu ake mphamvu
Psalms30:1 Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo yakuperekera nyumba kwa Mulungu. Ndidzakukwezani

Psalms31:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Ndakhulupirira Inu
Psalms31:2 Munditcherere khutu lanu; ndipulumutseni msanga. Mundikhalire ine thanthwe lolimba
Psalms31:3 Pakuti Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa; ndipo chifukwa cha dzina lanu ndiyendetseni bwino
Psalms31:4 Mundionjole m'ukonde umene ananditchera mobisika. Pakuti Inu ndinu mphamvu yanga.
Psalms31:5 Ndipereka mzimu wanga m'dzanja lanu; mwandiombola
Psalms31:6 Ndikwiya nao iwo akusamala zachabe zonama
Psalms31:7 Ndidzakondwera ndi kusangalala m'chifundo chanu
Psalms31:8 Ndipo simunandipereka m'dzanja la mdani; munapondetsa mapazi anga pali malo.
Psalms31:9 Mundichitire chifundo
Psalms31:10 Pakuti moyo wanga watha ndi chisoni
Psalms31:11 Ndakhala chotonza chifukwa cha akundisautsa onse
Psalms31:12 Ndaiwalika m'mtima monga wakufa
Psalms31:13 Pakuti ndamva ugogodi wa ambiri
Psalms31:14 Koma ine ndakhulupirira Inu
Psalms31:15 Nyengo zanga zili m'manja mwanu
Psalms31:16 Walitsani nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu
Psalms31:17 Yehova
Psalms31:18 Ikhale yosalankhula milomo ya mabodza
Psalms31:19 Ha! Kukoma kwanu ndiko kwakukulu nanga
Psalms31:20 Pobisalira pamaso panu mudzawabisa kwa chiwembu cha munthu
Psalms31:21 Wolemekezeka Yehova
Psalms31:22 Ndipo ine
Psalms31:23 Kondani Yehova
Psalms31:24 Limbikani ndipo Iye adzalimbitsa mtima wanu
Psalms32:1 Salimo la Davide. Chilangizo. Wodala munthuyo wokhululukidwa tchimo lake; wokwiriridwa choipa chake.
Psalms32:2 Wodala munthuyu Yehova samwerengera mphulupulu zake; ndimo mumzimu mwake mulibe chinyengo.
Psalms32:3 Pamene ndinakhala chete mafupa anga anakalamba ndi kubuula kwanga tsiku lonse.
Psalms32:4 Chifukwa usana ndi usiku dzanja lanu linandilemera ine; uwisi wanga unasandulika kuuma kwa malimwe.
Psalms32:5 Ndinavomera choipa changa kwa Inu; ndipo mphulupulu yanga sindinaibisa. Ndinati
Psalms32:6 Chifukwa chake oyera mtima onse apemphere kwa Inu
Psalms32:7 Inu ndinu mobisalira mwanga; m'nsautso mudzandisunga; mudzandizinga ndi nyimbo za chipulumutso.
Psalms32:8 Ine ndidzakulangiza ndi kuphunzitsa iwe za njira ukayendayo; ndidzakupangira ndi diso langa lakuyang'ana iwe.
Psalms32:9 Musakhale monga kavalo
Psalms32:10 Zisoni zambiri zigwera woipa; koma chifundo chidzamzinga iye wakukhulupirira Yehova.
Psalms32:11 Sekerani mwa Yehova
Psalms33:1 Fuulani mokondwera mwa Yehova
Psalms33:2 Yamikani Yehova ndi zeze; muimbireni ndi chisakasa cha zingwe khumi.
Psalms33:3 Mumuimbire Iye nyimbo yatsopano; muimbe mwaluso kumveketsa mau.
Psalms33:4 Pakuti mau a Yehova ali olunjika; ndi ntchito zake zonse zikhulupirika.
Psalms33:5 Iye ndiye wakukonda chilungamo ndi chiweruzo
Psalms33:6 Zakumwamba zinalengedwa ndi mau a Yehova; ndipo ndi mpweya wa m'kamwa mwake khamu lao lonse.
Psalms33:7 Amaunjika madzi a m'nyanja monga mulu
Psalms33:8 Dziko lonse lapansi liope Yehova
Psalms33:9 Pakuti ananena
Psalms33:10 Yehova aphwanya upo wa amitundu
Psalms33:11 Chiweruzo cha Yehova chikhazikika chikhazikikire
Psalms33:12 Wodalitsika mtundu wa anthu umene Yehova ndiye Mulungu wao; mtundu womwe anausankha ukhale cholandira cha Iye yekha.
Psalms33:13 Yehova apenyerera m'mwamba; aona ana onse a anthu.
Psalms33:14 M'malo akhalamo Iye
Psalms33:15 Iye amene akonza mitima ya iwo onse
Psalms33:16 Palibe mfumu yoti gulu lalikulu limpulumutsa
Psalms33:17 Kavalo safikana kupulumuka naye
Psalms33:18 Taonani
Psalms33:19 Kupulumutsa moyo wao kwa imfa
Psalms33:20 Moyo wathu walindira Yehova; Iye ndiye thandizo lathu ndi chikopa chathu.
Psalms33:21 Pakuti mtima wathu udzakondwera mwa Iye
Psalms33:22 Yehova
Psalms34:1 Salimo la Davide. Muja anasintha makhalidwe ake pamaso pa Abimeleki
Psalms34:2 Moyo wanga udzatamanda Yehova; ofatsa adzakumva nadzakondwera.
Psalms34:3 Bukitsani pamodzi ndine ukulu wa Yehova
Psalms34:4 Ndinafuna Yehova ndipo anandivomera

Psalms34:8 Talawani
Psalms34:9 Opani Yehova

Psalms34:19 Masautso a wolungama mtima achuluka
Psalms34:20 Iye asunga mafupa ake onse; silinathyoka limodzi lonse.
Psalms34:21 Mphulupulu idzamupha woipa; ndipo adzawatsutsa kumlandu iwo akudana naye wolungama.
Psalms34:22 Yehova aombola moyo wa anyamata ake

Psalms35:6 Njira yao ikhale ya mdima ndi yoterera

Psalms40:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Kuyembekeza ndayembekeza Yehova; ndipo anandilola
Psalms40:2 Ndipo anandikweza kunditulutsa m'dzenje la chitayiko
Psalms40:3 Ndipo anapatsa nyimbo yatsopano m'kamwa mwanga
Psalms40:4 Wodala munthuyo wakuyesa Yehova wokhulupirika; wosasamala odzikuza
Psalms40:5 Inu
Psalms40:6 Nsembe ndi chopereka simukondwera nazo; mwanditsegula makutu. Nsembe yopsereza ndi yamachimo simunapempha.
Psalms40:7 Pamenepo ndinati
Psalms40:8 kuchita chikondwero chanu kundikonda
Psalms40:9 Ndalalikira chilungamo mu msonkhano waukulu; onani
Psalms40:10 Chilungamo chanu sindinachibisa m'kati mwamtima mwanga; chikhulupiriko chanu ndi chipulumutso chanu ndinachinena; chifundo chanu ndi choonadi chanu sindinachibisira msonkhano waukulu.

Psalms40:12 Pakuti zoipa zosawerengeka zandizinga
Psalms40:13 Ndikupemphani

Psalms41:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Wodala iye amene asamalira wosauka! Tsiku la tsoka Yehova adzampulumutsa.
Psalms41:2 Yehova adzamsunga
Psalms41:3 Yehova adzamgwiriziza pa kama wodwalira; podwala iye mukonza pogona pake.
Psalms41:4 Ndinati ine
Psalms41:5 Adani anga andinenera choipa
Psalms41:6 Ndipo akadza kundiona wina angonena bodza; mumtima mwake adzisonkhera zopanda pake
Psalms41:7 Onse akudana nane andinong'onezerana; apangana chondiipsa ine.
Psalms41:8 Chamgwera chinthu choopsa
Psalms41:9 Ngakhale bwenzi langa lenileni
Psalms41:10 Koma Inu
Psalms41:11 Umo ndidziwa kuti mukondwera ndi ine
Psalms41:12 Ndipo ine
Psalms41:13 Wodalitsika Yehova
Psalms42:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Chilangizo cha kwa ana a Kora. Monga nswala ipuma wefuwefu kukhumba mitsinje; motero moyo wanga upuma wefuwefu kukhumba Inu
Psalms42:2 Moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu la kwa Mulungu
Psalms42:3 Misozi yanga yakhala ngati chakudya changa
Psalms42:4 Ndidzikumbukira izi ndipo nditsanulira moyo wanga m'kati mwa ine

Psalms62:2 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; msanje wanga

Psalms63:1 Salimo la Davide; muja anakhala m'chipululu cha Yuda Inu Mulungu
Psalms63:2 Kuti ndione mphamvu yanu ndi ulemerero wanu
Psalms63:3 Pakuti chifundo chanu chiposa moyo makomedwe ake; milomo yanga idzakulemekezani.
Psalms63:4 Potero ndidzakuyamikani m'moyo mwanga; ndidzakweza manja anga m'dzina lanu.
Psalms63:5 Mudzakhutitsa moyo wanga ngati ndi mafuta ndi chonona; ndipo pakamwa panga ndidzakulemekezani ndi milomo yakufuula mokondwera.
Psalms63:6 Pokumbukira Inu pa kama wanga
Psalms63:7 Pakuti munakhala mthandizi wanga; ndipo ndidzafuula mokondwera mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu.
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga uumirira Inu. Dzanja lamanja lanu lindigwiriziza.
Psalms63:9 Koma iwo amene afuna moyo wanga kuti auononge
Psalms63:10 Adzawapereka kumphamvu ya lupanga; iwo adzakhala gawo la ankhandwe.
Psalms63:11 Koma mfumu idzakondwera mwa Mulungu; yense wakulumbirira iye adzatamandira; pakuti pakamwa pa iwo onena bodza padzatsekedwa.
Psalms64:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Imvani Yehova
Psalms64:2 Ndibiseni pa upo wachinsinsi wa ochita zoipa; pa phokoso la ochita zopanda pake.
Psalms64:3 Amene anola lilime lao ngati lupanga
Psalms64:4 kuponyera wangwiro mobisika: Amponyera modzidzimutsa
Psalms64:5 Alimbikitsana m'chinthu choipa; apangana za kutchera misampha mobisika; akuti
Psalms64:6 Afunafuna zosalungama; kusanthula
Psalms64:7 Koma Mulungu adzawaponyera muvi; adzalaswa modzidzimutsa.
Psalms64:8 Adzawakhumudwitsa
Psalms64:9 Ndipo anthu onse adzachita mantha; nadzabukitsa chochita Mulungu
Psalms64:10 Wolungama adzakondwera mwa Yehova
Psalms65:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. M'Ziyoni akulemekezani Inu mwachete
Psalms65:2 Wakumva pemphero Inu
Psalms65:3 Mphulupulu zinandilaka; koma mudzafafaniza zolakwa zathu.
Psalms65:4 Wodala munthuyo mumsankha
Psalms65:5 Mudzatiyankha nazo zoopsa m'chilungamo
Psalms65:6 Ndinu amene mukhazikitsa mapiri ndi mphamvu yanu; pozingidwa nacho chilimbiko.
Psalms65:7 Amene atontholetsa kukuntha kwa nyanja
Psalms65:8 Ndipo iwo akukhala kumalekezero adzachita mantha chifukwa cha zizindikiro zanu; mukondweretsa apo patulukira dzuwa
Psalms65:9 Mucheza nalo dziko lapansi
Psalms65:10 Mukhutitsa nthaka yake yolima; mufafaniza nthumbira zake; muiolowetsa ndi mvumbi; mudalitsa mmera wake.
Psalms65:11 Muveka chakachi ndi ukoma wanu; ndipo mabande anu akukha zakucha.
Psalms65:12 Akukha pa mabusa a m'chipululu; ndipo mapiri azingika nacho chimwemwe.
Psalms65:13 Podyetsa mpodzaza ndi zoweta; ndipo zigwa zakutidwa ndi tirigu; zifuula mokondwera
Psalms66:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Nyimbo
Psalms66:2 Imbirani ulemerero wa dzina lake; pomlemekeza mumchitire ulemerero.
Psalms66:3 Nenani kwa Mulungu
Psalms66:4 Dziko lonse lapansi lidzakugwadirani
Psalms66:5 Idzani
Psalms66:6 Anasanduliza nyanja ikhale mtunda. Anaoloka mtsinje choponda pansi
Psalms66:7 Achita ufumu mwa mphamvu yake kosatha; maso ake ayang'anira amitundu; opikisana ndi Iye asadzikuze.
Psalms66:8 Lemekezani Mulungu wathu
Psalms66:9 Iye amene asunga moyo wathu tingafe
Psalms66:10 Pakuti munatiyesera
Psalms66:11 Munapita nafe kuukonde; munatisenza chothodwetsa pamsana pathu.
Psalms66:12 Munapititsa anthu oberekeka pamwamba pamitu pathu; tinapyola moto ndi madzi; koma munatifikitsa potitsitsimutsa.
Psalms66:13 Ndidzalowa m'nyumba yanu ndi nsembe zopsereza
Psalms66:14 zimene inazitchula milomo yanga
Psalms66:15 Ndidzakufukizirani nsembe zopsereza zonona
Psalms66:16 Idzani
Psalms66:17 Ndinamfuulira Iye pakamwa panga
Psalms66:18 Ndikadasekera zopanda pake m'mtima mwanga
Psalms66:19 Koma Mulungu anamvadi; anamvera mau a pemphero langa.
Psalms66:20 Wolemekezeka Mulungu
Psalms67:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo
Psalms67:2 kuti njira yanu idziwike pa dziko lapansi

Psalms67:5 Anthu akuyamikeni
Psalms67:6 Dziko lapansi lapereka zipatso zake
Psalms67:7 Mulungu adzatidalitsa; ndipo malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzamuopa Iye.
Psalms68:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. Auke Mulungu
Psalms68:2 Muwachotse monga utsi uchotseka; monga phula lisungunuka pamoto
Psalms68:3 Koma olungama akondwere; atumphe ndi chimwemwe pamaso pa Mulungu; ndipo asekere nacho chikondwerero.
Psalms68:4 Imbirani Yehova
Psalms68:5 Mulungu
Psalms68:6 Mulungu amangitsira banja anthu a pa okha; atulutsa am'ndende alemerere; koma opikisana naye akhala m'dziko lopanda madzi.
Psalms68:7 Pakutuluka paja
Psalms68:8 Dziko lapansi linagwedezeka
Psalms68:9 Inu
Psalms68:10 Gulu lanu linakhala m'dziko muja. Mwa ukoma wanu munalikonzera ozunzika
Psalms68:11 Ambuye anapatsa mau
Psalms68:12 Mafumu a magulu a ankhondo athawathawa
Psalms68:13 Pogona inu m'makola a zoweta
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuyonse anabalalitsa mafumu m'dzikomo
Psalms68:15 Phiri la Basani ndilo phiri la Mulungu; Phiri la Basani ndilo phiri la mitumitu.
Psalms68:16 Muchitiranji nsanje mapiri inu a mitumitu
Psalms68:17 Magaleta a Mulungu ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri
Psalms68:18 Munakwera kunka kumwamba
Psalms68:19 Wolemekeza Ambuye
Psalms68:20 Mulungu akhala kwa ife Mulungu wa chipulumutso; ndipo Yehova Ambuye ali nazo zopulumutsira kuimfa.
Psalms68:21 Indedi Mulungu adzaphwanya mutu wa adani ake
Psalms68:22 Ambuye anati
Psalms68:23 kuti uviike phazi lako m'mwazi

Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani chilombo cha m'bango

Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye wakuberekeka pamwambamwamba

Psalms68:35 Inu Mulungu
Psalms69:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Pa Syosyanimu. Salimo la Davide. Ndipulumutseni Mulungu; pakuti madzi afikira moyo wanga.
Psalms69:2 Ndamira m'thope lozama
Psalms69:3 Ndalema ndi kufuula kwanga; kum'mero kwauma gwa! M'maso mwanga mwada poyembekeza Mulungu wanga.
Psalms69:4 Ondida kopanda chifukwa achuluka koposa tsitsi la pamutu panga; ofuna kunditha
Psalms69:5 Mulungu
Psalms69:6 Iwo akuyembekeza Inu
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndalola chotonza chifukwa cha Inu
Psalms69:8 Abale anga andiyesa mlendo
Psalms69:9 Pakuti changu cha pa nyumba yanu chandidya; ndi zotonza za iwo otonza Inu zandigwera ine.
Psalms69:10 Ndipo ndinalira pa kusala kwa moyo wanga
Psalms69:11 Ndipo chovala changa ndinayesa chiguduli
Psalms69:12 Okhala pachipata akamba za ine; ndipo oledzera andiimba.
Psalms69:13 Koma ine
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuthope
Psalms69:15 Chigumula chisandifotsere
Psalms69:16 Mundiyankhe Yehova; pakuti chifundo chanu nchokoma; munditembenukire monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu.
Psalms69:17 Ndipo musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu; pakuti ndisautsika ine; mundiyankhe msanga.
Psalms69:18 Yandikizani moyo wanga
Psalms69:19 Mudziwa chotonza changa
Psalms69:20 Chotonza chandiswera mtima
Psalms69:21 Ndipo anandipatsa ndulu ikhale chakudya changa; nandimwetsa vinyo wosasa pomva ludzu ine.
Psalms69:22 Gome lao likhale msampha pamaso pao; pokhala ndi mtendere iwo
Psalms69:23 M'maso mwao mude
Psalms69:24 Muwatsanulire mkwiyo wanu
Psalms69:25 Pokhala pao pakhale bwinja; m'mahema mwao musakhale munthu.
Psalms69:26 Pakuti alondola amene Inu munampanda; ndipo akambirana za zowawa zao za iwo amene munawalasa.
Psalms69:27 Onjezani mphulupulu pa mphulupulu zao; ndipo asafikire chilungamo chanu.
Psalms69:28 Afafanizidwe m'buku lamoyo
Psalms69:29 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi womva zowawa; chipulumutso chanu
Psalms69:30 Ndidzalemekeza dzina la Mulungu ndi kuliimbira
Psalms69:31 Ndipo chidzakomera Yehova koposa ng'ombe
Psalms69:32 Ofatsa anachiona
Psalms69:33 Pakuti Yehova amvera aumphawi
Psalms69:34 Zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zimlemekeze
Psalms69:35 Pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni
Psalms69:36 Ndipo mbumba ya atumiki ake idzalilandira; ndipo iwo akukonda dzina lake adzakhala m'mwemo.

Psalms70:2 Achite manyazi

Psalms71:1 Ndikhulupirira Inu
Psalms71:2 Ndikwatuleni m'chilungamo chanu
Psalms71:3 Mundikhalire thanthwe lokhalamo
Psalms71:4 Ndilanditseni

Psalms71:6 Inu munandigwiriziza kuyambira ndisanabadwe
Psalms71:7 Ndikhala chodabwitsa kwa ambiri; koma Inu ndinu pothawira panga polimba.
Psalms71:8 M'kamwa mwanga mudzadzala lemekezo lanu
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye mu ukalamba wanga; musandisiye

Psalms72:1 Salimo la kwa Solomoni. Patsani mfumu maweruzo anu
Psalms72:2 Potero adzanenera anthu anu mlandu ndi m'chilungamo
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzatengera anthu mtendere
Psalms72:4 Adzaweruza ozunzika a mwa anthu
Psalms72:5 Adzakuopani momwe likhalira dzuwa ndi mwezi
Psalms72:6 Adzanga mvula yakugwa pa udzu wosenga
Psalms72:7 Masiku ake wolungama adzakhazikika; ndi mtendere wochuluka
Psalms72:8 Ndipo adzachita ufumu kuchokera kunyanja kufikira kunyanja
Psalms72:9 Okhala m'chipululu adzagwadira pamaso pake; ndi adani ake adzaluma nthaka.
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisisi ndi ku Zisumbuzo adzabwera nacho chopereka; mafumu a ku Sheba ndi Seba adzadza nazo mphatso.
Psalms72:11 Inde mafumu onse adzamgwadira iye
Psalms72:12 Pakuti adzapulumutsa waumphawi wofuulayo; ndi wozunzika amene alibe mthandizi.
Psalms72:13 Adzachitira nsoni wosauka ndi waumphawi
Psalms72:14 Adzaombola moyo wao ku chinyengo ndi chiwawa; ndipo mwazi wao udzakhala wa mtengo pamaso pake.
Psalms72:15 Ndipo iye adzakhala ndi moyo; ndipo adzampatsa golide wa ku Sheba; nadzampempherera kosalekeza; adzamlemekeza tsiku lonse.
Psalms72:16 M'dzikomo mudzakhala dzinthu dzochuluka pamwamba pa mapiri; zipatso zake zidzati waa
Psalms72:17 Dzina lake lidzakhala kosatha
Psalms72:18 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu
Psalms72:19 Ndipo dzina lake la ulemerero lidalitsike kosatha; ndipo dziko lonse lapansi lidzale nao ulemerero wake. Amen
Psalms72:20 Mapemphero a Davide mwana wa Yese atha.
Psalms73:1 Salimo la Asafu. Indedi Mulungu achitira Israele zabwino
Psalms73:2 Koma ine
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinachitira nsanje odzitamandira
Psalms73:4 Pakuti palibe zomangira pakufa iwo
Psalms73:5 Savutika monga anthu ena; sasautsika monga anthu ena.
Psalms73:6 Chifukwa chake kudzikuza kunga unyolo pakhosi pao; achivala chiwawa ngati malaya.
Psalms73:7 Kunenepa kwao kutuzulitsa maso ao
Psalms73:8 Achita zaphwete nalankhula moipa za kusautsa
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pao anena zam'mwamba

Psalms73:13 Indedi

Psalms73:19 Ha? M'kamphindi ayesedwa bwinja; athedwa konse ndi zoopsa.

Psalms74:1 Chilangizo cha Asafu. Mulungu
Psalms74:2 Kumbukirani msonkhano wanu
Psalms74:3 Nyamulani mapazi anu kukapenya mapasukidwe osatha
Psalms74:4 Otsutsana ndi Inu abangula pakati pa msonkhano wanu; aika mbendera zao zikhale zizindikiro.
Psalms74:5 Anaoneka ngati osamula nkhwangwa kunkhalango.
Psalms74:6 Ndipo tsopano aphwanya zosemeka zake zonse ndi nkhwangwa ndi nyundo.
Psalms74:7 Anatentha malo anu opatulika; anaipsa ndi kugwetsa pansi mokhalamo dzina lanu.
Psalms74:8 Ananena mumtima mwao
Psalms74:9 Sitiziona zizindikiro zathu; palibenso mneneri; ndipo mwa ife palibe wina wakudziwa mpaka liti.
Psalms74:10 Wotsutsanayo adzatonza kufikira liti
Psalms74:11 Mubwezeranji dzanja lanu
Psalms74:12 Koma Mulungu ndiye mfumu yanga kuyambira kale
Psalms74:13 Mudagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; mudaswa mitu ya zoopsa za m'madzi.
Psalms74:14 Mudaphwanya mitu ya Leviyatani; mudampereka akhale chakudya cha zilombo za m'chipululu.
Psalms74:15 Mudagawa kasupe ndi mtsinje; mudaphwetsa mitsinje yaikulu.
Psalms74:16 Usana ndi wanu
Psalms74:17 Munaika malekezero onse a dziko lapansi; munalenga dzinja ndi malimwe.
Psalms74:18 Mukumbukire ichi
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa njiwa yanu kwa chilombo; musamaiwala moyo wa ozunzika anu nthawi yonse.
Psalms74:20 Samalirani chipanganocho; pakuti malo a mdima a m'dziko adzala ndi zokhalamo chiwawa.
Psalms74:21 Okhalira mphanthi asabwere nao manyazi; wozunzika ndi waumphawi alemekeze dzina lanu.
Psalms74:22 Nyamukani
Psalms74:23 Musaiwale mau a iwo otsutsana ndi Inu; kusokosera kwa iwo akuukirani Inu kumakwera kosaleka.
