Psalms77:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Yedutuni; Salimo la Asafu. Ndidzafuulira kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga; kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga
Psalms77:2 Tsiku la nsautso yanga ndinafuna Ambuye. Dzanja langa linatambalika usiku
Psalms77:3 Ndikumbukira Mulungu ndipo ndivutika; ndilingalira ndipo mzimu wanga ukomoka.
Psalms77:4 Mundikhalitsa maso; ndigwidwa mtima wosanena kanthu.
Psalms77:5 Ndinaganizira masiku akale
Psalms77:6 Ndikumbukira nyimbo yanga usiku; ndilingalira mumtima mwanga; mzimu wanga unasanthula.
Psalms77:7 Kodi Ambuye adzataya nthawi yonse? Osabwerezanso kukondwera nafe.
Psalms77:8 Chifundo chake chalekeka konsekonse kodi? Lonjezano lake lidatha kodi ku mibadwo yonse?
Psalms77:9 Kodi Mulungu waiwala kuchita chifundo? Watsekereza kodi nsoni zokoma zake mumkwiyo?
Psalms77:10 Ndipo ndinati
Psalms77:11 Ndidzakumbukira zimene adazichita Yehova; inde
Psalms77:12 Ndipo ndidzalingalira ntchito yanu yonse
Psalms77:13 Mulungu

Psalms77:15 Munaombola anthu anu ndi mkono wanu
Psalms77:16 Madziwo anakuonani Mulungu; anakuonani madziwo; anachita mantha
Psalms77:17 Makongwa anatsanula madzi; thambo lidamvetsa liu lake; mivi yanu yomwe inatulukira.
Psalms77:18 Liu la bingu lanu linatengezanatengezana; mphezi zinaunikira ponse pali anthu; dziko lapansi linanjenjemera ndi kugwedezeka.

Psalms77:20 Munatsogolera anthu anu ngati gulu la nkhosa

Psalms78:6 kuti mbadwo ukudzawo udziwe

Psalms78:8 Ndi kuti asange makolo ao

Psalms78:33 Potero anathera masiku ao ndi zopanda pake
Psalms78:34 Pamene anawapha ndipo anamfuna Iye; nabwerera

Psalms78:36 Koma anamsyasyalika pakamwa pao
Psalms78:37 Popeza mtima wao sunakonzekera Iye
Psalms78:38 Koma Iye pokhala ngwa chifundo
Psalms78:39 Ndipo anakumbukira kuti iwo ndiwo anthu; mphepo yopita yosabweranso.
Psalms78:40 Kawirikawiri nanga anapikisana ndi Iye kuchigwako
Psalms78:41 Pakuti anabwerera m'mbuyo
Psalms78:42 Sanakumbukire dzanja lake
Psalms78:43 Amene anaika zizindikiro zake m'Ejipito
Psalms78:44 Nasanduliza nyanja yao mwazi
Psalms78:45 Anawatumizira pakati pao mitambo ya ntchentche zakuwatha; ndi achule akuwaononga.
Psalms78:46 Ndipo anapatsa mphuchi dzinthu dzao
Psalms78:47 Anapha mphesa zao ndi matalala
Psalms78:48 Naperekanso zoweta zao kwa matalala
Psalms78:49 Anawatumizira mkwiyo wake wotentha
Psalms78:50 Analambulira mkwiyo wake njira; sanalekerere moyo wao usafe
Psalms78:51 Ndipo anapha ana oyamba onse a mu Ejipito
Psalms78:52 Koma anatulutsa anthu ake ngati nkhosa
Psalms78:53 Ndipo anawatsogolera mokhulupirika
Psalms78:54 Ndipo anawafikitsa kumalire a malo ake oyera
Psalms78:55 Ndipo anapirikitsa amitundu pamaso pao
Psalms78:56 Koma anamuyesa napikisana ndi Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba
Psalms78:57 koma anabwerera m'mbuyo
Psalms78:58 Ndipo anautsa mtima wake ndi malo amsanje ao
Psalms78:59 Pakumva ichi Mulungu
Psalms78:60 ndipo anachokera chokhalamo cha ku Silo
Psalms78:61 napereka mphamvu yake m'ukapolo
Psalms78:62 Naperekanso anthu ake kwa lupanga; nakwiya nacho cholandira chake.
Psalms78:63 Moto unapsereza anyamata ao; ndi anamwali ao sanalemekezeke.
Psalms78:64 Ansembe ao anagwa ndi lupanga; ndipo amasiye ao sanachite maliro.
Psalms78:65 Pamenepo Ambuye anauka ngati wam'tulo; ngati chiphona chakuchita nthungululu ndi vinyo.
Psalms78:66 Ndipo anapanda otsutsana naye kumbuyo; nawapereka akhale otonzeka kosatha.
Psalms78:67 Tero anakana hema wa Yosefe; ndipo sanasankhe fuko la Efuremu;
Psalms78:68 koma anasankha fuko la Yuda
Psalms78:69 Ndipo anamanga malo oyera ake ngati kaphiri
Psalms78:70 Ndipo anasankha Davide mtumiki wake
Psalms78:71 Anamtenga kuja anatsata zoyamwitsa
Psalms78:72 Potero anawaweta monga mwa mtima wake wangwiro; nawatsogolera ndi luso la manja ake.

Psalms95:2 Tidze nacho chiyamiko pamaso pake
Psalms95:3 Pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wamkulu; ndi mfumu yaikulu yoposa milungu yonse.
Psalms95:4 Malo ozama a dziko lapansi ali m'dzanja lake; chuma cha m'mapiri chomwe ndi chake.
Psalms95:5 Nyanja ndi yake
Psalms95:6 Tiyeni
Psalms95:7 Pakuti Iye ndiye Mulungu wathu
Psalms95:8 Musaumitse mitima yanu
Psalms95:9 Pamene makolo anu anandisuntha
Psalms95:10 Zaka makumi anai mbadwo uwu unandimvetsa chisoni
Psalms95:11 Chifukwa chake ndinalumbira mu mkwiyo wanga
Psalms96:1 Muimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; muimbireni Yehova
Psalms96:2 Muimbireni Yehova
Psalms96:3 Fotokozerani ulemerero wake mwa amitundu; zodabwitsa zake mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu.
Psalms96:4 Pakuti Yehova ndi wamkulu
Psalms96:5 Pakuti milungu yonse ya mitundu ya anthu ndiyo mafano
Psalms96:6 Pamaso pake pali ulemu ndi ukulu. M'malo opatulika mwake muli mphamvu ndi zochititsa kaso.
Psalms96:7 Mpatseni Yehova
Psalms96:8 Mpatseni Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lake; bwerani nacho chopereka
Psalms96:9 Gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa
Psalms96:10 Nenani mwa amitundu
Psalms96:11 Kumwamba kukondwere nilisekerere dziko lapansi; nyanja ibume mwa kudzala kwake.
Psalms96:12 Munda ukondwerere ndi zonse zili m'mwemo; pamenepo mitengo yonse ya kunkhalango idzafuula mokondwera.
Psalms96:13 Pamaso pa Yehova
Psalms97:1 Yehova achita ufumu; dziko lapansi likondwere; zisumbu zambiri zikondwerere.
Psalms97:2 Pomzinga pali mitambo ndi mdima; chilungamo ndi chiweruzo ndizo zolimbitsa mpando wachifumu wake.
Psalms97:3 Moto umtsogolera
Psalms97:4 Mphezi zake zinaunikira dziko lokhalamo anthu; dziko lapansi linaona nilinagwedezeka.
Psalms97:5 Mapiri anasungunuka ngati sera pamaso pa Yehova
Psalms97:6 Kumwamba kulalikira chilungamo chake
Psalms97:7 Onse akutumikira fano losema
Psalms97:8 Ziyoni anamva nakondwera
Psalms97:9 Pakuti Inu
Psalms97:10 Inu okonda Yehova
Psalms97:11 Kuunika kufesekera wolungama
Psalms97:12 Kondwerani mwa Yehova
Psalms98:1 Salimo. Muimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; popeza anachita zodabwitsa: Dzanja lake lamanja
Psalms98:2 Yehova anawadziwitsira chipulumutso chake; anaonetsera chilungamo chake pamaso pa amitundu.
Psalms98:3 Anakumbukira chifundo chake ndi chikhulupiriko chake kunyumba ya Israele; malekezero onse a dziko lapansi anaona chipulumutso cha Mulungu wathu.
Psalms98:4 Fuulirani kwa Yehova
Psalms98:5 Muimbireni Yehova zomlemekeza ndi zeze; ndi zeze ndi mau a salimo.
Psalms98:6 Fuulani pamaso pa Mfumu Yehova
Psalms98:7 Nyanja ifuule ndi kudzala kwake; dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhalamo;
Psalms98:8 mitsinje iombe manja; mapiri afuule pamodzi mokondwera.
Psalms98:9 Pamaso pa Yehova
Psalms99:1 Yehova ndiye mfumu; mitundu ya anthu injenjemere; Iye akhala pakati pa akerubi; dziko lapansi ligwedezeke.
Psalms99:2 Yehova ndiye wamkulu m'Ziyoni; ndipo akwezeka pamwamba pa mitundu yonse ya anthu.
Psalms99:3 Alemekeze dzina lanu lalikulu ndi loopsa. Ili ndilo loyera.
Psalms99:4 Ndipo mphamvu ya mfumu ikonda chiweruzo; Inu mukhazikitsa zolunjika
Psalms99:5 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms99:6 Mwa ansembe ake muli Mose ndi Aroni
Psalms99:7 Iye analankhula nao mu mtambo woti njo: Iwo anasunga mboni zake ndi malembawa anawapatsa.
Psalms99:8 Munawayankha
Psalms99:9 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms100:1 Salimo la Chiyamiko. Fuulirani kwa Yehova
Psalms100:2 Tumikirani Yehova ndi chikondwerero: Idzani pamaso pake ndi kumuimbira mokondwera.
Psalms100:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; Iyeyu anatilenga
Psalms100:4 Lowani kuzipata zake ndi chiyamiko
Psalms100:5 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; chifundo chake chimanka muyaya; ndi chikhulupiriko chake ku mibadwomibadwo.
Psalms101:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzaimba zachifundo ndi chiweruzo; ndidzaimba zakukulemekezani Inu
Psalms101:2 Ndidzachita mwanzeru m'njira yangwiro; mudzandidzera liti? Ndidzayenda m'nyumba mwanu ndi mtima wangwiro.
Psalms101:3 Sindidzaika chinthu choipa pamaso panga; chochita iwo akupatuka padera chindiipira; sichidzandimamatira.
Psalms101:4 Mtima wopulukira udzandichokera; sindidzadziwana naye woipa.
Psalms101:5 Wakuneneza mnzake m'tseri ndidzamdula; wa maso odzikuza ndi mtima wodzitama sindidzamlola.
Psalms101:6 Maso anga ayang'ana okhulupirika m'dziko
Psalms101:7 Wakuchita chinyengo sadzakhala m'kati mwa nyumba yanga; wakunena mabodza sadzakhazikika pamaso panga.
Psalms101:8 Mamawa onse ndidzadula oipa onse a m'dziko; kuduliratu onse akuchita zopanda pake kumudzi wa Yehova.
Psalms102:1 Pemphero la Wozunzika
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu tsiku la nsautso yanga; munditchereze khutu lanu; tsiku limene ndiitana ine mundiyankhe msanga.
Psalms102:3 Popeza masiku anga akanganuka ngati utsi
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga ukunga udzu womweta
Psalms102:5 Chifukwa cha liu la kubuula kwanga mnofu wanga umamatika kumafupa anga.
Psalms102:6 Ndikunga vuwo m'chipululu; ndikhala ngati kadzidzi wa kumabwinja.
Psalms102:7 Ndidikira
Psalms102:8 Adani anga anditonza tsiku lonse; akundiyalukirawo alumbirira ine.
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndadya mapulusa ngati mkate
Psalms102:10 chifukwa cha ukali wanu ndi kuzaza kwanu; popeza munandinyamula ndipo munandigwetsa.
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga akunga mthunzi womka m'tali; ndipo ine ndauma ngati udzu.

Psalms102:13 Inu mudzauka

Psalms102:17 anasamalira pemphero la iwo akusowa konse
Psalms102:18 Ichi adzachilembera mbadwo ukudza; ndi mtundu wa anthu umene udalengedwa udzamlemekeza Yehova.
Psalms102:19 Pakuti anapenya pansi ali kumwamba kuli malo ake opatulika; Yehova pokhala kumwamba anapenya dziko lapansi;
Psalms102:20 kuti amve kubuula kwa wandende; namasule ana a imfa.

Psalms103:1 Salimo la Davide. Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms103:2 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms103:3 Amene akhululukira mphulupulu zako zonse; nachiritsa nthenda zako zonse;
Psalms103:4 amene aombola moyo wako ungaonongeke; nakuveka korona wa chifundo ndi nsoni zokoma:
Psalms103:5 Amene akhutitsa m'kamwa mwako ndi zabwino; nabweza ubwana wako unge mphungu.
Psalms103:6 Yehova achitira onse osautsidwa chilungamo ndi chiweruzo.
Psalms103:7 Analangiza Mose njira zake
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndiye wa nsoni zokoma ndi wachisomo
Psalms103:9 Sadzatsutsana nao nthawi zonse; ndipo sadzasunga mkwiyo wake kosatha.
Psalms103:10 Sanatichitira monga mwa zolakwa zathu
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mutalikira ndi dziko lapansi
Psalms103:12 Monga kum'mawa kutanimpha ndi kumadzulo
Psalms103:13 Monga atate achitira ana ake chifundo
Psalms103:14 Popeza adziwa mapangidwe athu; akumbukira kuti ife ndife fumbi.
Psalms103:15 Koma munthu
Psalms103:16 Pakuti mphepo ikapitapo pakhala palibe: Ndi malo ake salidziwanso.

Psalms103:18 kwa iwo akusunga chipangano chake

Psalms104:1 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms104:2 muvala ulemu ndi chifumu. Amene mudzikuta nako kuunika monga ndi chovala; ndi kuyala thambo ngati nsalu yotchinga.
Psalms104:3 Amene alumikiza mitanda ya zipinda zake m'madzi; naika makongwa akhale agaleta ake; nayenda pa mapiko a mphepo.
Psalms104:4 Amene ayesa mphepo amithenga ake; lawi la moto atumiki ake;
Psalms104:5 anakhazika dziko lapansi pa maziko ake
Psalms104:6 Mudalikuta ndi nyanja ngati ndi chovala; madzi anafikira pamwamba pa mapiri.
Psalms104:7 Pa kudzudzula kwanu anathawa; anathawa msanga liu la bingu lanu;
Psalms104:8 anakwera m'mapiri
Psalms104:9 Munaika malire kuti asapitirireko; kuti asabwererenso kuphimba dziko lapansi.
Psalms104:10 Atumiza akasupe alowe m'makwawa; ayenda pakati pa mapiri:
Psalms104:11 Zimamwamo nyama zonse za kuthengo; mbidzi zipherako ludzu lao.
Psalms104:12 Mbalame za mlengalenga zifatsa pamenepo
Psalms104:13 Iye amwetsa mapiri mochokera m'zipinda zake: Dziko lakhuta zipatso za ntchito zanu.
Psalms104:14 Ameretsa msipu ziudye ng'ombe
Psalms104:15 ndi vinyo wokondweretsa mtima wa munthu
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Yehova yadzala ndi madzi; mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni imene anaioka;
Psalms104:17 m'mwemo mbalame zimanga zisa zao; pokhala chumba mpa mitengo ya mikungudza.
Psalms104:18 Mapiri atali ndiwo ayenera zinkhoma; pamatanthwe mpothawirapo mbira.
Psalms104:19 Anaika mwezi nyengo zake; dzuwa lidziwa polowera pake.
Psalms104:20 Muika mdima ndipo pali usiku; pamenepo zituluka zilombo zonse za m'thengo.
Psalms104:21 Misona ya mkango ibangula potsata nyama yao
Psalms104:22 Potuluka dzuwa
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu atulukira kuntchito yake
Psalms104:24 Ntchito zanu zichulukadi
Psalms104:25 Nyanja siyo
Psalms104:26 M'mwemo muyenda zombo; ndi Leviyatani amene munamlenga aseweremo.
Psalms104:27 Izi zonse zikulindirirani
Psalms104:28 Chimene muzipatsa zigwira; mufumbatula dzanja lanu
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu
Psalms104:30 Potumizira mzimu wanu
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhale kosatha; Yehova akondwere mu ntchito zake;
Psalms104:32 amene apenyerera pa dziko lapansi
Psalms104:33 Ndidzaimbira Yehova m'moyo mwanga: ndidzaimbira Mulungu wanga zomlemekeza pokhala ndilipo.
Psalms104:34 Pomlingirira Iye pandikonde; ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova.
Psalms104:35 Ochimwa athedwe kudziko lapansi
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova
Psalms105:2 Muimbireni

Psalms105:5 Kumbukirani zodabwitsa zake adazichita; zizindikiro zake ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pake;
Psalms105:6 inu mbeu za Abrahamu

Psalms105:8 Akumbukira chipangano chake kosatha
Psalms105:9 chipanganocho anapangana ndi Abrahamu
Psalms105:10 ndipo anachiimikira Yakobo

Psalms105:20 Mfumuyo anatuma munthu nammasula; woweruza mitundu ya anthu anamtsegulira.
Psalms105:21 Anamuika akhale woyang'anira nyumba yake
Psalms105:22 Amange nduna zake iye mwini

Psalms105:38 Ejipito anakondwera pakuchoka iwo; popeza kuopsa kwao kudawagwera.
Psalms105:39 Anayala mtambo uwaphimbe; ndi moto uunikire usiku.

Psalms105:45 Kuti asamalire malemba ake
Psalms106:1 Aleluya. Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino: Pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.

Psalms106:3 Odala iwo amene asunga chiweruzo
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukire
Psalms106:5 Kuti ndione chokomacho cha osankhika anu
Psalms106:6 Talakwa pamodzi ndi makolo athu; tachita mphulupulu
Psalms106:7 Makolo athu sanadziwitse zodabwitsa zanu m'Ejipito; sanakumbukire zachifundo zanu zaunyinji; koma anapikisana ndi Inu kunyanja
Psalms106:8 Koma anawapulumutsa chifukwa cha dzina lake

Psalms106:11 Ndipo madziwo anamiza owasautsa; sanatsale mmodzi yense.
Psalms106:12 Pamenepo anavomereza mau ake; anaimbira chomlemekeza.

Psalms106:15 Ndipo anawapatsa chopempha iwo; koma anaondetsa mitima yao.

Psalms106:48 Wodala Yehova
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms107:2 Atere oomboledwa a Yehova
Psalms107:3 nawasokolotsa kumaiko
Psalms107:4 Anasokera m'chipululu
Psalms107:5 Anamva njala ndi ludzu
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo anafuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao
Psalms107:7 Ndipo anawatsogolera pa njira yolunjika
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake
Psalms107:9 Pakuti akhutitsa mtima wolakalaka
Psalms107:10 Iwo akukhala mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa
Psalms107:11 popeza anapikisana nao mau a Mulungu
Psalms107:12 kotero kuti anagonjetsa mtima wao ndi chovuta; iwowa anakhumudwa koma panalibe mthandizi.
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo anafuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao
Psalms107:14 Anawatulutsa mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake
Psalms107:16 Popeza adaswa zitseko zamkuwa
Psalms107:17 Anthu opusa azunzika chifukwa cha zolakwa zao
Psalms107:18 Mtima wao unyansidwa nacho chakudya chilichonse; ndipo ayandikira zipata za imfa.
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo afuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao
Psalms107:20 Atumiza mau ake nawachiritsa
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake
Psalms107:22 Ndipo apereke nsembe zachiyamiko
Psalms107:23 Iwo akutsikira kunyanja nalowa m'zombo
Psalms107:24 Iwowa apenya ntchito za Yehova
Psalms107:25 Popeza anena
Psalms107:26 Akwera kuthambo
Psalms107:27 Adzandira napambanitsa miyendo ngati munthu woledzera
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo afuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao
Psalms107:29 Asanduliza namondwe akhale bata
Psalms107:30 Pamenepo akondwera
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake
Psalms107:32 Amkwezenso mu msonkhano wa anthu
Psalms107:33 Asanduliza mitsinje ikhale chipululu
Psalms107:34 Dziko la zipatso
Psalms107:35 Asanduliza chipululu chikhale thawale
Psalms107:36 Ndi apo akhalitsa anjala
Psalms107:37 nafese m'minda
Psalms107:38 Ndipo awadalitsa
Psalms107:39 Koma achepanso
Psalms107:40 Atsanulira chimpepulo pa akulu
Psalms107:41 Koma aika waumphawi pamsanje posazunzika
Psalms107:42 Oongoka mtima adzachiona nadzasekera; koma chosalungama chonse chitseka pakamwa pake.
Psalms107:43 Wokhala nazo nzeru asamalire izi
Psalms108:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Wakhazikika mtima wanga
Psalms108:2 Galamukani
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakuyamikani mwa mitundu ya anthu
Psalms108:4 Pakuti chifundo chanu nchachikulu kupitirira kumwamba
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani pamwamba pa thambo
Psalms108:6 kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe
Psalms108:7 Mulungu analankhula m'chiyero chake; ndidzakondwerera: ndidzagawa Sekemu; ndidzayesa muyeso chigwa cha Sukoti.
Psalms108:8 Giliyadi ndi wanga
Psalms108:9 Mowabu ndiye mkhate wanga; pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga; ndidzafuulira Filistiya.
Psalms108:10 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu?
Psalms108:11 Si ndinu Mulungu
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni mumsauko; pakuti chipulumutso cha munthu ndi chabe.
Psalms108:13 Mwa Mulungu tidzachita molimbika mtima: Ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa.
Psalms109:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Mulungu wa chilemekezo changa
Psalms109:2 pakuti pakamwa pa woipa ndi pakamwa pa chinyengo pananditsegukira; anandilankhulira ndi m'kamwa mwa bodza.
Psalms109:3 Ndipo anandizinga ndi mau a udani
Psalms109:4 M'malo mwa chikondi changa andibwezera udani; koma ine
Psalms109:5 Ndipo anandisenza choipa m'malo mwa chokoma
Psalms109:6 Muike munthu woipa akhale mkulu wake; ndi mdani aime pa dzanja lamanja lake.
Psalms109:7 Ponenedwa mlandu wake atuluke wotsutsika; ndi pemphero lake likhale ngati kuchimwa.
Psalms109:8 Masiku ake akhale owerengeka; wina alandire udindo wake.
Psalms109:9 Ana ake akhale amasiye
Psalms109:10 Ana ake akhale amchirakuyenda ndi opemphapempha; afunefune zosowa zao kuchokera m'mabwinja mwao.
Psalms109:11 Wokongoletsa agwire zonse ali nazo; ndi alendo alande za ntchito yake.
Psalms109:12 Pasakhale munthu wakumchitira chifundo; kapena kuchitira chokoma ana ake amasiye.
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zake zidulidwe; dzina lao lifafanizidwe mu mbadwo ukudza.
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ake zikumbukike ndi Yehova; ndi tchimo la mai wake lisafafanizidwe.
Psalms109:15 Zikhale pamaso pa Yehova chikhalire
Psalms109:16 Chifukwa kuti sanakumbukire kuchita chifundo
Psalms109:17 Inde
Psalms109:18 Anavalanso temberero ngati malaya
Psalms109:19 Limkhalire ngati chovala adzikuta nacho
Psalms109:20 Ichi chikhale mphotho ya otsutsana nane yowapatsa Yehova
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi
Psalms109:23 Ndamuka ngati mthunzi womka m'tali; ndiingidwa kwina ndi kwina ngati dzombe.
Psalms109:24 Mabondo anga agwedezeka chifukwa cha kusala; ndi mnofu wanga waonda posowa mafuta.
Psalms109:25 Ndiwakhaliranso chotonza; pakundiona apukusa mutu.
Psalms109:26 Ndithandizeni Yehova
Psalms109:27 kuti adziwe kuti ichi ndi dzanja lanu; kuti Inu Yehova munachichita.
Psalms109:28 Atemberere iwowa
Psalms109:29 Otsutsana nane avale manyazi
Psalms109:30 Ndidzayamika Yehova kwakukulu pakamwa panga; ndi pakati pa anthu aunyinji ndidzamlemekeza.
Psalms109:31 Popeza adzaima pa dzanja lamanja la waumphawi
Psalms110:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ananena kwa Ambuye wanga
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzatumiza ndodo ya mphamvu yanu kuchokera ku Ziyoni; chitani ufumu pakati pa adani anu.
Psalms110:3 Anthu anu adzadzipereka eni ake tsiku la chamuna chanu: M'moyera mokometsetsa
Psalms110:4 Yehova walumbira
Psalms110:5 Yehova pa dzanja lamanja lako adzaphwanya mafumu tsiku la mkwiyo wake.
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza mwa amitundu
Psalms110:7 Adzamwa kumtsinje wa panjira; chifukwa chake adzaweramutsa mutu wake.
Psalms111:1 Aleluya. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wonse
Psalms111:2 Ntchito za Yehova nzazikulu
Psalms111:3 Chochita Iye ncha ulemu
Psalms111:4 Anachita chokumbukitsa zodabwitsa zake; Yehova ndiye wachisomo ndi nsoni zokoma.
Psalms111:5 Anapatsa akumuopa Iye chakudya; adzakumbukira chipangano chake kosatha.
Psalms111:6 Anaonetsera anthu ake mphamvu ya ntchito zake
Psalms111:7 Ntchito za manja ake ndizo choonadi ndi chiweruzo; malangizo ake onse ndiwo okhulupirika.
Psalms111:8 Achirikizika kunthawi za nthawi
Psalms111:9 Anatumizira anthu ake chipulumutso; analamulira chipangano chake kosatha; dzina lake ndilo loyera ndi loopedwa.
Psalms111:10 Kumuopa Yehova ndiko chiyambi cha nzeru; onse akuchita chotero ali nacho chidziwitso chokoma; chilemekezo chake chikhalitsa kosatha.
Psalms112:1 Aleluya. Wodala munthu wakuopa Yehova
Psalms112:2 Mbeu yake idzakhala yamphamvu pa dziko lapansi; mbadwo wa oongoka mtima udzadalitsidwa.
Psalms112:3 M'nyumba mwake mudzakhala akatundu ndi chuma: Ndi chilungamo chake chikhala chikhalire.
Psalms112:4 Kuunika kutulukira oongoka mtima mumdima; Iye ndiye wachisomo
Psalms112:5 Wodala munthu wakuchitira chifundo
Psalms112:6 Popeza sadzagwedezeka nthawi zonse; wolungama adzakumbukika ku nthawi yosatha.
Psalms112:7 Sadzaopa mbiri yoipa; mtima wake ngwokhazika
Psalms112:8 Mtima wake ngwochirikizika
Psalms112:9 Anagawagawa
Psalms112:10 Woipa adzaziona
Psalms113:1 Aleluya; Lemekezani
Psalms113:2 Lodala dzina la Yehova Kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha.
Psalms113:3 Chitulukire dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwake lilemekezedwe dzina la Yehova.
Psalms113:4 Yehova akwezeka pamwamba pa amitundu onse
Psalms113:5 Akunga Yehova Mulungu wathu ndani? Amene akhala pamwamba patali
Psalms113:6 nadzichepetsa apenye zam'mwamba ndi za pa dziko lapansi.
Psalms113:7 Amene autsa wosauka kumchotsa kufumbi
Psalms113:8 Kuti amkhalitse pamodzi ndi akulu
Psalms113:9 Asungitsa nyumba mkazi wosaona mwana
Psalms114:1 M'mene Israele anatuluka ku Ejipito
Psalms114:2 Yuda anakhala malo ake oyera
Psalms114:3 Nyanjayo inaona
Psalms114:4 Mapiri anatumphatumpha ngati nkhosa zamphongo
Psalms114:5 Unathawanji nawe
Psalms114:6 Munatumphatumphiranji ngati nkhosa zamphongo
Psalms114:7 Unjenjemere
Psalms114:8 amene anasanduliza thanthwe likhale thawale lamadzi
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ai
Psalms115:2 Aneneranji amitundu
Psalms115:3 Koma Mulungu wathu ndiye ali m'mwamba; achita chilichonse chimkonda.
Psalms115:4 Mafano ao ndiwo a siliva ndi golide
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo
Psalms115:6 makutu ali nao
Psalms115:7 manja ali nao
Psalms115:8 Adzafanana nao iwo akuwapanga; ndi onse akuwakhulupirira.
Psalms115:9 Israele
Psalms115:10 Nyumba ya Aroni
Psalms115:11 Inu akuopa Yehova
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukira; adzatidalitsa: adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israele; adzadalitsa nyumba ya Aroni.
Psalms115:13 Adzadalitsa iwo akuopa Yehova
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuonjezereni dalitso
Psalms115:15 Odalitsika inu a kwa Yehova
Psalms115:16 Kunena za kumwamba
Psalms115:17 Akufa salemekeza Yehova
Psalms115:18 Koma ife tidzalemekeza Yehova kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi yonse. Aleluya.
Psalms116:1 Ndimkonda
Psalms116:2 Popeza amanditcherera khutu lake
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinaitana dzina la Yehova; ndikuti
Psalms116:5 Yehova ngwa chifundo ndi wolungama; ndi Mulungu wathu ngwa nsoni.
Psalms116:6 Yehova asunga opusa; ndidafooka ine
Psalms116:7 Ubwere moyo wanga ku mpumulo wako; pakuti Yehova anakuchitira chokoma.
Psalms116:8 Pakuti munalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa
Psalms116:9 Ndidzayenda pamaso pa Yehova m'dziko la amoyo.
Psalms116:10 Ndinakhulupirira
Psalms116:11 Pofulumizidwa mtima ndinati ine
Psalms116:12 Ndidzabwezera Yehova chiyani chifukwa cha zokoma zake zonse anandichitira?
Psalms116:13 Ndidzanyamula chikho cha chipulumutso
Psalms116:14 Ndidzachita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya okondedwa ake nja mtengo wake pamaso pa Yehova.
Psalms116:16 Ndiloleni
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka kwa Inu nsembe yachiyamiko
Psalms116:18 Ndidzachita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova
Psalms116:19 M'mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova
Psalms117:1 Lemekezani Yehova
Psalms117:2 Pakuti chifundo chake cha pa ife ndi chachikulu; ndi choonadi cha Yehova nchosatha. Aleluya.
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms118:2 Anene tsono Israele
Psalms118:3 Anene tsono nyumba ya Aroni
Psalms118:4 Anene tsono iwo akuopa Yehova
Psalms118:5 M'mene ndinasautsika ndinaitanira pa Yehova; anandiyankha nandiika motakasuka Yehova.
Psalms118:6 Yehova ndi wanga; sindidzaopa; adzandichitanji munthu?
Psalms118:7 Yehova ndi wanga
Psalms118:8 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma koposa kukhulupirira munthu.
Psalms118:9 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma koposa kukhulupirira akulu.
Psalms118:10 Amitundu onse adandizinga
Psalms118:11 Adandizinga
Psalms118:12 Adandizinga ngati njuchi; anazima ngati moto waminga; indedi
Psalms118:13 Kundikankha anandikankha ndikadagwa; koma Yehova anandithandiza.
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; ndipo anakhala chipulumutso changa.
Psalms118:15 M'mahema a olungama muli liu lakufuula mokondwera Dzanja lamanja la Yehova ndi la chipulumutso:
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova likwezeka
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo
Psalms118:18 Kulanga anandilangadi Yehova: koma sanandipereke kuimfa ai.
Psalms118:19 Nditsegulireni zipata za chilungamo; ndidzalowamo
Psalms118:20 Chipata cha Yehova ndi ichi; olungama adzalowamo.
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene omangawo anaukana wakhala mutu wa pangodya.
Psalms118:23 Ichi chidzera kwa Yehova; nchodabwitsa ichi pamaso pathu.
Psalms118:24 Tsiku ili ndilo adaliika Yehova; tidzasekera ndi kukondwera m'mwemo.
Psalms118:25 Tikupemphani
Psalms118:26 Wodala wakudzayo m'dzina la Yehova; takudalitsani kochokera m'nyumba ya Yehova.
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndiye Mulungu
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova
Psalms119:1 Odala angwiro m'mayendedwe ao
Psalms119:2 Odala iwo akusunga mboni zake
Psalms119:3 inde
Psalms119:4 Inu munatilamulira
Psalms119:5 Ha? Mwenzi zitakhazikika njira zanga kuti ndisamalire malemba anu.
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo sindidzachita manyazi
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakuyamikani ndi mtima woongoka
Psalms119:8 Ndidzasamalira malemba anu: Musandisiye ndithu.
Psalms119:9 Mnyamata adzayeretsa mayendedwe ake bwanji? Akawasamalira monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:10 Ndinakufunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndisasokere kusiyana nao malamulo anu.
Psalms119:11 Ndinawabisa mau anu mumtima mwanga
Psalms119:12 Inu ndinu wodala Yehova; ndiphunzitseni malemba anu.
Psalms119:13 Ndinafotokozera ndi milomo yanga maweruzo onse a pakamwa panu.
Psalms119:14 Ndinakondwera m'njira ya mboni zanu
Psalms119:15 Ndidzalingirira pa malangizo anu
Psalms119:16 Ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malemba anu; sindidzaiwala mau anu.
Psalms119:17 Muchitire chokoma mtumiki wanu kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; ndipo ndidzasamalira mau anu.
Psalms119:18 Munditsegulire maso
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; musandibisire malamulo anu.
Psalms119:20 Mtima wanga wasweka ndi kukhumba maweruzo anu nyengo zonse.
Psalms119:21 Munadzudzula odzikuza otembereredwa
Psalms119:22 Mundichotsere chotonza
Psalms119:23 Nduna zomwe zinakhala zondineneza; koma mtumiki wanu analingirira malemba anu.
Psalms119:24 Mboni zanu zomwe ndizo zondikondwetsa
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga umamatika ndi fumbi; mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokozera njira zanga
Psalms119:27 Mundizindikiritse njira ya malangizo anu; kuti ndilingalire zodabwitsa zanu.
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wasungunuka ndi chisoni: Mundilimbitse monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:29 Mundichotsere njira ya chinyengo; nimundipatse mwachifundo chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:30 Ndinasankha njira yokhulupirika; ndinaika maweruzo anu pamaso panga.
Psalms119:31 Ndimamatika nazo mboni zanu; musandichititse manyazi
Psalms119:32 Ndidzathamangira njira ya malamulo anu
Psalms119:33 Mundiphunzitse
Psalms119:34 Mundizindikiritse
Psalms119:35 Mundiyendetse mopita malamulo anu; pakuti ndikondwera m'menemo.
Psalms119:36 Lingitsani mtima wanga kumboni zanu
Psalms119:37 Muchititse mlubza maso anga ndisapenye zachabe
Psalms119:38 Limbitsirani mtumiki wanu mau anu
Psalms119:39 Mundipatutsire chotonza changa ndichiopacho; popeza maweruzo anu ndi okoma.
Psalms119:40 Taonani
Psalms119:41 Ndipo chifundo chanu chindidzere
Psalms119:42 Kuti ndikhale nao mau akuyankha wonditonza; popeza ndikhulupirira mau anu.
Psalms119:43 Ndipo musandichotsere ndithu mau a choonadi pakamwa panga; pakuti ndinayembekeza maweruzo anu.
Psalms119:44 Potero ndidzasamalira malamulo anu chisamalire kunthawi za nthawi.
Psalms119:45 Ndipo ndidzayenda mwaufulu; popeza ndinafuna malangizo anu.
Psalms119:46 Ndidzalankhulanso za umboni wanu pamaso pa mafumu
Psalms119:47 Ndipo ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malamulo anu
Psalms119:48 Ndidzakwezanso manja anga ku malamulo anu
Psalms119:49 Kumbukirani mau a kwa mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:50 Chitonthozo changa m'kuzunzika kwanga ndi ichi; pakuti mau anu anandipatsa moyo.
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza anandinyoza kwambiri: koma sindinapatukanso nacho chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:52 Ndinakumbukira maweruzo anu kuyambira kale
Psalms119:53 Ndinasumwa kwakukulu
Psalms119:54 Malemba anu anakhala nyimbo zanga m'nyumba ya ulendo wanga.
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndinakumbukira dzina lanu
Psalms119:56 Ichi ndinali nacho
Psalms119:57 Yehova ndiye gawo langa: Ndinati ndidzasunga mau anu.
Psalms119:58 Ndinapemba pankhope panu ndi mtima wanga wonse: Mundichitire chifundo monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:59 Ndinaganizira njira zanga
Psalms119:60 Ndinafulumira
Psalms119:61 Anandikulunga nazo zingwe za oipa; koma sindinaiwala chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:62 Pakati pa usiku ndidzauka kukuyamikani chifukwa cha maweruzo anu olungama.
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine wakuyanjana nao onse akukuopani
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi lidzala nacho chifundo chanu
Psalms119:65 Munachitira mtumiki wanu chokoma
Psalms119:66 Mundiphunzitse chisiyanitso ndi nzeru; pakuti ndinakhulupirira malamulo anu.
Psalms119:67 Ndisanazunzidwe ndinasokera; koma tsopano ndisamalira mau anu.
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu wabwino
Psalms119:69 Odzikuza anandipangira bodza: Ndidzasunga malangizo anu ndi mtima wanga wonse.
Psalms119:70 Mtima wao unona ngati mafuta; koma ine ndikondwera nacho chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:71 Kundikomera kuti ndinazunzidwa; kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu.
Psalms119:72 Chilamulo cha pakamwa panu chindikomera koposa golide ndi siliva zikwizikwi.
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga nandiumba; mundizindikiritse
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene akuopani adzandiona ine nadzakondwera; popeza ndayembekezera mau anu.
Psalms119:75 Ndidziwa kuti maweruzo anu ndiwo olungama
Psalms119:76 Chifundo chanu chikhaletu chakunditonthoza
Psalms119:77 Nsoni zokoma zanu zindidzere
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza achite manyazi
Psalms119:79 Iwo akuopa Inu abwere kwa ine
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wangwiro m'malemba anu; kuti ndisachite manyazi.
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga unakomoka ndi kukhumba chipulumutso chanu: Ndinayembekezera mau anu.
Psalms119:82 Maso anga anatha mphamvu ndi kukhumba mau anu
Psalms119:83 Popeza ndakhala ngati thumba lofukirira; koma sindiiwala malemba anu.
Psalms119:84 Masiku a mtumiki wanu ndiwo angati? Mudzaweruza liti iwo akundilondola koipa?
Psalms119:85 Odzikuza anandikumbira mbuna
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ngokhulupirika; andilondola nalo bodza; ndithandizeni.
Psalms119:87 Akadandithera pa dziko lapansi; koma ine sindinasiya malangizo anu.
Psalms119:88 Mundipatse moyo monga mwa chifundo chanu; ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni ya pakamwa panu.
Psalms119:89 Mau anu aikika kumwamba
Psalms119:90 Chikhulupiriko chanu chifikira mibadwomibadwo; munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi
Psalms119:91 Kunena za maweruzo anu alimbikira kufikira lero; pakuti onsewa ndiwo atumiki anu.
Psalms119:92 Chilamulo chanu chikadapanda kukhala chikondweretso changa
Psalms119:93 Sindidzaiwala malangizo anu nthawi zonse; popeza munandipatsa nao moyo.
Psalms119:94 Ine ndine wanu
Psalms119:95 Oipa anandilalira kundiononga; koma ndizindikira mboni zanu.
Psalms119:96 Ndinapenya malekezero ake a ungwiro wonse; koma lamulo lanu ndi lotakasuka ndithu.
Psalms119:97 Ha! Ndikondadi chilamulo chanu; ndilingiriramo ine tsiku lonse.
Psalms119:98 Malamulo anu andipatsa nzeru yakuposa adani anga; pakuti akhala nane chikhalire.
Psalms119:99 Ndili nayo nzeru yakuposa aphunzitsi anga onse; pakuti ndilingalira mboni zanu.
Psalms119:100 Ndizindikira koposa okalamba popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu.
Psalms119:101 Ndinaletsa mapazi anga njira iliyonse yaoipa
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatukana nao maweruzo anu; pakuti Inu munandiphunzitsa.
Psalms119:103 Mau anu azunadi powalawa ine! Koposa uchi m'kamwa mwanga.
Psalms119:104 Malangizo anu andizindikiritsa; chifukwa chake ndidana nao mayendedwe onse achinyengo.
Psalms119:105 Mau anu ndiwo nyali ya ku mapazi anga
Psalms119:106 Ndinalumbira
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri: Ndipatseni moyo
Psalms119:108 Landirani
Psalms119:109 Moyo wanga ukhala m'dzanja langa chikhalire; koma sindiiwala chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:110 Oipa ananditchera msampha; koma sindinasokera m'malangizo anu.
Psalms119:111 Ndinalandira mboni zanu zikhale cholandira chosatha; pakuti ndizo zokondweretsa mtima wanga.
Psalms119:112 Ndinalingitsa mtima wanga uchite malemba anu
Psalms119:113 Ndidana nao a mitima iwiri; koma ndikonda chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pobisalapo panga
Psalms119:115 Mundichokere ochita zoipa inu; kuti ndisunge malamulo a Mulungu wanga.
Psalms119:116 Mundichirikize monga mwa mau anu
Psalms119:117 Mundigwirizize ndipo ndidzapulumutsidwa
Psalms119:118 Mupepula onse akusokera m'malemba anu; popeza chinyengo chao ndi bodza.
Psalms119:119 Muchotsa oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi ngati mphala: Chifukwa chake ndikonda mboni zanu.
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa linjenjemera ndi kuopa Inu; ndipo ndichita mantha nao maweruzo anu.
Psalms119:121 Ndinachita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo; musandisiyira akundisautsa.
Psalms119:122 Mumkhalire chikole mtumiki wanu chimkomere; odzikuza asandisautse.
Psalms119:123 Maso anga anatha mphamvu pofuna chipulumutso chanu
Psalms119:124 Muchitire mtumiki wanu monga mwa chifundo chanu
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:126 Yafika nyengo yakuti Yehova achite kanthu; pakuti anaswa chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:127 Chifukwa chake ndikonda malamulo anu koposa golide
Psalms119:128 Chifukwa chake ndiyesa ngolunjika malangizo anu onse akunena zonse; koma ndidana nazo njira zonse zonyenga.
Psalms119:129 Mboni zanu nzodabwitsa; chifukwa chake moyo wanga uzisunga.
Psalms119:130 Potsegulira mau anu paunikira; kuzindikiritsa opusa.
Psalms119:131 Ndinatsegula pakamwa panga
Psalms119:132 Munditembenukire
Psalms119:133 Khazikitsani mapazi anga m'mau anu; ndipo zisandigonjetse zopanda pake zilizonse.
Psalms119:134 Mundiombole kunsautso ya munthu: Ndipo ndidzasamalira malangizo anu.
Psalms119:135 Muwalitse nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu; ndipo mundiphunzitse malemba anu.
Psalms119:136 Maso anga atsitsa mitsinje ya madzi
Psalms119:137 Inu ndinu wolungama
Psalms119:138 Mboni zanuzo mudazilamulira zili zolungama ndi zokhulupirika ndithu.
Psalms119:139 Changu changa chinandithera
Psalms119:140 Mau anu ngoyera ndithu; ndi mtumiki wanu awakonda.
Psalms119:141 Wamng'ono ine
Psalms119:142 Chilungamo chanu ndicho chilungamo chosatha; ndi chilamulo chanu ndicho choonadi.
Psalms119:143 Kusautsika ndi kupsinjika kwandigwera; koma malamulo anu ndiwo ondikondweretsa ine.
Psalms119:144 Mboni zanu ndizo zolungama kosatha; mundizindikiritse izi
Psalms119:145 Ndinaitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundiyankhe
Psalms119:146 Ndinaitanira Inu; ndipulumutseni
Psalms119:147 Ndinafuula kusanake: ndinayembekezera mau anu.
Psalms119:148 Maso anga anakumana ndi maulonda a usiku
Psalms119:149 Imvani liu langa monga mwa chifundo chanu; mundipatse moyo monga mwa kuweruza kwanu
Psalms119:150 Otsata zachiwembu andiyandikira; akhala kutali ndi chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:151 Inu muli pafupi
Psalms119:152 Kuyambira kale ndinadziwa mu mboni zanu
Psalms119:153 Penyani kuzunzika kwanga
Psalms119:154 Mundinenere mlandu wanga
Psalms119:155 Chipulumutso chitalikira oipa; popeza safuna malemba anu.
Psalms119:156 Zachifundo zanu ndi zazikulu
Psalms119:157 Ondilondola ndi ondisautsa ndiwo ambiri; koma sindinapatukana nazo mboni zanu.
Psalms119:158 Ndinapenya ochita monyenga
Psalms119:159 Penyani kuti ndikonda malangizo anu; mundipatse moyo
Psalms119:160 Chiwerengero cha mau anu ndicho choonadi; ndi maweruzo anu olungama onse akhala kosatha.
Psalms119:161 Nduna zinandilondola kopanda chifukwa; koma mtima wanga uchita mantha nao mau anu.
Psalms119:162 Ndikondwera nao mau anu
Psalms119:163 Ndidana nalo bodza ndi kunyansidwa nalo; koma ndikonda chilamulo chanu.
Psalms119:164 Ndikulemekezani kasanu ndi kawiri
Psalms119:165 Akukonda chilamulo chanu ali nao mtendere wambiri; ndipo alibe chokhumudwitsa.
Psalms119:166 Ndinayembekeza chipulumutso chanu
Psalms119:167 Moyo wanga unasamalira mboni zanu; ndipo ndizikonda kwambiri.
Psalms119:168 Ndinasamalira malangizo anu ndi mboni zanu; popeza njira zanga zonse zili pamaso panu.
Psalms119:169 Kufuula kwanga kuyandikire pamaso panu
Psalms119:170 Kupemba kwanga kudze pamaso panu; mundilanditse monga mwa mau anu.
Psalms119:171 Milomo yanga itulutse chilemekezo; popeza mundiphunzitsa malemba anu.
Psalms119:172 Lilime langa liimbire mau anu; pakuti malamulo anu onse ndiwo olungama.
Psalms119:173 Dzanja lanu likhale lakundithandiza; popeza ndinasankha malangizo anu.

Psalms119:175 Mzimu wanga ukhale ndi moyo

Psalms136:5 Amene analenga zakumwamba mwanzeru; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:6 Amene anayala dziko lapansi pamwamba pa madzi; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:7 Amene analenga miuni yaikulu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:8 Dzuwa liweruze usana; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:9 Mwezi ndi nyenyezi ziweruze usiku; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:10 Iye amene anapandira Aejipito ana ao oyamba; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.

Psalms136:12 Ndi dzanja lamphamvu

Psalms136:14 Napititsa Israele pakati pake; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.
Psalms136:15 Nakhuthula Farao ndi khamu lake m'Nyanja Yofiira: pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.

Psalms136:17 Amene anapanda mafumu akulu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha.

Psalms144:15 Odala anthu akuona zotere; odala anthu amene Mulungu wao ndi Yehova.
Psalms145:1 Salimo lolemekeza; la Davide. Ndidzakukwezani Mulungu wanga
Psalms145:2 Masiku onse ndidzakuyamikani; ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu kunthawi za nthawi.
Psalms145:3 Yehova ndi wamkulu
Psalms145:4 Mbadwo wina udzalemekezera ntchito zanu mbadwo unzake
Psalms145:5 Ndidzalingalira ulemerero waukulu wa ulemu wanu
Psalms145:6 Ndipo adzanenera mphamvu za ntchito zanu zoopsa; ndi ukulu wanu ndidzaufotokozera.
Psalms145:7 Adzabukitsa chikumbukiro cha ubwino wanu waukulu
Psalms145:8 Yehova ndiye wachisomo
Psalms145:9 Yehova achitira chokoma onse; ndi nsoni zokoma zake zigwera ntchito zake zonse.
Psalms145:10 Ntchito zanu zonse zidzakuyamikani
Psalms145:11 Adzanenera ulemerero wa ufumu wanu
Psalms145:12 Kudziwitsa ana a anthu zamphamvu zake
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ndiwo ufumu womka muyaya
Psalms145:14 Yehova agwiriziza onse akugwa
Psalms145:15 Maso a onse ayembekeza Inu; ndipo muwapatsa chakudya chao m'nyengo zao.
Psalms145:16 Muolowetsa dzanja lanu
Psalms145:17 Yehova ali wolungama m'njira zake zonse
Psalms145:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi onse akuitanira kwa Iye
Psalms145:19 Adzachita chokhumba iwo akumuopa; nadzamva kufuula kwao
Psalms145:20 Yehova asunga onse akukondana naye; koma oipa onse adzawaononga.
Psalms145:21 Pakamwa panga padzanena chilemekezo cha Yehova; ndi zinthu zonse zilemekeze dzina lake loyera kunthawi za nthawi.
Psalms146:1 Aleluya; Ulemekeze Yehova
Psalms146:2 Ndidzalemekeza Yehova m'moyo mwanga; ndidzaimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wanga pokhala ndi moyo ine.
Psalms146:3 Musamakhulupirira zinduna
Psalms146:4 Mpweya wake uchoka
Psalms146:5 Wodala munthu amene akhala naye Mulungu wa Yakobo kuti amthandize
Psalms146:6 Amene analenga zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Psalms146:7 ndiye wakuchitira chiweruzo osautsika; ndiye wakupatsa anjala chakudya; Yehova amasula akaidi.
Psalms146:8 Yehova apenyetsa osaona; Yehova aongoletsa onse owerama; Yehova akonda olungama.
Psalms146:9 Yehova asunga alendo; agwiriziza mwana wamasiye ndi mkazi wamasiye; koma akhotetsa njira ya oipa.
Psalms146:10 Yehova adzachita ufumu kosatha
Psalms147:1 Aleluya; Pakuti kuimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wathu nkokoma; pakuti chikondwetsa ichi
Psalms147:2 Yehova amanga Yerusalemu; asokolotsa otayika a Israele.
Psalms147:3 Achiritsa osweka mtima
Psalms147:4 Awerenga nyenyezi momwe zili; azitcha maina zonsezi.
Psalms147:5 Ambuye wathu ndi wamkulu ndi wa mphamvu zambiri; nzeru yake njosatha.
Psalms147:6 Yehova agwiriziza ofatsa; atsitsira oipa pansi.
Psalms147:7 Yamikani Yehova ndi kuthira mang'ombe; muimbireni Mulungu wathu zomlemekeza pazeze:
Psalms147:8 Amene aphimba thambo ndi mitambo
Psalms147:9 Amene apatsa zoweta chakudya chao
Psalms147:10 Mphamvu ya kavalo siimkonda: Sakondwera nayo miyendo ya munthu.
Psalms147:11 Yehova akondwera nao akumuopa Iye
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu
Psalms147:13 Popeza analimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zitseko zanu: Anadalitsa ana anu m'kati mwanu.
Psalms147:14 Ndiye amene akhalitsa malire anu mumtendere; akukhutitsani ndi tirigu wakucha bwino.
Psalms147:15 Atumiza lamulo lake kudziko lapansi; mau ake athamanga liwiro.
Psalms147:16 Apatsa chipale chofewa ngati ubweya; awaza chisanu ngati phulusa.
Psalms147:17 Aponya matalala ake ngati zidutsu: Adzaima ndani pa kuzizira kwake?
Psalms147:18 Atumiza mau ake nazisungunula; aombetsa mphepo yake
Psalms147:19 Aonetsa mau ake kwa Yakobo; malemba ake
Psalms147:20 Sanatero nao anthu a mtundu wina; ndipo za maweruzo ake
Psalms148:1 Aleluya. Lemekezani Yehova kochokera kumwamba; mlemekezeni m'misanje.

Psalms148:3 Mlemekezeni
Psalms148:4 Mlemekezeni
Psalms148:5 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; popeza analamulira
Psalms148:6 Anazikhazikanso kunthawi za nthawi; anazipatsa chilamulo chosatumphika.
Psalms148:7 Lemekezani Yehova kochokera ku dziko lapansi
Psalms148:8 moto ndi matalala
Psalms148:9 mapiri ndi zitunda zonse; mitengo yazipatso ndi yamikungudza yonse:
Psalms148:10 Nyama za kuthengo ndi zoweta zonse; zokwawa
Psalms148:11 Mafumu a padziko ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu; zinduna ndi oweruza onse a padziko.
Psalms148:12 Anyamata ndiponso anamwali; okalamba pamodzi ndi ana.
Psalms148:13 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; pakuti dzina lake lokha ndi lokwezeka; ulemerero wake uli pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi thambo.
Psalms148:14 Ndipo anakweza nyanga ya anthu ake
Psalms149:1 Aleluya
Psalms149:2 Akondwere Israele mwa Iye amene anamlenga; ana a Ziyoni asekere mwa mfumu yao.
Psalms149:3 Alemekeze dzina lake ndi kuthira mang'ombe; amuimbire zomlemekeza ndi lingaka ndi zeze.
Psalms149:4 Popeza Yehova akondwera nao anthu ake; adzakometsa ofatsa ndi chipulumutso.
Psalms149:5 Okondedwa ake atumphe mokondwera m'ulemu: Afuule mokondwera pamakama pao.
Psalms149:6 Nyimbo zakukweza Mulungu zikhale pakamwa pao
Psalms149:7 kubwezera chilango akunja
Psalms149:8 kumanga mafumu ao ndi maunyolo
Psalms149:9 kuwachitira chiweruzo cholembedwacho. Ulemu wa okondedwa ake onse ndi uwu. Aleluya.
Psalms150:1 Aleluya. Lemekezani Mulungu m'malo ake oyera; mlemekezeni m'thambo la mphamvu yake.
Psalms150:2 Mlemekezeni chifukwa cha ntchito zake zolimba; mlemekezeni monga mwa ukulu wake waunjinji.
Psalms150:3 Mlemekezeni ndi kulira kwa lipenga; mlemekezeni ndi chisakasa ndi zeze.
Psalms150:4 Mlemekezeni ndi lingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe: Mlemekezeni ndi zoimbira za zingwe ndi chitoliro.
Psalms150:5 Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zomveka: Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zoliritsa.
Psalms150:6 Zonse zakupuma zilemekeze Yehova. Aleluya.

Proverbs10:1 Miyambo ya Solomoni: Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate; koma mwana wopusa amvetsa amake chisoni.
Proverbs10:2 Chuma cha uchimo sichithangata; koma chilungamo chipulumutsa kuimfa.
Proverbs10:3 Yehova samvetsa njala moyo wa wolungama; koma amainga chifuniro cha wochimwa.
Proverbs10:4 Wochita ndi dzanja laulesi amasauka; koma dzanja la akhama lilemeretsa.
Proverbs10:5 Wokolola m'malimwe ndi mwana wanzeru; koma wogona pakutula ndi mwana wochititsa manyazi.
Proverbs10:6 Madalitso ali pamtu pa wolungama; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa chiwawa.
Proverbs10:7 Amayesa wolungama wodala pomkumbukira; koma dzina la oipa lidzavunda.
Proverbs10:8 Mwini mtima wanzeru amalandira malamulo; koma chitsiru cholongolola chidzagwa.
Proverbs10:9 Woyenda moongoka amayenda osatekeseka; koma wokhotetsa njira zake adzadziwika.
Proverbs10:10 Wotsinzinira achititsa chisoni; koma wodzudzula momveka achita mtendere.
Proverbs10:11 M'kamwa mwa wolungama ndi kasupe wa moyo; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa chiwawa.
Proverbs10:12 Udani upikisanitsa; koma chikondi chikwirira zolakwa zonse.
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru ipezedwa m'milomo ya wozindikira; koma wopusa pamsana pake nthyole.
Proverbs10:14 Anzeru akundika zomwe adziwa; koma m'kamwa mwa chitsiru muononga tsopano lino.

Proverbs10:16 Ntchito za wolungama zipatsa moyo; koma phindu la oipa lichimwitsa.
Proverbs10:17 Wosunga mwambo ali m'njira ya moyo; koma wosiya chidzudzulo asochera.
Proverbs10:18 Wobisa udani ali ndi milomo yonama; wonena ugogodi ndiye chitsiru.
Proverbs10:19 Pochuluka mau zolakwa sizisoweka; koma wokhala chete achita mwanzeru.
Proverbs10:20 Lilime la wolungama likunga siliva wosankhika; koma mtima wa oipa uli wachabe.
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya wolungama imadyetsa ambiri; koma zitsiru zimafa posowa nzeru.

Proverbs16:2 Njira zonse za munthu ziyera pamaso pake; koma Yehova ayesa mizimu.
Proverbs16:3 Pereka zochita zako kwa Yehova
Proverbs16:4 Zonse Yehova anazipanga zili ndi zifukwa zao; ngakhale amphulupulu kuti aone tsiku loipa.
Proverbs16:5 Yense wonyada mtima anyansa Yehova; zoonadi sadzapulumuka chilango.
Proverbs16:6 Mphulupulu iomboledwa ndi chifundo ndi ntheradi; apatuka pa zoipa poopa Yehova.
Proverbs16:7 Njira za munthu zikakonda Yehova ayanjanitsana naye ngakhale adani ake.
Proverbs16:8 Zapang'ono
Proverbs16:9 Mtima wa munthu ulingalira njira yake; koma Yehova ayendetsa mapazi ake.
Proverbs16:10 Mau a mlauli ali m'milomo ya mfumu; m'kamwa mwake simudzachita chetera poweruza.
Proverbs16:11 Mwini muyeso ndi mulingo wolungama ndiye Yehova; ndiyenso anapanga miyala yonse yoyesera ya m'thumba.
Proverbs16:12 Kuchita mphulupulu kunyansa mafumu; pakuti mpando wao wakhazikika ndi chilungamo.
Proverbs16:13 Milomo yolungama ikondweretsa mafumu; wonena zoongoka amkonda.
Proverbs16:14 Mkwiyo wa mfumu ndi mithenga ya imfa; wanzeru adzaukhulula.
Proverbs16:15 M'kuunika kwa nkhope ya mfumu muli moyo; kukoma mtima kwake kunga mtambo wa mvula ya masika.
Proverbs16:16 Kodi kulandira nzeru sikupambana ndi golide

Proverbs24:34 ndipo umphawi wako udzafika ngati mbala; ndi kusauka kwako ngati munthu wachikopa.

Ecclesiastes1:2 Zachabechabe
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kodi ntchito zake zonse munthu asauka nazo zimpindulira chiyani?

Ecclesiastes1:5 Inde dzuwa lituluka
Ecclesiastes1:6 Kulowa kumwera ndi kuzungulira kumpoto zungulirezungulire imaomba mphepo; ibweranso monga mwa mazunguliridwe ake.
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mitsinje yonse ithira m'nyanja
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zinthu zonse zilemetsa; munthu sakhoza kuzifotokoza; maso sakhuta m'kuona
Ecclesiastes1:9 Chomwe chinaoneka chidzaonekanso; ndi chomwe chinachitidwa chidzachitidwanso; ndipo palibe kanthu katsopano pansi pano.
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kodi pali kanthu unganene kuti
Ecclesiastes1:11 Zoyamba zija sizikumbukiridwa; ngakhale zomwe zilinkudzazo
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine Mlaliki ndinali mfumu ya Israele m'Yerusalemu.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kufunafuna ndi nzeru

Ecclesiastes1:15 Chokhotakhota sichingaongokenso; ndipo choperewera sichingawerengedwe.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndinalankhula ndi mtima wanga
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kudziwa nzeru ndi kudziwa misala ndi utsiru; ndinazindikira kuti ichinso chingosautsa mtima.
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pakuti m'nzeru yambiri muli chisoni chambiri; ndi yemwe aenjezera chidziwitso aenjezera zowawa.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndinati mumtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndinati
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndinafuna mumtima mwanga kusangalatsa thupi langa ndi vinyo
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndinadzipangira zazikulu; ndinadzimangira nyumba; ndi kuoka mipesa;
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndinakonza mphanje ndi minda yanga
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndinadzipangira ndekha matamanda a madzi akuthirira madzi m'nkhalango momeramo mitengo;
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndinadzitengera akapolo ndi adzakazi
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndinakundikanso siliva ndi golide ndi chuma cha mafumu ndi madera a dziko; ndinaitanitsa amuna ndi akazi akuimba ndi zokondweretsazo za ana a anthu
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndinakula chikulire kupambana onse anali m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine; ndipo nzeru yanganso inakhala nanebe.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ndipo chilichonse maso anga anachifuna sindinawamana; sindinakaniza mtima wanga chimwemwe chilichonse pakuti mtima wanga unakondwera ndi ntchito zanga zonse; gawo langa la m'ntchito zanga zonse ndi limeneli.
Ecclesiastes2:11 Pamenepo ndinayang'ana zonse manja anga anazipanga
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndipo ndinatembenuka kukayang'ana nzeru ndi misala ndi utsiru; pakuti yemwe angotsata mfumu angachite chiyani? Si chomwe chinachitidwa kale.
Ecclesiastes2:13 Pamenepo ndinazindikira kuti nzeru ipambana utsiru kwambiri
Ecclesiastes2:14 Wanzeru maso ake ali m'mutu wake
Ecclesiastes2:15 Pamenepo ndinati mumtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pakuti wanzeru saposa chitsiru kukumbukidwa nthawi zonse; pakuti zonse zooneka kale zidzaiwalika m'tsogolomo. Ndipo wanzeru amwalira bwanji ngati chitsirutu.
Ecclesiastes2:17 Chifukwa chake ndinada moyo; pakuti ntchito azipanga kunja kuno zindisautsa; pakuti zonse ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndipo ndinada ntchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo kunja kuno; pakuti ndidzamsiyira izo munthu wina amene adzanditsata.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndipo ndani adziwa ngati adzakhala wanzeru pena chitsiru? Koma adzalamulira ntchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndipo ndinatembenuka ndi kukhululuka za ntchito zanga zonse ndasauka nazo kunja kuno.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pakuti pali munthu wina agwira ntchito mwanzeru ndi modziwa nadzipinduliramo; koma adzapereka gawo lake kwa munthu amene sanagwirepo ntchito. Ichinso ndi chabe ndi choipa chachikulu.
Ecclesiastes2:22 Pakuti munthu ali ndi chiyani m'ntchito zake zonse
Ecclesiastes2:23 Pakuti masiku ake onse ndi zisoni
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kodi si chabwino kuti munthu adye namwe
Ecclesiastes2:25 Pakuti ndani angadye ndi kufulumirako
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pakuti yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino ampatsa nzeru ndi chidziwitso ndi chimwemwe; koma wochimwa amlawitsa vuto la kusonkhanitsa ndi kukundika
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kanthu kalikonse kali ndi nthawi yake ndi chofuna chilichonse cha pansi pa thambo chili ndi mphindi yake;
Ecclesiastes3:2 mphindi yakubadwa ndi mphindi yakumwalira; mphindi yakubzala ndi mphindi yakuzula zobzalazo;
Ecclesiastes3:3 mphindi yakupha ndi mphindi yakuchiza; mphindi yakupasula ndi mphindi yakumanga;
Ecclesiastes3:4 mphindi yakugwa misozi ndi mphindi yakuseka; mphindi yakulira ndi mphindi yakuvina;
Ecclesiastes3:5 mphindi yakutaya miyala ndi mphindi yakukundika miyala; mphindi yakufungatirana ndi mphindi yakuleka kufungatirana;
Ecclesiastes3:6 mphindi yakufunafuna ndi mphindi yakumwazika; mphindi yakusunga ndi mphindi yakutaya;
Ecclesiastes3:7 mphindi yakung'amba ndi mphindi yakusoka; mphindi yakutonthola ndi mphindi yakulankhula;
Ecclesiastes3:8 mphindi yakukonda ndi mphindi yakudana; mphindi ya nkhondo ndi mphindi ya mtendere.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Wogwira Ntchito aona phindu lanji m'chomsautsacho?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndaona vuto limene Mulungu wapatsa ana a anthu kuti avutidwe nalo.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Chinthu chilichonse anachikongoletsa pa mphindi yake; ndipo waika zamuyaya m'mitima yao ndipo palibe munthu angalondetse ntchito Mulungu wazipanga chiyambire mpaka chitsiriziro.
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndidziwa kuti iwo alibe ubwino
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ndiponso kuti munthu yense adye namwe naone zabwino m'ntchito zake zonse; ndiwo mtulo wa Mulungu.

Ecclesiastes3:20 Onse apita kumalo amodzi; onse achokera m'fumbi ndi onse abweranso kufumbi.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndani adziwa mzimu wa ana a anthu wokwera kumwamba
Ecclesiastes3:22 M'mwemo ndinazindikira kuti kulibe kanthu kabwino kopambana aka

Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yabwino iposa zonunkhira zabwino; ndi tsiku lakumwalira liposa tsiku lakubadwa.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kunka kunyumba ya maliro kupambana kunka kunyumba ya madyerero; pakuti kujako ndi matsiriziro a anthu onse; ndipo omwe ali ndi moyo adzakumbukirapo.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Chisoni chiposa kuseka; pakuti nkhope yakugwa ikonza mtima.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa anzeru uli m'nyumba ya maliro; koma mtima wa zitsiru uli m'nyumba ya kuseka.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kumva chidzudzulo cha anzeru kupambana kumva nyimbo ya zitsiru.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pakuti kuseka kwa chitsiru kunga minga ilikuthetheka pansi pa mphika; ichinso ndi chabe.

Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndani akunga wanzeru? Ndani adziwa tanthauzo la mau? Nzeru ya munthu iwalitsa nkhope yake
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nditi
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakangaze kumchokera; usaumirire kanthu koipa; pakuti iyeyo amachita chomwe chimkonda.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Pakuti mau a mfumu ali ndi mphamvu; ndipo ndani anganene kwa iye
Ecclesiastes8:5 Wosunga chilamulo sadzadziwa kanthu koipa; ndipo mtima wa munthu wanzeru udziwa nyengo ndi maweruzo;
Ecclesiastes8:6 pakuti kanthu kalikonse kali ndi nthawi yake ndi chiweruzo chake; popeza zoipa za munthu zimchulukira;
Ecclesiastes8:7 pakuti sadziwa chimene chidzakhala; pakuti ndani angamuuze nthawi yakuti chidzachitidwa?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kulibe munthu ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira mzimu ndi yakutsekereza mzimu; ngakhale mphamvu tsiku la imfa; munkhondo umo mulibe kumasuka; udyo sudzapulumutsa akuzolowerana nao.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zonsezi ndaziona ndi kuyang'anitsa mtima wanga ntchito zonse zichitidwa pansi pano; nthawi yakuti wina apweteka mnzake pomlamulira.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ndipo ndinaona oipa alikuikidwa m'manda ndi kupita; ndipo omwe anachita zolungama anachokera kumalo opatulika akumudzi nawaiwala; ichinso ndi chabe.

Ecclesiastes9:1 Pakuti zonsezi ndinazisunga mumtima ndikalondoletu zonsezi; kuti olungama ndi anzeru ndi ntchito zao ali m'manja a Mulungu; ngakhale kukonda ngakhale kudana anthu sadziwa; zonse zili m'tsogolo mwao.
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zonse zigwera onse chimodzimodzi; kanthu kamodzi kangogwera wolungama ndi woipa; ngakhale wabwino ndi woyera ndi wodetsedwa; ngakhale wopereka nsembe ndi wosapereka konse; wabwino alingana ndi wochimwa; wolumbira ndi woopa lumbira.
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ichi ndi choipa m'zonse zichitidwa pansi pano

SongOfSongs8:9 Ngati ndiye khoma
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndine khoma

SongOfSongs8:13 Namwaliwe wokhala m'minda

Isaiah1:1 Masomphenya a Yesaya mwana wa Amozi
Isaiah1:2 Imvani
Isaiah1:3 Ng'ombe idziwa mwini wake
Isaiah1:4 Mtundu wochimwa inu
Isaiah1:5 Nanga bwanji mukali chimenyedwere kuti inu mulikupandukirabe? Mutu wonse ulikudwala
Isaiah1:6 Kuchokera pansi pa phazi kufikira kumutu m'menemo mulibe changwiro; koma mabala
Isaiah1:7 Dziko lanu lili bwinja; midzi yanu yatenthedwa ndi moto; dziko lanu alendo alimkudya pamaso panu; ndipo lili labwinja monga lagubuduzidwa ndi alendo.
Isaiah1:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wasiyidwa ngati chitando cha m'munda wamphesa
Isaiah1:9 Akadapanda Yehova wa makamu kutisiyira otsala ang'onong'ono ndithu
Isaiah1:10 Imvani mau a Yehova inu olamulira a Sodomu
Isaiah1:11 Nditani nazo nsembe zanu zochulukazo? Ati Yehova; ndakhuta nazo nsembe zopsereza za nkhosa zamphongo ndi mafuta a nyama zonenepa; sindisekera ndi mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo
Isaiah1:12 Pakudzaonekera inu pamaso pa Ine
Isaiah1:13 Musadze nazonso
Isaiah1:14 Masiku anu okhala mwezi ndi nthawi ya zikondwerero zanu mtima wanga uzida; zindivuta Ine; ndalema ndi kupirira nazo.
Isaiah1:15 Ndipo pamene mutambasula manja anu
Isaiah1:16 Sambani
Isaiah1:17 phunzirani kuchita zabwino; funani chiweruzo; thandizani osautsidwa
Isaiah1:18 Tiyeni
Isaiah1:19 Ngati inu muli ofuna ndi omvera
Isaiah1:20 koma ngati mukana ndi kupanduka
Isaiah1:21 Mudzi wokhulupirika wasanduka wadama! Wodzala chiweruzowo! Chilungamo chinakhalamo koma tsopano ambanda.
Isaiah1:22 Siliva wako wasanduka mphala
Isaiah1:23 Akulu ako apanduka
Isaiah1:24 Chifukwa chake Yehova ati
Isaiah1:25 ndipo ndidzaikanso dzanja langa pa iwe
Isaiah1:26 ndidzabweza oweruza ako monga poyamba
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni adzaomboledwa ndi chiweruzo
Isaiah1:28 Koma kupasula kwa olakwa ndi kwa ochimwa kudzakhala kumodzi
Isaiah1:29 Chifukwa adzakhala ndi manyazi
Isaiah1:30 Chifukwa mudzakhala ngati mtengo wathundu
Isaiah1:31 Ndimo wamphamvu adzakhala ngati chingwe chathonje
Isaiah2:1 Mau amene Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anaona
Isaiah2:2 Ndipo padzakhala masiku otsiriza
Isaiah2:3 Ndipo anthu ambiri adzanka
Isaiah2:4 Iye adzaweruza pakati pa akunja
Isaiah2:5 Inu a nyumba ya Yakobo
Isaiah2:6 Chifukwa inu mwasiya anthu anu a nyumba ya Yakobo
Isaiah2:7 Dziko lao ladzala siliva ndi golide

Isaiah2:9 Munthu wachabe agwada pansi
Isaiah2:10 Lowa m'phanga
Isaiah2:11 Maso a munthu akuyang'anira kumwamba adzatsitsidwa

Isaiah2:13 ndi pa mitengo yonse yamkungudza ya Lebanoni
Isaiah2:14 ndi pa mapiri onse atali
Isaiah2:15 ndi pa nsanja zazitali zonse
Isaiah2:16 ndi pa ngalawa zonse za Tarisisi

Isaiah2:22 Siyani munthu

Isaiah5:1 Ndiimbire wokondedwa wanga nyimbo ya wokondedwa wanga ya munda wake wamphesa. Wokondedwa wanga anali ndi munda wamphesa m'chitunda cha zipatso zambiri;
Isaiah5:2 ndipo iye anakumba mcherenje kuzungulira kwete
Isaiah5:3 Ndipo tsopano
Isaiah5:4 Ndikanachitanso chiyani ndi munda wanga wamphesa
Isaiah5:5 Ndipo tsopano ndidzakuuzani chimene nditi ndichite ndi munda wanga wamphesa; ndidzachotsapo tchinga lake
Isaiah5:6 ndipo ndidzaupasula; sudzadzomboleredwa kapena kulimidwa; koma padzamera lunguzi ndi minga; ndidzalamuliranso mitambo kuti isavumbwepo mvula.
Isaiah5:7 Chifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa Yehova wa makamu ndiwo banja la Israele
Isaiah5:8 Tsoka kwa iwo amene aphatikiza nyumba ndi nyumba
Isaiah5:9 M'makutu anga
Isaiah5:10 Chifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa madera khumi udzangobala bati imodzi ya vinyo
Isaiah5:11 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adzuka m'mamawa kuti atsate zakumwa zaukali; amene achezera usiku kufikira vinyo awaledzeretsa!
Isaiah5:12 Ndipo zeze ndi mngoli
Isaiah5:13 Chifukwa chake anthu anga amuka m'nsinga
Isaiah5:14 Ndipo manda akuza chilakolako chake
Isaiah5:15 Munthu wonyozeka waweramitsidwa
Isaiah5:16 koma Yehova wa makamu wakwezedwa m'chiweruziro
Isaiah5:17 Pamenepo anaankhosa adzadyapo ngati m'busa mwao
Isaiah5:18 Tsoka kwa iwo amene akoka mphulupulu ndi zingwe zachabe
Isaiah5:19 amene ati
Isaiah5:20 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ayesa zoipa zabwino
Isaiah5:21 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adziyesera anzeru ndi ochenjera!
Isaiah5:22 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ali a mphamvu yakumwa vinyo
Isaiah5:23 amene alungamitsa woipa pa chokometsera mlandu
Isaiah5:24 Chifukwa chake monga ngati lilime la moto likutha chiputu
Isaiah5:25 Chifukwa chake mkwiyo wa Yehova wayaka pa anthu ake
Isaiah5:26 Ndipo Iye adzakwezera a mitundu yakutali mbendera
Isaiah5:27 palibe amene adzalema

Isaiah5:30 Ndipo iwo adzawabangulira tsiku limenelo ngati kukokoma kwa nyanja; ndipo wina ayang'ana padziko

Isaiah11:16 Ndipo padzakhala khwalala la anthu ake otsala ochokera ku Asiriya; monga lija la Israele tsiku lokwera iwo kutuluka m'dziko la Ejipito.

Isaiah15:1 Katundu wa Mowabu. Pakuti usiku umodzi Ari wa ku Mowabu wapasuka
Isaiah15:2 Akwera ku Kachisi
Isaiah15:3 M'makwalala mwao adzimangira chiguduli m'chuuno
Isaiah15:4 Ndi Hesiboni afuula zolimba
Isaiah15:5 Mtima wanga ufuula chifukwa cha Mowabu: akulu ake athawira ku Zowari
Isaiah15:6 Pakuti pa madzi a Nimurimu padzakhala mabwinja; popeza udzu wafota
Isaiah15:7 Chifukwa chake zochuluka adazipeza
Isaiah15:8 Pakuti kulira kwamveka kuzungulira malire a Mowabu; kukuwa kwake kwafikira ku Egilaimu
Isaiah15:9 Pakuti madzi a Diboni adzala mwazi; pakuti ndidzatengera zina pa Diboni
Isaiah16:1 Tumizani inu anaankhosa kwa wolamulira wa dziko kuchokera ku Sela kunka kuchipululu
Isaiah16:2 Pakuti ana akazi a Mowabu adzakhala pa madooko a Arinoni
Isaiah16:3 Chitani uphungu
Isaiah16:4 Opirikitsidwa a Mowabu akhale ndi iwe
Isaiah16:5 Ndipo mpando wachifumu udzakhazikika m'chifundo
Isaiah16:6 Ife tinamva kunyada kwa Mowabu
Isaiah16:7 Chifukwa chake Mowabu adzakuwa chifukwa cha Mowabu
Isaiah16:8 Pakuti minda ya ku Hesiboni yalefuka
Isaiah16:9 Chifukwa chake ndidzalira ndi kulira kwa Yazere
Isaiah16:10 Ndipo chikondwero ndi msangalalo zachotsedwa m'munda wopatsa zipatso; ndi m'minda ya mipesa simudzakhala kuimba
Isaiah16:11 Chifukwa chake m'mimba mwanga mulirira Mowabu
Isaiah16:12 Ndipo padzakhala kuti pamene Mowabu adzadzionetsa yekha
Isaiah16:13 Awa ndi mau amene Yehova adanena za Mowabu nthawi zapitazo.
Isaiah16:14 Koma tsopano Yehova wanena
Isaiah17:1 Katundu wa Damasiko. Taonani
Isaiah17:2 Midzi ya Aroere yasiyidwa; idzakhala ya zoweta zogona pansi
Isaiah17:3 Ku Efuremu sikudzakhalanso linga
Isaiah17:4 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo
Isaiah17:5 Ndipo padzakhala ngati wamasika alikumweta tirigu wosacheka
Isaiah17:6 Koma mudzasiyidwa m'menemo khunkha
Isaiah17:7 Tsiku limenelo munthu adzayang'ana kwa Mlengi wake
Isaiah17:8 Ndipo iye sadzayang'ana pa maguwa a nsembe
Isaiah17:9 Tsiku limenelo midzi yake yolimba idzakhala ngati mabwinja a m'nkhalango
Isaiah17:10 Chifukwa iwe waiwala Mulungu wa chipulumutso chako
Isaiah17:11 tsiku lako looka uzingapo mpanda
Isaiah17:12 Ha
Isaiah17:13 Mitundu ya anthu idzathamanga ngati kuthamanga kwa madzi ambirimbiri; koma Iye adzawadzudzula
Isaiah17:14 Pa nthawi ya madzulo
Isaiah18:1 Ha
Isaiah18:2 limene litumiza mithenga panyanja m'ngalawa zamagumbwa zoyenda m'madzi
Isaiah18:3 Inu nonse akukhala m'dziko lapansi
Isaiah18:4 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine
Isaiah18:5 Pakuti masika asanafike
Isaiah18:6 Adzasiyira mbalame zakulusa za m'mapiri ndi zilombo za dziko nthambizo
Isaiah18:7 Nthawi imeneyo mphatso idzaperekedwa kwa Yehova wa makamu
Isaiah19:1 Katundu wa Ejipito. Taonani
Isaiah19:2 Ndipo ndidzapikisanitsa Aejipito; ndipo adzamenyana wina ndi mbale wake
Isaiah19:3 Ndipo mzimu wa Ejipito adzakhala wachabe pakati pake; ndipo Ine ndidzaononga uphungu wake; ndimo iwo adzafunafuna mafano ndi anyanga
Isaiah19:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka Ejipito m'manja mwa mbuye wankharwe; ndi mfumu yaukali idzawalamulira
Isaiah19:5 Ndipo madzi adzaphwa m'nyanja yaikulu
Isaiah19:6 Ndipo nyanja zidzanunkha; mitsinje ya Ejipito idzachepa
Isaiah19:7 Madambo oyandikana ndi Nailo
Isaiah19:8 Asodzinso adzalira
Isaiah19:9 Komanso iwo amene agwira ntchito yakupala thonje
Isaiah19:10 Ndipo maziko ake adzasweka
Isaiah19:11 Akalonga a Zowani apusa ndithu; uphungu wa aphungu anzeru a Farao wasanduka wopulukira; bwanji iwe unena kwa Farao
Isaiah19:12 Nanga tsopano anzeru ali kuti? Akuuze iwe tsopano; adziwe chimene Yehova wa makamu watsimikiza mtima kuchitira Ejipito.
Isaiah19:13 Akalonga a Zowani apusa
Isaiah19:14 Yehova wasanganiza mzimu wa kusaweruzika pakati pake; ndipo iwo asocheretsa Ejipito m'ntchito zake zonse
Isaiah19:15 Ejipito sadzakhala ndi ntchito
Isaiah19:16 Tsiku limenelo Ejipito adzanga akazi; ndipo adzanthunthumira ndi kuopa
Isaiah19:17 Ndipo dziko la Yuda lidzaopsa Ejipito
Isaiah19:18 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala midzi isanu m'dziko la Ejipito yolankhula chinenero cha Kanani
Isaiah19:19 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala guwa la nsembe la Yehova pakati pa dziko la Ejipito
Isaiah19:20 Ndipo chidzakhala chizindikiro ndi mboni ya Yehova wa makamu m'dziko la Ejipito; pakuti iwo adzalirira kwa Yehova
Isaiah19:21 Ndipo Yehova adzadziwika kwa Ejipito
Isaiah19:22 Ndipo Yehova adzakantha Ejipito kukantha ndi kuchiritsa; ndipo iwo adzabwerera kwa Yehova
Isaiah19:23 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala khwalala lochokera m'Ejipito kunka ku Asiriya
Isaiah19:24 Tsiku limenelo Israele ndi Ejipito ndi Asiriya atatuwa
Isaiah19:25 pakuti Yehova wa makamu wadalitsa iwo
Isaiah20:1 Chaka chimene kazembe wa ku Asiriya anafika ku Asidodi
Isaiah20:2 Nthawi imeneyo Yehova ananena ndi Yesaya
Isaiah20:3 Ndipo Yehova anati
Isaiah20:4 momwemo mfumu ya Asiriya idzatsogolera kwina am'nsinga a Ejipito
Isaiah20:5 Ndipo iwo adzakhala ndi mantha ndi manyazi
Isaiah20:6 Ndipo wokhala m'mphepete mwa nyanja muno adzati tsiku limenelo
Isaiah21:1 Katundu wa chipululu cha kunyanja. Monga akamvulumvulu a kumwera apitirira
Isaiah21:2 Masomphenya ovuta aonetsedwa kwa ine; wogula malonda wonyenga amangonyenga
Isaiah21:3 Chifukwa chake m'chuuno mwanga mwadzazidwa ndi zopota; zopweteka zandigwira ine monga zopweteka za mkazi pobala mwana; zowawa zindiweramitsa
Isaiah21:4 Mtima wanga uguguda
Isaiah21:5 Iwo akonza pa gome lodyera
Isaiah21:6 Pakuti Ambuye atero kwa ine
Isaiah21:7 ndipo pamene iye anaona khamu
Isaiah21:8 Ndipo iye anafuulitsa ngati mkango
Isaiah21:9 ndipo taonani
Isaiah21:10 Kuomba kwanga nanga
Isaiah21:11 Katundu wa Duma. Wina aitana kwa ine kuchokera ku Seiri
Isaiah21:12 Mlonda anati
Isaiah21:13 Katundu wa pa Arabiya. M'nkhalango ya m'Arabiya mudzagona
Isaiah21:14 Muchingamire akumva ludzu ndi madzi; okhala m'dziko la Tema ananka kukomana ndi othawa ndi chakudya chao.
Isaiah21:15 Pakuti iwo anathawa malupanga
Isaiah21:16 Pakuti Ambuye anatero kwa ine
Isaiah21:17 ndi otsala amauta
Isaiah22:1 Katundu wa chigwa cha masomphenya. Mwatani kuti mwakwera nonsenu pamachindwi?
Isaiah22:2 Iwe amene wadzala ndi zimfuu
Isaiah22:3 Olamulira ako onse athawa pamodzi
Isaiah22:4 Chomwecho ndinati
Isaiah22:5 Pakuti nditsiku laphokoso
Isaiah22:6 Ndipo Elamu anatenga phodo
Isaiah22:7 Ndipo panali kuti zigwa zako zosankhika zinadzala magaleta
Isaiah22:8 Ndipo Iye anachotsa chophimba cha Yuda; ndipo iwe unayang'ana tsiku limenelo pa zida za m'nyumba ya nkhalango.
Isaiah22:9 Ndipo inu munaona kuti pa mudzi wa Davide panagumuka mipata yambiri; ndipo munasonkhanitsa pamodzi madzi a m'thamanda lakunsi.
Isaiah22:10 Ndipo inu munawerenga nyumba za Yerusalemu
Isaiah22:11 Inu munapanganso chosungamo madzi a thamanda lakale
Isaiah22:12 Ndipo tsiku limenelo Ambuye
Isaiah22:13 koma taonani
Isaiah22:14 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu wadzivumbulutsa yekha m'makutu mwanga
Isaiah22:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova wa makamu
Isaiah22:16 Uchitanji iwe kuno
Isaiah22:17 Taona Yehova adzakuponya iwe zolimba
Isaiah22:18 Iye ndithu adzakuzunguza
Isaiah22:19 Ndipo Ine ndidzakutulutsa iwe mu ntchito yako
Isaiah22:20 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo
Isaiah22:21 ndipo ndidzamveka iye chovala chako
Isaiah22:22 Ndipo ndidzaika mfungulo wa nyumba ya Davide paphewa pake
Isaiah22:23 Ndipo ndidzamkhomera iye ngati chikhomo cholimba; ndipo iye adzakhala mpando wa ulemerero wa banja la atate wake.
Isaiah22:24 Ndipo iwo adzapachika pa iye ulemerero wonse wa banja la atate wake
Isaiah22:25 Tsiku limenelo

Isaiah23:2 Khalani chete
Isaiah23:3 Ndi pa nyanja zazikulu anapindula ndi mbeu za ku Sihori ndizo dzinthu za ku Nailo; ndi kumeneko kunali msika wa amitundu.

Isaiah23:5 Pofika mbiriyo ku Ejipito
Isaiah23:6 Olokani inu
Isaiah23:7 Kodi umene ndi mudzi wanu wokondwa
Isaiah23:8 Ndani wapanga uphungu uno pa Tiro
Isaiah23:9 Yehova wa makamu wapanga uphungu uwu
Isaiah23:10 Pita pakati pa dziko lako monga Nailo

Isaiah24:5 Dzikonso laipitsidwa ndi okhalamo ake omwe

Isaiah24:8 Kusangalala kwa mangaka kwalekeka

Isaiah25:1 Yehova
Isaiah25:2 Chifukwa Inu mwasandutsa mudzi muunda; mudzi walinga bwinja; nyumba ya alendo kuti isakhale mudzi; sudzamangidwa konse.

Isaiah25:4 Chifukwa Inu mwakhala linga la aumphawi
Isaiah25:5 Monga kutentha m'malo ouma
Isaiah25:6 Ndipo m'phiri limeneli Yehova wa makamu adzakonzera anthu ake onse phwando la zinthu zonona
Isaiah25:7 Ndipo Iye adzaononga m'phiri limeneli chophimba nkhope chovundikira mitundu yonse ya anthu
Isaiah25:8 Iye wameza imfa kunthawi yonse; ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzapukuta misozi pa nkhope zonse; ndipo chitonzo cha anthu ake adzachichotsa pa dziko lonse lapansi; chifukwa Yehova wanena.

Isaiah27:1 Tsiku limenelo Yehova ndi lupanga lake lolimba ndi lalikulu ndi lamphamvu adzalanga Leviyatani njoka yothamanga

Isaiah27:4 Ndilibe ukali; ndani adzalimbanitsa lunguzi ndi minga ndi Ine kunkhondo? Ndiziponde ndizitenthe pamodzi.
Isaiah27:5 Kapena mlekeni
Isaiah27:6 M'mibadwo ikudzayo Yakobo adzamera mizu; Israele adzaphuka ndi kuchita mphundu; ndipo iwo adzadzaza ndi zipatso pa dziko lonse lapansi.

Isaiah28:6 ndipo adzakhala mzimu wa chiweruziro kwa oweruza milandu

Isaiah28:11 Iai

Isaiah32:11 Nthunthumirani
Isaiah32:12 Iwo adzadzimenya pazifuwa chifukwa cha minda yabwino
Isaiah32:13 Pa dziko la anthu anga padzafika minga ndi lunguzi; inde pa nyumba zonse zokondwa
Isaiah32:14 pakuti nyumba ya mfumu idzasiyidwa; mudzi wa anthu ambiri udzakhala bwinja; chitunda ndi nsanja zidzakhala nkhwimba kunthawi zonse
Isaiah32:15 kufikira mzimu udzathiridwa pa ife kuchokera kumwamba
Isaiah32:16 Pamenepo chiweruzo chidzakhala m'chipululu
Isaiah32:17 Ndi ntchito ya chilungamo idzakhala mtendere; ndi zotsata chilungamo zidzakhala mtendere
Isaiah32:18 Ndipo anthu anga adzakhala m'malo a mtendere
Isaiah32:19 Koma kudzagwa matalala m'kugwa kwake kwa nkhalango; ndipo mudzi udzagwetsedwa ndithu.
Isaiah32:20 Odala muli inu
Isaiah33:1 Tsoka kwa iwe amene usakaza
Isaiah33:2 Inu Yehova
Isaiah33:3 Pa mau a phokoso mitundu ya anthu yathawa; ponyamuka iwe amitundu abalalika.
Isaiah33:4 Ndipo zofunkha zanu zidzasonkhanitsidwa
Isaiah33:5 Yehova wakwezedwa; pakuti akhala kumwamba; Iye wadzaza Ziyoni ndi chiweruzo ndi chilungamo.
Isaiah33:6 Ndipo kudzakhala chilimbiko m'nthawi zako
Isaiah33:7 Taonani
Isaiah33:8 Njira zamakwalala zikufa
Isaiah33:9 Dziko lirira maliro ndi kulefuka; Lebanoni ali ndi manyazi
Isaiah33:10 Tsopano ndidzauka
Isaiah33:11 Inu mudzatenga pakati ndi mungu
Isaiah33:12 Ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzanga potentha miyala yanjeresa; monga minga yodulidwa
Isaiah33:13 Imvani inu amene muli kutali
Isaiah33:14 Ochimwa a m'Ziyoni ali ndi mantha
Isaiah33:15 Iye amene ayenda molungama
Isaiah33:16 iye adzakhala pamsanje; malo ake ochinjikiza adzakhala malinga amiyala; chakudya chake chidzapatsidwa kwa iye; madzi ake adzakhala chikhalire.
Isaiah33:17 Maso ako adzaona mfumu m'kukongola kwake; iwo adzaona dziko lakutali.
Isaiah33:18 Mtima wako udzaganizira zoopsa; mlembi ali kuti? Ali kuti iye amene anayesa msonkho? Ali kuti iye amene anawerenga nsanja?
Isaiah33:19 Iwe sudzaona anthu aukali
Isaiah33:20 Tayang'ana pa Ziyoni
Isaiah33:21 Koma pamenepo Yehova adzakhala ndi ife m'ulemerero
Isaiah33:22 Pakuti Yehova ndiye woweruza wathu
Isaiah33:23 Zingwe zako za ngalawa zamasulidwa; sizinathe kulimbitsa patsinde pa mlongoti wake
Isaiah33:24 Ndipo wokhalamo sadzanena
Isaiah34:1 Idzani pafupi
Isaiah34:2 Pakuti Yehova akwiyira amitundu onse
Isaiah34:3 Ophedwa aonso adzatayidwa kunja
Isaiah34:4 Ndipo makamu onse a kumwamba adzasungunuka
Isaiah34:5 Pakuti lupanga langa lakhuta kumwamba; taonani
Isaiah34:6 Lupanga la Yehova lakhuta ndi mwazi
Isaiah34:7 Ndipo njati zidzatsika ndi iwo
Isaiah34:8 Pakuti lili tsiku la kubwezera la Yehova
Isaiah34:9 Ndipo mitsinjeyo idzasanduka matope akuda
Isaiah34:10 Sadzazimikai usiku
Isaiah34:11 Koma vuwo ndi nungu zidzakhalamo
Isaiah34:12 Iwo adzaitana mfulu zake zilowe m'ufumu
Isaiah34:13 Ndipo minga idzamera m'nyumba zake zazikulu
Isaiah34:14 Ndipo zilombo za m'chipululu zidzakomana ndi mimbulu
Isaiah34:15 Kumeneko kadzidzi adzapanga chisa chake
Isaiah34:16 Funani inu m'buku la Yehova
Isaiah34:17 Ndipo Iye wachita maere
Isaiah35:1 Chipululu ndi malo ouma adzakondwa; ndipo dziko loti see lidzasangalala ndi kuphuka ngati duwa.
Isaiah35:2 Lidzaphuka mochuluka ndi kusangalala
Isaiah35:3 Limbitsani manja opanda mphamvu
Isaiah35:4 Nenani kwa a mitima ya chinthenthe
Isaiah35:5 Pamenepo maso a akhungu adzatsegudwa
Isaiah35:6 Pamenepo wopunduka adzatumpha ngati nswala
Isaiah35:7 Ndipo mchenga wong'azimira udzasanduka thamanda
Isaiah35:8 Ndipo kudzakhala khwalala kumeneko
Isaiah35:9 Sikudzakhala mkango kumeneko
Isaiah35:10 ndipo oomboledwa a Yehova adzabwera
Isaiah36:1 Koma panali chaka chakhumi ndi chinai cha mfumu Hezekiya

Isaiah37:2 Ndipo anatumiza Eliyakimu

Isaiah37:31 Ndipo otsala amene opulumuka a nyumba ya Yuda adzaphukanso mizu pansi

Isaiah38:1 Masiku amenewo Hezekiya anadwala

Isaiah38:5 Ukanene kwa Hezekiya

Isaiah40:6 Mau a wina ati
Isaiah40:7 udzu unyala
Isaiah40:8 Udzu unyala

Isaiah40:12 Ndani wayesa madzi m'dzanja lake

Isaiah40:20 Wosowa nsembe yoteroyo asankha mtengo umene sungavunde
Isaiah40:21 Kodi inu simunadziwe? Kodi inu simunamve? Kodi sanakuuzeni inu chiyambire? Kodi inu simunadziwitse chiyambire mayambiro a dziko lapansi?
Isaiah40:22 Ndi Iye amene akhala pamwamba pa malekezero a dziko lapansi
Isaiah40:23 amene asandutsa akalonga kuti akhale achabe
Isaiah40:24 Inde sanaokedwe
Isaiah40:25 Mudzandifanizira Ine ndi yani tsono

Isaiah40:27 Bwanji iwe

Isaiah40:29 Iye alimbitsa olefuka
Isaiah40:30 Ngakhale anyamata adzalefuka ndi kulema ndi amisinkhu adzagwa ndithu:
Isaiah40:31 koma iwo amene alindira Yehova adzatenganso mphamvu; adzauluka pamwamba ndi mapiko monga ziombankhanga; adzathamanga koma osalema; adzayenda koma osalefuka.
Isaiah41:1 Khalani chete pamaso pa Ine
Isaiah41:2 Ndani anautsa wina wochokera kum'mawa
Isaiah41:3 Iye awathamangitsa
Isaiah41:4 Ndani wachipanga
Isaiah41:5 Zisumbu zinaona niziopa; malekezero a dziko lapansi ananthunthumira; anayandikira

Isaiah42:2 Iye sadzafuula

Isaiah42:4 Iye sadzalephera kapena kudololoka
Isaiah42:5 Atero Mulungu Yehova

Isaiah42:7 kuti utsegule maso akhungu

Isaiah42:9 Taona

Isaiah42:11 Chipululu ndi midzi yake ikweze mau ao
Isaiah42:12 Apereke ulemerero kwa Yehova
Isaiah42:13 Yehova adzatuluka ngati munthu wamphamvu; adzautsa nsanje ngati munthu wa nkhondo; Iye adzafuula
Isaiah42:14 Ndakhala nthawi yambiri wosalankhula ndakhala chete kudzithungata ndekha; tsopano ndidzafuula ngati mkazi wobala; ndidzapuma modukizadukiza ndi wefuwefu pamodzi.
Isaiah42:15 Ndidzapasula mapiri ndi zitunda
Isaiah42:16 Ndipo ndidzayendetsa akhungu m'khwalala

Isaiah43:3 Chifukwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako
Isaiah43:4 Pokhala iwe wa mtengo wapatali pamaso panga
Isaiah43:5 Usaope; pakuti Ine ndili ndi iwe; ndidzatenga mbeu zako kuchokera kum'mawa

Isaiah45:10 Tsoka kwa iye amene ati kwa atate wake

Isaiah53:1 Ndani wamvera uthenga wathu? Ndi mkono wa Yehova wavumbulukira yani?

Isaiah66:9 Kodi Ine ndidzafikitsira mkazi nthawi yakutula osamtulitsa? Ati Yehova; kodi Ine amene ndibalitsa ndidzatseka mimba? Ati Mulungu wako.
Isaiah66:10 Sangalalani inu pamodzi ndi Yerusalemu

Jeremiah36:4 Ndipo Yeremiya anaitana Baruki mwana wa Neriya; ndipo Yeremiya analembetsa Baruki m'buku lampukutu mau onse a Yehova

Jeremiah36:20 Ndipo analowa kwa mfumu kubwalo; ndipo anasunga buku m'chipinda cha Elisama mlembi; nafotokozera mau onse m'makutu a mfumu.
Jeremiah36:21 Ndipo mfumu anatuma Yehudi atenge mpukutuwo; ndipo anautenga kutuluka nao m'chipinda cha Elisama mlembi. Ndipo Yehudi anauwerenga m'makutu a mfumu
Jeremiah36:22 Ndipo mfumu anakhala m'nyumba ya nyengo yachisanu mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai; ndipo munali moto m'mbaula pamaso pake.
Jeremiah36:23 Ndipo panali
Jeremiah36:24 Ndipo sanaope

Jeremiah36:31 Ndipo ndidzamlanga iye ndi mbeu zake ndi atumiki ake chifukwa cha mphulupulu zao; ndipo ndidzawatengera iwo
Jeremiah36:32 Ndipo Yeremiya anatenga mpukutu wina

Jeremiah50:26 Tadzani kudzamenyana ndi iye kuchokera ku malekezero ake

Jeremiah50:31 Taonani

Jeremiah50:33 Yehova wa makamu atero. Ana a Israele ndi ana a Yuda asautsidwa pamodzi; ndipo onse amene anawagwira ndende awagwiritsitsa; akana kuwamasula.
Jeremiah50:34 Mombolo wao ngwa mphamvu; dzina lake Yehova wa makamu: adzawanenera mlandu wao ndithu; kuti apumutse dziko lapansi
Jeremiah50:35 Lupanga lili pa Ababiloni
Jeremiah50:36 Lupanga lili pa amatukutuku
Jeremiah50:37 Lupanga lili pa akavalo ao
Jeremiah50:38 Chilala chili pa madzi ake
Jeremiah50:39 Chifukwa chake zilombo za kuchipululu ndi mimbulu zidzakhalamo
Jeremiah50:40 Monga muja Yehova anagwetsa Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi midzi inzake
Jeremiah50:41 Taonani
Jeremiah50:42 Agwira uta ndi nthungo; ali ankharwe
Jeremiah50:43 Mfumu ya ku Babiloni yamva mbiri yao
Jeremiah50:44 Taonani
Jeremiah50:45 Chifukwa chake tamvani uphungu wa Yehova
Jeremiah50:46 Dziko lapansi linthunthumira
Jeremiah51:1 Yehova atero: Taonani
Jeremiah51:2 Ndipo ndidzatuma ku Babiloni alendo
Jeremiah51:3 Wauta asakoke uta wake
Jeremiah51:4 Ndipo adzagwa ophedwa m'dziko la Ababiloni
Jeremiah51:5 Pakuti Israele ndi Yuda sasiyidwa ndi Mulungu wao
Jeremiah51:6 Thawani pakati pa Babiloni
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni wakhala chikho chagolide m'dzanja la Yehova
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni wagwa dzidzidzi naonongedwa; mumkuwire iye; mutengere zowawa zake vunguti
Jeremiah51:9 Tikadachiritsa Babiloni koma sanachire; mumsiye iye
Jeremiah51:10 Yehova watulutsa chilungamo chathu; tiyeni tilalikire m'Ziyoni ntchito ya Yehova Mulungu wathu.
Jeremiah51:11 Nolani mivi; gwirani zolimba zikopa; Yehova waukitsa mtima wa mafumu a Amedi; chifukwa alingalirira Babiloni kuti amuononge; pakuti ndi kubwezera chilango kwa Yehova; kubwezera chilango chifukwa cha Kachisi wake.
Jeremiah51:12 Muwakwezere mbendera makoma a Babiloni
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe wokhala pa madzi ambiri
Jeremiah51:14 Yehova wa makamu walumbira pa Iye mwini
Jeremiah51:15 Iye analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu yake
Jeremiah51:16 pamene Iye anena mau
Jeremiah51:17 Anthu onse ali opulukira ndi opanda nzeru; wakusula golide achitidwa manyazi ndi fanizo lake losema; pakuti fanizo lake loyenga lili bodza
Jeremiah51:18 Ngwachabe
Jeremiah51:19 Gawo la Yakobo silifanafana ndi izo; pakuti Iye ndiye analenga zonse; Israele ndi mtundu wa cholowa chake
Jeremiah51:20 Iwe ndiwe chibonga changa ndi zida zanga za nkhondo; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola amitundu
Jeremiah51:21 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola kavalo ndi wokwera wake;
Jeremiah51:22 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola galeta ndi iye wokweramo; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mwamuna ndi mkazi; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola wokalamba ndi mnyamata; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mnyamata ndi namwali;
Jeremiah51:23 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mbusa ndi zoweta zake; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola wakulima ndi goli la ng'ombe lake; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola akazembe ndi ziwanga.
Jeremiah51:24 Ndipo ndidzabwezera Babiloni ndi okhala m'Kasidi zoipa zao zonse anazichita m'Ziyoni pamaso panu
Jeremiah51:25 Taona
Jeremiah51:26 Ndipo sadzachotsa pa iwe mwala wa pangodya
Jeremiah51:27 Kwezani mbendera m'dziko
Jeremiah51:28 Konzerani amitundu amenyane ndi iye
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko linthunthumira ndi kuphwetekedwa
Jeremiah51:30 Olimba a ku Babiloni akana kumenyana
Jeremiah51:31 Wamtokoma mmodzi adzathamanga kukakomana ndi mnzake
Jeremiah51:32 pamadooko patsekedwa
Jeremiah51:33 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni wandidya ine
Jeremiah51:35 Wokhala m'Ziyoni adzati
Jeremiah51:36 Chifukwa chake Yehova atero: Taona
Jeremiah51:37 Ndipo Babiloni adzasanduka miunda
Jeremiah51:38 Adzabangula pamodzi ngati misona ya mikango; adzachita nthulu ngati ana a mikango.
Jeremiah51:39 Pamene atentha
Jeremiah51:40 Ndidzawagwetsa kuti aphedwe monga anaankhosa amphongo
Jeremiah51:41 Sesaki wagwidwatu! Chimene dziko lonse lapansi linachitamanda chalandidwa dzidzidzi! Babiloni wakhalatu bwinja pakati pa amitundu!
Jeremiah51:42 Nyanja yakwera kufikira ku Babiloni; wamira ndi mafunde ake aunyinji.
Jeremiah51:43 Midzi yake yakhala bwinja
Jeremiah51:44 Ndipo Ine ndiweruza Beli m'Babiloni
Jeremiah51:45 Anthu anga
Jeremiah51:46 Mtima wanu usalefuke
Jeremiah51:47 Chifukwa chake
Jeremiah51:48 Pamenepo kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Jeremiah51:49 Monga Babiloni wagwetsa ophedwa a Israele
Jeremiah51:50 Inu amene mwapulumuka kulupanga
Jeremiah51:51 Tili ndi manyazi
Jeremiah51:52 Chifukwa chake
Jeremiah51:53 Ngakhale Babiloni adzakwera kumwamba
Jeremiah51:54 Mau akufuula ochokera ku Babiloni
Jeremiah51:55 Pakuti Yehova afunkha Babiloni
Jeremiah51:56 pakuti wakufunkha wafika kwa iye
Jeremiah51:57 Ndipo ndidzaledzeretsa akulu ake ndi anzeru ake
Jeremiah51:58 Yehova wa makamu atero: Makoma otakata a Babiloni adzagwetsedwa ndithu
Jeremiah51:59 Mau amene Yeremiya mneneri anauza Seraya mwana wa Neriya
