Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri kudza chimodzi pamene analowa ufumu wake; ndipo analamulira m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi kudza chimodzi; dzina la amake ndi Hamutala mwana wamkazi wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina.
Jeremiah52:2 Ndipo iye anachita zoipa pamaso pa Yehova
Jeremiah52:3 Pakuti zonse zinachitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Yehova
Jeremiah52:4 Ndipo panaoneka chaka chachisanu ndi chinai cha ufumu wake mwezi wakhumi
Jeremiah52:5 Ndipo mudzi unazingidwa mpaka chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha mfumu Zedekiya.
Jeremiah52:6 Mwezi wachinai
Jeremiah52:7 Pamenepo anaboola mudzi
Jeremiah52:8 Koma nkhondo ya Ababiloni inamtsata mfumu
Jeremiah52:9 Ndipo anamgwira iye
Jeremiah52:10 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babiloni inapha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pake; niphanso akulu onse a Yuda m'Ribula.
Jeremiah52:11 Ndipo anakolowola maso a Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:12 Mwezi wachisanu
Jeremiah52:13 ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba ya mfumu
Jeremiah52:14 Ndipo nkhondo yonse ya Ababiloni
Jeremiah52:15 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende anthu aumphawi
Jeremiah52:16 Koma Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anasiya aumphawi a padziko akhale akulima mphesa ndi akulima m'minda.
Jeremiah52:17 Ndi mizati yamkuwa imene inali m'nyumba ya Yehova
Jeremiah52:18 Ndiponso miphika
Jeremiah52:19 Ndi zikho
Jeremiah52:20 Nsanamira ziwirizo
Jeremiah52:21 Koma nsanamirazo
Jeremiah52:22 Ndipo korona wamkuwa anali pamwamba pake; utali wake wa korona mmodzi unali wa mikono isanu
Jeremiah52:23 Ndipo pambali pake panali makangaza makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo makangaza onse anali zana limodzi pamade pozungulira pake.
Jeremiah52:24 Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anatenga Seraya wansembe wamkulu
Jeremiah52:25 ndipo m'mudzi anatenga kazembe amene anali woyang'anira anthu a nkhondo ndi amuna asanu ndi awiri a iwo akuona nkhope ya mfumu
Jeremiah52:26 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga iwo
Jeremiah52:27 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babiloni anawakantha
Jeremiah52:28 Amenewa ndi anthu amene Nebukadinezara anatenga ndende: chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri
Jeremiah52:29 chaka chakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chitatu cha Nebukadinezara iye anatenga ndende kuchokera m'Yerusalemu anthu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi awiri;
Jeremiah52:30 chaka cha makumi awiri ndi zitatu cha Nebukadinezara Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende Ayuda mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu; anthu onse anali zikwi zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi.
Jeremiah52:31 Ndipo panali chaka cha makumi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri cha undende wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah52:32 nanena naye bwino
Jeremiah52:33 Ndipo anapindula zovala zake za m'ndende
Jeremiah52:34 Koma phoso lake mfumu ya ku Babiloni sanaleke kumpatsa
Lamentations1:1 Ha! Mudziwo unadzala anthu
Lamentations1:2 Uliralira usiku; misozi yake ili pa masaya ake; mwa onse amene anaukonda mulibe mmodzi wakuutonthoza: Mabwenzi ake onse auchitira ziwembu
Lamentations1:3 Yuda watengedwa ndende chifukwa cha msauko ndi ukapolo waukulu; akhala mwa amitundu
Lamentations1:4 M'njira za Ziyoni mulira posoweka akudzera msonkhano; pa zipata zake zonse papasuka; ansembe ake onse ausa moyo; anamwali ake asautsidwa; iye mwini namva zowawa.
Lamentations1:5 Amaliwongo ake asanduka akulu ake
Lamentations1:6 Ulemu wake wonse wamchokera mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; akalonga ake asanduka nswala zosapeza busa
Lamentations1:7 M'masiku a msauko wake ndi kusochera kwake Yerusalemu ukumbukira zokondweretsa zake zonse zachikhalire; pogwidwa anthu ake ndi mdaniyo popanda wakuupulumutsa
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu wachimwa kwambiri; chifukwa chake wasanduka chinthu chonyansa; onse akuulemekeza aupeputsa
Lamentations1:9 Udyo wake unali m'nsalu zake; sunakumbukira chitsiriziro chake; chifukwa chake watsika mozizwitsa; ulibe wakuutonthoza; taonani
Lamentations1:10 Amaliwongo atambasulira manja ao pa zokondweretsa zake zonse; pakuti waona amitundu atalowa m'malo ake opatulika
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ake onse ausa moyo nafunafuna mkate; ndi zokondweretsa zao agula zakudya kuti atsitsimutse moyo wao; taonani
Lamentations1:12 Kodi muyesa chimenechi chabe
Lamentations1:13 Anatumiza moto wochokera kumwamba kulowa m'mafupa anga
Lamentations1:14 Goli la zolakwa zanga lamangidwa ndi dzanja lake; zalukidwa
Lamentations1:15 Ambuye wapepula ngwazi zanga zonse pakati panga; waitanira msonkhano pa ine kuti uphwanye anyamata anga
Lamentations1:16 Chifukwa cha zimenezi ndilira; diso langa
Lamentations1:17 Ziyoni atambasula manja ake
Lamentations1:18 Yehova ali wolungama; pakuti ndapikisana ndi m'kamwa mwake; mumvetu
Lamentations1:19 Ndinaitana akundikondawo koma anandinyenga; ansembe ndi akulu anga anamwalira m'mudzimu
Lamentations1:20 Onani
Lamentations1:21 Iwo anamva kuti ndiusa moyo
Lamentations1:22 Zoipa zao zonse zidze pamaso panu

Lamentations2:3 Pokwiya moopsa walikha nyanga zonse za Israele; wabweza m'mbuyo dzanja lake lamanja pamaso pa adaniwo
Lamentations2:4 Wathifula uta wake ngati mdani
Lamentations2:5 Yehova wasanduka mdani
Lamentations2:6 Wachotsa mwamphamvu dindiro lake ngati la m'munda; waononga mosonkhanira mwake; Yehova waiwalitsa anthu msonkhano ndi Sabata m'Ziyoni; wanyoza mfumu ndi wansembe mokwiya mwaukali.
Lamentations2:7 Ambuye wataya guwa lake la nsembe
Lamentations2:8 Yehova watsimikiza mtima kupasula linga la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; watambalika chingwe
Lamentations2:9 Zipata zake zalowa pansi; waononga ndi kuthyola mipiringidzo yake; mfumu yake ndi akalonga ake ali pakati pa amitundu akusowa chilamulo; inde
Lamentations2:10 Akulu a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akhala pansi natonthola; aponya fumbi pa mitu yao
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga alefuka ndi misozi
Lamentations2:12 Amati kwa amao
Lamentations2:13 Ndikuchitire umboni wotani? Ndikuyerekeze ndi chiyani
Lamentations2:14 Aneneri ako anakuonera masomphenya achabe ndi opusa; osawulula mphulupulu yako kuti abweze undende wako
Lamentations2:15 Onse opita panjira akuombera manja: Atsonya
Lamentations2:16 Adani ako onse ayasamira pa iwe

Lamentations3:44 Mwadzikuta ndi mtambo kuti pemphero lathu lisapyolemo.

Lamentations3:47 Mantha ndi dzenje zitifikira

Lamentations3:50 kufikira Yehova adzazolika kumwamba ndi kuona.

Ezekiel1:1 Ndipo kunali chaka cha makumi atatu
Ezekiel1:2 Tsiku lachisanu la mwezi
Ezekiel1:3 anadzadi mau a Yehova kwa Ezekiele wansembe
Ezekiel1:4 Ndinapenya
Ezekiel1:5 Ndi m'kati mwake mudaoneka mafaniziro a zamoyo zinai. Ndipo maonekedwe ao ndiwo anafanana ndi munthu
Ezekiel1:6 ndi yense anali nazo nkhope zinai
Ezekiel1:7 Ndi mapazi ao anali mapazi oongoka
Ezekiel1:8 Zinali naonso manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao pa mbali zao zinai; ndipo zinaizi zinali nazo nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao.
Ezekiel1:9 Mapiko ao analumikizana; sizinatembenuka poyenda; chilichonse chinayenda ndi kulunjika kutsogoloko.
Ezekiel1:10 Mafaniziro a nkhope zao zinali nayo nkhope ya munthu; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya mkango pa mbali ya kudzanja lamanja; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya ng'ombe pa mbali ya kudzanja lamanzere; izi zinai zinali nayonso nkhope ya chiombankhanga.
Ezekiel1:11 Ndi nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao zinagawikana kumutu; chilichonse chinali nao mapiko awiri olumikizana
Ezekiel1:12 Ndipo zinayenda
Ezekiel1:13 Kunena za mafaniziro a zamoyozo
Ezekiel1:14 Ndipo zamoyozo zinathamanga ndi kubwerera

Ezekiel27:7 Thanga lako ndi labafuta wopikapika wa ku Ejipito

Ezekiel27:9 Akulu a ku Gebala ndi eni luso ake anali mwa iwe kukonza ziboo zako; zombo zonse za kunyanja pamodzi ndi amalinyero ao anali mwa iwe kusinthana nawe malonda.
Ezekiel27:10 Apersiya
Ezekiel27:11 Anthu a Arivadi pamodzi ndi ankhondo ako anali pa malinga ako pozungulira
Ezekiel27:12 Tarisisi anagulana nawe malonda m'kuchuluka kwa chuma chilichonse; anagula malonda ako ndi siliva ndi chitsulo

Ezekiel27:18 Damasiko anagulana nawe malonda chifukwa cha zambirizo udazipanga
Ezekiel27:19 Vedani ndi Yavani anagula malonda ako ndi thonje
Ezekiel27:20 Dedani anagulana nawe malonda ndi nsalu za mtengo wake zoyenda nazo pa kavalo.
Ezekiel27:21 Arabiya ndi akalonga onse a ku Kedara anazolowerana nao malonda ako; anaankhosa

Ezekiel40:7 Ndi chipinda cha alonda
Ezekiel40:8 Anayesanso khonde la kuchipata kumbali ya ku Kachisi
Ezekiel40:9 ndi mphuthu zake mikono iwiri; ndi khonde la kuchipata linaloza ku Kachisi.

Ezekiel40:11 Ndipo anayesa kupingasa kwa chipata pakhoma pake mikono khumi
Ezekiel40:12 ndi pakhomo pa zipinda za alonda panali kakhoma ka mkono umodzi chakuno
Ezekiel40:13 Ndipo anayesa chipata kuyambira kutsindwi la chipinda cha alonda chimodzi
Ezekiel40:14 Anamanganso nsanamira za mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi; ndi bwalo la pakati pa chipata lidafikira kunsanamira.
Ezekiel40:15 Ndipo kuyambira pa khomo lolowera la chipata kufikira khomo la khonde la chipata m'katimo ndiko mikono makumi asanu.

Ezekiel40:22 Ndi mazenera ake

Ezekiel40:24 Ndipo ananditsogolera kunka kumwera
Ezekiel40:25 Ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo
Ezekiel40:26 Ndipo panali makwerero asanu ndi awiri okwererapo

Ezekiel40:28 Pamenepo analowa nane pa chipata cha kumwera m'bwalo lam'kati
Ezekiel40:29 ndi zipinda zake

Ezekiel40:31 Ndi zidundumwa zake zinaloza kubwalo lakunja

Ezekiel40:36 zipinda zake
Ezekiel40:37 Ndi nsanamira zake zinaloza kubwalo lakunja; ndi pa nsanamira zake panali akanjedza chakuno ndi chauko; ndipo pokwerera pake panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu.

Ezekiel41:5 Pamenepo anayesa khoma la nyumba

Ezekiel41:7 Ndipo zipinda za m'mphepete zinakula m'kupingasa kwao
Ezekiel41:8 Ndinaonanso kuti kunyumba kunali chiunda pozungulira pake; maziko a zipinda za m'mphepete anafikira muyeso wa bango la mikono isanu ndi umodzi yaikulu.
Ezekiel41:9 Kuchindikira kwa khoma la kuzipinda za m'mphepete kunja kwake kunali mikono isanu; ndipo mpata wake unali malo olowera m'zipinda za m'mphepete za Kachisi.

Daniel11:4 Ndipo pakuuka iye ufumu wake udzathyoledwa
Daniel11:5 Ndipo mfumu ya kumwera

Daniel11:7 Koma apo pophukira mizu yake adzauka wina m'malo mwake
Daniel11:8 ndi milungu yao yomwe
Daniel11:9 Ndipo adzalowa m'ufumu wa mfumu ya kumwera
Daniel11:10 Ndi ana ake adzachita nkhondo
Daniel11:11 Ndi mfumu ya kumwera adzawawidwa mtima
Daniel11:12 Ndipo atauchotsa unyinjiwo udzakwezeka mtima wake; ndipo adzagwetsa zikwi makumimakumi
Daniel11:13 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzabwera
Daniel11:14 Ndipo nthawi zija ambiri adzaukira mfumu ya kumwera
Daniel11:15 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzadza
Daniel11:16 Koma iye amene amdzera kulimbana naye adzachita chifuniro chake cha iye mwini; palibe wakulimbika pamaso pake; ndipo adzaima m'dziko lokometsetsalo
Daniel11:17 Ndipo adzalimbitsa nkhope yake
Daniel11:18 Pambuyo pake adzatembenuzira nkhope yake kuzisumbu
Daniel11:19 Pamenepo adzatembenuzira nkhope yake kumalinga a dziko lakelake; koma adzakhumudwa
Daniel11:20 Ndipo m'malo mwake adzauka wina wakupititsa wamsonkho pa ulemerero wa ufumuwo; koma atatha masiku owerengeka adzathyoledwa iye
Daniel11:21 Ndi m'malo mwake adzauka munthu woluluka
Daniel11:22 Ndipo mwa mayendedwe ake a chigumula adzakokololedwa pamaso pake
Daniel11:23 Ndipo atapangana naye adzachita monyenga; pakuti adzakwera
Daniel11:24 Adzafika kachetechete kuminda yokometsetsa ya derali
Daniel11:25 Nadzautsa mphamvu yake ndi mtima wake ayambane ndi mfumu ya kumwera ndi khamu lalikulu la nkhondo; ndi mfumu ya kumwera idzachita nkhondo ndi khamu lalikulu ndi lamphamvu ndithu; koma sadzaimika
Daniel11:26 Inde iwo akudyako chakudya chake adzamuononga; ndi ankhondo ake adzasefukira
Daniel11:27 Ndipo mafumu awa onse awiri mitima yao idzakumbuka kuchita zoipa
Daniel11:28 Ndipo adzabwerera kudziko lake ndi chuma chambiri; ndi mtima wake udzatsutsana ndi chipangano chopatulika
Daniel11:29 Pa nthawi yoikika adzabwera
Daniel11:30 Pakuti zombo za ku Kitimu zidzafika kuyambana naye; chifukwa chake adzatenga nkhawa
Daniel11:31 Ndipo ankhondo adzamuimirira
Daniel11:32 Ndipo akuchitira choipa chipanganocho iye adzawaipsa
Daniel11:33 Ndipo aphunzitsi a anthu adzalangiza ambiri
Daniel11:34 Ndipo pakugwa iwo adzathandizidwa ndi thandizo laling'ono; koma ambiri adzaphatikizana nao ndi mau osyasyalika.
Daniel11:35 Nadzagwa aphunzitsi ena kuwayesa ndi moto
Daniel11:36 Ndipo mfumu idzachita monga mwa chifuniro chake
Daniel11:37 Ndipo sidzasamalira milungu ya makolo ake
Daniel11:38 Koma kumalo kwake idzachitira ulemu mulungu wa malinga; ndi mulungu amene makolo ake sanaudziwe
Daniel11:39 Ndipo adzachita molimbana ndi malinga olimba koposa
Daniel11:40 Ndipo nthawi yotsiriza mfumu ya kumwera idzalimbana naye
Daniel11:41 Adzalowanso m'dziko lokometsetsalo ndi maiko ambiri adzapasuka; koma opulumuka dzanja lake ndi awa: Edomu
Daniel11:42 Adzatambalitsiranso dzanja lake kumaiko; dziko la Ejipito lomwe silidzapulumuka.
Daniel11:43 Ndipo adzachita mwamphamvu ndi chuma cha golide
Daniel11:44 Koma mbiri yochokera kum'mawa ndi kumpoto idzamvuta; nadzatuluka iye ndi ukali waukulu kupha ndi kuononga konse ambiri.
Daniel11:45 Ndipo adzamanga mahema a nyumba yachifumu yake pakati pa nyanja ndi phiri lopatulika lofunika; koma adzafikira chimaliziro chake wopanda wina wakumthandiza.
Daniel12:1 Ndipo nthawi yomweyi adzauka Mikaele kalonga wamkulu wakutumikira ana a anthu a mtundu wako; ndipo padzakhala nthawi ya masautso
Daniel12:2 Ndipo ambiri a iwo ogona m'fumbi lapansi adzauka
Daniel12:3 Ndipo aphunzitsi adzawala ngati kunyezimira kwa thambo; ndi iwo otembenuza ambiri atsate chilungamo ngati nyenyezi kunthawi za nthawi.
Daniel12:4 Koma iwe Daniele
Daniel12:5 Pamenepo ine Daniele ndinapenya
Daniel12:6 Ndipo wina anati kwa munthu wovala bafuta
Daniel12:7 Ndipo ndinamva munthuyo wovala bafuta wokhala pamwamba pa madzi a mumtsinje
Daniel12:8 Ndinachimva ichi
Daniel12:9 Ndipo anati
Daniel12:10 Ambiri adzadzitsuka ndi kudziyeretsa
Daniel12:11 Ndipo kuyambira nthawi yoti idzachotsedwa nsembe yachikhalire
Daniel12:12 Wodala iye amene ayembekeza
Daniel12:13 Koma iwe
Hosea1:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Hoseya mwana wa Beeri masiku a Uziya

Amos3:4 Kodi mkango udzabangula m'nkhalango wosakhala nayo nyama? Kodi msona wa mkango udzalira m'ngaka mwake usanagwire kanthu?
Amos3:5 Kodi mbalame idzakodwa mumsampha pansi popanda msampha woitchera? Kodi msampha ufwamphuka pansi wosakola kanthu?
Amos3:6 Kodi adzaomba lipenga m'mudzi osanjenjemera anthu? Kodi choipa chidzagwera mudzi osachichita Yehova?

Obadiah1:1 Masomphenya a Obadiya. Atero Ambuye Yehova za Edomu: Tamva mbiri yochokera kwa Yehova
Obadiah1:2 Taona
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakunyenga
Obadiah1:4 Chinkana ukwera pamwamba penipeni ngati chiombankhanga
Obadiah1:5 Akakudzera akuba
Obadiah1:6 Ha! Za Esau zasanthulidwa; ha! Zobisika zake zafunidwa.
Obadiah1:7 Anthu onse a akupangana nawe anakuperekeza mpaka pamalire; anthu okhala ndi mtendere nawe anakunyenga
Obadiah1:8 Ati Yehova
Obadiah1:9 Ndipo amuna anu amphamvu adzatenga nkhawa
Obadiah1:10 Chifukwa cha chiwawa unamchitira mphwako Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Tsiku lija unaima padera
Obadiah1:12 Koma usapenyerera tsiku la mphwako
Obadiah1:13 Usalowe m'mudzi wa anthu anga tsiku la tsoka lao
Obadiah1:14 Ndipo usaime pamphambano kuononga opulumuka ake; kapena kupereka otsala ake tsiku lakupsinjika.
Obadiah1:15 Pakuti tsiku la Yehova layandikira amitundu onse; monga unachita iwe
Obadiah1:16 Pakuti monga munamwa pa phiri langa lopatulika
Obadiah1:17 Koma m'phiri la Ziyoni mudzakhala opulumuka
Obadiah1:18 Ndipo nyumba ya Yakobo idzakhala moto
Obadiah1:19 Ndipo akumwera adzakhala nalo phiri la Esau cholowa chao; ndi iwo a kuchidikha adzakhala nalo dziko la Afilisti; ndipo adzakhala nayo minda ya Efuremu
Obadiah1:20 Ndipo andende a khamu ili la ana a Israele
Obadiah1:21 Ndipo apulumutsi adzakwera pa phiri la Ziyoni kuweruza phiri la Esau; ndipo ufumu udzakhala wake wa Yehova.

Nahum1:1 Katundu wa Ninive. Buku la masomphenya a Nahumu wa ku Elikosi.
Nahum1:2 Yehova ndiye Mulungu wansanje
Nahum1:3 Yehova ndiye wolekerera mkwiyo
Nahum1:4 Adzudzula nyanja
Nahum1:5 Mapiri agwedezeka chifukwa cha Iye
Nahum1:6 Adzaima ndani pa kulunda kwake? Ndipo adzakhalitsa ndani pa mkwiyo wake wotentha? Ukali wake utsanulidwa ngati moto
Nahum1:7 Yehova ali wabwino
Nahum1:8 Koma ndi chigumula chosefukira adzatha konse malo ake
Nahum1:9 Mulingaliranji chotsutsana ndi Yehova? Iye adzatha psiti; nsautso siidzauka kawiri.
Nahum1:10 Pakuti chinkana akunga minga yoyangayanga
Nahum1:11 Mwa iwe watuluka wina wolingalira choipa chotsutsana ndi Yehova
Nahum1:12 Atero Yehova: Angakhale iwo ali ndi mphamvu yokwanira
Nahum1:13 Koma tsopano ndidzathyola ndi kukuchotsera goli lake
Nahum1:14 Ndipo Yehova walamulira za iwe kuti asabzalidwenso ena a dzina lako; m'nyumba ya milungu yako ndidzachotsa fano losema ndi fano loyenga; ndidzakukonzerapo manda
Nahum1:15 Taonani pamapiri mapazi a iye wakulalikira uthenga wabwino
Nahum2:1 Wophwanyayo wakwera pamaso pako; sunga linga
Nahum2:2 Pakuti Yehova abwezeranso ukulu wake wa Yakobo ngati ukulu wake wa Israele; pakuti okhuthula anawakhuthula
Nahum2:3 Zikopa za amphamvu ake zasanduka zofiira
Nahum2:4 Magaleta achita mkokomo m'miseu
Nahum2:5 Akumbukira omveka ake; akhumudwa m'kupita kwao
Nahum2:6 Pa zipata za mitsinje patseguka
Nahum2:7 Chatsimikizika

Nahum2:10 Ndiye mopanda kanthu mwakemo ndi mwachabe

Nahum2:12 Mkangowo unamwetula zofikira ana ake
Nahum2:13 Taona
Nahum3:1 Tsoka mudzi wa mwazi! Udzala nao mabodza ndi zachifwamba; zachifwamba sizidukiza.

Nahum3:3 munthu wokwera pa kavalo
Nahum3:4 chifukwa cha chiwerewere chochuluka cha wachiwerewere wokongola
Nahum3:5 Taona

Nahum3:9 Kusi ndi Ejipito ndiwo mphamvu yake
Nahum3:10 Koma iye anatengedwa
Nahum3:11 Iwenso udzaledzera
Nahum3:12 Malinga ako onse adzanga mikuyu ndi nkhuyu zoyamba kupsa; akagwedeza zingokugwa m'kamwa mwa wakudya.
Nahum3:13 Taona
Nahum3:14 Udzitungiretu madzi a nthawi yokumangira misasa
Nahum3:15 Pomwepo moto udzatha iwe; lupanga lidzakuononga; lidzatha iwe ngati chirimamine; udzichulukitse ngati chirimamine
Nahum3:16 Wachulukitsa amalonda ako koposa nyenyezi za kuthambo; chirimamine anyambita
Nahum3:17 Ovala korona ako akunga dzombe
Nahum3:18 Abusa ako aodzera
Nahum3:19 Palibe chakulunzitsa kuthyoka kwako; bala lako liwawa; onse akumva mbiri yako akuombera manja; pakuti ndaniyo kuipa kwako sikunampitapitabe?

Habakkuk3:6 Anaimirira
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinaona mahema a Kusani ali mkusauka; nsalu zotchinga za dziko la Midiyani zinanjenjemera.
Habakkuk3:8 Kodi Yehova anaipidwa nayo mitsinje? Mkwiyo wanu unali pamitsinje kodi
Habakkuk3:9 Munapombosola uta wanu; malumbiro analumbirira mafuko anali mau oona. Munang'amba dziko lapansi ndi mitsinje.
Habakkuk3:10 Mapiri anakuonani
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zinaima njera mokhala mwao; pa kuunika kwa mivi yanu popita iyo. Pa kung'anipa kwa nthungo yanu yonyezimira.
Habakkuk3:12 Munaponda dziko ndi kulunda
Habakkuk3:13 Munatulukira chipulumutso cha anthu anu

Zephaniah1:2 Kuzitha ndidzazitha zonse kuzichotsa panthaka

Zechariah13:1 Tsiku lomwelo padzatsegukira nyumba ya Davide ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu kasupe wa kwa uchimo ndi chidetso.

Zechariah14:1 Taonani likudza tsiku la Yehova
Zechariah14:2 Pakuti ndidzasonkhanitsa amitundu onse alimbane ndi Yerusalemu; ndipo mudziwo udzalandidwa
Zechariah14:3 Pamenepo Yehova adzatuluka
Zechariah14:4 Ndi mapazi ake adzaponda tsiku lomwelo pa phiri la Azitona
Zechariah14:5 Pamenepo mudzathawa kudzera chigwa cha mapiri anga; pakuti chigwa cha mapiri chidzafikira ku Azali; ndipo mudzathawa monga umo munathawira chivomezi
Zechariah14:6 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo
Zechariah14:7 koma lidzakhala tsiku la pa lokha lodziwika ndi Yehova; palibe usana
Zechariah14:8 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo kuti madzi amoyo adzatuluka ku Yerusalemu; gawo lao lina kunka ku nyanja ya kum'mawa
Zechariah14:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu ya dziko lonse; tsiku lomwelo Yehova adzakhala Iye yekha
Zechariah14:10 Dziko lonse lidzasandulika
Zechariah14:11 Ndipo anthu adzakhala m'menemo
Zechariah14:12 Ndipo mliri umene Yehova adzakantha nao mitundu yonse ya anthu imene idathira nkhondo pa Yerusalemu ndi uwu: nyama yao idzaonda akali chilili pa mapazi ao
Zechariah14:13 Ndipo kudzali tsiku lomwelo
Zechariah14:14 Ndi Yuda yemwe adzachita nkhondo ku Yerusalemu; ndi zolemera za amitundu onse ozungulirapo zidzasonkhanitsidwa
Zechariah14:15 Momwemonso mliri wa pa akavalo
Zechariah14:16 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti otsala onse a amitundu onse anadzawo kulimbana ndi Yerusalemu
Zechariah14:17 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti aliyense wa mabanja a dziko wosakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu
Zechariah14:18 Ndipo banja la ku Ejipito likapanda kukwera
Zechariah14:19 Ili ndi tchimo la Ejipito
Zechariah14:20 Tsiku lomwelo padzaoneka pa miliu ya akavalo Opatulikira Yehova; ndi mbiya za m'nyumba ya Yehova zidzanga mbale za kuguwa la nsembe.
Zechariah14:21 Inde mbiya zonse za m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova wa makamu; ndi onse akuphera nsembe adzafika nadzatengako

Malachi2:2 Mukapanda kumvera

Malachi2:14 Koma mukuti

Malachi2:16 Pakuti ndidana nako kuleka kumene
Malachi2:17 Mwalemetsa Yehova ndi mau anu. Koma mukuti

Malachi3:6 Pakuti Ine Yehova sindisinthika

Matthew1:1 Buku la kubadwa kwa Yesu Khristu
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu anabala Isaki; ndi Isaki anabala Yakobo; ndi Yakobo anabala Yuda ndi abale ake;
Matthew1:3 ndi Yuda anabala Perezi ndi Zera mwa Tamara; ndi Perezi anabala Hezironi; ndi Hezironi anabala Ramu;
Matthew1:4 ndi Ramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Nasoni; ndi Nasoni anabala Salimoni;
Matthew1:5 ndi Salimoni anabala Bowazi mwa Rahabu; ndi Bowazi anabala Obede mwa Rute; ndi Obede anabala Yese;
Matthew1:6 ndi Yese anabala Davide mfumuyo. Ndipo Davide anabala Solomoni mwa mkazi wa Uriya;
Matthew1:7 ndi Solomoni anabala Rehobowamu; ndi Rehobowamu anabala Abiya; ndi Abiya anabala Asa;
Matthew1:8 ndi Asa anabala Yehosafati; ndi Yehosafati anabala Yoramu; ndi Yoramu anabala Uziya;
Matthew1:9 ndi Uziya anabala Yotamu; ndi Yotamu anabala Ahazi; ndi Ahazi anabala Hezekiya;
Matthew1:10 ndi Hezekiya anabala Manase; ndi Manase anabala Amoni; ndi Amoni anabala Yosiya;
Matthew1:11 ndi Yosiya anabala Yekoniya ndi abale ake pa nthawi yakutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni.
Matthew1:12 Ndipo pambuyo pake pa kutengedwako ku Babiloni
Matthew1:13 ndi Zerubabele anabala Abihudi; ndi Abihudi anabala Eliyakimu; ndi Eliyakimu anabala Azoro;
Matthew1:14 ndi Azoro anabala Zadoki; ndi Zadoki anabala Akimu; ndi Akimu anabala Eliudi;
Matthew1:15 ndi Eliudi anabala Eleazara; ndi Eleazara anabala Matani; ndi Matani anabala Yakobo;
Matthew1:16 ndi Yakobo anabala Yosefe
Matthew1:17 Motero mibadwo yonse kuyambira pa Abrahamu kufikira kwa Davide ndiyo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa Davide kufikira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni kufikira kwa Khristu mibadwo khumi ndi inai.
Matthew1:18 Ndipo kubadwa kwake kwa Yesu Khristu kunali kotere: Amai wake Maria anapalidwa ubwenzi ndi Yosefe
Matthew1:19 Koma Yosefe
Matthew1:20 Koma pakusinkhasinkha iye zinthu izi
Matthew1:21 Ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna
Matthew1:22 Ndipo zonsezi zinakhala kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri
Matthew1:23 Onani namwali adzaima
Matthew1:24 Ndipo Yosefe anauka tulo take
Matthew1:25 ndipo sanamdziwe iye kufikira atabala mwana wake; namutcha dzina lake Yesu.

Matthew5:4 Odala ali achisoni; chifukwa adzasangalatsidwa.
Matthew5:5 Odala ali akufatsa; chifukwa adzalandira dziko lapansi.

Matthew5:14 Inu ndinu kuunika kwa dziko lapansi. Mudzi wokhazikika pamwamba pa phiri sungathe kubisika.

Matthew5:39 koma ndinena kwa inu

Matthew5:42 Kwa iye wopempha iwe umpatse
Matthew5:43 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa
Matthew5:44 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu

Matthew5:46 Chifukwa kuti ngati muwakonda akukondana ndi inu mphotho yanji muli nayo? Kodi angakhale amisonkho sachita chomwecho?
Matthew5:47 Ndipo ngati mupatsa moni abale anu okhaokha
Matthew5:48 Chifukwa chake inu mukhale angwiro
Matthew6:1 Yang'anirani kuti musachite zolungama zanu pamaso pa anthu kuti muonekere kwa iwo; pakuti ngati mutero mulibe mphotho ndi Atate wanu wa Kumwamba.
Matthew6:2 Chifukwa chake pamene paliponse upatsa mphatso zachifundo
Matthew6:3 Koma iwe popatsa mphatso zachifundo
Matthew6:4 kotero kuti mphatso zako zachifundo zikhale zam'tseri; ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe.
Matthew6:5 Ndipo pamene mupemphera
Matthew6:6 Koma iwe popemphera
Matthew6:7 Ndipo popemphera musabwerezebwereze chabe iai
Matthew6:8 Chifukwa chake inu musafanane nao: pakuti Atate wanu adziwa zomwe muzisowa
Matthew6:9 Chifukwa chake pempherani inu chomwechi: Atate wathu wa Kumwamba
Matthew6:10 Ufumu wanu udze. Kufuna kwanu kuchitidwe
Matthew6:11 Mutipatse ife lero chakudya chathu chalero.
Matthew6:12 Ndipo mutikhululukire mangawa athu
Matthew6:13 Ndipo musatitengere kokatiyesa
Matthew6:14 Pakuti ngati mukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao adzakhululukira inunso Atate wanu wa Kumwamba.
Matthew6:15 Koma ngati simukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao
Matthew6:16 Ndipo pamene ponse musala kudya
Matthew6:17 Koma iwe
Matthew6:18 kuti usaonekere kwa anthu kuti ulikusala kudya
Matthew6:19 Musadzikundikire nokha chuma pa dziko lapansi
Matthew6:20 koma mudzikundikire nokha chuma m'Mwamba
Matthew6:21 pakuti kumene kuli chuma chako
Matthew6:22 Diso ndilo nyali ya thupi; chifukwa chake ngati diso lako lili la kumodzi
Matthew6:23 Koma ngati diso lako lili loipa
Matthew6:24 Palibe munthu angathe kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri: pakuti pena adzamuda mmodziyo
Matthew6:25 Chifukwa chake ndinena kwa inu
Matthew6:26 Yang'anirani mbalame za kumwamba
Matthew6:27 Ndipo ndani wa inu ndi kudera nkhawa angathe kuonjezera pa msinkhu wake mkono umodzi?
Matthew6:28 Ndipo muderanji nkhawa ndi chovala? Tapenyetsani maluwa a kuthengo
Matthew6:29 koma ndinena kwa inu
Matthew6:30 Koma ngati Mulungu aveka chotero udzu wa kuthengo
Matthew6:31 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa
Matthew6:32 Pakuti anthu akunja azifunitsa zonse zimenezo; pakuti Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adziwa kuti musowa zonse zimenezo.
Matthew6:33 Koma muthange mwafuna Ufumu wake ndi chilungamo chake
Matthew6:34 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa za mawa; pakuti mawa adzadzidera nkhawa iwo okha. Zikwanire tsiku zovuta zake.

Matthew7:19 Mtengo uliwonse wosapatsa chipatso chokoma

Matthew13:34 Zonsezi Yesu anaziphiphiritsira m'mafanizo kwa makamu a anthu; ndipo kopanda fanizo sanalankhule kanthu kwa iwo;

Matthew13:37 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati

Matthew13:39 ndipo mdani amene anamfesa uwu
Matthew13:40 Ndipo monga namsongole asonkhanitsidwa pamodzi
Matthew13:41 Mwana wa Munthu adzatuma angelo ake
Matthew13:42 ndipo adzawataya iwo m'ng'anjo yamoto; kumeneko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano.
Matthew13:43 Pomwepo olungamawo adzawalitsa monga dzuwa
Matthew13:44 Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi chuma chobisika m'munda; chimene munthu anachipeza
Matthew13:45 Ndiponso Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi munthu wa malonda
Matthew13:46 ndipo m'mene anaipeza ngale imodzi ya mtengo wapatali
Matthew13:47 Ndiponso
Matthew13:48 limene podzala
Matthew13:49 Padzatero pa chimaliziro cha nthawi ya pansi pano: angelo adzatuluka
Matthew13:50 nadzawataya m'ng'anjo yamoto; komweko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano.
Matthew13:51 Mwamvetsa zonsezi kodi? Iwo anati kwa Iye
Matthew13:52 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo
Matthew13:53 Ndipo panali
Matthew13:54 Ndipo pofika kudziko la kwao
Matthew13:55 Kodi uyu si mwana wa mmisiri wa mitengo? Kodi dzina lake la amake si Maria? Ndi abale ake si Yakobo ndi Yosefe ndi Simoni ndi Yuda?
Matthew13:56 Ndipo alongo ake sali ndife onsewa? Ndipo Iyeyo adazitenga zinthu zonsezi kuti?
Matthew13:57 Ndipo iwo anakhumudwa chifukwa cha Iye. Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo
Matthew13:58 Ndipo Iye

Matthew15:1 Pomwepo anadza kwa Yesu Afarisi ndi alembi
Matthew15:2 Ophunzira anu alumphiranji miyambo ya makolo? Pakuti sasamba manja pakudya.
Matthew15:3 Ndipo Iye anayankha
Matthew15:4 Pakuti Mulungu anati
Matthew15:5 Koma inu munena
Matthew15:6 iyeyo sadzalemekeza atate wake. Ndipo inu mupeputsa mau a Mulungu chifukwa cha miyambo yanu.
Matthew15:7 Onyenga inu! Yesaya ananenera bwino za inu
Matthew15:8 Anthu awa andilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yao; koma mtima wao uli kutali ndi Ine.
Matthew15:9 Koma andilambira Ine kwachabe
Matthew15:10 Ndipo Iye anaitana makamuwo nati kwa iwo
Matthew15:11 si chimene chilowa m'kamwa mwake chiipitsa munthu; koma chimene chituluka m'kamwa mwake
Matthew15:12 Pomwepo anadza ophunzira
Matthew15:13 Koma Iye anayankha nati
Matthew15:14 Kawalekeni iwo
Matthew15:15 Ndipo Petro anayankha nati kwa Iye
Matthew15:16 Ndipo Iye anati
Matthew15:17 Simudziwa kodi kuti zonse zakulowa m'kamwa zipita m'mimba
Matthew15:18 Koma zakutuluka m'kamwa zichokera mumtima; ndizo ziipitsa munthu.
Matthew15:19 Pakuti mumtima muchokera maganizo oipa
Matthew15:20 izi ndizo ziipitsa munthu
Matthew15:21 Ndipo Yesu anatulukapo napatukira kumbali za Tiro ndi Sidoni.
Matthew15:22 Ndipo onani
Matthew15:23 Koma Iye sanamyankhe mau amodzi. Ndipo ophunzira ake anadza
Matthew15:24 Ndipo Iye anayankha
Matthew15:25 Koma iye anadza
Matthew15:26 Ndipo Iye anayankha
Matthew15:27 Koma iye anati
Matthew15:28 Pomwepo Yesu anayankha
Matthew15:29 Ndipo Yesu anachoka kumeneko

Mark1:1 Chiyambi chake cha Uthenga Wabwino wa Yesu Khristu
Mark1:2 Monga mwalembedwa m'Yesaya mneneri
Mark1:3 Mau a wofuula m'chipululu
Mark1:4 Yohane anadza nabatiza m'chipululu
Mark1:5 Ndipo anatuluka a ku dziko lonse la Yudeya
Mark1:6 Ndipo Yohane anavala ubweya wa ngamira
Mark1:7 Ndipo analalikira
Mark1:8 Ndakubatizani inu ndi madzi; koma Iye adzakubatizani ndi Mzimu Woyera.
Mark1:9 Ndipo kunali masiku omwewo
Mark1:10 Ndipo pomwepo
Mark1:11 ndipo mau anatuluka m'thambo
Mark1:12 Ndipo pomwepo Mzimu anamkakamiza kunka kuchipululu.
Mark1:13 Ndipo anakhala m'chipululu masiku makumi anai woyesedwa ndi Satana; nakhala ndi zilombo
Mark1:14 Ndipo ataperekedwa Yohane
Mark1:15 nanena
Mark1:16 Ndipo pakuyenda m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya
Mark1:17 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao
Mark1:18 Ndipo pomwepo anasiya makoka ao
Mark1:19 Ndipo atapita patsogolo pang'ono
Mark1:20 Ndipo pomwepo anawaitana: ndipo anasiya atate wao Zebedeo m'chombomo pamodzi ndi antchito olembedwa
Mark1:21 Ndipo iwo analowa m'Kapernao; ndipo pomwepo pa tsiku la Sabata iye analowa m'sunagoge naphunzitsa.
Mark1:22 Ndipo anazizwa ndi chiphunzitso chake; pakuti anaphunzitsa monga mwini mphamvu
Mark1:23 Ndipo pomwepo panali munthu m'sunagoge mwao ali ndi mzimu wonyansa; ndipo anafuula iye.
Mark1:24 Kuti
Mark1:25 Ndipo Yesu anaudzudzula
Mark1:26 Ndipo mzimu wonyansa
Mark1:27 Ndipo anazizwa onse
Mark1:28 Ndipo mbiri yake inabuka pompaja kudziko lonse la Galileya lozungulirapo.
Mark1:29 Ndipo pomwepo
Mark1:30 Ndipo mpongozi wake wa Simoni anali gone wodwala malungo; ndipo pomwepo anamuuza za iye:
Mark1:31 ndipo anadza namgwira dzanja
Mark1:32 Ndipo madzulo
Mark1:33 Ndipo mudzi wonse unasonkhana pakhomo.
Mark1:34 Ndipo anachiritsa anthu ambiri akudwala nthenda za mitundumitundu
Mark1:35 Ndipo m'mawa mwake anauka usikusiku
Mark1:36 Ndipo Simoni ndi anzake anali naye anamtsata
Mark1:37 nampeza
Mark1:38 Ndipo ananena nao
Mark1:39 Ndipo analowa m'masunagoge mwao m'Galileya monse
Mark1:40 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye wodwala khate
Mark1:41 Ndipo Yesu anagwidwa chifundo
Mark1:42 Ndipo pomwepo khate linamchoka
Mark1:43 Ndipo anamuuzitsa
Mark1:44 nanena naye
Mark1:45 Koma iye anatuluka nayamba kulalikira ndithu
Mark2:1 Ndipo polowanso Iye m'Kapernao atapita masiku ena
Mark2:2 Ndipo ambiri anaunjikana
Mark2:3 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye otenga munthu wodwala manjenje
Mark2:4 Ndipo pamene sanakhoze kufika kuli Iye
Mark2:5 Ndipo Yesu pakuona chikhulupiriro chao ananena ndi wodwala manjenje
Mark2:6 Koma anakhalapo ena a alembi akuganizira mumtima mwao
Mark2:7 Munthu amene atero bwanji? Achita mwano; akhoza ndani kukhululukira machimo
Mark2:8 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu pozindikira mumtima mwake kuti alikuganizira chomwecho mwa iwo okha
Mark2:9 Chapafupi nchiti
Mark2:10 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa Munthu ali mwini ulamuliro wakukhululukira machimo pa dziko lapansi (ananena ndi wodwala manjenje)
Mark2:11 Ndikuuza iwe
Mark2:12 Ndipo ananyamuka iye pomwepo
Mark2:13 Ndipo anatulukanso kunka m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndipo linadza kwa Iye khamu lonse la anthu
Mark2:14 Ndipo pakumuka
Mark2:15 Ndipo ananyamuka namtsata Iye. Ndipo kunali kuti anakhala pakudya m'nyumba mwake
Mark2:16 Ndipo alembi a kwa Afarisi
Mark2:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu anamva ichi
Mark2:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane ndi Afarisi analinkusala kudya; ndipo anadza
Mark2:19 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao
Mark2:20 Koma adzadza masiku
Mark2:21 Palibe munthu asokerera chigamba cha nsalu yaiwisi pa chofunda chakale; pena chimene choti chidzakonza chizomolapo
Mark2:22 Ndipo palibe munthu amatsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale: pena vinyo adzaphulitsa matumba
Mark2:23 Ndipo kunali kuti anapita Iye pakati pa minda tsiku la Sabata; ndipo ophunzira ake poyenda anayamba kubudula ngala za dzinthu.
Mark2:24 Ndipo Afarisi ananena ndi Iye
Mark2:25 Ndipo ananena nao
Mark2:26 Kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu masiku a Abiyatara
Mark2:27 Ndipo ananena nao
Mark2:28 motero Mwana wa Munthu ali mwini tsiku la Sabata lomwe.

Mark13:9 Koma inu mudziyang'anire inu nokha; pakuti adzakuperekani inu kwa akulu a milandu; ndipo adzakukwapulani m'masunagoge; ndipo pamaso pa akazembe ndi mafumu mudzaimirira chifukwa cha Ine
Mark13:10 Ndipo Uthenga Wabwino uyenera uyambe kulalikidwa kwa anthu a mitundu yonse.
Mark13:11 Ndipo pamene adzapita nanu kumlandu
Mark13:12 Ndipo mbale adzapereka mbale wake kuti amuphe

Mark13:14 Ndipo pamene mukaona chonyansa cha kupululutsa chilikuima pomwe sichiyenera (wakuwerenga azindikire)
Mark13:15 ndi iye amene ali pamwamba pa chindwi asatsike
Mark13:16 ndi iye amene ali kumunda asabwere kudzatenga malaya ake.

Mark13:18 Ndipo pempherani kuti kusakhale m'nyengo yachisanu.
Mark13:19 Pakuti masiku aja padzakhala chisautso
Mark13:20 Ndipo Ambuye akadapanda kufupikitsa masikuwo

Mark13:24 Koma m'masikuwo
Mark13:25 ndi nyenyezi zidzagwa kuchokera m'mwamba ndi mphamvu zili m'mwamba zidzagwedezeka.
Mark13:26 Ndipo pamenepo adzaona Mwana wa Munthu alinkudza m'mitambo ndi mphamvu yaikulu
Mark13:27 Ndipo pamenepo adzatuma angelo
Mark13:28 Ndipo phunzirani ndi mkuyu fanizo lake; pamene pafika kuti nthambi yake ikhala yanthete
Mark13:29 chomwecho inunso
Mark13:30 Indetu ndinena ndi inu
Mark13:31 Thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzapita; koma mau anga sadzapita.
Mark13:32 Koma za tsiku ilo
Mark13:33 Yang'anirani
Mark13:34 Monga ngati munthu wa paulendo
Mark13:35 Chifukwa chake dikirani; pakuti simudziwa inu nthawi yake yakubwera mwini nyumba
Mark13:36 kuti angabwere balamanthu nakakupezani muli m'tulo.
Mark13:37 Ndipo chimene ndinena ndi inu ndinena kwa onse
Mark14:1 Ndipo popita masiku awiri kuli phwando la Paska ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa; ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi anafunafuna momchitira chiwembu
Mark14:2 pakuti anati
Mark14:3 Ndipo pakukhala Iye ku Betaniya m'nyumba ya Simoni wakhate
Mark14:4 Koma anakhalako ena anavutika mtima mwa iwo okha
Mark14:5 Pakuti mafuta amene akadagula marupiya atheka mazana atatu ndi mphamvu zake
Mark14:6 Koma Yesu anati
Mark14:7 Pakuti muli nao aumphawi pamodzi ndi inu masiku onse
Mark14:8 Iye wachita chimene wakhoza; anandidzozeratu thupi langa ku kuikidwa m'manda.

John4:5 Chifukwa chake anadza kumudzi wa Samariya
John4:6 ndipo pamenepo panali chitsime cha Yakobo. Ndipo Yesu
John4:7 Kunali ngati ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi. Kunadza mkazi wotuluka m'Samariya kudzatunga madzi. Yesu ananena naye
John4:8 Pakuti ophunzira ake adachoka kunka kumudzi kuti akagule chakudya.
John4:9 Pamenepo mkazi wa m'Samariya ananena ndi Iye
John4:10 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye
John4:11 Mkaziyo ananena ndi Iye
John4:12 Kodi muli wamkulu ndi atate wathu Yakobo amene anatipatsa ife chitsimechi
John4:13 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye
John4:14 koma iye wakumwa madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa sadzamva ludzu nthawi zonse; koma madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa adzakhala mwa iye kasupe wa madzi otumphukira kumoyo wosatha.
John4:15 Mkaziyo ananena kwa Iye
John4:16 Yesu ananena kwa iye
John4:17 Mkazi anayankha nati kwa Iye
John4:18 pakuti wakhala nao amuna asanu; ndipo iye amene ukhala naye tsopano sali mwamuna wako; ichi wanena zoona.
John4:19 Mkazi ananena ndi Iye
John4:20 Makolo athu analambira m'phiri ili; ndipo inu munena
John4:21 Yesu ananena naye
John4:22 Inu mulambira chimene simuchidziwa; ife tilambira chimene tichidziwa; pakuti chipulumutso chichokera kwa Ayuda.
John4:23 Koma ikudza nthawi
John4:24 Mulungu ndiye mzimu; ndipo omlambira Iye ayenera kumlambira mumzimu ndi m'choonadi.
John4:25 Mkazi ananena ndi Iye
John4:26 Yesu ananena naye
John4:27 Ndipo pamenepo anadza ophunzira ake; nazizwa kuti analinkulankhula ndi mkazi; koma panalibe wina anati
John4:28 Pamenepo mkazi anasiya mtsuko wake
John4:29 Tiyeni
John4:30 Anatuluka iwo m'mudzi ndipo analinkudza kwa Iye.
John4:31 Pa mphindikati iyi ophunzira ake anampempha Iye
John4:32 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo
John4:33 Chifukwa chake ophunzira ananena wina ndi mnzake
John4:34 Yesu ananena nao
John4:35 Kodi simunena inu
John4:36 Wakumweta alandira kulipira
John4:37 Pakuti m'menemo chonenacho chili choona
John4:38 Ine ndinatuma inu kukamweta chimene simunagwirirapo ntchito: ena anagwira ntchito
John4:39 Ndipo m'mudzi muja anthu Asamariya ambiri anamkhulupirira Iye chifukwa cha mau a mkazi
John4:40 Chifukwa chake pamene Asamariya anadza kwa Iye
John4:41 Ndipo ambiri oposa anakhulupirira chifukwa cha mau ake;
John4:42 ndipo ananena kwa mkazi
John4:43 Koma atapita masiku awiriwo anachoka komweko kunka ku Galileya.
John4:44 Pakuti Yesu mwini anachita umboni kuti
John4:45 Chifukwa chake pamene anadza ku Galileya
John4:46 Chifukwa chake Yesu anadzanso ku Kana wa m'Galileya
John4:47 Iyeyu
John4:48 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iye
John4:49 Mkuluyo ananena kwa Iye
John4:50 Yesu ananena naye
John4:51 Ndipo m'mene analikutsika
John4:52 Chifukwa chake anawafunsa ora lake anayamba kuchiralo. Pamenepo anati kwa iye
John4:53 Chifukwa chake atateyo anadziwa kuti ndi ora lomwelo limene Yesu anati kwa iye
John4:54 Ichi ndi chizindikiro chachiwiri Yesu anachita
John5:1 Zitapita izi panali chikondwerero cha Ayuda; ndipo Yesu anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu.

John5:3 M'menemo munagona khamu lalikulu la anthu odwala
John5:4 
John5:5 Koma panali munthu wina apo
John5:6 Yesu
John5:7 Wodwalayo anayankha
John5:8 Yesu ananena naye
John5:9 Ndipo pomwepo munthuyu anachira
John5:10 Chifukwa chake Ayuda ananena kwa wochiritsidwayo
John5:11 Koma iyeyu anayankha iwo
John5:12 Anamfunsa
John5:13 Koma wochiritsidwayo sanadziwe kuti anali ndani; pakuti Yesu anachoka kachetechete
John5:14 Zitapita izi Yesu anampeza m'Kachisi

John5:25 Indetu

John5:28 Musazizwe ndi ichi
John5:29 nadzatulukira
John5:30 Sindikhoza kuchita kanthu kwa Ine ndekha; monga momwe ndimva ndiweruza; ndipo maweruzidwe anga ali olungama; chifukwa kuti sinditsata chifuniro changa
John5:31 Ngati ndichita umboni wa Ine ndekha
John5:32 Wochita umboni wa Ine ndi wina; ndipo ndidziwa kuti umboni umene Iye andichitire Ine uli woona.
John5:33 Inu munatuma kwa Yohane
John5:34 Ndipo Ine sindilandira umboni kwa munthu: koma ndinena izi
John5:35 Iyeyo anali nyali yoyaka ndi yowala; ndipo inu munafuna kukondwera m'kuunika kwake kanthawi.
John5:36 Koma Ine ndili nao umboni woposa wa Yohane; pakuti ntchito zimene Atate anandipatsa ndizitsirize
John5:37 Ndipo Atate wonditumayo
John5:38 Ndipo mulibe mau ake okhala mwa inu; chifukwa kuti amene Iyeyu anatuma
John5:39 Musanthula m'malembo
John5:40 ndipo simufuna kudza kwa Ine
John5:41 Ulemu sindiulandira kwa anthu.

John5:43 Ndadza Ine m'dzina la Atate wanga
John5:44 Mungathe inu bwanji kukhulupirira
John5:45 Musayesa kuti Ine ndidzakunenezani inu kwa Atate; pali wakukunenezani

John5:47 Koma ngati simukhulupirira malembo a iyeyu
John6:1 Zitapita izi anachoka Yesu kunka kutsidya lija la nyanja ya Galileya
John6:2 Ndipo khamu lalikulu la anthu linamtsata Iye
John6:3 Koma Yesu anakwera kuphiri
John6:4 Ndipo Paska
John6:5 Pamenepo Yesu
John6:6 Koma ananena ichi kuti amuyese; pakuti anadziwa yekha chimene adzachita.
John6:7 Filipo anayankha Iye
John6:8 Mmodzi wa ophunzira ake
John6:9 Pali mnyamata pano
John6:10 Nati Yesu
John6:11 Pomwepo Yesu anatenga mikateyo; ndipo pamene adayamika
John6:12 Ndipo pamene adakhuta
John6:13 Pomwepo anasonkhanitsa
John6:14 Chifukwa chake
John6:15 Pamenepo Yesu
John6:16 Koma pofika madzulo
John6:17 ndipo pamene adalowa m'ngalawa
John6:18 Ndipo nyanja inalikuuka chifukwa cha mphepo yaikulu yakuombako.
John6:19 Ndipo pamene adapalasa monga mastadiya makumi awiri ndi asanu kapena makumi atatu
John6:20 Koma Iye ananena nao
John6:21 Pamenepo analola kumlandira m'ngalawa; ndipo pomwepo ngalawayo inafika kumtunda kumene analikunkako.
John6:22 M'mawa mwake khamu la anthu limene linaima tsidya lija la nyanja linaona kuti palibe ngalawa ina koma imodzi
John6:23 koma zinachokera ngalawa zina ku Tiberiasi
John6:24 chifukwa chake pamene khamu la anthu linaona kuti palibe Yesu
John6:25 Ndipo pamene anampeza Iye tsidya lina la nyanja
John6:26 Yesu anayankha iwo nati
John6:27 Gwirani ntchito si chifukwa cha chakudya chimene chitsalira kumoyo wosatha
John6:28 Pamenepo anati kwa Iye
John6:29 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo
John6:30 Chifukwa chake anati kwa Iye
John6:31 Atate athu anadya mana m'chipululu; monga kwalembedwa
John6:32 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa iwo
John6:33 Pakuti mkate wa Mulungu ndiye wakutsika kuchokera Kumwamba ndi kupatsa moyo kwa dziko lapansi.
John6:34 Pamenepo anati kwa Iye
John6:35 Yesu anati kwa iwo
John6:36 Koma ndinati kwa inu
John6:37 Chinthu chonse chimene anandipatsa Ine Atate chidzadza kwa Ine; ndipo wakudza kwa Ine sindidzamtaya iye kunja.
John6:38 Pakuti ndinatsika Kumwamba
John6:39 Koma chifuniro cha Iye amene anandituma Ine ndi ichi
John6:40 Pakuti chifuniro cha Atate wanga ndi ichi
John6:41 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anang'ung'udza za Iye
John6:42 Ndipo iwo ananena
John6:43 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo
John6:44 Kulibe mmodzi akhoza kudza kwa Ine koma ngati Atate wondituma Ine amkoka iye; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomaliza.
John6:45 Chalembedwa mwa aneneri
John6:46 Sikuti munthu wina waona Atate
John6:47 Indetu
John6:48 Ine ndine mkate wamoyo.
John6:49 Makolo anu adadya m'chipululu
John6:50 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi uwu
John6:51 Mkate wamoyo wotsika Kumwamba Ndine amene. Ngati munthu wina akadyako mkate umene
John6:52 Pamenepo Ayuda anatetana wina ndi mnzake ndi kunena
John6:53 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa iwo
John6:54 Iye wakudya thupi langa ndi kumwa mwazi wanga ali nao moyo wosatha; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomaliza.
John6:55 Pakuti thupi langa ndi chakudya ndithu
John6:56 Iye wakudya thupi langa ndi kumwa mwazi wanga akhala mwa Ine ndi Ine mwa iye.
John6:57 Monga Atate wamoyo anandituma Ine
John6:58 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi umenewu: si monga makolowo
John6:59 Izi ananena m'sunagoge
John6:60 Pamenepo ambiri a ophunzira ake
John6:61 Koma Yesu podziwa mwa yekha kuti ophunzira ake alikung'ung'udza chifukwa cha ichi
John6:62 Nanga bwanji ngati mukaona Mwana wa Munthu alikukwera kumene anali kale lomwe?
John6:63 Wopatsa moyo ndi mzimu; thupi silithandiza konse. Mau amene ndalankhula ndi inu ndiwo mzimu
John6:64 Koma pali ena mwa inu amene sakhulupirira. Pakuti Yesu anadziwa poyamba amene ali osakhulupirira
John6:65 Ndipo ananena
John6:66 Pa ichi ambiri a ophunzira ake anabwerera m'mbuyo
John6:67 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa khumi ndi awiriwo
John6:68 Simoni Petro anamyankha Iye
John6:69 Ndipo ife tikhulupirira

John6:71 Koma adanena za Yudasi
John7:1 Ndipo zitapita izi Yesu anayendayenda m'Galileya; pakuti sanafune kuyendayenda m'Yudeya
John7:2 Koma chikondwerero cha Ayuda cha Misasa
John7:3 Chifukwa chake abale ake anati kwa Iye
John7:4 Pakuti palibe munthu achita kanthu mobisika
John7:5 Pakuti angakhale abale ake sanakhulupirira Iye.
John7:6 Chifukwa chake Yesu ananena nao
John7:7 Dziko lapansi silingathe kudana ndi inu; koma Ine lindida popeza Ine ndilichitira umboni
John7:8 Kwerani inu kunka kuphwando; sindikwera Ine kuphwando ili tsopano apa; pakuti nthawi yanga siinakwanire.
John7:9 Ndipo m'mene adanena nao zimenezi anakhalabe m'Galileya.
John7:10 Koma pamene abale ake adakwera kunka kuchikondwerero
John7:11 Pomwepo Ayuda analikumfuna Iye pachikondwerero
John7:12 Ndipo kunali kung'ung'udza kwambiri za Iye m'makamu a anthu; ena ananena
John7:13 Chinkana anatero panalibe munthu analankhula za Iye poyera
John7:14 Koma pamene padafika pakati pa chikondwerero
John7:15 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anazizwa
John7:16 Pamenepo Yesu anayankha iwo
John7:17 Ngati munthu aliyense afuna kuchita chifuniro chake
John7:18 Iye wolankhula zochokera kwa iye yekha afuna ulemu wa mwini yekha. Iye wakufuna ulemu wa Iye amene anamtuma
John7:19 Si Mose kodi anakupatsani inu chilamulo
John7:20 Khamu la anthu linayankha
John7:21 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo
John7:22 Chifukwa cha ichi Mose anakupatsani inu mdulidwe (si kuti uchokera kwa Mose
John7:23 Ngati munthu alandira mdulidwe tsiku la Sabata
John7:24 Musaweruze monga maonekedwe
John7:25 Pamenepo ena a iwo a ku Yerusalemu ananena
John7:26 Ndipo taona amalankhula poyera
John7:27 Koma ameneyo tidziwa uko achokera: koma Khristu pamene akadzadza
John7:28 Pamenepo Yesu anafuula m'Kachisi
John7:29 Ine ndimdziwa Iye; chifukwa ndili wochokera kwa Iye
John7:30 Pamenepo anafuna kumgwira Iye; koma palibe wina anamgwira kumanja
John7:31 Koma ambiri a m'khamu la anthu anakhulupirira Iye; ndipo ananena
John7:32 Afarisi anamva khamu la anthu ling'ung'udza zimenezi za Iye; ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi anatuma anyamata kuti akamgwire Iye.
John7:33 Pamenepo Yesu anati
John7:34 Mudzafunafuna Ine
John7:35 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anati mwa iwo okha
John7:36 Mau awa amene ananena ndi chiyani
John7:37 Koma tsiku lomaliza
John7:38 Iye wokhulupirira Ine
John7:39 Koma ichi anati za Mzimu
John7:40 Pamenepo ena a khamulo pakumva mau awa
John7:41 Ena ananena
John7:42 Kodi sichinati chilembo kuti Khristu adza kutuluka mwa mbeu ya Davide
John7:43 Kudakhala tsono kusiyana m'khamulo chifukwa cha Iye.
John7:44 Koma ena mwa iwo anafuna kumgwira Iye; koma palibe munthu anamgwira kumanja.
John7:45 Pamenepo anyamatawo anadza kwa ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi; ndipo iwowa anati kwa iwo
John7:46 Anyamatawo anayankha
John7:47 Pamenepo Afarisi anayankha iwo

John7:49 Koma khamu ili losadziwa chilamulo
John7:50 Nikodemo ananena kwa iwo
John7:51 Kodi chilamulo chathu chiweruza munthu
John7:52 Anayankha nati kwa iye
John7:53 Ndipo anamuka munthu yense kunyumba yake.

John8:2 Koma mamawa anadzanso ku Kachisi

John8:4 ananena kwa Iye
John8:5 Koma m'chilamulo Mose anatilamula
John8:6 Koma ichi ananena kuti amuyese Iye
John8:7 Koma pamene anakhalakhala alikumfunsabe Iye
John8:8 Ndipo m'mene adaweramanso analemba ndi chala chake pansi.

John8:17 Inde kudalembedwa m'chilamulo chanu kuti umboni wa anthu awiri uli woona.
John8:18 Ine ndine wakuchita umboni wa Ine ndekha
John8:19 Chifukwa chake ananena ndi Iye
John8:20 Mau awa analankhula m'nyumba yosungiramo chuma cha Mulungu pophunzitsa m'Kachisi; ndipo palibe munthu anamgwira Iye

John8:28 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati
John8:29 Ndipo wondituma Ine ali ndi Ine; sanandisiye Iye pa ndekha; chifukwa ndichita Ine zimene zimkondweretsa Iye nthawi zonse.
John8:30 Pakulankhula Iye zimenezi ambiri anakhulupirira Iye.

John8:32 ndipo mudzazindikira choonadi
John8:33 Anamyankha iye
John8:34 Yesu anayankha iwo
John8:35 Koma kapolo sakhala m'nyumba nthawi yonse; mwana ndiye akhala nthawi yonse.
John8:36 Chifukwa chake ngati Mwana adzakuyesani inu aufulu
John8:37 Ndidziwa kuti muli mbeu ya Abrahamu; koma mufuna kundipha Ine
John8:38 Zimene ndinaona Ine kwa Atate
John8:39 Anayankha nati kwa iye
John8:40 Koma tsopano mufuna kundipha Ine
John8:41 Inu muchita ntchito za atate wanu. Anati kwa Iye
John8:42 Yesu anati kwa iwo
John8:43 Simuzindikira malankhulidwe anga chifukwa ninji? Chifukwa simungathe kumva mau anga.
John8:44 Inu muli ochokera mwa atate wanu mdierekezi
John8:45 Koma Ine
John8:46 Ndani mwa inu anditsutsa Ine za tchimo? Ngati ndinena choonadi
John8:47 Iye wochokera kwa Mulungu amva zonena za Mulungu; inu simumva chifukwa chakuti simuli a kwa Mulungu.
John8:48 Ayuda anayankha nati kwa Iye
John8:49 Yesu anayankha
John8:50 Koma Ine sinditsata ulemerero wanga; alipo woutsata ndi wakuweruza.

John8:52 Ayuda anati kwa Iye
John8:53 Kodi Inu ndinu wamkulu ndi atate wathu Abrahamu
John8:54 Yesu anayankha

John8:56 Atate wanu Abrahamu anakondwera kuona tsiku langa; ndipo anaona nasangalala.

John8:58 Yesu anati kwa iwo

John10:2 Koma iye wakulowera pakhomo
John10:3 Iyeyu
John10:4 Pamene adatulutsa zonse nkhosa zimtsata iye; chifukwa zidziwa mau ake.
John10:5 Koma mlendo sizidzamtsata
John10:6 Fanizo ili Yesu ananena kwa iwo; koma sanazindikira zimene Yesu analikulankhula nao.
John10:7 Chifukwa chake Yesu ananenanso nao

John10:9 Ine ndine khomo; ngati wina alowa ndi Ine

John10:13 chifukwa ali wolipidwa

Acts8:16 pakuti kufikira pamenepo nkuti asanagwe pa wina mmodzi wa iwo; koma anangobatizidwa m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu.

Acts27:1 Ndipo pamene padatsimikizika kuti tipite m'ngalawa kunka ku Italiya
Acts27:2 Ndipo m'mene tidalowa m'ngalawa ya ku Adramitio ikati ipite kunka ku malo a ku mbali ya Asiya
Acts27:3 Ndipo m'mawa mwake tinangokocheza ku Sidoni; ndipo Julio anachitira Paulo mwachikondi
Acts27:4 Ndipo pokankhanso pamenepo
Acts27:5 Ndipo pamene tidapyola nyanja ya kunsi kwake kwa Silisiya ndi Pamfiliya
Acts27:6 Ndipo kenturiyo anapezako ngalawa ya ku Aleksandriya
Acts27:7 Ndipo m'mene tidapita pang'onopang'ono masiku ambiri
Acts27:8 ndipo popazapazapo movutika
Acts27:9 Ndipo itapita nthawi yambiri
Acts27:10 nanena nao
Acts27:11 Koma kenturiyo anakhulupirira watsigiro ndi mwini ngalawa makamaka
Acts27:12 Ndipo popeza dooko silinakoma kugonapo nyengo yachisanu
Acts27:13 Ndipo poomba pang'ono mwera
Acts27:14 Koma patapita pang'ono idaombetsa kuchokerako mphepo ya namondwe
Acts27:15 ndipo pogwidwa nayo ngalawa
Acts27:16 Ndipo popita kuseri kwa chisumbu chaching'ono dzina lake Kauda
Acts27:17 ndipo m'mene adaukweza
Acts27:18 Ndipo povutika kwakukulu ndi namondweyo
Acts27:19 ndipo tsiku lachitatu anataya ndi manja ao a iwo eni zipangizo za ngalawa.
Acts27:20 Ndipo m'mene dzuwa kapena nyenyezi sizinatiwalira masiku ambiri
Acts27:21 Ndipo pamene atakhala nthawi yaikulu osadya kanthu
Acts27:22 Koma tsopano ndikuchenjezani mulimbike mtima; pakuti sadzatayika wamoyo mmodzi mwa inu
Acts27:23 Pakuti anaimirira kwa ine usiku walero mngelo wa Mulungu amene ndili wake
Acts27:24 nanena
Acts27:25 Chifukwa chake
Acts27:26 Koma tiyenera kutayika pa chisumbu chakuti.
Acts27:27 Koma pofika usiku wakhumi ndi chinai
Acts27:28 ndipo anayesa madzi
Acts27:29 Ndipo pakuopa tingatayike pamiyala
Acts27:30 Ndipo m'mene amalinyero anafuna kuthawa m'ngalawa
Acts27:31 Paulo anati kwa kenturiyo ndi kwa asilikali
Acts27:32 Pamenepo asilikali anadula zingwe za bwato
Acts27:33 Ndipo popeza kulinkucha
Acts27:34 Momwemo ndikuchenjezani mutenge kanthu kakudya; pakuti kumeneku ndi kwa chipulumutso chanu; pakuti silidzatayika tsitsi la pa mutu wa mmodzi wa inu.
Acts27:35 Ndipo atanena izi
Acts27:36 Ndipo anakhala olimbika mtima onse
Acts27:37 Ndipo ife tonse tili m'ngalawa ndife anthu mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu ndi mmodzi.
Acts27:38 Ndipo m'mene anakhuta
Acts27:39 Ndipo kutacha sanazindikira dzikolo; koma anaona pali bondo la mchenga; kumeneko anafuna
Acts27:40 Ndipo m'mene anataya anangula anawasiya m'nyanja

Acts27:42 Ndipo uphungu wa asilikali udati awaphe andende
Acts27:43 Koma kenturiyo
Acts27:44 ndipo otsalawo

Acts28:4 Koma pamene akunjawo anaona chilombocho chili lende pa dzanja lake
Acts28:5 Koma anakutumulira chilombocho kumoto
Acts28:6 Koma anayesa kuti adzatupa
Acts28:7 Koma pafupi pamenepo panali minda
Acts28:8 Ndipo kunatero kuti atate wake wa Publioyo anagona wodwala nthenda ya malungo ndi kamwazi. Kwa iyeyu Paulo analowa
Acts28:9 Ndipo patachitika ichi
Acts28:10 amenenso anatichitira ulemu wambiri; ndipo pochoka ife anatiikira zotisowa.
Acts28:11 Ndipo itapita miyezi itatu tinayenda m'ngalawa ya ku Aleksandriya
Acts28:12 Ndipo pamene tinakocheza ku Sirakusa

Acts28:31 ndi kulalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu
Romans1:1 Paulo
Romans1:2 umene Iye analonjeza kale ndi mau a aneneri ake m'malembo oyera
Romans1:3 wakunena za Mwana wake
Romans1:4 amene anatsimikizidwa ndi mphamvu kuti ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu monga mwa Mzimu wa chiyero
Romans1:5 amene ife tinalandira naye chisomo ndi utumwi
Romans1:6 mwa amenewo muli inunso
Romans1:7 kwa onse a ku Roma
Romans1:8 Poyamba
Romans1:9 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga
Romans1:10 ndi kupempha masiku onse m'mapemphero anga
Romans1:11 Pakuti ndilakalaka kuonana ndinu
Romans1:12 ndiko
Romans1:13 Ndipo sindifuna kuti inu
Romans1:14 Ine ndili wamangawa wa Agriki ndi wa akunja
Romans1:15 Chotero
Romans1:16 Pakuti Uthenga Wabwino sundichititsa manyazi; pakuti uli mphamvu ya Mulungu yakupulumutsa munthu aliyense wakukhulupirira; kuyambira Myuda
Romans1:17 Pakuti m'menemo chaonetsedwa chilungamo cha Mulungu chakuchokera kuchikhulupiriro kuloza kuchikhulupiriro: monga kwalembedwa
Romans1:18 Pakuti mkwiyo wa Mulungu
Romans1:19 chifukwa chodziwika cha Mulungu chaonekera m'kati mwao; pakuti Mulungu anachionetsera kwa iwo.
Romans1:20 Pakuti chilengedwere dziko lapansi zaoneka bwino zosaoneka zake ndizo mphamvu yake yosatha ndi umulungu wake; popeza zazindikirika ndi zinthu zolengedwa
Romans1:21 chifukwa kuti
Romans1:22 Pakunena kuti ali anzeru
Romans1:23 nasandutsa ulemerero wa Mulungu wosaonongeka
Romans1:24 Chifukwa chake Mulungu anawapereka iwo m'zilakolako za mitima yao
Romans1:25 amenewo anasandutsa choonadi cha Mulungu chabodza napembedza
Romans1:26 Chifukwa cha ichi Mulungu anawapereka iwo ku zilakolako za manyazi: pakuti angakhale akazi ao anasandutsa machitidwe ao a chibadwidwe akhale machitidwe osalingana ndi chibadwidwe:
Romans1:27 ndipo chimodzimodzinso amuna anasiya machitidwe a chibadwidwe cha akazi
Romans1:28 Ndipo monga iwo anakana kukhala naye Mulungu m'chidziwitso chao
Romans1:29 anadzala ndi zosalungama zonse
Romans1:30 akazitape
Romans1:31 opanda nzeru
Romans1:32 amene ngakhale adziwa kuweruza kwake kwa Mulungu
Romans2:1 Chifukwa chake uli wopanda mau owiringula
Romans2:2 Ndipo tidziwa kuti kuweruza kwa Mulungu kuli koona pa iwo akuchita zotere.
Romans2:3 Ndipo uganiza kodi
Romans2:4 Kapena upeputsa kodi kulemera kwa ubwino wake
Romans2:5 Koma kolingana ndi kuuma kwako
Romans2:6 amene adzabwezera munthu aliyense kolingana ndi ntchito zake;
Romans2:7 kwa iwo amene afunafuna ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi chisaonongeko
Romans2:8 koma kwa iwo andeu
Romans2:9 nsautso ndi kuwawa mtima
Romans2:10 koma ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi mtendere kwa munthu aliyense wakuchita zabwino
Romans2:11 pakuti Mulungu alibe tsankho.
Romans2:12 Pakuti onse amene anachimwa opanda lamulo adzaonongeka opanda lamulo; ndi onse amene anachimwa podziwa lamulo adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo;
Romans2:13 pakuti akumvaimva lamulo sakhala olungama pamaso pa Mulungu
Romans2:14 Pakuti pamene anthu a mitundu akukhala opanda lamulo
Romans2:15 popeza iwo aonetsa ntchito ya lamulolo yolembedwa m'mitima yao
Romans2:16 tsiku limene Mulungu adzaweruza ndi Khristu Yesu zinsinsi za anthu
Romans2:17 Koma ngati iwe unenedwa Myuda
Romans2:18 nudziwa chifuniro chake
Romans2:19 nulimbika mumtima kuti iwe wekha uli wotsogolera wa akhungu
Romans2:20 wolangiza wa opanda nzeru
Romans2:21 ndiwe tsono wakuphunzitsa wina
Romans2:22 Iwe wakunena kuti munthu asachite chigololo
Romans2:23 Iwe wakudzitamandira pachilamulo
Romans2:24 Pakuti dzina la Mulungu lichitidwa mwano chifukwa cha inu
Romans2:25 Pakuti inde mdulidwe uli wabwino
Romans2:26 Chifukwa chake ngati wosadulidwa asunga zoikika za chilamulo
Romans2:27 Ndipo kusadulidwa
Romans2:28 Pakuti siali Myuda amene akhala wotere pamaso
Romans2:29 koma Myuda ndiye amene akhala wotere mumtima; ndipo mdulidwe uli wa mtima
Romans3:1 Ndipo potero Myuda aposa ninji? Kapena mdulidwe upindulanji?
Romans3:2 Zambiri monsemonse: choyamba
Romans3:3 Nanga bwanji ngati ena sanakhulupirira? Kodi kusakhulupirira kwao kuyesa chabe chikhulupiriko cha Mulungu?
Romans3:4 Msatero ai. Koma Mulungu akhale woona
Romans3:5 Koma ngati chosalungama chathu chitsimikiza chilungamo cha Mulungu
Romans3:6 Msatero ai. Ngati kotero
Romans3:7 Pakuti ngati choonadi cha Mulungu chichulukitsa ulemerero wake chifukwa cha bodza langa
Romans3:8 Ndipo tilekerenji kunena
Romans3:9 Ndipo chiyani tsono? Kodi tiposa ife? Iai ndithu; pakuti tidawaneneza kale Ayuda ndi Agriki omwe
Romans3:10 monga kwalembedwa
Romans3:11 palibe mmodzi wakudziwitsa
Romans3:12 onsewa apatuka
Romans3:13 M'mero mwao muli manda apululu; ndi lilime lao amanyenga; ululu wa mamba uli pansi pa milomo yao;
Romans3:14 m'kamwa mwao mudzala ndi zotemberera ndi zowawa;
Romans3:15 miyendo yao ichita liwiro kukhetsa mwazi;
Romans3:16 kusakaza ndi kusauka kuli m'njira zao;
Romans3:17 ndipo njira ya mtendere sanaidziwa;
Romans3:18 kumuopa Mulungu kulibe pamaso pao.
Romans3:19 Ndipo tidziwa kuti zinthu zilizonse chizinena chilamulo chizilankhulira iwo ali nacho chilamulo; kuti pakamwa ponse patsekedwe
Romans3:20 chifukwa kuti pamaso pake palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi ntchito za lamulo; pakuti uchimo udziwika ndi lamulo.
Romans3:21 Koma tsopano chilungamo cha Mulungu chaoneka chopanda lamulo
Romans3:22 ndicho chilungamo cha Mulungu chimene chichokera mwa chikhulupiriro cha pa Yesu Khristu kwa onse amene akhulupirira; pakuti palibe kusiyana;
Romans3:23 pakuti onse anachimwa
Romans3:24 ndipo ayesedwa olungama kwaulere
Romans3:25 amene Mulungu anamuika poyera akhale chotetezera mwa chikhulupiriro cha m'mwazi wake
Romans3:26 kuti aonetse chilungamo chake m'nyengo yatsopano; kuti Iye akhale wolungama
Romans3:27 Pamenepo kudzitama kuli kuti? Kwaletsedwa. Ndi lamulo lotani? La ntchito kodi? Iai; koma ndi lamulo la chikhulupiriro.
Romans3:28 Pakuti timuyesa munthu wolungama chifukwa cha chikhulupiriro
Romans3:29 Kapena Mulungu ndiye wa Ayuda okhaokha kodi? Si wao wa amitundunso kodi? Eya
Romans3:30 ngatitu ndiye Mulungu mmodzi
Romans3:31 Potero kodi lamulo tiyesa chabe mwa chikhulupiriro? Msatero ai; koma tikhazikitsa lamulo.
Romans4:1 Ndipo tsono tidzanena kuti Abrahamu
Romans4:2 Pakuti ngati Abrahamu anayesedwa wolungama chifukwa cha ntchito
Romans4:3 Pakuti lembo litani? Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu
Romans4:4 Ndipo kwa iye amene agwira ntchito
Romans4:5 Koma kwa iye amene sachita
Romans4:6 Monganso Davide anena za mdalitso wake wa munthu
Romans4:7 ndi kuti
Romans4:8 Wodala munthu amene Mulungu samwerengera uchimo.
Romans4:9 Mdalitso umenewu tsono uli kwa odulidwa kodi
Romans4:10 Tsono chinawerengedwa bwanji? M'mene iye anali wodulidwa kapena wosadulidwa? Si wodulidwa ai
Romans4:11 iye ndipo analandira chizindikiro cha mdulidwe
Romans4:12 ndiponso kholo la mdulidwe wa iwo amene siali a mdulidwe okha
Romans4:13 Pakuti lonjezo lakuti iye adzakhala wolowa nyumba wa dziko lapansi silinapatsidwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yake mwa lamulo
Romans4:14 Pakuti ngati iwo a lamulo akhala olowa nyumba
Romans4:15 pakuti chilamulo chichitira mkwiyo; koma pamene palibe lamulo
Romans4:16 Chifukwa chake chilungamo chichokera m'chikhulupiriro
Romans4:17 monga kwalembedwa: Ndinakukhazika iwe kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamaso pa Mulungu amene iye anamkhulupirira
Romans4:18 Amene anakhulupirira nayembekeza zosayembekezeka
Romans4:19 Ndipo iye osafooka m'chikhulupiriro sanalabadira thupi lake
Romans4:20 ndipo poyang'anira lonjezo la Mulungu sanagwedezeka chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira
Romans4:21 nakhazikikanso mumtima kuti
Romans4:22 Chifukwa chake ichi chinawerengedwa kwa iye chilungamo.
Romans4:23 Ndipo ichi sichinalembedwa chifukwa cha iye yekhayekha
Romans4:24 koma chifukwa cha ifenso
Romans4:25 amene anaperekedwa chifukwa cha zolakwa zathu
Romans5:1 Popeza tsono tayesedwa olungama ndi chikhulupiriro
Romans5:2 amene ife tikhoza kulowa naye ndi chikhulupiriro m'chisomo ichi m'mene tilikuimamo; ndipo tikondwera m'chiyembekezo cha ulemerero wa Mulungu.
Romans5:3 Ndipo si chotero chokha
Romans5:4 ndi chizolowezi chichita chiyembekezo:
Romans5:5 ndipo chiyembekezo sichichititsa manyazi; chifukwa chikondi cha Mulungu chinatsanulidwa m'mitima mwathu mwa Mzimu Woyera
Romans5:6 Pakuti pamene tinali chikhalire ofooka
Romans5:7 Pakuti ndi chivuto munthu adzafera wina wolungama; pakuti kapena wina adzalimbika mtima kufera munthu wabwino.
Romans5:8 Koma Mulungu atsimikiza kwa ife chikondi chake cha mwini yekha m'menemo
Romans5:9 Ndipo tsono popeza tinayesedwa olungama ndi mwazi wake
Romans5:10 Pakuti ngati
Romans5:11 Ndipo si chotero chokha
Romans5:12 Chifukwa chake
Romans5:13 Pakuti kufikira nthawi ya lamulo uchimo unali m'dziko lapansi; koma uchimo suwerengedwa popanda lamulo.
Romans5:14 Komatu imfa inachita ufumu kuyambira kwa Adamu kufikira kwa Mose
Romans5:15 Koma mphatso yaulere siilingana ndi kulakwa. Pakuti ngati ambiriwo anafa chifukwa cha kulakwa kwa mmodziyo
Romans5:16 Ndipo mphatso siinadza monga mwa mmodzi wakuchimwa
Romans5:17 Pakuti ngati
Romans5:18 Chifukwa chake
Romans5:19 Pakuti monga ndi kusamvera kwa munthu mmodzi ambiri anayesedwa ochimwa
Romans5:20 Ndipo lamulo linalowa moonjezera
Romans5:21 kuti
Romans6:1 Chifukwa chake tidzatani? Tidzakhalabe m'uchimo kodi
Romans6:2 Msatero ai. Ife amene tili akufa ku uchimo
Romans6:3 Kapena kodi simudziwa kuti ife tonse amene tinabatizidwa mwa Khristu Yesu; tinabatizidwa mu imfa yake?
Romans6:4 Chifukwa chake tinaikidwa m'manda pamodzi ndi Iye mwa ubatizo kulowa muimfa; kuti monga Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa mwa ulemerero wa Atate
Romans6:5 Pakuti ngati ife tinakhala olumikizidwa ndi Iye m'chifanizidwe cha imfa yake
Romans6:6 podziwa ichi
Romans6:7 pakuti iye amene anafa anamasulidwa kuuchimo.
Romans6:8 Koma ngati ife tinafa ndi Khristu
Romans6:9 podziwa kuti Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa
Romans6:10 Pakuti pakufa Iye
Romans6:11 Chotero inunso mudziwerengere inu nokha ofafa ku uchimo
Romans6:12 Chifukwa chake musamalola uchimo uchite ufumu m'thupi lanu la imfa kumvera zofuna zake:
Romans6:13 ndipo musapereke ziwalo zanu kuuchimo
Romans6:14 Pakuti uchimo sudzachita ufumu pa inu; popeza simuli a lamulo koma a chisomo.
Romans6:15 Ndipo chiyani tsono? Tidzachimwa kodi chifukwa sitili a lamulo
Romans6:16 Kodi simudziwa kuti kwa iye amene mudzipereka eni nokha kukhala akapolo ake akumvera iye
Romans6:17 Koma ayamikidwe Mulungu
Romans6:18 ndipo pamene munamasulidwa kuuchimo
Romans6:19 Ndilankhula manenedwe a anthu
Romans6:20 Pakuti pamene inu munali akapolo a uchimo
Romans6:21 Ndipo munali nazo zobala zanji nthawi ija
Romans6:22 Koma tsopano
Romans6:23 Pakuti mphotho yake ya uchimo ndi imfa; koma mphatso yaulere ya Mulungu ndiyo moyo wosatha wa mwa Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu.
Romans7:1 Nanga kodi simudziwa
Romans7:2 Pakuti mkazi wokwatidwa amangidwa ndi lamulo kwa mwamuna wake wamoyo; koma mwamunayo akafa
Romans7:3 Ndipo chifukwa chake
Romans7:4 Chotero
Romans7:5 Pakuti pamene tinali m'thupi
Romans7:6 Koma tsopano tinamasulidwa kuchilamulo
Romans7:7 Pamenepo tidzatani? Kodi chilamulo chili uchimo? Msatero ai. Koma ine sindikadazindikira uchimo
Romans7:8 koma uchimo
Romans7:9 Ndipo kale ine ndinali wamoyo popanda lamulo; koma pamene lamulo linadza
Romans7:10 Ndipo lamulo
Romans7:11 Pakuti uchimo
Romans7:12 Chotero chilamulo chili choyera
Romans7:13 Ndipo tsopano chabwino chija chinandikhalira imfa kodi? Msatero ai. Koma uchimo
Romans7:14 Pakuti tidziwa kuti chilamulo chili chauzimu; koma ine ndili wathupi
Romans7:15 Pakuti chimene ndichita sindichidziwa; pakuti sindichita chimene ndifuna
Romans7:16 Koma ngati ndichita chimene sindichifuna
Romans7:17 Ndipo tsopano si ine ndichichita
Romans7:18 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti m'kati mwanga
Romans7:19 Pakuti chabwino chimene ndichifuna
Romans7:20 Koma ngati ndichita chimene sindichifuna
Romans7:21 Ndipo chotero ndipeza lamulo ili
Romans7:22 Pakuti monga mwa munthu wa m'kati mwanga
Romans7:23 koma ndiona lamulo lina m'ziwalo zanga
Romans7:24 Munthu wosauka ine; adzandilanditsa ndani m'thupi la imfa iyi?
Romans7:25 Ndiyamika Mulungu
Romans8:1 Chifukwa chake tsopano iwo akukhala mwa Khristu Yesu alibe kutsutsidwa.
Romans8:2 Pakuti chilamulo cha mzimu wa moyo mwa Khristu Yesu chandimasula ine ku lamulo la uchimo ndi la imfa.
Romans8:3 Pakuti chimene chilamulo sichinathe kuchita
Romans8:4 kuti choikika chake cha chilamulo chikakwaniridwe mwa ife
Romans8:5 Pakuti iwo amene ali monga mwa thupi asamalira zinthu za thupi; koma iwo amene ali monga mwa mzimu
Romans8:6 pakuti chisamaliro cha thupi chili imfa; koma chisamaliro cha mzimu chili moyo ndi mtendere.
Romans8:7 Chifukwa chisamaliro cha thupi chidana ndi Mulungu; pakuti sichigonja ku chilamulo cha Mulungu
Romans8:8 Ndipo iwo amene ali m'thupi sangathe kukondweretsa Mulungu.
Romans8:9 Koma inu simuli m'thupi ai
Romans8:10 Ndipo ngati Khristu akhala mwa inu
Romans8:11 Koma ngati Mzimu wa Iye amene adaukitsa Yesu kwa akufa akhalabe mwa inu
Romans8:12 Chifukwa chake
Romans8:13 pakuti ngati mukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi
Romans8:14 Pakuti onse amene atsogozedwa ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu
Romans8:15 Pakuti inu simunalandira mzimu wa ukapolo kuchitanso mantha; koma munalandira mzimu wa umwana
Romans8:16 Mzimu yekha achita umboni pamodzi ndi mzimu wathu
Romans8:17 ndipo ngati ana
Romans8:18 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti masauko a nyengo yatsopano sayenera kulinganizidwa ndi ulemerero umene udzaonetsedwa kwa ife.
Romans8:19 Pakuti chiyembekezetso cha cholengedwa chilindira vumbulutso la ana a Mulungu.
Romans8:20 Pakuti cholengedwacho chagonjetsedwa kuutsiru
Romans8:21 kuti cholengedwa chomwe chidzamasulidwa ku ukapolo wa chivundi
Romans8:22 Pakuti tidziwa kuti cholengedwa chonse chibuula
Romans8:23 Ndipo si chotero chokha

Romans14:4 Ndani iwe wakuweruza mnyamata wa mwini wake? Iye aimirira kapena kugwa kwa mbuye wake wa mwini yekha. Ndipo adzaimiritsidwa; pakuti Ambuye ali wamphamvu kumuimiritsa.
Romans14:5 Munthu wina aganizira kuti tsiku lina liposa linzake; wina aganizira kuti masiku onse alingana. Munthu aliyense akhazikike konse mumtima mwake.

2Corinthians11:3 Koma ndiopa
2Corinthians11:4 Pakutitu ngati iye wakudza alalikira Yesu wina
2Corinthians11:5 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti sindinaperewera konse ndi atumwi oposatu.
2Corinthians11:6 Ndipo ndingakhale ndili wosaphunzira m'manenedwe
2Corinthians11:7 Kodi ndachimwa podzichepetsa ndekha
2Corinthians11:8 Ndinalanda za Mipingo ina
2Corinthians11:9 ndipo pakukhala nanu
2Corinthians11:10 Choonadi cha Khristu chili mwa ine
2Corinthians11:11 Chifukwa ninji? Chifukwa sindikonda inu kodi? Adziwa Mulungu.
2Corinthians11:12 Koma chimene ndichita
2Corinthians11:13 Pakuti otere ali atumwi onyenga
2Corinthians11:14 Ndipo kulibe kudabwa; pakuti Satana yemwe adzionetsa ngati mngelo wa kuunika.
2Corinthians11:15 Chifukwa chake sikuli kanthu kwakukulu ngatinso atumiki ake adzionetsa monga atumiki a chilungamo; amene chimaliziro chao chidzakhala monga ntchito zao.
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinenanso
2Corinthians11:17 Chimene ndilankhula sindilankhula monga mwa Ambuye
2Corinthians11:18 Popeza ambiri adzitamandira monga mwa thupi
2Corinthians11:19 Pakuti mulolana nao opanda nzeru mokondwera
2Corinthians11:20 Pakuti mulola ngati wina akuyesani inu akapolo
2Corinthians11:21 Ndinena monga mwa kunyoza
2Corinthians11:22 Kodi ali Ahebri? Inenso. Kodi ali Aisraele? Inenso. Kodi ali mbeu ya Abrahamu? Inenso.
2Corinthians11:23 Kodi ali atumiki a Khristu? (Ndilankhula monga moyaluka)
2Corinthians11:24 Kwa Ayuda ndinalandira kasanu mikwingwirima makumi anai kuperewera umodzi.
2Corinthians11:25 Katatu ndinamenyedwa ndi ndodo
2Corinthians11:26 paulendo kawirikawiri
2Corinthians11:27 m'chivutitso ndi m'cholemetsa
2Corinthians11:28 Popanda zakunjazo pali chondisindikiza tsiku ndi tsiku
2Corinthians11:29 Afooka ndani wosafooka inenso? Akhumudwitsidwa ndani
2Corinthians11:30 Ngati ndiyenera kudzitamandira
2Corinthians11:31 Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye Yesu
2Corinthians11:32 M'Damasiko kazembe wa mfumu Areta analindizitsa mudzi wa Adamasiko kuti andigwire ine;
2Corinthians11:33 ndipo mwa zenera

2Corinthians12:7 Ndipo kuti ndingakwezeke koposa

2Corinthians12:9 Ndipo ananena kwa ine

2Corinthians12:14 Taonani
2Corinthians12:15 Ndipo ndidzapereka ndi kuperekedwa konse chifukwa cha miyoyo yanu mokondweratu. Ngati ndikonda inu kochuluka koposa
2Corinthians12:16 Koma kukhale kotero; ine sindinalemetsa inu; koma pokhala wochenjera ine

2Corinthians12:18 Ndinadandaulira Tito

Ephesians4:32 Koma mukhalirane okoma wina ndi mnzake
Ephesians5:1 Chifukwa chake khalani akutsanza a Mulungu
Ephesians5:2 ndipo yendani m'chikondi monganso Khristu anakukondani inu
Ephesians5:3 Koma dama ndi chidetso chonse
Ephesians5:4 kapena chinyanso
Ephesians5:5 Pakuti ichi muchidziwe kuti wadama yense
Ephesians5:6 Asakunyengeni inu munthu ndi mau opanda pake
Ephesians5:7 Chifukwa chake musakhale olandirana nao;
Ephesians5:8 pakuti kale munali mdima
Ephesians5:9 pakuti chipatso cha kuunika tichipeza m'ubwino wonse
Ephesians5:10 kuyesera chokondweretsa Ambuye nchiyani;
Ephesians5:11 ndipo musayanjane nazo ntchito za mdima zosabala kanthu
Ephesians5:12 pakuti zochitidwa nao m'tseri
Ephesians5:13 Koma zinthu zonse potsutsika ndi kuunika

Ephesians5:16 akuchita machawi
Ephesians5:17 Chifukwa chake musakhale opusa
Ephesians5:18 Ndipo musaledzere naye vinyo
Ephesians5:19 ndi kudzilankhulira nokha ndi masalmo
Ephesians5:20 ndi kuyamika Mulungu Atate masiku onse
Ephesians5:21 ndi kumverana wina ndi mnzake m'kuopa Khristu.
Ephesians5:22 Akazi inu
Ephesians5:23 Pakuti mwamuna ndiye mutu wa mkazi
Ephesians5:24 Komatu monga Mpingo amvera Khristu
Ephesians5:25 Amuna inu
Ephesians5:26 kuti akampatule
Ephesians5:27 kuti Iye akadziikire yekha Mpingo wa ulemerero
Ephesians5:28 Koteronso amuna azikonda akazi ao a iwo okha monga ngati matupi a iwo okha. Wokonda mkazi wa iye yekha
Ephesians5:29 pakuti munthu sanadana nalo thupi lake ndi kale lonse; komatu alilera nalisunga
Ephesians5:30 pakuti tili ziwalo za thupi lake.
Ephesians5:31 Chifukwa cha ichi munthu azisiya atate ndi amai
Ephesians5:32 Chinsinsi ichi nchachikulu; koma ndinena ine za Khristu ndi Mpingo.

Ephesians6:1 Ananu
Ephesians6:2 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako (ndilo lamulo loyamba lokhala nalo lonjezano)
Ephesians6:3 kuti kukhale bwino ndi iwe
Ephesians6:4 Ndipo atate inu
Ephesians6:5 Akapolo inu
Ephesians6:6 si monga mwa ukapolo wa pamaso
Ephesians6:7 akuchita ukapolo ndi kuvomereza mtima
Ephesians6:8 podziwa kuti chinthu chokoma chilichonse yense achichita
Ephesians6:9 Ndipo
Ephesians6:10 Chotsalira
Ephesians6:11 Tavalani zida zonse za Mulungu
Ephesians6:12 Chifukwa kuti kulimbana kwathu sitilimbana nao mwazi ndi thupi
Ephesians6:13 Mwa ichi mudzitengere zida zonse za Mulungu
Ephesians6:14 Chifukwa chake chilimikani
Ephesians6:15 ndipo mutadziveka mapazi anu ndi makonzedwe a Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere;

Ephesians6:17 Mutengenso chisoti cha chipulumutso
Ephesians6:18 mwa pemphero lonse ndi pembedzero mupemphere nthawi yonse mwa Mzimu
Ephesians6:19 ndi ine ndemwe
Ephesians6:20 chifukwa cha umene ndili mtumiki wa m'unyolo
Ephesians6:21 Koma kuti mukadziwe inunso za kwa ine
Ephesians6:22 amene ndamtuma kwa inu chifukwa cha ichicho
Ephesians6:23 Mtendere ukhale kwa abale
Ephesians6:24 Akhale nacho chisomo onse akukonda Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu m'chosaonongeka.
Philippians1:1 Paulo ndi Timoteo
Philippians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu.
Philippians1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga pokumbukira inu ponse;
Philippians1:4 nthawi zonse m'pembedzero langa lonse la kwa inu nonse ndichita pembedzerolo ndi kukondwera
Philippians1:5 chifukwa cha chiyanjano chanu chakuthandizira Uthenga Wabwino
Philippians1:6 pokhulupirira pamenepo
Philippians1:7 monga kundiyenera ine kuyesa za inu nonse
Philippians1:8 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga
Philippians1:9 Ndipo ichi ndipempha
Philippians1:10 kuti mukayese inu zinthu zosiyana; kuti mukakhale a mtima woona ndi wosalakwa
Philippians1:11 odzala nacho chipatso cha chilungamo
Philippians1:12 Koma abale
Philippians1:13 kotero kuti zomangira zanga zinaonekera mwa Khristu m'bwalo lonse la alonda
Philippians1:14 ndi kuti unyinji wa abale mwa Ambuye
Philippians1:15 Enatu alalikiranso Khristu chifukwa cha kaduka ndi ndeu; koma enanso chifukwa cha kukoma mtima;
Philippians1:16 ena atero ndi chikondi
Philippians1:17 koma ena alalikira Khristu mochokera m'chotetana
Philippians1:18 Potero nchiyani? Chokhacho kuti monsemo
Philippians1:19 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti ichi chidzandichitira ine chipulumutso
Philippians1:20 monga mwa kulingiriritsa ndi chiyembekezo changa
Philippians1:21 Pakuti kwa ine kukhala ndi moyo ndiko Khristu
Philippians1:22 Koma ngati kukhala ndi moyo m'thupi ndiko chipatso cha ntchito yanga
Philippians1:23 Koma ndipanidwa nazo ziwirizi
Philippians1:24 koma kukhalabe m'thupi ndiko kufunika koposa
Philippians1:25 Ndipo pokhulupirira pamenepo ndidziwa kuti ndidzakhala
Philippians1:26 kuti kudzitamandira kwanu kuchuluke m'Khristu Yesu mwa ine
Philippians1:27 Chokhachi
Philippians1:28 osaopa adani m'kanthu konse
Philippians1:29 kuti kwapatsidwa kwa inu kwaufulu chifukwa cha Khristu
Philippians1:30 ndi kukhala nacho inu chilimbano chomwechi mudachiona mwa ine
Philippians2:1 Ngati tsono muli chitonthozo mwa Khristu
Philippians2:2 kwaniritsani chimwemwe changa
Philippians2:3 musachite kanthu monga mwa chotetana
Philippians2:4 munthu yense asapenyerere zake za iye yekha
Philippians2:5 Mukhale nao mtima m'kati mwanu umene unalinso mwa Khristu Yesu
Philippians2:6 ameneyo
Philippians2:7 koma anadzikhuthula yekha
Philippians2:8 ndipo popezedwa m'maonekedwe ngati munthu
Philippians2:9 Mwa ichinso Mulungu anamkwezetsa Iye
Philippians2:10 kuti m'dzina la Yesu bondo lililonse lipinde
Philippians2:11 ndi malilime onse avomere kuti Yesu Khristu ali Ambuye
Philippians2:12 Potero
Philippians2:13 pakuti wakuchita mwa inu kufuna ndi kuchita komwe
Philippians2:14 Chitani zonse kopanda madandaulo ndi makani
Philippians2:15 kuti mukakhale osalakwa ndi oona
Philippians2:16 akuonetsera mau a moyo; kuti ine ndikakhale wakudzitamandira nao m'tsiku la Khristu
Philippians2:17 Komatu ngatinso ndithiridwa pa nsembe ndi kutumikira kwa chikhulupiriro chanu
Philippians2:18 momwemonso kondwerani inu
Philippians2:19 Koma ndiyembekeza mwa Ambuye Yesu kuti ndidzatumiza Timoteo kwa inu msanga
Philippians2:20 Pakuti ndilibe wina wa mtima womwewo
Philippians2:21 Pakuti onsewa atsata za iwo okha
Philippians2:22 Koma muzindikira matsimikizidwe ake
Philippians2:23 Ameneyo ndithu tsono ndiyembekeza kumtuma posachedwa m'mene ndikapenyerera za kwa ine zidzatani;
Philippians2:24 koma ndikhulupirira mwa Ambuye kuti ine ndekhanso ndidzadza msanga.
Philippians2:25 Koma ndinayesa nkufunika kutuma kwa inu Epafrodito mbaleyo
Philippians2:26 popeza anali wolakalaka inu nonse
Philippians2:27 Pakutinso anadwaladi pafupi imfa; komatu Mulungu anamchitira chifundo; koma si iye yekha
Philippians2:28 Chifukwa chake ndamtuma iye chifulumizire
Philippians2:29 Chifukwa chake mumlandire mwa Ambuye
Philippians2:30 pakuti chifukwa cha ntchito ya Khristu anafikira pafupi imfa

Philippians4:3 Inde

Philippians4:13 Ndikhoza zonse mwa Iye wondipatsa mphamvuyo.

Philippians4:16 pakuti m'Tesalonikanso munanditumizira pa chosowa changa kamodzi kapena kawiri.

Philippians4:18 Koma ndili nazo zonse
Philippians4:19 Koma Mulungu wanga adzakwaniritsa chosowa chanu chilichonse monga mwa chuma chake m'ulemerero mwa Khristu Yesu.

Philippians4:21 Lankhulani woyera mtima aliyense mwa Khristu Yesu. Abalewo akukhala ndi ine alankhula inu.
Philippians4:22 Oyera mtima onse alankhula inu
Philippians4:23 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi mzimu wanu.
Colossians1:1 Paulo
Colossians1:2 kwa oyera mtima ndi abale okhulupirika mwa Khristu a m'Kolose: Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wochokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu.
Colossians1:3 Tiyamika Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu ndi kupempherera inu nthawi zonse
Colossians1:4 popeza tidamva za chikhulupiriro chanu cha mwa Khristu Yesu
Colossians1:5 chifukwa cha chiyembekezo chosungikira kwa inu m'Mwamba
Colossians1:6 umene udafikira kwa inu; monganso m'dziko lonse lapansi umabala zipatso
Colossians1:7 monga momwe munaphunzira kwa Epafra kapolo mnzathu wokondedwa
Colossians1:8 amenenso anatifotokozera chikondi chanu mwa Mzimu.
Colossians1:9 Mwa ichi ifenso
Colossians1:10 kuti mukayenda koyenera Ambuye kukamkondweretsa monsemo
Colossians1:11 olimbikitsidwa m'chilimbiko chonse
Colossians1:12 ndi kuyamika Atate
Colossians1:13 amene anatilanditsa ife kuulamuliro wa mdima
Colossians1:14 amene tili nao maomboledwe mwa Iye

Colossians1:18 Ndipo Iye ali mutu wa thupi

Colossians1:20 mwa Iyenso kuyanjanitsa zinthu zonse kwa Iye mwini
Colossians1:21 Ndipo inu
Colossians1:22 koma tsopano anakuyanjanitsani m'thupi lake mwa imfayo
Colossians1:23 ngatitu
Colossians1:24 Tsopano ndikondwera nazo zowawazo chifukwa cha inu
Colossians1:25 amene ndinakhala mtumiki wake
Colossians1:26 ndiwo chinsinsicho chinabisika kuyambira pa nthawizo
Colossians1:27 kwa iwo amene Mulungu anafuna kuwazindikiritsa ichi chimene chili chuma cha ulemerero wa chinsinsi pakati pa amitundu
Colossians1:28 amene timlalikira ife
Colossians1:29 kuchita ichi ndidzivutitsa ndi kuyesetsa monga mwa machitidwe ake akuchita mwa ine ndi mphamvu.

1Thessalonians1:3 ndi kukumbukira kosalekeza ntchito yanu ya chikhulupiriro
1Thessalonians1:4 podziwa
1Thessalonians1:5 kuti Uthenga Wabwino wathu sunadza kwa inu m'mau mokha
1Thessalonians1:6 Ndipo munayamba kukhala akutsanza athu
1Thessalonians1:7 kotero kuti munayamba kukhala inu chitsanzo kwa onse akukhulupirira m'Masedoniya ndi m'Akaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Pakuti kutuluka kwa inu kudamveka mau a Ambuye
1Thessalonians1:9 Pakuti iwo okha alalikira za ife
1Thessalonians1:10 ndi kulindirira Mwana wake achokere Kumwamba
1Thessalonians2:1 Pakuti
1Thessalonians2:2 koma tingakhale tidamva zowawa kale
1Thessalonians2:3 Pakuti kudandaulira kwathu sikuchokera kukusochera
1Thessalonians2:4 komatu monga Mulungu anativomereza kutiikiza Uthenga Wabwino
1Thessalonians2:5 Pakuti sitinayenda nao mau osyasyalika nthawi iliyonse monga mudziwa
1Thessalonians2:6 kapena sitinakhala ofuna ulemerero wa kwa anthu
1Thessalonians2:7 Komatu tinakhala ofatsa pakati pa inu
1Thessalonians2:8 kotero ife poliralira inu
1Thessalonians2:9 Pakuti mukumbukira
1Thessalonians2:10 Inu ndinu mboni
1Thessalonians2:11 monga mudziwa kuti tinachitira yense wa inu pa yekha
1Thessalonians2:12 ndi kukudandaulirani
1Thessalonians2:13 Ndipo mwa ichinso ife tiyamika Mulungu kosalekeza
1Thessalonians2:14 Pakuti inu
1Thessalonians2:15 amene adaphanso Ambuye Yesu
1Thessalonians2:16 natiletsa ife kuti tisalankhule ndi akunja kuti apulumutsidwe; kudzaza machimo ao nthawi zonse; koma mkwiyo wafika pa iwo kufikira chimaliziro.
