1Thessalonians4:1 Chotsalira tsono
1Thessalonians4:2 Pakuti mudziwa malangizo amene tinakupatsani mwa Ambuye Yesu.
1Thessalonians4:3 Pakuti ichi ndi chifuniro cha Mulungu
1Thessalonians4:4 yense wa inu adziwe kukhala nacho chotengera chake m'chiyeretso ndi ulemu
1Thessalonians4:5 kosati m'chiliro cha chilakolako chonyansa
1Thessalonians4:6 asapitirireko munthu
1Thessalonians4:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanaitana ife titsate chidetso
1Thessalonians4:8 Chifukwa chake iye wotaya ichi
1Thessalonians4:9 Koma kunena za chikondano cha pa abale sikufunika kuti akulembereni; pakuti wakukuphunzitsani ndi Mulungu
1Thessalonians4:10 pakutinso munawachitira ichi abale onse a m'Masedoniya lonse. Koma tikudandaulirani
1Thessalonians4:11 ndi kuti muyesetse kukhala chete ndi kuchita za inu eni ndi kugwira ntchito ndi manja anu
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti mukayende oona mtima pa iwo a kunja
1Thessalonians4:13 Koma sitifuna
1Thessalonians4:14 Pakuti ngati tikhulupirira kuti Yesu adamwalira
1Thessalonians4:15 Pakuti ichi tinena kwa inu m'mau a Ambuye
1Thessalonians4:16 Pakuti Ambuye adzatsika Kumwamba mwini yekha ndi mfuu
1Thessalonians4:17 pamenepo ife okhala ndi moyo
1Thessalonians4:18 Chomwecho
1Thessalonians5:1 Koma za nthawizo ndi nyengozo
1Thessalonians5:2 Pakuti inu nokha mudziwa bwino kuti tsiku la Ambuye lidzadza monga mbala usiku.
1Thessalonians5:3 Pamene angonena
1Thessalonians5:4 Koma inu
1Thessalonians5:5 pakuti inu nonse muli ana a kuunika
1Thessalonians5:6 chifukwa chake tsono tisagone monga otsalawo
1Thessalonians5:7 Pakuti iwo akugona agona usiku; ndi iwo akuledzera aledzera usiku.
1Thessalonians5:8 Koma ife popeza tili a usana tisaledzere
1Thessalonians5:9 Pakuti Mulungu sanatiika ife tilawe mkwiyo
1Thessalonians5:10 amene anafa m'malo mwathu
1Thessalonians5:11 Mwa ichi chenjezanani
1Thessalonians5:12 Koma
1Thessalonians5:13 ndipo muwachitire ulemu woposatu mwa chikondi
1Thessalonians5:14 Koma tidandaulira inu abale
1Thessalonians5:15 Penyani kuti wina asabwezere choipa womchitira choipa; komatu nthawi zonse mutsatire chokoma
1Thessalonians5:16 Kondwerani nthawi zonse;
1Thessalonians5:17 Pempherani kosaleka;
1Thessalonians5:18 M'zonse yamikani; pakuti ichi ndi chifuniro cha Mulungu cha kwa inu
1Thessalonians5:19 Musazime Mzimuyo;
1Thessalonians5:20 Musanyoze manenero;
1Thessalonians5:21 Yesani zonse; sungani chokomacho
1Thessalonians5:22 Mupewe maonekedwe onse a choipa.
1Thessalonians5:23 Ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere yekha ayeretse inu konsekonse; ndipo mzimu wanu ndi moyo wanu ndi thupi lanu zisungidwe zamphumphu
1Thessalonians5:24 Wakuitana inu ali wokhulupirika
1Thessalonians5:25 Abale
1Thessalonians5:26 Perekani moni kwa abale onse ndi chipsompsono chopatulika.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndikulumbirirani pa Ambuye kuti kalatayu awerengedwe kwa abale onse.
1Thessalonians5:28 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale nanu.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
2Thessalonians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu.
2Thessalonians1:3 Tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu
2Thessalonians1:4 kotero kuti ife tokha tidzitamandira za inu m'Mipingo ya Mulungu
2Thessalonians1:5 ndicho chitsimikizo cha chiweruziro cholungama cha Mulungu; kuti mukawerengedwe oyenera ufumu wa Mulungu
2Thessalonians1:6 popeza nkolungama kwa Mulungu kubwezera chisautso kwa iwo akuchitira inu chisautso
2Thessalonians1:7 ndi kwa inu akumva chisautso mpumulo pamodzi ndi ife
2Thessalonians1:8 m'lawi lamoto
2Thessalonians1:9 amene adzamva chilango
2Thessalonians1:10 pamene adzadza kudzalemekezedwa mwa oyera mtima ake
2Thessalonians1:11 Kukatero tikupemphereraninso nthawi zonse
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu lilemekezedwe mwa inu
2Thessalonians2:1 Ndipo tikupemphani
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musamagwedezeka mtima msanga ndi kutaya maganizo anu
2Thessalonians2:3 munthu asakunyengeni konseko; kuti silifika
2Thessalonians2:4 amene atsutsana nazo
2Thessalonians2:5 Simukumbukira kodi
2Thessalonians2:6 Ndipo tsopano chomletsa muchidziwa
2Thessalonians2:7 Pakuti chinsinsi cha kusaweruzika chayambadi kuchita; chokhachi pali womletsa tsopano
2Thessalonians2:8 Ndipo pamenepo adzavumbulutsidwa wosaweruzikayo
2Thessalonians2:9 ndiye amene kudza kwake kuli monga mwa machitidwe a Satana
2Thessalonians2:10 ndi m'chinyengo chonse cha chosalungama kwa iwo akuonongeka
2Thessalonians2:11 Ndipo chifukwa chake Mulungu atumiza kwa iwo machitidwe a kusocheretsa
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti aweruzidwe onse amene sanakhulupirira choonadi
2Thessalonians2:13 Koma tiyenera ife tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu
2Thessalonians2:14 kumene anaitanako inu mwa Uthenga Wabwino wathu
2Thessalonians2:15 Chifukwa chake tsono
2Thessalonians2:16 Ndipo Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu
2Thessalonians2:17 asangalatse mitima yanu
2Thessalonians3:1 Chotsalira
2Thessalonians3:2 ndi kuti tilanditsidwe m'manja a anthu osayenera ndi oipa; pakuti si onse ali nacho chikhulupiriro.
2Thessalonians3:3 Koma Ambuye ali wokhulupirika amene adzakukhazikitsani inu
2Thessalonians3:4 koma tikhulupirira mwa Ambuye za inu
2Thessalonians3:5 Ndipo Ambuye atsogolere bwino mitima yanu ilowe m'chikondi cha mulungu ndi m'chipiriro cha Khristu.
2Thessalonians3:6 Ndipo tikulamulirani
2Thessalonians3:7 Pakuti mudziwa nokha m'mene muyenera kutitsanza ifemo; pakuti sitinakhala dwakedwake mwa inu;
2Thessalonians3:8 kapena sitinadya mkate chabe pa dzanja la munthu aliyense
2Thessalonians3:9 si chifukwa tilibe ulamuliro
2Thessalonians3:10 Pakutinso pamene tinali nanu tidakulamulirani ichi
2Thessalonians3:11 Pakuti tikumva za ena mwa inu kuti ayenda dwakedwake
2Thessalonians3:12 Koma oterewa tiwalamulira ndi kuwadandaulira mwa Ambuye Yesu Khristu
2Thessalonians3:13 Koma inu
2Thessalonians3:14 Koma ngati wina samvera mau athu m'kalata uyu
2Thessalonians3:15 Koma musamuyese mdani
2Thessalonians3:16 Ndipo Ambuye wa mtendere yekha atipatse ife mtendere nthawi zonse
2Thessalonians3:17 Ndipereka moni ndi dzanja langa Paulo; ndicho chizindikiro m'kalata aliyense; ndiko kulemba kwanga.
2Thessalonians3:18 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu nonse.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo mwana wanga weniweni m'chikhulupiriro: Chisomo
1Timothy1:3 Monga ndinakudandaulira iwe utsalire m'Efeso
1Timothy1:4 kapena asasamale nkhani zachabe
1Timothy1:5 koma chitsirizo cha chilamuliro ndicho chikondi chochokera mu mtima woyera ndi m'chikumbu mtima chokoma ndi chikhulupiriro chosanyenga;
1Timothy1:6 zimenezo
1Timothy1:7 pofuna kukhala aphunzitsi a malamulo ngakhale sadziwitsa zimene azinena
1Timothy1:8 Koma mudziwa kuti lamulo ndi labwino
1Timothy1:9 podziwa ichi
1Timothy1:10 achigololo
1Timothy1:11 monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Mulungu wolemekezeka
1Timothy1:12 Ndimyamika Iye wondipatsa ine mphamvu
1Timothy1:13 ndingakhale kale ndinali wamwano
1Timothy1:14 koma chisomo cha Ambuye wathu chidachulukatu pamodzi ndi chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi chili mwa Khristu Yesu.
1Timothy1:15 Mauwa ali okhulupirika ndi oyenera konse kuti awalandire
1Timothy1:16 komatu mwa ichi anandichitira chifundo
1Timothy1:17 Ndipo kwa Mfumu yosatha
1Timothy1:18 Lamulo ili ndipereka kwa iwe
1Timothy1:19 ndi kukhala nacho chikhulupiriro ndi chikumbu mtima chokoma
1Timothy1:20 a iwo ali Himeneo ndi Aleksandro
1Timothy2:1 Ndidandaulira tsono
1Timothy2:2 chifukwa cha mafumu ndi onse akuchita ulamuliro; kuti m'moyo mwathu tikakhale odika mtima ndi achete m'kulemekeza Mulungu
1Timothy2:3 Pakuti ichi nchokoma ndi cholandirika pamaso pa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu;
1Timothy2:4 amene afuna anthu onse apulumuke
1Timothy2:5 Pakuti pali Mulungu mmodzi
1Timothy2:6 amene anadzipereka yekha chiombolo m'malo mwa onse; umboni m'nyengo zake;
1Timothy2:7 umene anandiika ine mlaliki wake ndi mtumwi (ndinena zoona
1Timothy2:8 Chifukwa chake ndifuna kuti amunawo apemphere pamalo ponse
1Timothy2:9 Momwemonso
1Timothy2:10 komatu (umo mokomera akazi akuvomereza kulemekeza Mulungu)
1Timothy2:11 Mkazi aphunzire akhale wachete m'kumvera konse.
1Timothy2:12 Koma sindilola ine kuti mkazi aphunzitse
1Timothy2:13 Pakuti Adamu anayamba kulengedwa
1Timothy2:14 ndipo Adamu sananyengedwa
1Timothy2:15 koma adzapulumutsidwa mwa kubala mwana
1Timothy3:1 Mauwa ali okhulupirika
1Timothy3:2 Ndipo kuyenera woyang'anira akhale wopanda chilema
1Timothy3:3 wosati woledzera
1Timothy3:4 woweruza bwino nyumba yake ya iye yekha
1Timothy3:5 Koma ngati munthu sadziwa kuweruza nyumba ya iye yekha
1Timothy3:6 Asakhale wophunza
1Timothy3:7 Kuyeneranso kuti iwo akunja adzakhoza kumchitira umboni wabwino; kuti ungamgwere mtonzo
1Timothy3:8 Momwemonso atumiki akhale olemekezeka
1Timothy3:9 okhala nacho chinsinsi cha chikhulupiriro m'chikumbu mtima choona.
1Timothy3:10 Koma iwonso ayamba ayesedwe; pamenepo atumikire
1Timothy3:11 Momwemonso akazi akhale olemekezeka
1Timothy3:12 Atumiki akhale mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi
1Timothy3:13 Pakuti iwo akutumikira bwino adzitengera okha mbiri yabwino
1Timothy3:14 Izi ndikulembera ndi kuyembekeza kudza kwa iwe posachedwa
1Timothy3:15 kuti udziwe kuyenedwa kwake pokhala m'nyumba ya Mulungu
1Timothy3:16 Ndipo povomerezeka
1Timothy4:1 Koma Mzimu anena monenetsa
1Timothy4:2 m'maonekedwe onyenga a iwo onena mabodza
1Timothy4:3 a kuletsa ukwati
1Timothy4:4 Pakuti cholengedwa chonse cha Mulungu nchabwino
1Timothy4:5 pakuti kayeretsedwa ndi Mau a Mulungu ndi kupemphera.
1Timothy4:6 Ngati ukumbutsa abale zinthu izi
1Timothy4:7 koma nkhani zachabe ndi za akazi okalamba ukane. Ndipo udzizoloweretse kuchita chipembedzo;
1Timothy4:8 pakuti chizolowezi cha thupi chipindula pang'ono
1Timothy4:9 Okhulupirika mauwa ndi oyenera kulandiridwa konse.
1Timothy4:10 Pakuti kukalingako tigwiritsa ntchito ndi kuyesetsa
1Timothy4:11 Lamulira izi
1Timothy4:12 Munthu asapeputse ubwana wako; komatu khala chitsanzo kwa iwo okhulupirira
1Timothy4:13 Kufikira ndidza ine
1Timothy4:14 Usanyalapse mphatsoyo ili mwa iwe
1Timothy4:15 Izi uzisamalitse; mu izi ukhale; kuti kukula mtima kwako kuonekere kwa onse.
1Timothy4:16 Udzipenyerere wekha
1Timothy5:1 Mkulu usamdzudzule
1Timothy5:2 akazi akulu ngati amai; akazi aang'ono ngati alongo
1Timothy5:3 Chitira ulemu amasiye amene ali amasiye ndithu.
1Timothy5:4 Koma ngati wamasiye wina ali nao ana kapena adzukulu
1Timothy5:5 Koma iye amene ali wamasiye ndithu
1Timothy5:6 Koma iye wakutsata zomkondweretsa
1Timothy5:7 Ndipo izi ulamulire
1Timothy5:8 Koma ngati wina sadzisungiratu mbumba yake ya iye yekha
1Timothy5:9 Asawerengedwe wamasiye ngati sanafikire zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi
1Timothy5:10 wa mbiri ya ntchito zabwino; ngati walera ana
1Timothy5:11 Koma amasiye ang'ono uwakane; pakuti pamene ayamba kumchitira Khristu chipongwe afuna kukwatiwa;
1Timothy5:12 pokhala nacho chitsutso
1Timothy5:13 Ndipo aphunziraponso kuchita ulesi
1Timothy5:14 Chifukwa chake nditi akwatiwe amasiye ang'ono
1Timothy5:15 pakuti adayamba ena kupatuka ndi kutsata Satana.
1Timothy5:16 Ngati mkazi wina wokhulupirira ali nao amasiye

1Timothy5:18 Pakuti malembo ati
1Timothy5:19 Pa mkulu usalandire chomnenera
1Timothy5:20 Iwo akuchimwa uwadzudzule pamaso pa onse
1Timothy5:21 Ndikuchitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu
1Timothy5:22 Usafulumira kuika manja pa munthu aliyense
1Timothy5:23 Usakhalenso wakumwa madzi okha
1Timothy5:24 Zochimwa za anthu ena zili zooneka kale
1Timothy5:25 Momwemonso pali ntchito zokoma zinaonekera kale; ndipo zina zosati zotere sizikhoza kubisika.
1Timothy6:1 Onse amene ali akapolo a m'goli
1Timothy6:2 Ndipo iwo akukhala nao ambuye okhulupirira
1Timothy6:3 Ngati munthu aphunzitsa zina
1Timothy6:4 iyeyo watukumuka
1Timothy6:5 makani opanda pake a anthu oipsika nzeru ndi ochotseka choonadi
1Timothy6:6 Koma chipembedzo pamodzi ndi kudekha chipindulitsa kwakukulu;
1Timothy6:7 pakuti sitinatenga kanthu polowa m'dziko lapansi
1Timothy6:8 koma pokhala nazo zakudya ndi zofunda
1Timothy6:9 Koma iwo akufuna kukhala achuma amagwa m'chiyesero ndi m'msampha
1Timothy6:10 Pakuti muzu wa zoipa zonse ndiwo chikondi cha pa ndalama; chimene ena pochikhumba
1Timothy6:11 Koma iwe
1Timothy6:12 Limba nayo nkhondo yabwino ya chikhulupiriro
1Timothy6:13 Ndikulamulira pamaso pa Mulungu
1Timothy6:14 kuti usunge lamulolo
1Timothy6:15 limene adzalionetsa m'nyengo za Iye yekha
1Timothy6:16 amene Iye yekha ali nao moyo wosatha
1Timothy6:17 Lamulira iwo achuma m'nthawi yino ya pansi pano
1Timothy6:18 kuti achite zabwino
1Timothy6:19 nadzikundikire okha maziko okoma ku nyengo ikudzayi
1Timothy6:20 Timoteo iwe
1Timothy6:21 chimene ena pochivomereza adalakwa ndi kutaya chikhulupiriro. Chisomo chikhale nanu.
2Timothy1:1 Paulo mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu
2Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu
2Timothy1:4 pokhumba usiku ndi usana kukuona iwe
2Timothy1:5 pokumbukira chikhulupiriro chosanyenga chili mwa iwe
2Timothy1:6 Chifukwa chake ndikukumbutsa iwe ukoleze mphatso ya Mulungu
2Timothy1:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanatipatsa mzimu wa mantha; komatu wa mphamvu ndi chikondi ndi chidziletso.
2Timothy1:8 Potero usachite manyazi pa umboni wa Ambuye wathu
2Timothy1:9 amene anatipulumutsa ife
2Timothy1:10 koma chaonetsedwa tsopano m'maonekedwe a Mpulumutsi wathu Khristu Yesu
2Timothy1:11 umene ndaikikapo mlaliki
2Timothy1:12 Chifukwa cha ichicho ndinamva zowawa izi; komatu sindichita manyazi; pakuti ndimdziwa Iye amene ndamkhulupirira
2Timothy1:13 Gwira chitsanzo cha mau a moyo
2Timothy1:14 Chosungitsa chokomacho udikire mwa Mzimu Woyera amene akhalitsa mwa ife.
2Timothy1:15 Ichi uchidziwa
2Timothy1:16 Ambuye achitire banja la Onesifore chifundo; pakuti anatsitsimutsa ine kawirikawiri
2Timothy1:17 komatu pokhala m'Roma iye anandifunafuna ine ndi khama
2Timothy1:18 (Ambuye ampatse iye apeze chifundo ndi Ambuye tsiku lijalo); ndi muja ananditumikira m'zinthu zambiri m'Efeso
2Timothy2:1 Ndipo iwe
2Timothy2:2 Ndipo zimene wazimva kwa ine mwa mboni zambiri
2Timothy2:3 Umve zowawa pamodzi nane monga msilikali wabwino wa Khristu Yesu.
2Timothy2:4 Msilikali sakodwa nazo ntchito wamba
2Timothy2:5 Koma ngatinso wina ayesana nao m'makani amasewero
2Timothy2:6 Wam'munda wogwiritsitsa ntchitoyo ayenera akhale woyamba kulandira zipatsozo.
2Timothy2:7 Lingirira chimene ndinena; pakuti Ambuye adzakupatsa chidziwitso m'zonse.
2Timothy2:8 Kumbukira Yesu Khristu
2Timothy2:9 m'menemo ndimva zowawa kufikira zomangira
2Timothy2:10 Mwa ichi ndipirira zonse
2Timothy2:11 Okhulupirika mauwa: Pakuti ngati tidamwalira ndi Iye
2Timothy2:12 ngati tipirira
2Timothy2:13 ngati tikhala osakhulupirika
2Timothy2:14 Uwakumbutse izi
2Timothy2:15 Uchite changu kudzionetsera kwa Mulungu wovomerezeka
2Timothy2:16 Koma pewa nkhani zopanda pake; pakuti adzapitirira kutsata chisapembedzo
2Timothy2:17 ndipo mau ao adzanyeka chilonda; a iwo ali Himeneo ndi Fileto;
2Timothy2:18 ndiwo amene adasokera kunena za choonadi
2Timothy2:19 Koma ndithu maziko a Mulungu aimika pokhazikika
2Timothy2:20 Koma m'nyumba yaikulu simuli zotengera za golide ndi siliva zokha
2Timothy2:21 Ngati tsono munthu adziyeretsa yekha pa izi
2Timothy2:22 Koma thawa zilakolako za unyamata
2Timothy2:23 Koma mafunso opusa ndi opanda malango upewe
2Timothy2:24 Ndipo kapolo wa Ambuye sayenera kuchita ndeu
2Timothy2:25 wolangiza iwo akutsutsana mofatsa; ngati kapena Mulungu awapatse iwo chitembenuziro
2Timothy2:26 ndipo akadzipulumutse kumsampha wa mdierekezi
2Timothy3:1 Koma zindikira ichi
2Timothy3:2 Pakuti anthu adzakhala odzikonda okha
2Timothy3:3 osayera mtima
2Timothy3:4 achiwembu
2Timothy3:5 akukhala nao maonekedwe a chipembedzo
2Timothy3:6 Pakuti mwa iwo akhala akukwawira m'nyumba
2Timothy3:7 ophunzira nthawi zonse
2Timothy3:8 Ndipo monga momwe Yane ndi Yambere anatsutsana naye Mose
2Timothy3:9 Koma sadzapitirirapo; pakuti kupusa kwao kudzaonekeratu kwa onse
2Timothy3:10 Koma iwe watsatatsata chiphunzitso changa
2Timothy3:11 mazunzo
2Timothy3:12 Ndipo onse akufuna kukhala opembedza m'moyo mwa Khristu Yesu
2Timothy3:13 Koma anthu oipa ndi onyenga
2Timothy3:14 Koma ukhalebe iwe mu izi zimene waziphunzira
2Timothy3:15 ndi kuti kuyambira ukhanda wako wadziwa malembo opatulika
2Timothy3:16 Lemba lililonse adaliuzira Mulungu
2Timothy3:17 kuti munthu wa Mulungu akhale woyenera
2Timothy4:1 Ndikuchitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Khristu Yesu
2Timothy4:2 lalikira mau; chita nao pa nthawi yake
2Timothy4:3 Pakuti idzafika nthawi imene sadzalola chiphunzitso cholamitsa; komatu poyabwa m'khutu adzadziunjikitsa aphunzitsi monga mwa zilakolako za iwo okha:
2Timothy4:4 ndipo adzalubza dala pachoonadi
2Timothy4:5 Koma iwe
2Timothy4:6 Pakuti ndilimkuthiridwa nsembe tsopano
2Timothy4:7 Ndalimbana nako kulimbana kwabwino
2Timothy4:8 chotsalira wandiikira ine korona wa chilungamo
2Timothy4:9 Tayesetsa kudza kwa ine msanga:
2Timothy4:10 pakuti Dema wandisiya ine
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko
2Timothy4:12 Koma Tikiko ndamtuma ku Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Chofunda chija ndinachisiya ku Troasi kwa Karpo
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandro wosula mkuwa anandichitira zoipa zambiri: adzambwezera iye Ambuye monga mwa ntchito zake;
2Timothy4:15 ameneyo iwenso uchenjere naye; pakuti anatsutsana nao mau athu.
2Timothy4:16 Pa chodzikanira changa choyamba panalibe mmodzi anandithangata
2Timothy4:17 Koma Ambuye anaima nane nandipatsa mphamvu; kuti mwa ine chilalikiro chimveke konsekonse
2Timothy4:18 Ambuye adzandilanditsa ku ntchito yonse yoipa
2Timothy4:19 Pereka moni kwa Prisika ndi Akwila
2Timothy4:20 Erasto anakhalira m'Korinto; koma Trofimo ndamsiya wodwala ku Mileto.
2Timothy4:21 Tayesetsa kudza isanadze nyengo yachisanu. Akukupatsa moni Yubulo
2Timothy4:22 Ambuye akhale ndi mzimu wako. Chisomo chikhale nanu.
Titus1:1 Paulo
Titus1:2 m'chiyembekezo cha moyo wosatha
Titus1:3 koma pa nyengo za Iye yekha anaonetsa mau ake muulalikiro
Titus1:4 kwa Tito
Titus1:5 Chifukwa cha ichi ndinakusiya iwe m'Krete
Titus1:6 ngati wina ali wopanda chilema
Titus1:7 Pakuti woyang'anira ayenera kukhala wopanda chilema
Titus1:8 komatu wokonda kuchereza alendo
Titus1:9 wogwira mau okhulupirika monga mwa chiphunzitso
Titus1:10 Pakuti alipo ambiri osamvera mau
Titus1:11 amene ayenera kutsekedwa pakamwa; ndiwo amene apasula mabanja banja lonse
Titus1:12 Wina wa mwa iwo
Titus1:13 Umboni uwu uli woona. Mwa ichi uwadzudzule mokalipa
Titus1:14 osasamala nthano zachabe za Chiyuda
Titus1:15 Zonse ziyera kwa iwo amene ayera mtima; koma kwa iwo odetsedwa ndi osakhulupirira kulibe kanthu koyera; komatu zadetsedwa nzeru zao ndi chikumbu mtima chao.
Titus1:16 Avomereza kuti adziwa Mulungu
Titus2:1 Koma iwe
Titus2:2 okalamba akhale odzisunga
Titus2:3 Momwemonso akazi okalamba akhale nao makhalidwe oyenera anthu oyera
Titus2:4 kuti akalangize akazi aang'ono akonde amuna ao
Titus2:5 akhale odziletsa
Titus2:6 Momwemonso anyamata uwadandaulire akhale odziletsa;
Titus2:7 m'zonse udzionetsere wekha chitsanzo cha ntchito zabwino; m'chiphunzitso chako uonetsere chosavunda
Titus2:8 mau olama osatsutsika; kuti iye wakutsutsana achite manyazi
Titus2:9 Akapolo amvere ambuye ao a iwo okha
Titus2:10 osatapa pa zao
Titus2:11 Pakuti chaonekera chisomo cha Mulungu chakupulumutsa anthu onse
Titus2:12 ndi kutiphunzitsa ife kuti
Titus2:13 akulindira chiyembekezo chodala
Titus2:14 amene anadzipereka yekha m'malo mwa ife
Titus2:15 Izi lankhula
Titus3:1 Uwakumbutse iwo agonje kwa akulu
Titus3:2 asachitire mwano munthu aliyense
Titus3:3 Pakuti kale ifenso tinali opusa
Titus3:4 Koma pamene kukoma mtima
Titus3:5 zosati zochokera m'ntchito za m'chilungamo
Titus3:6 amene anatsanulira pa ife mochulukira
Titus3:7 kuti poyesedwa olungama ndi chisomo cha Iyetu
Titus3:8 Okhulupirika mauwa
Titus3:9 koma pewa mafunso opusa
Titus3:10 Munthu wopatukira chikhulupiriro
Titus3:11 podziwa kuti wotereyo wasandulika konse
Titus3:12 Pamene ndikatuma Aritema kwa iwe
Titus3:13 Zena nkhoswe ya milandu
Titus3:14 Ndipo anthu athu aphunzirenso asunge ntchito zabwino zofunika
Titus3:15 Akukupatsa moni onse akukhala pamodzi ndi ine. Pereka moni kwa otikondawo m'chikhulupiriro. Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse.
Philemon1:1 Paulo
Philemon1:2 ndi kwa Afiya mlongoyo
Philemon1:3 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu.
Philemon1:4 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse
Philemon1:5 pakumva za chikondi chako ndi chikhulupiriro uli nacho chakulinga kwa Ambuye Yesu
Philemon1:6 kuti chiyanjano cha chikhulupiriro chako chikakhale champhamvu podziwa chabwino chilichonse chili mwa inu
Philemon1:7 Pakuti ndinali nacho chimwemwe chambiri ndi chisangalatso pa chikondi chako
Philemon1:8 Momwemo
Philemon1:9 koma makamaka ndidandaulira mwa chikondi
Philemon1:10 ndikudandaulira chifukwa cha mwana wanga
Philemon1:11 amene kale sanakupindulira
Philemon1:12 amene ndi yemweyo ndakubwezera iwe
Philemon1:13 Ameneyo ndikadafuna ine kumsunga akhale nane
Philemon1:14 koma wopanda kudziwa mtima wako sindinafuna kuchita kanthu; kuti ubwino wako usakhale monga mokakamiza
Philemon1:15 Pakuti kapena anasiyanitsidwa ndi iwe kanthawi chifukwa cha ichi
Philemon1:16 osatinso monga kapolo
Philemon1:17 Ngati tsono undiyesa woyanjana nawe
Philemon1:18 Koma ngati anakulakwira kanthu
Philemon1:19 ine Paulo ndichilemba ndi dzanja langa
Philemon1:20 Inde
Philemon1:21 Pokhulupirira kumvera kwako ndikulembera iwe
Philemon1:22 Koma undikonzerenso pogona; pakuti ndiyembekeza kuti mwa mapemphero anu ndidzapatsidwa kwa inu.
Philemon1:23 Epafra wandende mnzanga mwa Khristu Yesu akukupatsa moni;
Philemon1:24 ateronso
Philemon1:25 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale pamodzi ndi mzimu wanu. Amen.

Hebrews10:2 Pakadapanda kutero

Hebrews10:5 Mwa ichi polowa m'dziko lapansi

Hebrews10:16 Ichi ndi chipangano ndidzapangana nao

Hebrews10:29 ndipo mutani

Hebrews10:33 pena pochitidwa chinthu chooneredwa mwa matonzo ndi zisautso; penanso polawana nao iwo ochitidwa zotere.
Hebrews10:34 Pakuti munamva chifundo ndi iwo a m'ndende
Hebrews10:35 Potero musataye kulimbika kwanu
Hebrews10:36 Pakuti chikusowani chipiriro
Hebrews10:37 Pakuti katsala kanthawi kakang'onong'ono
Hebrews10:38 Koma wolungama wangayo adzakhala ndi moyo wochokera m'chikhulupiriro: Ndipo ngati abwerera
Hebrews10:39 Koma ife si ndife a iwo akubwerera kulowa chitayiko; koma a iwo a chikhulupiriro cha ku chipulumutso cha moyo.
Hebrews11:1 Koma chikhulupiriro ndicho chikhazikitso cha zinthu zoyembekezeka
Hebrews11:2 Pakuti momwemo akulu anachitidwa umboni.
Hebrews11:3 Ndi chikhulupiriro tizindikira kuti maiko ndi a m'mwamba omwe anakonzedwa ndi mau a Mulungu
Hebrews11:4 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abele anapereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yoposa ija ya Kaini
Hebrews11:5 Ndi chikhulupiriro Enoki anatengedwa kuti angaone imfa; ndipo sanapezeka
Hebrews11:6 koma wopanda chikhulupiriro sikutheka kumkondweretsa; pakuti iye wakudza kwa Mulungu ayenera kukhulupirira kuti alipo
Hebrews11:7 Ndi chikhulupiriro Nowa
Hebrews11:8 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu
Hebrews11:9 Ndi chikhulupiriro anakhala mlendo kudziko la lonjezano
Hebrews11:10 pakuti analindirira mudzi wokhala nao maziko
Hebrews11:11 Ndi chikhulupiriro Sara yemwe analandira mphamvu yakukhala ndi pakati
Hebrews11:12 mwa ichinso kudachokera kwa mmodzi
Hebrews11:13 Iwo onse adamwalira m'chikhulupiriro
Hebrews11:14 Pakuti iwo akunena zotere aonetserapo kuti alikufuna dziko likhale lao.
Hebrews11:15 Ndipotu akadakumbukira lijalo adatulukamo akadaona njira yakubwera nayo.
Hebrews11:16 Koma tsopano akhumba lina loposa
Hebrews11:17 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu
Hebrews11:18 amene kudanenedwa za iye
Hebrews11:19 poyesera iye kuti Mulungu ngwokhoza kuukitsa
Hebrews11:20 Ndi chikhulupiriro Isaki anadalitsa Yakobo ndi Esau
Hebrews11:21 Ndi chikhulupiriro Yakobo
Hebrews11:22 Ndi chikhulupiriro
Hebrews11:23 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose
Hebrews11:24 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose
Hebrews11:25 nasankhula kuchitidwa zoipa pamodzi ndi anthu a Mulungu
Hebrews11:26 nawerenga tonzo la Khristu chuma choposa zolemera za Aejipito; pakuti anapenyerera chobwezera cha mphotho.
Hebrews11:27 Ndi chikhulupiriro anasiya Ejipito
Hebrews11:28 Ndi chikhulupiriro anachita Paska
Hebrews11:29 Ndi chikhulupiriro anaoloka Nyanja Yofiira kupita ngati pamtunda: ndiko Aejipito poyesanso anamizidwa.
Hebrews11:30 Ndi chikhulupiriro malinga a Yeriko adagwa atazunguliridwa masiku asanu ndi awiri.
Hebrews11:31 Ndi chikhulupiriro Rahabu wadama uja sanaonongeka pamodzi ndi osamverawo
Hebrews11:32 Ndipo ndinene chiyaninso? Pakuti idzandiperewera nthawi ndifotokozere za Gideoni
Hebrews11:33 mene mwa chikhulupiriro anagonjetsa maufumu
Hebrews11:34 nazima mphamvu ya moto
Hebrews11:35 Akazi analandira akufa ao mwa kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo ena anakwapulidwa
Hebrews11:36 kuti akalandire kuuka koposa; koma ena anayesedwa ndi matonzo ndi zokwapulira
Hebrews11:37 anaponyedwa miyala
Hebrews11:38 (amenewo dziko lapansi silinayenera iwo)
Hebrews11:39 Ndipo iwo onse adachitidwa umboni mwa chikhulupiriro
Hebrews11:40 popeza Mulungu adatikonzera ife kanthu koposa
Hebrews12:1 Chifukwa chake ifenso
Hebrews12:2 Yesu
Hebrews12:3 Pakuti talingirirani Iye amene adapirira ndi ochimwa otsutsana naye kotere
Hebrews12:4 Simunakana kufikira mwazi pogwirana nalo tchimo;
Hebrews12:5 ndipo mwaiwala dandauliro limene linena nanu monga ndi ana
Hebrews12:6 pakuti iye amene Ambuye amkonda amlanga
Hebrews12:7 Mukapirira kufikira kulangidwa Mulungu achitira inu monga ngati ana; pakuti mwana wanji amene atate wake wosamlanga?
Hebrews12:8 Koma ngati mukhala opanda chilango
Hebrews12:9 Komanso
Hebrews12:10 Pakutitu iwo anatilanga masiku owerengeka monga kudawakomera; koma Iye atero
Hebrews12:11 Chilango chilichonse
Hebrews12:12 Mwa ichi limbitsani manja ogooka
Hebrews12:13 ndipo lambulani miseu yolunjika yoyendamo mapazi anu
Hebrews12:14 Londolani mtendere ndi anthu onse
Hebrews12:15 ndi kuyang'anira kuti pangakhale wina wakuperewera chisomo cha Mulungu
Hebrews12:16 kuti pangakhale wachigololo
Hebrews12:17 Pakuti mudziwa kutinso pamene anafuna kulowa dalitsolo
Hebrews12:18 Pakuti simunayandikira phiri lokhudzika
Hebrews12:19 ndi mau a lipenga
Hebrews12:20 pakuti sanakhoza kulola cholamulidwacho. Ingakhale nyama ikakhudza phirilo
Hebrews12:21 ndipo maonekedwewo anali oopsa otere
Hebrews12:22 Komatu mwayandikira kuphiri la Ziyoni
Hebrews12:23 ndi kwa msonkhano wa onse ndi Mpingo wa obadwa oyamba olembedwa m'Mwamba
Hebrews12:24 ndi kwa Yesu Nkhoswe ya chipangano chatsopano
Hebrews12:25 Penyani musakane wolankhulayo. Pakuti ngati iwowa sanapulumuka
Hebrews12:26 amene mau ake anagwedeza dziko pamenepo; koma tsopano adalonjeza
Hebrews12:27 Ndipo ichi
Hebrews12:28 Mwa ichi polandira ufumu wosagwedezeka
Hebrews12:29 Pakuti Mulungu wathu ndiye moto wonyeketsa.
Hebrews13:1 Chikondi cha pa abale chikhalebe.
Hebrews13:2 Musaiwale kuchereza alendo; pakuti mwa ichi ena anachereza angelo osachidziwa.
Hebrews13:3 Kumbukirani am'nsinga
Hebrews13:4 Ukwati uchitidwe ulemu ndi onse
Hebrews13:5 Mtima wanu ukhale wosakonda chuma; zimene muli nazo zikukwanireni; pakuti Iye anati
Hebrews13:6 Kotero kuti tinena molimbika mtima
Hebrews13:7 Kumbukirani atsogoleri anu
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Khristu ali yemweyo dzulo
Hebrews13:9 Musatengedwe ndi maphunzitso a mitundumitundu
Hebrews13:10 Tili nalo guwa la nsembe
Hebrews13:11 Pakuti matupi a nyama zija
Hebrews13:12 Mwa ichi Yesunso
Hebrews13:13 Chifukwa chake titulukire kwa Iye kunja kwa tsasa osenza tonzo lake.
Hebrews13:14 Pakuti pano tilibe mudzi wokhalitsa
Hebrews13:15 Potero mwa Iye tipereke chiperekere nsembe yakuyamika Mulungu
Hebrews13:16 Koma musaiwale kuchitira chokoma ndi kugawira ena; pakuti nsembe zotere Mulungu akondwera nazo.
Hebrews13:17 Mverani atsogoleri anu
Hebrews13:18 Mutipempherere ife; pakuti takopeka mtima kuti tili nacho chikumbu mtima chokoma m'zonse
Hebrews13:19 Ndipo ndikudandaulirani koposa kuchita ichi
Hebrews13:20 Koma Mulungu wa mtendere amene anabwera naye wotuluka mwa akufa Mbusa wamkulu wa nkhosa ndi mwazi wa chipangano chosatha
Hebrews13:21 akuyeseni inu opanda chilema m'chinthu chilichonse chabwino

Hebrews13:25 Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse
James1:1 Yakobo
James1:2 Muchiyese chimwemwe chokha
James1:3 pozindikira kuti chiyesedwe cha chikhulupiriro chanu chichita chipiriro.
James1:4 Koma chipiriro chikhale nayo ntchito yake yangwiro
James1:5 Koma wina wa inu ikamsowa nzeru
James1:6 Koma apemphe ndi chikhulupiriro
James1:7 Pakuti asayese munthu uyu kuti adzalandira kanthu kwa Ambuye;
James1:8 munthu wa mitima iwiri akhala wosinkhasinkha pa njira zake zonse.
James1:9 Koma mbale woluluka adzitamandire pa ukulu wake;
James1:10 pakuti adzapita monga duwa la udzu.
James1:11 Pakuti latuluka dzuwa ndi kutentha kwake
James1:12 Wodala munthu wakupirira poyesedwa; pakuti pamene wavomerezeka
James1:13 Munthu poyesedwa
James1:14 koma munthu aliyense ayesedwa pamene chilakolako chake cha iye mwini chimkokera
James1:15 Pamenepo chilakolakocho chitaima
James1:16 Musanyengedwe
James1:17 Mphatso iliyonse yabwino
James1:18 Mwa chifuniro chake mwini anatibala ife ndi mau a choonadi
James1:19 Mudziwa
James1:20 Pakuti mkwiyo wa munthu suchita chilungamo cha Mulungu.
James1:21 Mwa ichi
James1:22 Khalani akuchita mau
James1:23 Pakuti ngati munthu ali wakumva mau
James1:24 pakuti wadziyang'anira yekha
James1:25 Koma iye wakupenyerera m'lamulo langwiro
James1:26 Ngati wina adziyesera ali wopembedza Mulungu
James1:27 Mapembedzedwe oyera ndi osadetsa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Atate ndiwo: kucheza ndi ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye m'chisautso chao

James2:4 kodi simunasiyanitsa mwa inu nokha
James2:5 Mverani

James2:7 Kodi sachitira mwano iwowa dzina lokomali muitanidwa nalo?

James2:9 koma ngati musamala maonekedwe

James2:12 Lankhulani motero

James2:26 Pakuti monga thupi lopanda mzimu lili lakufa
James3:1 Musakhale aphunzitsi ambiri
James3:2 Pakuti timakhumudwa tonse pa zinthu zambiri. Munthu akapanda kukhumudwa pa mau
James3:3 Koma ngati tiikira akavalo zogwirira m'kamwa mwao atimvere
James3:4 Taonani
James3:5 Kotero lilimenso lili chiwalo chaching'ono
James3:6 Ndipo lilime ndilo moto; ngati dziko la chosalungama mwa ziwalo zathu laikika lilime
James3:7 Pakuti mtundu uliwonse wa nyama ndi wa mbalamenso
James3:8 koma lilime palibe munthu akhoza kulizoloweretsa; lili choipa chotakataka
James3:9 Timayamika Ambuye ndi Atate nalo; nalonso timatemberera anthu
James3:10 Mochokera m'kamwa momwemo mutuluka chiyamiko ndi temberero. Abale anga

James3:12 Kodi mkuyu ukhoza kubala azitona
James3:13 Ndani ali wanzeru

James3:15 Nzeru iyi
James3:16 Pakuti pomwe pali kaduka ndi zotetana
James3:17 Koma nzeru yochokera kumwamba iyamba kukhala yoyera
James3:18 Ndipo chipatso cha chilungamo chifesedwa mumtendere kwa iwo akuchita mtendere.

1Peter4:2 kuti nthawi yotsalira simukakhalenso ndi moyo m'thupi kutsata zilakolako za anthu

1Peter4:4 m'menemo ayesa nchachilendo kuti simuthamanga nao kufikira kusefukira komwe kwa chitayiko
1Peter4:5 amenewo adzamwerengera Iye wokhala wokonzeka kuweruza amoyo ndi akufa.

1Peter4:17 Chifukwa yafika nthawi kuti chiweruziro chiyambe pa nyumba ya Mulungu; koma ngati chiyamba ndi ife
1Peter4:18 Ndipo ngati munthu wolungama apulumuka ndi kuyesetsa kokhakokha

2Peter1:1 Simoni Petro
2Peter1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zichulukitsidwe m'chidziwitso cha Mulungu ndi Yesu Ambuye wathu.
2Peter1:3 Popeza mphamvu ya umulungu wake idatipatsa ife zonse za pamoyo ndi chipembedzo
2Peter1:4 mwa izi adatipatsa malonjezano a mtengo wake ndi akulu ndithu; kuti mwa izi mukakhale oyanjana nao umulungu wake
2Peter1:5 Ndipo mwa ichi chomwe
2Peter1:6 ndi pachodziletsa chipiriro;
2Peter1:7 ndi pachipiriro chipembedzo; ndi pachipembedzo chikondi cha pa abale; ndi pachikondi cha pa abale chikondi.
2Peter1:8 Pakuti izi zikakhala ndi inu
2Peter1:9 Pakuti iye wakusowa izi ali wakhungu
2Peter1:10 Momwemo abale
2Peter1:11 pakuti kotero kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu kolemerera khomo lakulowa ufumu wosatha wa Ambuye wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Khristu.
2Peter1:12 Mwa ichi sindidzaleka kukukumbutsani inu nthawi zonse za izi
2Peter1:13 Ndipo ndichiyesa chokoma
2Peter1:14 podziwa kuti kuleka kwa msasa wanga kuli pafupi
2Peter1:15 Koma ndidzachitanso changu kosalekeza kuti nditachoka ine
2Peter1:16 Pakuti sitinatsata miyambi yachabe
2Peter1:17 Pakuti analandira kwa Mulungu Atate ulemu ndi ulemerero
2Peter1:18 ndipo mau awa ochokera Kumwamba tidawamva ife
2Peter1:19 Ndipo tili nao mau a chinenero okhazikika koposa; amene muchita bwino powasamalira
2Peter1:20 ndi kudziwa ichi poyamba
2Peter1:21 pakuti kale lonse chinenero sichinadza ndi chifuniro cha munthu; koma anthu a Mulungu
2Peter2:1 Koma padakhalanso pakati pa anthuwo aneneri onama
2Peter2:2 Ndipo ambiri adzatsata zonyansa zao; chifukwa cha iwo njira ya choonadi idzanenedwa zamwano.
2Peter2:3 Ndipo m'chisiriro adzakuyesani malonda ndi mau onyenga; amene chiweruzo chao sichinachedwa ndi kale lomwe
2Peter2:4 Pakuti ngati Mulungu sanalekerera angelo adachimwawo
2Peter2:5 ndipo sanalekerera dziko lapansi lakale
2Peter2:6 ndipo pakuisandutsa makala midzi ya Sodomu ndi Gomora anaitsutsa poigwetsa
2Peter2:7 ndipo anapulumutsa Loti wolungamayo
2Peter2:8 (pakuti wolungamayo pokhala pakati pao. Ndi kuona ndi kumva zao
2Peter2:9 Ambuye adziwa kupulumutsa opembedza poyesedwa iwo
2Peter2:10 koma makamaka iwo akutsata za thupi
2Peter2:11 popeza angelo
2Peter2:12 Koma awo
2Peter2:13 ochitidwa zoipa kulipira kwa chosalungama; anthu akuyesera chowakondweretsa kudyerera usana; ndiwo mawanga ndi zilema
2Peter2:14 okhala nao maso odzala ndi chigololo
2Peter2:15 posiya njira yolunjika
2Peter2:16 koma anadzudzulidwa pa kulakwa kwake mwini; bulu wopanda mau
2Peter2:17 Iwo ndiwo akasupe opanda madzi
2Peter2:18 Pakuti polankhula mau otukumuka opanda pake
2Peter2:19 ndi kuwalonjezera iwo ufulu

Revelation21:19 Maziko a linga la mzinda anakometsedwa ndi miyala ya mtengo
Revelation21:20 achisanu
Revelation21:21 Ndipo zitseko khumi ndi ziwiri ndizo ngale khumi ndi ziwiri; chitseko chilichonse pa chokha cha ngale imodzi. Ndipo khwalala la mzinda nla golide woyengeka
Revelation21:22 Ndipo sindinaona Kachisi momwemo; pakuti Ambuye Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse
Revelation21:23 Ndipo pamzinda sipafunika dzuwa
Revelation21:24 Ndipo amitundu adzayendayenda mwa kuunika kwake; ndi mafumu a dziko atenga ulemerero wao kulowa nao momwemo.
Revelation21:25 Ndipo pazipata zake sipatsekedwa konse usana
Revelation21:26 ndipo adzatenga ulemerero ndi ulemu wa amitundu nadzalowa nao momwemo;
Revelation21:27 ndipo simudzalowa konse momwemo kanthu kalikonse kosapatulidwa kapena iye wakuchita chonyansa ndi bodza; koma iwo okha olembedwa m'buku la moyo la Mwanawankhosa.
Revelation22:1 Ndipo anandionetsa mtsinje wa madzi a moyo
Revelation22:2 Pakati pa khwalala lake
Revelation22:3 Ndipo sipadzakhalanso temberero lililonse; ndipo mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu ndi wa Mwanawankhosa udzakhala momwemo; ndipo akapolo ake adzamtumikira Iye
Revelation22:4 nadzaona nkhope yake; ndipo dzina lake lidzakhala pamphumi pao.
Revelation22:5 Ndipo sikudzakhalanso usiku; ndipo sasowa kuunika kwa nyali
Revelation22:6 Ndipo anati kwa ine
Revelation22:7 Ndipo taonani
Revelation22:8 Ndipo ine Yohane ndine wakumva ndi wakupenya izi. Ndipo pamene ndinamva ndi kupenya
Revelation22:9 Ndipo ananena kwa ine
Revelation22:10 Ndipo ananena ndi ine
Revelation22:11 Iye wakukhala wosalungama achitebe zosalungama; ndi munthu wonyansa akhalebe wonyansa; ndi iye wakukhala wolungama achitebe cholungama; ndi iye amene ali woyera akhalebe woyeretsedwa.
Revelation22:12 Taonani
Revelation22:13 Ine ndine Alefa ndi Omega
Revelation22:14 Odala iwo amene atsuka miinjiro yao
Revelation22:15 Kunja kuli agalu ndi anyanga
Revelation22:16 Ine Yesu ndatuma mngelo wanga kukuchitirani umboni za izi m'Mipingo. Ine ndine muzu ndi mbadwa ya Davide
Revelation22:17 Ndipo Mzimu ndi mkwatibwi anena
Revelation22:18 Ndichita umboni kwa munthu aliyense wakumva mau a chinenero cha buku ili
Revelation22:19 ndipo aliyense akachotsako pa mau a buku la chinenero ichi
Revelation22:20 Iye wakuchitira umboni izi
